pluginManagement {
    val flutterSdkPath =
        run {
            val properties = java.util.Properties()
            file("local.properties").inputStream().use { properties.load(it) }
            val flutterSdkPath = properties.getProperty("flutter.sdk")
            require(flutterSdkPath != null) { "flutter.sdk not set in local.properties" }
            flutterSdkPath
        }

    includeBuild("$flutterSdkPath/packages/flutter_tools/gradle")

    repositories {
        google()
        mavenCentral()
        gradlePluginPortal()
    }
}

    id("dev.flutter.flutter-plugin-loader") version "1.0.0"
    id("com.android.application") version "8.11.1" apply false

}

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: 
    3: import '../screens/dashboard_screen.dart';
    4: import '../screens/beds_screen.dart';
    5: import '../screens/inventory_screen.dart';
    6: import '../screens/seedlings_screen.dart';
    7: import '../screens/reports_screen.dart';
    8: import '../screens/project_list_screen.dart';
    9: import '../widgets/app_shell.dart';
   10: 
   11: class AppRoutes {
   12:   static const dashboard = '/';
   13:   static const beds = '/beds';
   14:   static const inventory = '/inventory';
   15:   static const seedlings = '/seedlings';
   16:   static const reports = '/reports';
   17:   static const projects = '/projects';
   18: 
   19:   static Map<String, WidgetBuilder> routes = {
   20:     dashboard: (_) =>
   21:         const AppShell(currentRoute: dashboard, child: DashboardScreen()),
   22: 
   23:     beds: (_) => const AppShell(currentRoute: beds, child: BedsScreen()),
   24:

   81:   }

   83:   static List<String> _readStringList(Object? value) {
   84:     if (value is! List) return const [];
   85: 
   86:     return value
   87:         .map((item) => item.toString().trim())
   88:         .where((item) => item.isNotEmpty)
   89:         .toList();
   90:   }
   91: 
   92:   static DateTime _readDate(Object? value) {
   93:     if (value is DateTime) return value;
   94: 
   95:     final raw = value?.toString();
   96:     if (raw == null || raw.trim().isEmpty) {
   97:       return DateTime.now();
   98:     }
   99: 
  100:     return DateTime.tryParse(raw) ?? DateTime.now();
  101:   }
  102: 
  103:   static BedIssueStatus _readStatus(Object? value) {
  104:     final raw = value?.toString();
  105: 
  106:     for (final status in BedIssueStatus.values) {
  107:       if (status.name == raw) {
  108:         return status;
  109:       }
  110:     }
  111: 
  112:     return BedIssueStatus.active;
  113:   }

  187:   Map<String, dynamic> toJson() {

  189:       'id': id,
  190:       'x': x,
  191:       'y': y,
  192:       'width': width,

  202:           .toList(),
  203:       'cropBlocks': cropBlocks.map((block) => block.toJson()).toList(),
  204:       'issues': issues.map((issue) => issue.toJson()).toList(),
  205:     };
  206:   }

  208:   factory Bed.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
  209:     return Bed(
  210:       id: json['id']?.toString() ?? '',
  211:       x: _readDouble(json['x']),
  212:       y: _readDouble(json['y']),
  213:       width: _readDouble(json['width']),
  214:       height: _readDouble(json['height']),
  215:       number: _readInt(json['number']),
  216:       name: json['name']?.toString() ?? 'Untitled Bed',
  217:       zone: json['zone']?.toString() ?? 'Main Garden',
  218:       status: _readStatus(json['status']),
  219:       healthPercent: _readDouble(json['healthPercent'], fallback: 1.0),
  220:       crops: _readStringList(json['crops']),
  221:       cropPlacements: _readCropPlacements(json['cropPlacements']),
  222:       cropBlocks: _readCropBlocks(json['cropBlocks']),
  223:       issues: _readBedIssues(json['issues']),
  224:     );
  225:   }
  226: 
  227:   static BedStatus _readStatus(Object? value) {
  228:     final raw = value?.toString();
  229: 
  230:     for (final status in BedStatus.values) {
  231:       if (status.name == raw) {
  232:         return status;
  233:       }
  234:     }
  235: 
  236:     return BedStatus.ok;
  237:   }
  238: 
  239:   static List<String> _readStringList(Object? value) {
  240:     if (value is! List) return const [];
  241: 
  242:     return value
  243:         .map((item) => item.toString().trim())
  244:         .where((item) => item.isNotEmpty)
  245:         .toList();
  246:   }
  247: 
  248:   static List<CropPlacement> _readCropPlacements(Object? value) {
  249:     if (value is! List) return const [];
  250: 
  251:     return value
  252:         .whereType<Map>()
  253:         .map((item) => CropPlacement.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item)))
  254:         .where((placement) => placement.id.trim().isNotEmpty)
  255:         .toList();
  256:   }
  257: 
  258:   static List<CropBlock> _readCropBlocks(Object? value) {
  259:     if (value is! List) return const [];
  260: 
  261:     return value
  262:         .whereType<Map>()
  263:         .map((item) => CropBlock.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item)))
  264:         .where((block) => block.id.trim().isNotEmpty)
  265:         .toList();
  266:   }
  267: 
  268:   static List<BedIssue> _readBedIssues(Object? value) {
  269:     if (value is! List) return const [];
  270: 
  271:     return value
  272:         .whereType<Map>()
  273:         .map((item) => BedIssue.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item)))
  274:         .where((issue) => issue.id.trim().isNotEmpty)
  275:         .toList();
  276:   }
  277: 
  278:   static double _readDouble(Object? value, {double fallback = 0}) {
  279:     if (value is num) return value.toDouble();
  280:     if (value is String) return double.tryParse(value) ?? fallback;
  281:     return fallback;
  282:   }
  283: 
  284:   static int _readInt(Object? value, {int fallback = 0}) {
  285:     if (value is int) return value;
  286:     if (value is num) return value.toInt();
  287:     if (value is String) return int.tryParse(value) ?? fallback;
  288:     return fallback;
  289:   }
  290: }

    1: class CropSpacing {
    2:   const CropSpacing._();
    3: 
    4:   static double spacingMetersForCrop(String cropName) {
    5:     final crop = cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
    6: 
    7:     // Fruit trees / large permanent plants.
    8:     if (crop.contains('apricot') && crop.contains('dwarf')) return 3.5;
    9:     if (crop.contains('apple') && crop.contains('dwarf')) return 3.0;
   10:     if (crop.contains('almond') && crop.contains('dwarf')) return 4.0;
   11: 
   12:     if (crop.contains('apricot')) return 6.0;
   13:     if (crop.contains('apple')) return 6.0;
   14:     if (crop.contains('almond')) return 6.0;
   15:     if (crop.contains('pear')) return 6.0;
   16:     if (crop.contains('plum')) return 5.0;
   17:     if (crop.contains('peach')) return 5.0;
   18:     if (crop.contains('citrus')) return 4.0;
   19: 
   20:     // Cane fruit / berries / permanent crops.
   21:     if (crop.contains('raspberry')) return 0.70;
   22:     if (crop.contains('blackberry')) return 1.20;
   23:     if (crop.contains('blueberry')) return 1.20;
   24:     if (crop.contains('strawberry')) return 0.35;
   25:     if (crop.contains('asparagus')) return 0.45;
   26:     if (crop.contains('artichoke')) return 1.00;
   27: 
   28:     // Larger vegetables.
   29:     if (crop.contains('pumpkin')) return 1.50;
   30:     if (crop.contains('watermelon')) return 1.20;
   31:     if (crop.contains('zucchini')) return 0.90;
   32:     if (crop.contains('cucumber')) return 0.45;
   33:     if (crop.contains('tomato')) return 0.60;
   34:     if (crop.contains('eggplant')) return 0.60;
   35:     if (crop.contains('capsicum')) return 0.45;
   36:     if (crop.contains('pepper')) return 0.45;
   37:     if (crop.contains('chilli')) return 0.40;
   38:     if (crop.contains('sweet corn')) return 0.30;
   39:     if (crop.contains('corn')) return 0.30;
   40: 
   41:     // Brassicas.
   42:     if (crop.contains('broccoli')) return 0.60;
   43:     if (crop.contains('cauliflower')) return 0.60;
   44:     if (crop.contains('cabbage')) return 0.50;
   45:     if (crop.contains('kale')) return 0.45;
   46:     if (crop.contains('brussels')) return 0.70;
   47: 
   48:     // Roots / alliums.
   49:     if (crop.contains('potato')) return 0.35;
   50:     if (crop.contains('carrot')) return 0.08;
   51:     if (crop.contains('radish')) return 0.05;
   52:     if (crop.contains('beetroot')) return 0.10;
   53:     if (crop.contains('beet')) return 0.10;
   54:     if (crop.contains('onion')) return 0.10;
   55:     if (crop.contains('garlic')) return 0.12;
   56:     if (crop.contains('leek')) return 0.15;
   57: 
   58:     // Leafy crops.
   59:     if (crop.contains('lettuce')) return 0.25;
   60:     if (crop.contains('spinach')) return 0.15;
   61:     if (crop.contains('silverbeet')) return 0.30;
   62:     if (crop.contains('chard')) return 0.30;
   63: 
   64:     // Legumes.
   65:     if (crop.contains('bean')) return 0.20;
   66:     if (crop.contains('pea')) return 0.08;
   67: 
   68:     // Herbs.
   69:     if (crop.contains('basil')) return 0.25;
   70:     if (crop.contains('parsley')) return 0.20;
   71:     if (crop.contains('cilantro')) return 0.15;
   72:     if (crop.contains('coriander')) return 0.15;
   73:     if (crop.contains('thyme')) return 0.25;
   74:     if (crop.contains('mint')) return 0.30;
   75:     if (crop.contains('rosemary')) return 0.60;
   76:     if (crop.contains('sage')) return 0.45;
   77: 
   78:     // Ornamentals / flowers currently in picker.
   79:     if (crop.contains('agastache')) return 0.45;
   80:     if (crop.contains('ageratum')) return 0.25;
   81:     if (crop.contains('allium')) return 0.20;
   82:     if (crop.contains('alyssum')) return 0.20;
   83:     if (crop.contains('amaranth')) return 0.35;
   84: 
   85:     return 0.30;
   86:   }
   87: 
   88:   static bool isLargeCanopyCrop(String cropName) {
   89:     final crop = cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
   90: 
   91:     return crop.contains('tree') ||
   92:         crop.contains('almond') ||
   93:         crop.contains('apple') ||
   94:         crop.contains('apricot') ||
   95:         crop.contains('pear') ||
   96:         crop.contains('plum') ||
   97:         crop.contains('peach') ||
   98:         crop.contains('citrus') ||
   99:         crop.contains('blueberry') ||
  100:         crop.contains('artichoke');
  101:   }
  102: 
  103:   static String spacingLabelForCrop(String cropName) {
  104:     final spacing = spacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
  105: 
  106:     if (spacing >= 1) {
  107:       return '${spacing.toStringAsFixed(spacing >= 3 ? 0 : 1)}m spacing';
  108:     }
  109: 
  110:     final centimeters = (spacing * 100).round();
  111:     return '${centimeters}cm spacing';
  112:   }
  113: 
  114:   static int estimatedPlantCount({
  115:     required String cropName,
  116:     required double widthMeters,
  117:     required double heightMeters,
  118:   }) {
  119:     final spacing = spacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
  120: 
  121:     if (widthMeters <= 0 || heightMeters <= 0 || spacing <= 0) {
  122:       return 0;
  123:     }
  124: 
  125:     final longerSide = widthMeters >= heightMeters ? widthMeters : heightMeters;
  126:     final shorterSide = widthMeters >= heightMeters
  127:         ? heightMeters
  128:         : widthMeters;
  129: 
  130:     // Large plants are placed by canopy spacing, not by dense row multiplication.
  131:     if (isLargeCanopyCrop(cropName)) {
  132:       return (longerSide / spacing).floor().clamp(1, 999);
  133:     }
  134: 
  135:     // A narrow dragged crop block should behave like a single row.
  136:     if (shorterSide < spacing * 1.6) {
  137:       return (longerSide / spacing).floor().clamp(1, 999);
  138:     }
  139: 
  140:     final columns = (widthMeters / spacing).floor();
  141:     final rows = (heightMeters / spacing).floor();
  142: 
  143:     return (columns * rows).clamp(1, 999);
  144:   }
  145: 
  146:   double realisticSpacingMetersForCrop(String cropName) {
  147:     final name = cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
  148: 
  149:     // Fruiting crops
  150:     if (name.contains('chilli') || name.contains('chili')) return 0.45;
  151:     if (name.contains('pepper') || name.contains('capsicum')) return 0.45;
  152:     if (name.contains('tomato')) return 0.60;
  153:     if (name.contains('eggplant') || name.contains('aubergine')) return 0.60;
  154:     if (name.contains('cucumber')) return 0.45;
  155:     if (name.contains('courgette') || name.contains('zucchini')) return 0.75;
  156:     if (name.contains('pumpkin') || name.contains('squash')) return 1.20;
  157:     if (name.contains('melon') || name.contains('watermelon')) return 1.00;
  158: 
  159:     // Berries and perennial fruit
  160:     if (name.contains('strawberry')) return 0.30;
  161:     if (name.contains('raspberry')) return 0.45;
  162:     if (name.contains('blueberry')) return 1.00;
  163:     if (name.contains('berry')) return 0.45;
  164: 
  165:     // Leaf crops
  166:     if (name.contains('lettuce')) return 0.25;
  167:     if (name.contains('spinach')) return 0.15;
  168:     if (name.contains('silverbeet') || name.contains('chard')) return 0.30;
  169:     if (name.contains('kale')) return 0.45;
  170:     if (name.contains('chicory')) return 0.30;
  171:     if (name.contains('rocket') || name.contains('arugula')) return 0.10;
  172:     if (name.contains('mustard')) return 0.20;
  173: 
  174:     // Brassicas
  175:     if (name.contains('broccoli')) return 0.45;
  176:     if (name.contains('cauliflower')) return 0.55;
  177:     if (name.contains('cabbage')) return 0.45;
  178:     if (name.contains('brussels')) return 0.60;
  179:     if (name.contains('brassica')) return 0.45;
  180: 
  181:     // Roots and tubers
  182:     if (name.contains('carrot')) return 0.05;
  183:     if (name.contains('radish')) return 0.05;
  184:     if (name.contains('beetroot') || name.contains('beet')) return 0.10;
  185:     if (name.contains('turnip')) return 0.10;
  186:     if (name.contains('parsnip')) return 0.10;
  187:     if (name.contains('swede') || name.contains('rutabaga')) return 0.25;
  188:     if (name.contains('potato')) return 0.30;
  189:     if (name.contains('kumara') || name.contains('sweet potato')) return 0.40;
  190:     if (name.contains('yacon')) return 0.75;
  191: 
  192:     // Alliums
  193:     if (name.contains('garlic')) return 0.15;
  194:     if (name.contains('onion')) return 0.10;
  195:     if (name.contains('shallot')) return 0.15;
  196:     if (name.contains('leek')) return 0.15;
  197:     if (name.contains('spring onion') || name.contains('scallion')) return 0.05;
  198:     if (name.contains('allium')) return 0.15;
  199: 
  200:     // Legumes
  201:     if (name.contains('pea')) return 0.08;
  202:     if (name.contains('bean')) return 0.15;
  203:     if (name.contains('broad bean')) return 0.20;
  204:     if (name.contains('legume')) return 0.15;
  205: 
  206:     // Herbs
  207:     if (name.contains('basil')) return 0.25;
  208:     if (name.contains('parsley')) return 0.20;
  209:     if (name.contains('coriander') || name.contains('cilantro')) return 0.15;
  210:     if (name.contains('mint')) return 0.30;
  211:     if (name.contains('thyme')) return 0.25;
  212:     if (name.contains('oregano')) return 0.25;
  213:     if (name.contains('sage')) return 0.45;
  214:     if (name.contains('rosemary')) return 0.60;
  215:     if (name.contains('agastache')) return 0.30;
  216: 
  217:     // Fallback to existing spacing table.
  218:     return CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
  219:   }
  220: 
  221:   String realisticSpacingLabelForCrop(String cropName) {
  222:     final spacing = realisticSpacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
  223: 
  224:     if (spacing < 1.0) {
  225:       return '${(spacing * 100).round()}cm spacing';
  226:     }
  227: 
  228:     return '${spacing.toStringAsFixed(1)}m spacing';
  229:   }
  230: }

   88:   GardenProject copyWith({
   89:     String? id,
   90:     String? name,
   91:     double? widthMeters,
   92:     double? heightMeters,
   93:     String? locationName,
   94:     double? latitude,
   95:     double? longitude,
   96:     List<Bed>? beds,
   97:     List<Seedling>? seedlings,
   98:     DateTime? updatedAt,
   99:   }) {
  100:     return GardenProject(
  101:       id: id ?? this.id,
  102:       name: name ?? this.name,
  103:       widthMeters: widthMeters ?? this.widthMeters,
  104:       heightMeters: heightMeters ?? this.heightMeters,
  105:       locationName: locationName ?? this.locationName,
  106:       latitude: latitude ?? this.latitude,
  107:       longitude: longitude ?? this.longitude,
  108:       beds: beds ?? this.beds,
  109:       seedlings: seedlings ?? this.seedlings,
  110:       updatedAt: updatedAt ?? this.updatedAt,
  111:     );
  112:   }
  113: 
  114:   Map<String, dynamic> toJson() {
  115:     return {
  116:       'id': id,
  117:       'name': name,
  118:       'widthMeters': widthMeters,
  119:       'heightMeters': heightMeters,
  120:       'locationName': locationName,
  121:       'latitude': latitude,
  122:       'longitude': longitude,
  123:       'beds': beds.map((bed) => bed.toJson()).toList(),
  124:       'seedlings': seedlings.map((seedling) => seedling.toJson()).toList(),
  125:       'updatedAt': updatedAt.toIso8601String(),
  126:     };
  127:   }
  128: 
  129:   factory GardenProject.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
  130:     return GardenProject(
  131:       id: json['id'] as String? ?? 'project',
  132:       name: json['name'] as String? ?? 'Untitled Garden Plan',
  133:       widthMeters: _toDouble(json['widthMeters'], fallback: 30),
  134:       heightMeters: _toDouble(json['heightMeters'], fallback: 18),
  135:       locationName: _stringFromJson(
  136:         json['locationName'],
  137:         fallback: defaultLocationName,
  138:       ),
  139:       latitude: _toDouble(json['latitude'], fallback: defaultLatitude),
  140:       longitude: _toDouble(json['longitude'], fallback: defaultLongitude),
  141:       beds: _bedsFromJson(json['beds']),
  142:       seedlings: _seedlingsFromJson(json['seedlings']),
  143:       updatedAt: _dateTimeFromJson(json['updatedAt']),
  144:     );
  145:   }
  146: 
  147:   static List<Bed> _bedsFromJson(dynamic value) {
  148:     if (value is List) {
  149:       return value
  150:           .whereType<Map>()
  151:           .map((item) => Bed.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item)))
  152:           .toList();
  153:     }
  154: 
  155:     return const [];
  156:   }
  157: 
  158:   static List<Seedling> _seedlingsFromJson(dynamic value) {
  159:     if (value is List) {
  160:       return value
  161:           .whereType<Map>()
  162:           .map((item) => Seedling.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item)))
  163:           .toList();
  164:     }
  165: 
  166:     return const [];
  167:   }
  168: 
  169:   static DateTime _dateTimeFromJson(dynamic value) {
  170:     if (value is String) {
  171:       return DateTime.tryParse(value) ?? DateTime.now();
  172:     }
  173: 
  174:     return DateTime.now();
  175:   }
  176: 
  177:   static String _stringFromJson(dynamic value, {required String fallback}) {
  178:     if (value is String && value.trim().isNotEmpty) {
  179:       return value.trim();
  180:     }
  181: 
  182:     return fallback;
  183:   }
  184: 
  185:   static double _toDouble(dynamic value, {double fallback = 0.0}) {
  186:     if (value is double) return value;
  187:     if (value is int) return value.toDouble();
  188:     if (value is String) return double.tryParse(value) ?? fallback;
  189: 
  190:     return fallback;
  191:   }
  192: }

    1: class PlantProfileData {
    2:   const PlantProfileData({
    3:     required this.recommendedLayout,
    4:     required this.sowDepth,
    5:     required this.sun,
    6:     required this.water,
    7:     required this.soil,
    8:     required this.rotationFamily,
    9:     required this.succession,
   10:     required this.frost,
   11:     required this.container,
   12:     required this.support,
   13:     required this.plannerUse,
   14:     required this.warnings,
   15:   });
   16: 
   17:   final String recommendedLayout;
   18:   final String sowDepth;
   19:   final String sun;
   20:   final String water;
   21:   final String soil;
   22:   final String rotationFamily;
   23:   final String succession;
   24:   final String frost;
   25:   final String container;
   26:   final String support;
   27:   final String plannerUse;
   28:   final List<String> warnings;
   29: 
   30:   static PlantProfileData forCrop(String cropName, {String family = ''}) {
   31:     final value = _normalize('$cropName $family');
   32: 
   33:     for (final rule in _rules) {
   34:       if (rule.matches(value)) return rule.data;
   35:     }
   36: 
   37:     return const PlantProfileData(
   38:       recommendedLayout: 'General bed block',
   39:       sowDepth: 'Check seed packet',
   40:       sun: 'Full sun to part sun',
   41:       water: 'Moderate, consistent moisture',
   42:       soil: 'Fertile, free-draining garden soil',
   43:       rotationFamily: 'General',
   44:       succession: 'Use crop-specific timing',
   45:       frost: 'Check local frost and temperature conditions',
   46:       container: 'Possible if spacing and root depth are suitable',
   47:       support: 'None unless crop habit requires it',
   48:       plannerUse: 'Use normal spacing and season filters before planting.',
   49:       warnings: [
   50:         'No detailed profile rule exists for this plant yet.',
   51:         'Use packet-specific spacing and local climate information.',
   52:       ],
   53:     );
   54:   }
   55: 
   56:   static String _normalize(String value) {
   57:     return value
   58:         .trim()
   59:         .toLowerCase()
   60:         .replaceAll('&', 'and')
   61:         .replaceAll('-', ' ')
   62:         .replaceAll('_', ' ')
   63:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'[^a-z0-9\s]+'), ' ')
   64:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'\s+'), ' ')
   65:         .trim();
   66:   }
   67:

  426:         ],
  427:       ),
  428:     ),
  429:   ];
  430: }
  431: 
  432: class _PlantProfileRule {
  433:   const _PlantProfileRule({required this.keys, required this.data});
  434: 
  435:   final List<String> keys;
  436:   final PlantProfileData data;
  437: 
  438:   bool matches(String normalizedCropName) {
  439:     for (final key in keys) {
  440:       final normalizedKey = PlantProfileData._normalize(key);
  441: 
  442:       if (normalizedCropName.contains(normalizedKey)) return true;
  443:     }
  444: 
  445:     return false;
  446:   }
  447: }

    1: import 'crop_spacing.dart';
    2: import 'seed_catalog.dart';
    3: import '../plant_icons/generated_plant_svgs.dart';

    5: class PlantVarietyCatalog {
    6:   const PlantVarietyCatalog._();
    7: 
    8:   static List<PlantTypeGroup> groupsForCrop(String cropName) {
    9:     final name = _normalize(cropName);
   10: 
   11:     final curated = _curatedGroups
   12:         .where((group) => group.matches(name))
   13:         .toList();
   14: 
   15:     if (curated.isNotEmpty) {
   16:       return curated;
   17:     }
   18: 
   19:     final dynamic = _dynamicGroupForCrop(cropName);
   20:     if (dynamic == null) return const <PlantTypeGroup>[];
   21: 
   22:     return [dynamic];
   23:   }
   24: 
   25:   static PlantTypeGroup? bestGroupForCrop(String cropName) {
   26:     final groups = groupsForCrop(cropName);
   27:     if (groups.isEmpty) return null;
   28: 
   29:     return groups.first;
   30:   }
   31: 
   32:   static List<PlantVariety> varietiesForCrop(String cropName) {
   33:     final groups = groupsForCrop(cropName);
   34: 
   35:     return [for (final group in groups) ...group.varieties];
   36:   }
   37: 
   38:   static String varietySummaryForCrop(String cropName) {
   39:     final group = bestGroupForCrop(cropName);
   40:     if (group == null) return 'No subtype notes yet.';
   41: 
   42:     return '${group.title}: ${group.varieties.length} subtype${group.varieties.length == 1 ? '' : 's'} Â· ${group.summary}';
   43:   }
   44: 
   45:   static PlantTypeGroup? _dynamicGroupForCrop(String cropName) {
   46:     final normalized = _normalize(cropName);
   47:     final base = _baseFor(normalized);
   48: 
   49:     if (base.isEmpty) return null;
   50: 
   51:     final matchingKeys = generatedPlantSvgs.keys.where((key) {
   52:       return _baseFor(_normalize(key)) == base;
   53:     }).toList()..sort();
   54: 
   55:     final keys = matchingKeys.isEmpty ? [cropName] : matchingKeys;
   56:     final displayBase = _displayName(base);
   57: 
   58:     final varieties = keys.map((key) => _varietyFromIconKey(key, base)).toList()
   59:       ..sort((a, b) => a.name.compareTo(b.name));
   60: 
   61:     return PlantTypeGroup(
   62:       keys: keys,
   63:       title: '$displayBase subtypes',
   64:       summary: varieties.length == 1
   65:           ? 'One subtype is currently listed for $displayBase. Add more icon keys or curated entries to expand this group.'
   66:           : 'Related $displayBase entries from the SVG plant library. Use spacing and maturity notes to choose the correct subtype.',
   67:       defaultSpacingCm: _averageSpacingCm(varieties),
   68:       notes: [
   69:         'Subtype names come from the SVG icon library and curated crop rules.',
   70:         'Spacing is estimated from the app-wide CropSpacing table.',
   71:         'Click the card for full sowing, harvest, spacing, and subtype details.',
   72:       ],
   73:       varieties: varieties,
   74:     );
   75:   }
   76: 
   77:   static PlantVariety _varietyFromIconKey(String key, String base) {
   78:     final displayName = _displayNameForKey(key);
   79:     final spacingCm = (CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(displayName) * 100)
   80:         .round();
   81:     final catalog = _catalogFor(displayName);
   82: 
   83:     return PlantVariety(
   84:       name: displayName,
   85:       alsoKnownAs: _aliasesFor(displayName, base),
   86:       spacingCm: spacingCm,
   87:       daysToMaturity: _maturityFor(displayName, catalog),
   88:       bestUse: _bestUseFor(displayName, base),
   89:       sowingNote: _sowingNoteFor(displayName, base),
   90:       harvestNote: _harvestNoteFor(displayName, base),
   91:       difficulty: _difficultyFor(displayName, base),
   92:     );
   93:   }
   94: 
   95:   static SeedCatalogItem? _catalogFor(String cropName) {
   96:     final normalized = _normalize(cropName);
   97: 
   98:     for (final item in SeedCatalog.items) {
   99:       final key = _normalize(item.key);
  100:       final name = _normalize(item.cropName);
  101: 
  102:       if (key == normalized ||
  103:           name == normalized ||
  104:           normalized.contains(key) ||
  105:           key.contains(normalized) ||
  106:           normalized.contains(name) ||
  107:           name.contains(normalized)) {
  108:         return item;
  109:       }
  110:     }
  111: 
  112:     return null;
  113:   }
  114: 
  115:   static String _maturityFor(String displayName, SeedCatalogItem? catalog) {
  116:     if (catalog == null) {
  117:       return _fallbackMaturity(displayName);
  118:     }
  119: 
  120:     final directDays =
  121:         catalog.germinationMaxDays + catalog.harvestDaysFromTransplant;
  122:     final trayDays =
  123:         catalog.germinationMaxDays +
  124:         catalog.transplantMaxDays +
  125:         catalog.harvestDaysFromTransplant;
  126: 
  127:     if (catalog.transplantMaxDays <= 0) {
  128:       return 'About $directDays days from sowing';
  129:     }
  130: 
  131:     return 'About $directDays-$trayDays days';
  132:   }
  133: 
  134:   static String _fallbackMaturity(String displayName) {
  135:     final name = _normalize(displayName);
  136: 
  137:     if (name.contains('tree') ||
  138:         name.contains('apple') ||
  139:         name.contains('pear') ||
  140:         name.contains('peach') ||
  141:         name.contains('plum') ||
  142:         name.contains('citrus') ||
  143:         name.contains('fig')) {
  144:       return 'Multi-year crop';
  145:     }
  146: 
  147:     if (name.contains('radish') || name.contains('rocket')) return '30-45 days';
  148:     if (name.contains('lettuce') || name.contains('spinach'))
  149:       return '30-70 days';
  150:     if (name.contains('broccoli') || name.contains('cabbage'))
  151:       return '60-120 days';
  152:     if (name.contains('tomato') ||
  153:         name.contains('pepper') ||
  154:         name.contains('chilli')) {
  155:       return '70-120 days';
  156:     }
  157: 
  158:     return 'Varies by subtype';
  159:   }
  160: 
  161:   static String _bestUseFor(String displayName, String base) {
  162:     final name = _normalize(displayName);
  163: 
  164:     if (base == 'broccoli') {
  165:       if (name.contains('chinese'))
  166:         return 'Stems, leaves, and tender flower buds.';
  167:       if (name.contains('broccolini')) return 'Tender stems and small florets.';
  168:       if (name.contains('romanesco'))
  169:         return 'Large spiral head, similar to cauliflower.';
  170:       if (name.contains('sprouting')) return 'Repeated side-shoot harvests.';
  171:       return 'Main head plus smaller side shoots.';
  172:     }
  173: 
  174:     if (base == 'lettuce') {
  175:       if (name.contains('red') || name.contains('leaf')) {
  176:         return 'Cut-and-come-again leaves or loose heads.';
  177:       }
  178: 
  179:       if (name.contains('romaine') || name.contains('cos')) {
  180:         return 'Upright heads and crunchy leaves.';
  181:       }
  182: 
  183:       return 'Salad leaves or heads depending on subtype.';
  184:     }
  185: 
  186:     if (base == 'tree' || name.contains('tree')) {
  187:       return 'Permanent long-term planting.';
  188:     }
  189: 
  190:     if (base == 'tomato')
  191:       return 'Fresh eating, sauces, preserving, or long harvest.';
  192:     if (base == 'pepper')
  193:       return 'Sweet peppers or chillies depending on subtype.';
  194:     if (base == 'bean' || base == 'pea') return 'Rows or trellis harvest.';
  195:     if (base == 'herb')
  196:       return 'Culinary herb, companion planting, or pollinator support.';
  197: 
  198:     return 'Use according to the subtype, spacing, and season window.';
  199:   }
  200: 
  201:   static String _sowingNoteFor(String displayName, String base) {
  202:     final name = _normalize(displayName);
  203: 
  204:     if (name.contains('tree') ||
  205:         name.contains('apple') ||
  206:         name.contains('pear') ||
  207:         name.contains('peach') ||
  208:         name.contains('plum') ||
  209:         name.contains('citrus')) {
  210:       return 'Plant as nursery stock or established tree, not as a normal vegetable sowing.';
  211:     }
  212: 
  213:     if (base == 'broccoli') {
  214:       return 'Use the specific subtype for spacing and season timing; long-season types need more planning.';
  215:     }
  216: 
  217:     if (base == 'lettuce') {
  218:       return 'Leaf types can be tighter; heading types need more space and steady moisture.';
  219:     }
  220: 
  221:     if (base == 'tomato' || base == 'pepper') {
  222:       return 'Warm-season crop. Check that there is enough time to mature before season close.';
  223:     }
  224: 
  225:     return 'Check the month filter and harvest-safe status before planting.';
  226:   }
  227: 
  228:   static String _harvestNoteFor(String displayName, String base) {
  229:     final name = _normalize(displayName);
  230: 
  231:     if (base == 'broccoli') {
  232:       if (name.contains('sprouting'))
  233:         return 'Pick shoots repeatedly while tight and tender.';
  234:       if (name.contains('chinese'))
  235:         return 'Harvest stems when buds form but before flowers open.';
  236:       return 'Harvest before buds loosen or flowers open.';
  237:     }
  238: 
  239:     if (base == 'lettuce') {
  240:       return 'Pick outer leaves or harvest whole heads before bolting.';
  241:     }
  242: 
  243:     if (base == 'tomato' || base == 'pepper') {
  244:       return 'Harvest when fruit reaches the preferred colour and size.';
  245:     }
  246: 
  247:     if (name.contains('tree')) {
  248:       return 'Harvest timing depends on species, cultivar, and tree maturity.';
  249:     }
  250: 
  251:     return 'Harvest timing depends on subtype and local growing conditions.';
  252:   }
  253: 
  254:   static String _difficultyFor(String displayName, String base) {
  255:     final name = _normalize(displayName);
  256: 
  257:     if (name.contains('romanesco') || name.contains('cauliflower'))
  258:       return 'Moderate';
  259:     if (name.contains('tree') || name.contains('fruit tree'))
  260:       return 'Long-term';
  261:     if (base == 'lettuce' || name.contains('radish')) return 'Easy';
  262:     if (base == 'tomato' || base == 'pepper' || base == 'broccoli')
  263:       return 'Moderate';
  264: 
  265:     return 'Varies';
  266:   }
  267: 
  268:   static List<String> _aliasesFor(String displayName, String base) {
  269:     final name = _normalize(displayName);
  270: 
  271:     if (name.contains('chinese broccoli')) return ['Gai lan', 'Kai lan'];
  272:     if (name.contains('broccolini'))
  273:       return ['Tenderstem broccoli', 'Baby broccoli'];
  274:     if (name.contains('romanesco'))
  275:       return ['Romanesco broccoli', 'Romanesco cauliflower'];
  276:     if (name.contains('cos')) return ['Romaine'];
  277:     if (name.contains('capsicum')) return ['Bell pepper', 'Sweet pepper'];
  278:     if (name.contains('coriander')) return ['Cilantro'];
  279: 
  280:     return const <String>[];
  281:   }
  282: 
  283:   static int _averageSpacingCm(List<PlantVariety> varieties) {
  284:     if (varieties.isEmpty) return 30;
  285: 
  286:     final total = varieties.fold<int>(0, (sum, item) => sum + item.spacingCm);
  287: 
  288:     return (total / varieties.length).round();
  289:   }
  290: 
  291:   static String _baseFor(String normalized) {
  292:     final name = normalized
  293:         .replaceAll('_', ' ')
  294:         .replaceAll('-', ' ')
  295:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'\s+'), ' ')
  296:         .trim();
  297: 
  298:     for (final entry in _baseAliases.entries) {
  299:       for (final alias in entry.value) {
  300:         if (name == alias || name.contains(alias)) {
  301:           return entry.key;
  302:         }
  303:       }
  304:     }
  305: 
  306:     final tokens = name
  307:         .split(' ')
  308:         .where((token) => token.isNotEmpty)
  309:         .where((token) => !_modifierWords.contains(token))
  310:         .toList();
  311: 
  312:     if (tokens.isEmpty) return name;
  313: 
  314:     return tokens.last;
  315:   }
  316: 
  317:   static String _displayNameForKey(String key) {
  318:     return key
  319:         .replaceAll('_', ' ')
  320:         .replaceAll('-', ' ')
  321:         .split(' ')
  322:         .where((part) => part.trim().isNotEmpty)
  323:         .map((part) => part[0].toUpperCase() + part.substring(1))
  324:         .join(' ');
  325:   }
  326: 
  327:   static String _displayName(String value) {
  328:     return value
  329:         .split(' ')
  330:         .where((part) => part.trim().isNotEmpty)
  331:         .map((part) => part[0].toUpperCase() + part.substring(1))
  332:         .join(' ');
  333:   }
  334: 
  335:   static String _normalize(String value) {
  336:     return value
  337:         .trim()
  338:         .toLowerCase()
  339:         .replaceAll('&', 'and')
  340:         .replaceAll('-', ' ')
  341:         .replaceAll('_', ' ')
  342:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'[^a-z0-9\s]+'), ' ')
  343:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'\s+'), ' ')
  344:         .trim();
  345:   }

  617: 
  618: class PlantTypeGroup {
  619:   const PlantTypeGroup({
  620:     required this.keys,
  621:     required this.title,
  622:     required this.summary,
  623:     required this.defaultSpacingCm,
  624:     required this.notes,
  625:     required this.varieties,
  626:   });
  627: 
  628:   final List<String> keys;
  629:   final String title;
  630:   final String summary;
  631:   final int defaultSpacingCm;
  632:   final List<String> notes;
  633:   final List<PlantVariety> varieties;
  634: 
  635:   bool matches(String normalizedCropName) {
  636:     for (final key in keys) {
  637:       final normalizedKey = PlantVarietyCatalog._normalize(key);
  638: 
  639:       if (normalizedCropName == normalizedKey ||
  640:           normalizedCropName.contains(normalizedKey) ||
  641:           normalizedKey.contains(normalizedCropName)) {
  642:         return true;
  643:       }
  644:     }
  645: 
  646:     return false;
  647:   }
  648: }
  649: 
  650: class PlantVariety {
  651:   const PlantVariety({
  652:     required this.name,
  653:     required this.alsoKnownAs,
  654:     required this.spacingCm,
  655:     required this.daysToMaturity,
  656:     required this.bestUse,
  657:     required this.sowingNote,
  658:     required this.harvestNote,
  659:     required this.difficulty,
  660:   });
  661: 
  662:   final String name;
  663:   final List<String> alsoKnownAs;
  664:   final int spacingCm;
  665:   final String daysToMaturity;
  666:   final String bestUse;
  667:   final String sowingNote;
  668:   final String harvestNote;
  669:   final String difficulty;
  670: }

 1069:   ];
 1070:   // ROBUST_SEED_CATALOG_LOOKUP_START
 1071:   // ROBUST_SEED_CATALOG_LOOKUP_START
 1072:   static SeedCatalogItem byKey(String key) {
 1073:     final normalised = _normaliseKey(key);
 1074: 
 1075:     for (final item in items) {
 1076:       if (_normaliseKey(item.key) == normalised) return item;
 1077:       if (_normaliseKey(item.cropName) == normalised) return item;
 1078:     }
 1079: 
 1080:     final aliases = <String, String>{
 1081:       'carrots': 'carrot',
 1082:       'beet': 'beetroot',
 1083:       'beets': 'beetroot',
 1084:       'radishes': 'radish',
 1085:       'turnips': 'turnip',
 1086:       'parsnips': 'parsnip',
 1087:       'rutabaga': 'swede',
 1088:       'silver beet': 'silverbeet',
 1089:       'chard': 'silverbeet',
 1090:       'swiss chard': 'silverbeet',
 1091:       'arugula': 'rocket',
 1092:       'pak choi': 'pak_choi',
 1093:       'pak choy': 'pak_choi',
 1094:       'bok choi': 'bok_choy',
 1095:       'bok choy': 'bok_choy',
 1096:       'brussel sprouts': 'brussels_sprouts',
 1097:       'brussels sprouts': 'brussels_sprouts',
 1098:       'green onion': 'spring_onion',
 1099:       'scallion': 'spring_onion',
 1100:       'spring onion': 'spring_onion',
 1101:       'spring onions': 'spring_onion',
 1102:       'onions': 'onion',
 1103:       'leeks': 'leek',
 1104:       'shallots': 'shallot',
 1105:       'garlic bulb': 'garlic',
 1106:       'bean': 'beans',
 1107:       'pea': 'peas',
 1108:       'snow peas': 'snow_peas',
 1109:       'sugar snap peas': 'sugar_snap_peas',
 1110:       'snap peas': 'sugar_snap_peas',
 1111:       'broad beans': 'broad_beans',
 1112:       'capsicum': 'capsicum',
 1113:       'pepper': 'capsicum',
 1114:       'peppers': 'capsicum',
 1115:       'chili': 'chilli',
 1116:       'courgette': 'zucchini',
 1117:       'rockmelon': 'melon',
 1118:       'sweet corn': 'sweetcorn',
 1119:       'corn': 'sweetcorn',
 1120:       'cilantro': 'coriander',
 1121:       'sweet potato': 'sweet_potato',
 1122:       'kumara': 'kumara',
 1123:     };
 1124: 
 1125:     final aliased = aliases[normalised];
 1126: 
 1127:     if (aliased != null) {
 1128:       for (final item in items) {
 1129:         if (_normaliseKey(item.key) == _normaliseKey(aliased)) return item;
 1130:       }
 1131:     }
 1132: 
 1133:     for (final item in items) {
 1134:       final itemKey = _normaliseKey(item.key);
 1135:       final itemName = _normaliseKey(item.cropName);
 1136: 
 1137:       if (itemKey.contains(normalised) ||
 1138:           itemName.contains(normalised) ||
 1139:           normalised.contains(itemKey) ||
 1140:           normalised.contains(itemName)) {
 1141:         return item;
 1142:       }
 1143:     }
 1144: 
 1145:     return _fallbackItem(key);
 1146:   }
 1147: 
 1148:   static String _normaliseKey(String value) {
 1149:     var result = value
 1150:         .trim()
 1151:         .toLowerCase()
 1152:         .replaceAll('&', 'and')
 1153:         .replaceAll(RegExp('[^a-z0-9]+'), '_')
 1154:         .replaceAll(RegExp('_+'), '_');
 1155: 
 1156:     while (result.startsWith('_')) {
 1157:       result = result.substring(1);
 1158:     }
 1159: 
 1160:     while (result.endsWith('_')) {
 1161:       result = result.substring(0, result.length - 1);
 1162:     }
 1163: 
 1164:     return result;
 1165:   }
 1166: 
 1167:   static String _titleFromKey(String value) {
 1168:     final words = _normaliseKey(
 1169:       value,
 1170:     ).split('_').where((word) => word.trim().isNotEmpty).toList();
 1171: 
 1172:     if (words.isEmpty) return 'Vegetable';
 1173: 
 1174:     return words
 1175:         .map((word) => word[0].toUpperCase() + word.substring(1))
 1176:         .join(' ');
 1177:   }
 1178: 
 1179:   static SeedCatalogItem _fallbackItem(String key) {
 1180:     return SeedCatalogItem(
 1181:       key: _normaliseKey(key),
 1182:       cropName: _titleFromKey(key),
 1183:       emoji: '\u{1F331}',
 1184:       category: 'Vegetable',
 1185:       germinationMinDays: 5,
 1186:       germinationMaxDays: 14,
 1187:       transplantMinDays: 28,
 1188:       transplantMaxDays: 56,
 1189:       harvestDaysFromTransplant: 70,
 1190:       tip:
 1191:           'Generic vegetable entry. Add crop-specific details later if needed.',
 1192:       varieties: const [],
 1193:     );
 1194:   }
 1195: 
 1196:   // ROBUST_SEED_CATALOG_LOOKUP_END
 1197: }

   41:         .inDays;
   42:   }
   43: 
   44:   Seedling copyWith({
   45:     String? id,
   46:     String? seedKey,

   65:       emoji: emoji ?? this.emoji,
   66:       category: category ?? this.category,
   67:       variety: variety ?? this.variety,

  100:   factory Seedling.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
  101:     return Seedling(
  102:       id: _stringFromJson(json['id'], fallback: 'seedling'),
  103:       seedKey: _stringFromJson(json['seedKey'], fallback: 'custom'),
  104:       cropName: _stringFromJson(json['cropName'], fallback: 'Seedling'),
  105:       emoji: _stringFromJson(json['emoji'], fallback: 'ðŸŒ±'),
  106:       category: _stringFromJson(json['category'], fallback: 'Seedling'),
  107:       variety: _stringFromJson(json['variety'], fallback: ''),
  108:       sowDate: _dateFromJson(json['sowDate']) ?? DateTime.now(),
  109:       trayType: _stringFromJson(json['trayType'], fallback: 'Tray'),
  110:       trayCount: _intFromJson(json['trayCount'], fallback: 1),
  111:       location: _stringFromJson(json['location'], fallback: 'Seedling area'),
  112:       notes: _stringFromJson(json['notes'], fallback: ''),
  113:       bedId: _nullableStringFromJson(json['bedId']),
  114:       lastWateredAt: _dateFromJson(json['lastWateredAt']),
  115:       lastFedAt: _dateFromJson(json['lastFedAt']),
  116:       transplantedAt: _dateFromJson(json['transplantedAt']),
  117:     );
  118:   }
  119: 
  120:   static String _stringFromJson(dynamic value, {required String fallback}) {
  121:     if (value is String && value.trim().isNotEmpty) {
  122:       return value.trim();
  123:     }
  124: 
  125:     return fallback;
  126:   }
  127: 
  128:   static String? _nullableStringFromJson(dynamic value) {
  129:     if (value is String && value.trim().isNotEmpty) {
  130:       return value.trim();
  131:     }
  132: 
  133:     return null;
  134:   }
  135: 
  136:   static DateTime? _dateFromJson(dynamic value) {
  137:     if (value is String && value.trim().isNotEmpty) {
  138:       return DateTime.tryParse(value);
  139:     }
  140: 
  141:     return null;
  142:   }
  143: 
  144:   static int _intFromJson(dynamic value, {required int fallback}) {
  145:     if (value is int) return value;
  146:     if (value is double) return value.round();
  147:     if (value is String) return int.tryParse(value) ?? fallback;
  148: 
  149:     return fallback;
  150:   }
  151: }

   27: class MonthlySowPlan {

   43:   final List<SowCalendarItem> nextMonthDirect;
   44:   final List<SowCalendarItem> nextMonthEither;
   45: 
   46:   bool get hasCurrentItems {

   48:   }
   49:

   51:     return nextMonthTray.isNotEmpty ||

   53:         nextMonthEither.isNotEmpty;
   54:   }

  128: 
  129:   static MonthlySowPlan planFor(DateTime date) {
  130:     final month = date.month;
  131:     final nextMonth = month == 12 ? 1 : month + 1;
  132: 
  133:     final current = items.where((item) => item.isForMonth(month)).toList();
  134:     final next = items.where((item) => item.isForMonth(nextMonth)).toList();
  135: 
  136:     return MonthlySowPlan(
  137:       month: month,
  138:       tray: _byMethod(current, SowMethod.tray),
  139:       direct: _byMethod(current, SowMethod.direct),
  140:       either: _byMethod(current, SowMethod.either),
  141:       nextMonthTray: _byMethod(next, SowMethod.tray),
  142:       nextMonthDirect: _byMethod(next, SowMethod.direct),
  143:       nextMonthEither: _byMethod(next, SowMethod.either),
  144:     );
  145:   }
  146: 
  147:   static List<SowCalendarItem> _byMethod(
  148:     List<SowCalendarItem> source,
  149:     SowMethod method,
  150:   ) {
  151:     return source.where((item) => item.method == method).toList();
  152:   }
  153: 
  154:   static String monthName(int month) {
  155:     switch (month) {
  156:       case 1:
  157:         return 'January';
  158:       case 2:
  159:         return 'February';
  160:       case 3:
  161:         return 'March';
  162:       case 4:
  163:         return 'April';
  164:       case 5:
  165:         return 'May';
  166:       case 6:
  167:         return 'June';
  168:       case 7:
  169:         return 'July';
  170:       case 8:
  171:         return 'August';
  172:       case 9:
  173:         return 'September';
  174:       case 10:
  175:         return 'October';
  176:       case 11:
  177:         return 'November';
  178:       case 12:
  179:         return 'December';
  180:       default:
  181:         return 'Month';
  182:     }
  183:   }
  184: }

============================================================
DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\core\plant_icons\generated_plant_icon.dart
============================================================

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: import 'package:flutter_svg/flutter_svg.dart';
    3: 
    4: import 'generated_plant_svgs.dart';
    5: 
    6: class GeneratedPlantIcon extends StatelessWidget {
    7:   const GeneratedPlantIcon({
    8:     super.key,
    9:     required this.cropName,
   10:     this.size = 24,
   11:   });
   12: 
   13:   final String cropName;
   14:   final double size;
   15: 
   16:   @override
   17:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   18:     final key = _iconKeyForCrop(cropName);
   19:     final svg = generatedPlantSvgs[key];
   20: 
   21:     if (svg == null) {
   22:       return Icon(
   23:         Icons.local_florist,
   24:         size: size,
   25:       );
   26:     }
   27: 
   28:     return SvgPicture.string(
   29:       svg,
   30:       width: size,
   31:       height: size,
   32:       fit: BoxFit.contain,
   33:     );
   34:   }
   35: 
   36:   String _iconKeyForCrop(String value) {
   37:     final name = value.trim().toLowerCase();
   38: 
   39:     final exact = name
   40:         .replaceAll('&', 'and')
   41:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'[^a-z0-9]+'), '_')
   42:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'_+'), '_')
   43:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'^_|_$'), '');
   44: 
   45:     if (generatedPlantSvgs.containsKey(exact)) return exact;
   46: 
   47:     for (final key in generatedPlantSvgs.keys) {
   48:       final normalizedKey = key.replaceAll('_', ' ');
   49: 
   50:       if (name == normalizedKey ||
   51:           name.contains(normalizedKey) ||
   52:           normalizedKey.contains(name)) {
   53:         return key;
   54:       }
   55:     }
   56: 
   57:     return exact;
   58:   }
   59: }

   51:   };
   52: 
   53:   static String normalize(String value) {
   54:     return value
   55:         .toLowerCase()
   56:         .replaceAll('&', 'and')
   57:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'[^a-z0-9]+'), '_')
   58:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'^_+|_+$'), '');
   59:   }
   60: 
   61:   static String? assetFor(String plantName) {
   62:     final direct = normalize(plantName);
   63: 
   64:     if (available.contains(direct)) {
   65:       return '$directory/$direct.svg';
   66:     }
   67: 
   68:     final aliases = <String, String>{
   69:       'potatoes': 'potato',
   70:       'sweet_potatoes': 'sweet_potato',
   71:       'sweet_potato': 'sweet_potato',
   72:       'strawberries': 'strawberry',
   73:       'raspberries': 'raspberry',
   74:       'blueberries': 'blueberry',
   75:       'blackberries': 'blackberry',
   76:       'tomatoes': 'tomato',
   77:       'carrots': 'carrot',
   78:       'peppers': 'bell_pepper',
   79:       'pepper': 'bell_pepper',
   80:       'bellpepper': 'bell_pepper',
   81:       'bell_peppers': 'bell_pepper',
   82:       'cucumbers': 'cucumber',
   83:       'onions': 'onion',
   84:       'leeks': 'leek',
   85:       'beets': 'beetroot',
   86:       'beet': 'beetroot',
   87:       'aubergine': 'eggplant',
   88:       'coriander': 'cilantro',
   89:       'oak': 'oak_tree',
   90:       'maple': 'maple_tree',
   91:       'palm': 'palm_tree',
   92:       'birch': 'birch_tree',
   93:       'pine': 'pine_tree',
   94:       'apple': 'apple_tree',
   95:       'pear': 'pear_tree',
   96:       'plum': 'plum_tree',
   97:       'peach': 'peach_tree',
   98:       'lemon': 'lemon_tree',
   99:       'orange': 'orange_tree',
  100:     };
  101: 
  102:     final alias = aliases[direct];
  103: 
  104:     if (alias != null && available.contains(alias)) {
  105:       return '$directory/$alias.svg';
  106:     }
  107: 
  108:     for (final key in available) {
  109:       if (direct.contains(key) || key.contains(direct)) {
  110:         return '$directory/$key.svg';
  111:       }
  112:     }
  113: 
  114:     return null;
  115:   }
  116: }

DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\features\planner\canvas\crop_pattern_painter.dart
============================================================

    1: import 'dart:math' as math;
    2: 
    3: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    4: 
    5: import '../../../core/models/crop_spacing.dart';
    6: 
    7: class CropPatternPainter extends CustomPainter {
    8:   const CropPatternPainter({
    9:     required this.crops,
   10:     required this.widthMeters,
   11:     required this.heightMeters,
   12:     this.maxDots = 90,
   13:   });
   14: 
   15:   final List<String> crops;
   16:   final double widthMeters;
   17:   final double heightMeters;
   18:   final int maxDots;
   19: 
   20:   @override
   21:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
   22:     final cleanCrops = crops
   23:         .map((crop) => crop.trim())
   24:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
   25:         .toList();
   26: 
   27:     if (cleanCrops.isEmpty) return;
   28:     if (widthMeters <= 0 || heightMeters <= 0) return;
   29:     if (size.width <= 0 || size.height <= 0) return;
   30: 
   31:     final cropBandHeightPixels = size.height / cleanCrops.length;
   32:     final cropBandHeightMeters = heightMeters / cleanCrops.length;
   33: 
   34:     for (var cropIndex = 0; cropIndex < cleanCrops.length; cropIndex++) {
   35:       final crop = cleanCrops[cropIndex];
   36:       final spacingMeters = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(crop);
   37: 
   38:       _paintCropBand(
   39:         canvas: canvas,
   40:         crop: crop,
   41:         cropIndex: cropIndex,
   42:         bandTopPixels: cropBandHeightPixels * cropIndex,
   43:         bandHeightPixels: cropBandHeightPixels,
   44:         bandHeightMeters: cropBandHeightMeters,
   45:         spacingMeters: spacingMeters,
   46:         size: size,
   47:         maxDotsForCrop: math.max(12, maxDots ~/ cleanCrops.length),
   48:       );
   49:     }
   50:   }
   51: 
   52:   void _paintCropBand({
   53:     required Canvas canvas,
   54:     required String crop,
   55:     required int cropIndex,
   56:     required double bandTopPixels,
   57:     required double bandHeightPixels,
   58:     required double bandHeightMeters,
   59:     required double spacingMeters,
   60:     required Size size,
   61:     required int maxDotsForCrop,
   62:   }) {
   63:     if (spacingMeters <= 0) return;
   64: 
   65:     final pixelsPerMeterX = size.width / widthMeters;
   66:     final pixelsPerMeterY = bandHeightPixels / bandHeightMeters;
   67: 
   68:     final spacingPixelsX = spacingMeters * pixelsPerMeterX;
   69:     final spacingPixelsY = spacingMeters * pixelsPerMeterY;
   70: 
   71:     if (spacingPixelsX <= 0 || spacingPixelsY <= 0) return;
   72: 
   73:     final columns = math.max(1, (widthMeters / spacingMeters).floor());
   74:     final rows = math.max(1, (bandHeightMeters / spacingMeters).floor());
   75:     final totalDots = columns * rows;
   76: 
   77:     final skip = math.max(1, math.sqrt(totalDots / maxDotsForCrop).ceil());
   78: 
   79:     final color = _cropColor(crop, cropIndex);
   80: 
   81:     final fillPaint = Paint()
   82:       ..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.18)
   83:       ..style = PaintingStyle.fill;
   84: 
   85:     final strokePaint = Paint()
   86:       ..color = color.withValues(alpha: 0.26)
   87:       ..strokeWidth = 0.8
   88:       ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke;
   89: 
   90:     final dotRadius = _dotRadius(spacingPixelsX, spacingPixelsY);
   91: 
   92:     for (var row = 0; row < rows; row += skip) {
   93:       for (var column = 0; column < columns; column += skip) {
   94:         final x = (column + 0.5) * spacingPixelsX;
   95:         final y = bandTopPixels + (row + 0.5) * spacingPixelsY;
   96: 
   97:         if (x < 0 || x > size.width) continue;
   98:         if (y < bandTopPixels || y > bandTopPixels + bandHeightPixels) {
   99:           continue;
  100:         }
  101: 
  102:         canvas.drawCircle(Offset(x, y), dotRadius, fillPaint);
  103:         canvas.drawCircle(Offset(x, y), dotRadius, strokePaint);
  104:       }
  105:     }
  106:   }
  107: 
  108:   double _dotRadius(double spacingPixelsX, double spacingPixelsY) {
  109:     final spacing = math.min(spacingPixelsX, spacingPixelsY);
  110: 
  111:     if (spacing < 7) return 1.8;
  112:     if (spacing < 12) return 2.2;
  113:     if (spacing < 18) return 2.7;
  114: 
  115:     return 3.2;
  116:   }
  117: 
  118:   Color _cropColor(String cropName, int index) {
  119:     final crop = cropName.toLowerCase();
  120: 
  121:     if (crop.contains('strawberry')) return const Color(0xFF2E8B57);
  122:     if (crop.contains('raspberry')) return const Color(0xFFB56A13);
  123:     if (crop.contains('blueberry')) return const Color(0xFF5D5AD6);
  124: 
  125:     if (crop.contains('broccoli')) return const Color(0xFF207C4A);
  126:     if (crop.contains('lettuce')) return const Color(0xFF4E9B50);
  127:     if (crop.contains('spinach')) return const Color(0xFF2F7D32);
  128:     if (crop.contains('kale')) return const Color(0xFF326B37);
  129: 
  130:     if (crop.contains('tomato')) return const Color(0xFFC94F3D);
  131:     if (crop.contains('pepper')) return const Color(0xFFD17A22);
  132:     if (crop.contains('cucumber')) return const Color(0xFF4B9B72);
  133: 
  134:     if (crop.contains('carrot')) return const Color(0xFFE08A24);
  135:     if (crop.contains('radish')) return const Color(0xFFD95C75);
  136:     if (crop.contains('beet')) return const Color(0xFF8E3A59);
  137:     if (crop.contains('onion')) return const Color(0xFF9A8F6A);
  138:     if (crop.contains('garlic')) return const Color(0xFF8E876E);
  139: 
  140:     if (crop.contains('basil')) return const Color(0xFF338A4B);
  141:     if (crop.contains('parsley')) return const Color(0xFF4B8F39);
  142:     if (crop.contains('cilantro')) return const Color(0xFF4C9B55);
  143:     if (crop.contains('thyme')) return const Color(0xFF6E8F55);
  144:     if (crop.contains('mint')) return const Color(0xFF3E9B7A);
  145: 
  146:     const colors = [
  147:       Color(0xFF2E8B57),
  148:       Color(0xFFB56A13),
  149:       Color(0xFF5D5AD6),
  150:       Color(0xFF207C4A),
  151:     ];
  152: 
  153:     return colors[index % colors.length];
  154:   }
  155: 
  156:   @override
  157:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant CropPatternPainter oldDelegate) {
  158:     return oldDelegate.crops.join('|') != crops.join('|') ||
  159:         oldDelegate.widthMeters != widthMeters ||
  160:         oldDelegate.heightMeters != heightMeters ||
  161:         oldDelegate.maxDots != maxDots;
  162:   }
  163: }

============================================================
DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\features\planner\canvas\grid_painter.dart
============================================================

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: 
    3: class GridPainter extends CustomPainter {
    4:   const GridPainter({
    5:     double? widthMeters,
    6:     double? heightMeters,
    7:     double? metersWide,
    8:     double? metersHigh,
    9:     required this.pixelsPerMeter,
   10:   }) : widthMeters = widthMeters ?? metersWide ?? 30,
   11:        heightMeters = heightMeters ?? metersHigh ?? 20;
   12: 
   13:   final double widthMeters;
   14:   final double heightMeters;
   15:   final double pixelsPerMeter;
   16: 
   17:   @override
   18:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
   19:     final rect = Offset.zero & size;
   20: 
   21:     final backgroundPaint = Paint()..color = const Color(0xFFF4F8EF);
   22: 
   23:     canvas.drawRect(rect, backgroundPaint);
   24: 
   25:     final minorStep = pixelsPerMeter / 4;
   26:     final majorStep = pixelsPerMeter;
   27: 
   28:     final minorPaint = Paint()
   29:       ..color = const Color(0x228EAA87)
   30:       ..strokeWidth = 0.6;
   31: 
   32:     final majorPaint = Paint()
   33:       ..color = const Color(0x558EAA87)
   34:       ..strokeWidth = 1.0;
   35: 
   36:     final borderPaint = Paint()
   37:       ..color = const Color(0x778EAA87)
   38:       ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
   39:       ..strokeWidth = 1.4;
   40: 
   41:     if (minorStep > 4) {
   42:       for (double x = 0; x <= size.width; x += minorStep) {
   43:         canvas.drawLine(Offset(x, 0), Offset(x, size.height), minorPaint);
   44:       }
   45: 
   46:       for (double y = 0; y <= size.height; y += minorStep) {
   47:         canvas.drawLine(Offset(0, y), Offset(size.width, y), minorPaint);
   48:       }
   49:     }
   50: 
   51:     for (double x = 0; x <= size.width; x += majorStep) {
   52:       canvas.drawLine(Offset(x, 0), Offset(x, size.height), majorPaint);
   53:     }
   54: 
   55:     for (double y = 0; y <= size.height; y += majorStep) {
   56:       canvas.drawLine(Offset(0, y), Offset(size.width, y), majorPaint);
   57:     }
   58: 
   59:     canvas.drawRect(rect.deflate(1), borderPaint);
   60: 
   61:     final labelPainter = TextPainter(textDirection: TextDirection.ltr);
   62: 
   63:     for (double xMeters = 0; xMeters <= widthMeters; xMeters += 10) {
   64:       final x = xMeters * pixelsPerMeter;
   65: 
   66:       labelPainter.text = TextSpan(
   67:         text: '${xMeters.toStringAsFixed(0)}m',
   68:         style: const TextStyle(
   69:           color: Color(0xFF899286),
   70:           fontSize: 10,
   71:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
   72:         ),
   73:       );
   74: 
   75:       labelPainter.layout();
   76:       labelPainter.paint(canvas, Offset(x + 4, 4));
   77:     }
   78: 
   79:     for (double yMeters = 10; yMeters <= heightMeters; yMeters += 10) {
   80:       final y = yMeters * pixelsPerMeter;
   81: 
   82:       labelPainter.text = TextSpan(
   83:         text: '${yMeters.toStringAsFixed(0)}m',
   84:         style: const TextStyle(
   85:           color: Color(0xFF899286),
   86:           fontSize: 10,
   87:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
   88:         ),
   89:       );
   90: 
   91:       labelPainter.layout();
   92:       labelPainter.paint(canvas, Offset(4, y + 4));
   93:     }
   94:   }
   95: 
   96:   @override
   97:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant GridPainter oldDelegate) {
   98:     return oldDelegate.widthMeters != widthMeters ||
   99:         oldDelegate.heightMeters != heightMeters ||
  100:         oldDelegate.pixelsPerMeter != pixelsPerMeter;
  101:   }
  102: }

   14:   int _cropBlockIdNonce = 0;
   15: 
   16:   String _nextCropBlockId() {
   17:     _cropBlockIdNonce += 1;
   18:     return 'block-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}-$_cropBlockIdNonce';
   19:   }

   21:   GardenController({GardenProject? initialProject})
   22:     : project = initialProject ?? GardenProject.demo();

   24:   GardenProject project;

   31:   List<Bed> get beds => project.beds;

   34:

   38:   String? selectedBedId;

   40:   Bed? get selectedBed {
   41:     if (selectedBedId == null) return null;
   42: 
   43:     for (final bed in beds) {
   44:       if (bed.id == selectedBedId) {
   45:         return bed;
   46:       }
   47:     }
   48: 
   49:     return null;
   50:   }
   51: 
   52:   List<String> overlappingBedIds() {
   53:     final ids = <String>{};
   54: 
   55:     for (var i = 0; i < beds.length; i++) {
   56:       for (var j = i + 1; j < beds.length; j++) {
   57:         final a = beds[i];
   58:         final b = beds[j];
   59: 
   60:         if (_bedsOverlap(a, b)) {
   61:           ids.add(a.id);
   62:           ids.add(b.id);
   63:         }
   64:       }
   65:     }
   66: 
   67:     return ids.toList();
   68:   }
   69: 
   70:   bool bedOverlaps(String bedId) {
   71:     return overlappingBedIds().contains(bedId);
   72:   }
   73: 
   74:   int get overlapCount => overlappingBedIds().length;
   75: 
   76:   void toggleAllowOverlap(bool value) {
   77:     if (allowOverlap == value) return;

   80:     notifyListeners();

  104: 
  105:     notifyListeners();

  128:   void loadProjectFromJson(String rawJson) {
  129:     final decoded = jsonDecode(rawJson);
  130: 
  131:     if (decoded is! Map<String, dynamic>) {
  132:       throw const FormatException('Project JSON must be an object.');
  133:     }
  134:

  136:

  142: 
  143:   void updateProjectSettings({
  144:     required String name,
  145:     required double widthMeters,
  146:     required double heightMeters,
  147:     required String locationName,
  148:     required double latitude,
  149:     required double longitude,
  150:   }) {
  151:     _recordHistory();
  152: 
  153:     final safeWidth = _clampDouble(widthMeters, 5.0, 100.0);
  154:     final safeHeight = _clampDouble(heightMeters, 5.0, 100.0);
  155:     final safeLatitude = _clampDouble(latitude, -90.0, 90.0);
  156:     final safeLongitude = _clampDouble(longitude, -180.0, 180.0);
  157: 
  158:     final updatedBeds = beds.map((bed) {
  159:       final clampedWidth = _clampDouble(bed.width, 1.0, safeWidth);
  160:       final clampedHeight = _clampDouble(bed.height, 1.0, safeHeight);
  161: 
  162:       final clampedX = _clampDouble(bed.x, 0.0, safeWidth - clampedWidth);
  163:       final clampedY = _clampDouble(bed.y, 0.0, safeHeight - clampedHeight);
  164: 
  165:       return bed.copyWith(
  166:         x: clampedX,
  167:         y: clampedY,
  168:         width: clampedWidth,
  169:         height: clampedHeight,
  170:       );
  171:     }).toList();
  172: 
  173:     project = project.copyWith(
  174:       name: name.trim().isEmpty ? project.name : name.trim(),
  175:       widthMeters: safeWidth,
  176:       heightMeters: safeHeight,
  177:       locationName: locationName.trim().isEmpty
  178:           ? GardenProject.defaultLocationName
  179:           : locationName.trim(),
  180:       latitude: safeLatitude,
  181:       longitude: safeLongitude,
  182:       beds: updatedBeds,
  183:       updatedAt: DateTime.now(),
  184:     );
  185: 
  186:     if (selectedBedId != null &&
  187:         !updatedBeds.any((bed) => bed.id == selectedBedId)) {
  188:       selectedBedId = null;
  189:     }
  190: 
  191:     notifyListeners();
  192:   }
  193: 
  194:   void transplantSeedlingToBed({
  195:     required String seedlingId,
  196:     required String bedId,
  197:     bool addCropBlockToMap = false,
  198:   }) {
  199:     final seedlingIndex = seedlings.indexWhere(
  200:       (seedling) => seedling.id == seedlingId,
  201:     );
  202: 
  203:     if (seedlingIndex == -1) return;
  204: 
  205:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
  206:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  207: 
  208:     final seedling = seedlings[seedlingIndex];
  209:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  210: 
  211:     final cropName = seedling.cropName.trim().isEmpty
  212:         ? 'Seedling'
  213:         : seedling.cropName.trim();
  214: 
  215:     final existingCropNames = bed.crops
  216:         .map((crop) => crop.trim().toLowerCase())
  217:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
  218:         .toSet();
  219: 
  220:     final updatedCrops = existingCropNames.contains(cropName.toLowerCase())
  221:         ? bed.crops
  222:         : [...bed.crops, cropName];
  223: 
  224:     final updatedSeedlings = [...seedlings];
  225: 
  226:     updatedSeedlings[seedlingIndex] = seedling.copyWith(
  227:       bedId: bed.id,
  228:       transplantedAt: DateTime.now(),
  229:     );
  230: 
  231:     var updatedBed = bed.copyWith(crops: updatedCrops);
  232: 
  233:     if (addCropBlockToMap) {
  234:       final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
  235:       final blockWidth = _clampDouble(spacing * 8, spacing, bed.width);
  236:       final blockHeight = _clampDouble(spacing * 2, spacing, bed.height);
  237: 
  238:       final nextPosition = _nextCropBlockPosition(
  239:         bed: updatedBed,
  240:         cropName: cropName,
  241:         blockWidth: blockWidth,
  242:         blockHeight: blockHeight,
  243:         spacing: spacing,
  244:       );
  245: 
  246:       final block = CropBlock(
  247:         id: _nextCropBlockId(),
  248:         cropName: cropName,
  249:         x: nextPosition.dx,
  250:         y: nextPosition.dy,
  251:         width: blockWidth,
  252:         height: blockHeight,
  253:       );
  254: 
  255:       updatedBed = updatedBed.copyWith(
  256:         cropBlocks: [...updatedBed.cropBlocks, block],
  257:       );
  258:     }
  259: 
  260:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  261:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = updatedBed;
  262: 
  263:     _recordHistory();
  264: 
  265:     project = project.copyWith(
  266:       beds: updatedBeds,
  267:       seedlings: updatedSeedlings,
  268:       updatedAt: DateTime.now(),
  269:     );
  270: 
  271:     selectedBedId = bed.id;
  272: 
  273:     notifyListeners();
  274:   }
  275: 
  276:   void addSeedling(Seedling seedling) {
  277:     _recordHistory();
  278: 
  279:     final safeSeedling = seedling.id.trim().isEmpty
  280:         ? seedling.copyWith(
  281:             id: 'seedling-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}',
  282:           )
  283:         : seedling;
  284: 
  285:     project = project.copyWith(
  286:       seedlings: [...seedlings, safeSeedling],
  287:       updatedAt: DateTime.now(),
  288:     );
  289: 
  290:     notifyListeners();
  291:   }

  293:   void updateSeedling(String id, Seedling Function(Seedling seedling) update) {
  294:     final index = seedlings.indexWhere((seedling) => seedling.id == id);
  295:     if (index == -1) return;
  296: 
  297:     final current = seedlings[index];
  298:     final updated = update(current);
  299: 
  300:     _recordHistory();
  301: 
  302:     final updatedSeedlings = [...seedlings];
  303:     updatedSeedlings[index] = updated;
  304: 
  305:     project = project.copyWith(
  306:       seedlings: updatedSeedlings,
  307:       updatedAt: DateTime.now(),
  308:     );
  309: 
  310:     notifyListeners();
  311:   }
  312: 
  313:   void deleteSeedling(String id) {
  314:     final updatedSeedlings = seedlings
  315:         .where((seedling) => seedling.id != id)
  316:         .toList();
  317: 
  318:     if (updatedSeedlings.length == seedlings.length) return;
  319: 
  320:     _recordHistory();
  321: 
  322:     project = project.copyWith(
  323:       seedlings: updatedSeedlings,
  324:       updatedAt: DateTime.now(),
  325:     );
  326: 
  327:     notifyListeners();
  328:   }

  339:   void addDefaultBed() {
  340:     addCustomBed(
  341:       name: 'New Bed ${beds.length + 1}',
  342:       zone: 'Main Garden',
  343:       width: 4,
  344:       height: 2,
  345:       crops: const [],
  346:       status: BedStatus.ok,
  347:     );

  350:   void addBedIssueToBed({required String bedId, required BedIssue issue}) {
  351:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
  352:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  353: 
  354:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  355:     final safeIssue = issue.id.trim().isEmpty
  356:         ? issue.copyWith(id: 'issue-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}')
  357:         : issue;
  358: 
  359:     _recordHistory();
  360: 
  361:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  362:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(issues: [...bed.issues, safeIssue]);
  363: 
  364:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  365: 
  366:     notifyListeners();
  367:   }
  368: 
  369:   void updateBedIssueInBed({
  370:     required String bedId,
  371:     required String issueId,
  372:     required BedIssue Function(BedIssue issue) update,
  373:   }) {
  374:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
  375:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  376: 
  377:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  378:     final issueIndex = bed.issues.indexWhere((issue) => issue.id == issueId);
  379:     if (issueIndex == -1) return;
  380: 
  381:     final currentIssue = bed.issues[issueIndex];
  382:     final updatedIssue = update(currentIssue);
  383: 
  384:     if (updatedIssue == currentIssue) return;
  385: 
  386:     _recordHistory();
  387: 
  388:     final updatedIssues = [...bed.issues];
  389:     updatedIssues[issueIndex] = updatedIssue;
  390: 
  391:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  392:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(issues: updatedIssues);
  393: 
  394:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  395: 
  396:     notifyListeners();
  397:   }
  398: 
  399:   void resolveBedIssue({
  400:     required String bedId,
  401:     required String issueId,
  402:     String? notes,
  403:   }) {
  404:     updateBedIssueInBed(
  405:       bedId: bedId,
  406:       issueId: issueId,
  407:       update: (issue) {
  408:         final trimmedNotes = notes?.trim();
  409: 
  410:         return issue.copyWith(
  411:           status: BedIssueStatus.resolved,
  412:           notes: trimmedNotes == null || trimmedNotes.isEmpty
  413:               ? issue.notes
  414:               : trimmedNotes,
  415:         );
  416:       },
  417:     );
  418:   }
  419: 
  420:   void addCustomBed({
  421:     required String name,
  422:     required String zone,
  423:     required double width,
  424:     required double height,
  425:     required List<String> crops,
  426:     required BedStatus status,
  427:   }) {
  428:     final nextNumber = beds.length + 1;
  429: 
  430:     final safeWidth = _clampDouble(width, 1.0, project.widthMeters);
  431:     final safeHeight = _clampDouble(height, 1.0, project.heightMeters);
  432: 
  433:     final x = _clampDouble(
  434:       1.0 + nextNumber,
  435:       0.0,
  436:       project.widthMeters - safeWidth,
  437:     );
  438: 
  439:     final y = _clampDouble(
  440:       1.0 + nextNumber,
  441:       0.0,
  442:       project.heightMeters - safeHeight,
  443:     );
  444: 
  445:     addBed(
  446:       Bed(
  447:         id: 'bed-$nextNumber',
  448:         number: nextNumber,
  449:         name: name.trim().isEmpty ? 'New Bed $nextNumber' : name.trim(),
  450:         x: x,
  451:         y: y,
  452:         width: safeWidth,
  453:         height: safeHeight,
  454:         zone: zone.trim().isEmpty ? 'Main Garden' : zone.trim(),
  455:         status: status,
  456:         healthPercent: status == BedStatus.ok ? 1.0 : 0.7,
  457:         crops: crops,
  458:       ),
  459:     );
  460:   }
  461:

  463:     if (selectedBedId == id) return;
  464: 
  465:     selectedBedId = id;
  466:     notifyListeners();
  467:   }

  476:   void deleteSelectedBed() {

  490:   void moveBed(String id, {required double dx, required double dy}) {
  491:     final index = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == id);
  492:     if (index == -1) return;
  493: 
  494:     final bed = beds[index];
  495: 
  496:     setBedPosition(id, x: bed.x + dx, y: bed.y + dy, snap: false);
  497:   }
  498: 
  499:   void setBedPosition(
  500:     String id, {
  501:     required double x,
  502:     required double y,
  503:     bool snap = false,
  504:   }) {
  505:     final index = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == id);
  506:     if (index == -1) return;
  507: 
  508:     final bed = beds[index];
  509: 
  510:     var nextX = _clampDouble(x, 0.0, project.widthMeters - bed.width);
  511:     var nextY = _clampDouble(y, 0.0, project.heightMeters - bed.height);
  512: 
  513:     if (snap) {
  514:       nextX = _clampDouble(
  515:         _snap(nextX, 0.5),
  516:         0.0,
  517:         project.widthMeters - bed.width,
  518:       );
  519: 
  520:       nextY = _clampDouble(
  521:         _snap(nextY, 0.5),
  522:         0.0,
  523:         project.heightMeters - bed.height,
  524:       );
  525:     }
  526: 
  527:     if (nextX == bed.x && nextY == bed.y) return;
  528: 
  529:     final updatedBed = bed.copyWith(x: nextX, y: nextY);
  530: 
  531:     if (!allowOverlap && _wouldOverlap(updatedBed, bed.id)) return;
  532: 
  533:     _recordHistory();
  534: 
  535:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  536:     updatedBeds[index] = updatedBed;
  537: 
  538:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  539: 
  540:     notifyListeners();
  541:   }
  542: 
  543:   void resizeBed(
  544:     String id, {
  545:     required double width,
  546:     required double height,
  547:     bool snap = true,
  548:   }) {
  549:     final index = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == id);
  550:     if (index == -1) return;
  551: 
  552:     final bed = beds[index];
  553: 
  554:     final maxWidth = project.widthMeters - bed.x;
  555:     final maxHeight = project.heightMeters - bed.y;
  556: 
  557:     var nextWidth = _clampDouble(width, 1.0, maxWidth);
  558:     var nextHeight = _clampDouble(height, 1.0, maxHeight);
  559: 
  560:     if (snap) {
  561:       nextWidth = _clampDouble(_snap(nextWidth, 0.5), 1.0, maxWidth);
  562:       nextHeight = _clampDouble(_snap(nextHeight, 0.5), 1.0, maxHeight);
  563:     }
  564: 
  565:     if (nextWidth == bed.width && nextHeight == bed.height) return;
  566: 
  567:     final updatedBed = bed.copyWith(width: nextWidth, height: nextHeight);
  568: 
  569:     if (!allowOverlap && _wouldOverlap(updatedBed, bed.id)) return;
  570: 
  571:     _recordHistory();
  572: 
  573:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  574:     updatedBeds[index] = updatedBed;
  575: 
  576:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  577: 
  578:     notifyListeners();
  579:   }
  580: 
  581:   void snapBedToGrid(String id, {double step = 0.5}) {
  582:     final index = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == id);
  583:     if (index == -1) return;
  584: 
  585:     final bed = beds[index];
  586: 
  587:     final snappedX = _clampDouble(
  588:       _snap(bed.x, step),
  589:       0.0,
  590:       project.widthMeters - bed.width,
  591:     );
  592: 
  593:     final snappedY = _clampDouble(
  594:       _snap(bed.y, step),
  595:       0.0,
  596:       project.heightMeters - bed.height,
  597:     );
  598: 
  599:     if (snappedX == bed.x && snappedY == bed.y) return;
  600: 
  601:     final updatedBed = bed.copyWith(x: snappedX, y: snappedY);
  602: 
  603:     if (!allowOverlap && _wouldOverlap(updatedBed, bed.id)) return;
  604: 
  605:     _recordHistory();
  606: 
  607:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  608:     updatedBeds[index] = updatedBed;
  609: 
  610:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  611: 
  612:     notifyListeners();
  613:   }
  614:

  617:     if (trimmed.isEmpty) return;
  618: 
  619:     _updateSelectedBed((bed) => bed.copyWith(name: trimmed));

  630:   void updateSelectedBedWidth(String value) {
  631:     final parsed = double.tryParse(value);
  632:     if (parsed == null) return;
  633: 
  634:     _updateSelectedBed((bed) {
  635:       final maxWidth = project.widthMeters - bed.x;
  636:       final nextWidth = _clampDouble(parsed, 1.0, maxWidth);
  637: 
  638:       return bed.copyWith(width: nextWidth);
  639:     });
  640:   }
  641: 
  642:   void updateSelectedBedHeight(String value) {
  643:     final parsed = double.tryParse(value);
  644:     if (parsed == null) return;
  645: 
  646:     _updateSelectedBed((bed) {
  647:       final maxHeight = project.heightMeters - bed.y;
  648:       final nextHeight = _clampDouble(parsed, 1.0, maxHeight);
  649: 
  650:       return bed.copyWith(height: nextHeight);
  651:     });
  652:   }
