  654:   void updateSelectedBedCropsFromText(String value) {
  655:     final crops = value
  656:         .split(',')
  657:         .map((crop) => crop.trim())
  658:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
  659:         .toList();
  660: 
  661:     _updateSelectedBed((bed) => bed.copyWith(crops: crops));
  662:   }
  663: 
  664:   void removeCropFromSelectedBed(String cropToRemove) {
  665:     final target = cropToRemove.trim();
  666:     if (target.isEmpty) return;
  667: 
  668:     _updateSelectedBed((bed) {
  669:       final updatedCrops = bed.crops
  670:           .where((crop) => crop.trim().toLowerCase() != target.toLowerCase())
  671:           .toList();
  672: 
  673:       final updatedPlacements = bed.cropPlacements
  674:           .where(
  675:             (placement) =>
  676:                 placement.cropName.trim().toLowerCase() != target.toLowerCase(),
  677:           )
  678:           .toList();
  679: 
  680:       final updatedBlocks = bed.cropBlocks
  681:           .where(
  682:             (block) =>
  683:                 block.cropName.trim().toLowerCase() != target.toLowerCase(),
  684:           )
  685:           .toList();
  686: 
  687:       return bed.copyWith(
  688:         crops: updatedCrops,
  689:         cropPlacements: updatedPlacements,
  690:         cropBlocks: updatedBlocks,
  691:       );
  692:     });
  693:   }
  694: 
  695:   void addCropPlacementToSelectedBed(String cropName) {
  696:     if (selectedBedId == null) return;
  697: 
  698:     final targetCrop = cropName.trim();
  699:     if (targetCrop.isEmpty) return;
  700: 
  701:     final index = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == selectedBedId);
  702:     if (index == -1) return;
  703: 
  704:     final bed = beds[index];
  705:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(targetCrop);
  706: 
  707:     final nextPosition = _nextCropPlacementPosition(
  708:       bed: bed,
  709:       cropName: targetCrop,
  710:       spacing: spacing,
  711:     );
  712: 
  713:     final existingCropsLower = bed.crops
  714:         .map((crop) => crop.trim().toLowerCase())
  715:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
  716:         .toSet();
  717: 
  718:     final updatedCrops = existingCropsLower.contains(targetCrop.toLowerCase())
  719:         ? bed.crops
  720:         : [...bed.crops, targetCrop];
  721: 
  722:     final placement = CropPlacement(
  723:       id: 'crop-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}',
  724:       cropName: targetCrop,
  725:       x: nextPosition.dx,
  726:       y: nextPosition.dy,
  727:     );
  728: 
  729:     _recordHistory();
  730: 
  731:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  732: 
  733:     updatedBeds[index] = bed.copyWith(
  734:       crops: updatedCrops,
  735:       cropPlacements: [...bed.cropPlacements, placement],
  736:     );
  737: 
  738:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  739: 
  740:     notifyListeners();
  741:   }
  742: 
  743:   void moveCropPlacement({
  744:     required String bedId,
  745:     required String placementId,
  746:     required double x,
  747:     required double y,
  748:   }) {
  749:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
  750:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  751: 
  752:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  753: 
  754:     final placementIndex = bed.cropPlacements.indexWhere(
  755:       (placement) => placement.id == placementId,
  756:     );
  757: 
  758:     if (placementIndex == -1) return;
  759: 
  760:     final placement = bed.cropPlacements[placementIndex];
  761:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(placement.cropName);
  762: 
  763:     final snappedX = _snapCropCoordinate(
  764:       value: x,
  765:       spacing: spacing,
  766:       max: bed.width,
  767:     );
  768: 
  769:     final snappedY = _snapCropCoordinate(
  770:       value: y,
  771:       spacing: spacing,
  772:       max: bed.height,
  773:     );
  774: 
  775:     if (snappedX == placement.x && snappedY == placement.y) return;
  776: 
  777:     _recordHistory();
  778: 
  779:     final updatedPlacements = [...bed.cropPlacements];
  780: 
  781:     updatedPlacements[placementIndex] = placement.copyWith(
  782:       x: snappedX,
  783:       y: snappedY,
  784:     );
  785: 
  786:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  787: 
  788:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(cropPlacements: updatedPlacements);
  789: 
  790:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  791: 
  792:     notifyListeners();
  793:   }
  794: 
  795:   void removeCropPlacement({
  796:     required String bedId,
  797:     required String placementId,
  798:   }) {
  799:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
  800:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  801: 
  802:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  803: 
  804:     final updatedPlacements = bed.cropPlacements
  805:         .where((placement) => placement.id != placementId)
  806:         .toList();
  807: 
  808:     if (updatedPlacements.length == bed.cropPlacements.length) return;
  809: 
  810:     _recordHistory();
  811: 
  812:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  813: 
  814:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(cropPlacements: updatedPlacements);
  815: 
  816:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  817: 
  818:     notifyListeners();
  819:   }
  820: 
  821:   void addCropBlockToSelectedBed(String cropName) {
  822:     if (selectedBedId == null) return;
  823: 
  824:     final targetCrop = cropName.trim();
  825:     if (targetCrop.isEmpty) return;
  826: 
  827:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == selectedBedId);
  828:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  829: 
  830:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  831:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(targetCrop);
  832: 
  833:     final existingCropsLower = bed.crops
  834:         .map((crop) => crop.trim().toLowerCase())
  835:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
  836:         .toSet();
  837: 
  838:     final updatedCrops = existingCropsLower.contains(targetCrop.toLowerCase())
  839:         ? bed.crops
  840:         : [...bed.crops, targetCrop];
  841: 
  842:     final blockWidth = _clampDouble(spacing * 8, spacing, bed.width);
  843:     final blockHeight = _clampDouble(spacing * 2, spacing, bed.height);
  844: 
  845:     final nextPosition = _nextCropBlockPosition(
  846:       bed: bed,
  847:       cropName: targetCrop,
  848:       blockWidth: blockWidth,
  849:       blockHeight: blockHeight,
  850:       spacing: spacing,
  851:     );
  852: 
  853:     final block = CropBlock(
  854:       id: _nextCropBlockId(),
  855:       cropName: targetCrop,
  856:       x: nextPosition.dx,
  857:       y: nextPosition.dy,
  858:       width: blockWidth,
  859:       height: blockHeight,
  860:     );
  861: 
  862:     _recordHistory();
  863: 
  864:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  865: 
  866:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(
  867:       crops: updatedCrops,
  868:       cropBlocks: [...bed.cropBlocks, block],
  869:     );
  870: 
  871:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  872: 
  873:     notifyListeners();
  874:   }
  875: 
  876:   void addCropBlockToBedAt({
  877:     required String bedId,
  878:     required String cropName,
  879:     required double x,
  880:     required double y,
  881:   }) {
  882:     final targetCrop = cropName.trim();
  883:     if (targetCrop.isEmpty) return;
  884: 
  885:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
  886:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  887: 
  888:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  889:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(targetCrop);
  890: 
  891:     final existingCropsLower = bed.crops
  892:         .map((crop) => crop.trim().toLowerCase())
  893:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
  894:         .toSet();
  895: 
  896:     final updatedCrops = existingCropsLower.contains(targetCrop.toLowerCase())
  897:         ? bed.crops
  898:         : [...bed.crops, targetCrop];
  899: 
  900:     final blockWidth = _clampDouble(
  901:       spacing * 12,
  902:       _clampDouble(2.8, spacing, bed.width),
  903:       bed.width,
  904:     );
  905: 
  906:     final blockHeight = _clampDouble(
  907:       spacing * 4,
  908:       _clampDouble(1.25, spacing, bed.height),
  909:       bed.height,
  910:     );
  911: 
  912:     final localX = _clampDouble(
  913:       x - bed.x - blockWidth / 2,
  914:       0,
  915:       bed.width - blockWidth,
  916:     );
  917: 
  918:     final localY = _clampDouble(
  919:       y - bed.y - blockHeight / 2,
  920:       0,
  921:       bed.height - blockHeight,
  922:     );
  923: 
  924:     final block = CropBlock(
  925:       id: _nextCropBlockId(),
  926:       cropName: targetCrop,
  927:       x: localX,
  928:       y: localY,
  929:       width: blockWidth,
  930:       height: blockHeight,
  931:     );
  932: 
  933:     _recordHistory();
  934: 
  935:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  936: 
  937:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(
  938:       crops: updatedCrops,
  939:       cropBlocks: [...bed.cropBlocks, block],
  940:     );
  941: 
  942:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  943: 
  944:     selectedBedId = bed.id;
  945: 
  946:     notifyListeners();
  947:   }
  948: 
  949:   void addExactCropBlockToBed({
  950:     required String bedId,
  951:     required String cropName,
  952:     required double x,
  953:     required double y,
  954:     required double width,
  955:     required double height,
  956:   }) {
  957:     final targetCrop = cropName.trim();
  958:     if (targetCrop.isEmpty) return;
  959: 
  960:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
  961:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
  962: 
  963:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
  964: 
  965:     final safeWidth = _clampDouble(width, 0.04, bed.width);
  966:     final safeHeight = _clampDouble(height, 0.04, bed.height);
  967: 
  968:     final safeX = _clampDouble(x, 0, bed.width - safeWidth);
  969:     final safeY = _clampDouble(y, 0, bed.height - safeHeight);
  970: 
  971:     final existingCropsLower = bed.crops
  972:         .map((crop) => crop.trim().toLowerCase())
  973:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
  974:         .toSet();
  975: 
  976:     final updatedCrops = existingCropsLower.contains(targetCrop.toLowerCase())
  977:         ? bed.crops
  978:         : [...bed.crops, targetCrop];
  979: 
  980:     final block = CropBlock(
  981:       id: 'single-plant-${_nextCropBlockId()}',
  982:       cropName: targetCrop,
  983:       x: safeX,
  984:       y: safeY,
  985:       width: safeWidth,
  986:       height: safeHeight,
  987:     );
  988: 
  989:     _recordHistory();
  990: 
  991:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
  992: 
  993:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(
  994:       crops: updatedCrops,
  995:       cropBlocks: [...bed.cropBlocks, block],
  996:     );
  997: 
  998:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
  999: 
 1000:     selectedBedId = bed.id;
 1001: 
 1002:     notifyListeners();
 1003:   }
 1004: 
 1005:   void addCropRowToBedRect({
 1006:     required String bedId,
 1007:     required String cropName,
 1008:     required double startX,
 1009:     required double startY,
 1010:     required double endX,
 1011:     required double endY,
 1012:   }) {
 1013:     final targetCrop = cropName.trim();
 1014:     if (targetCrop.isEmpty) return;
 1015: 
 1016:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
 1017:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
 1018: 
 1019:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
 1020:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(targetCrop);
 1021: 
 1022:     final existingCropsLower = bed.crops
 1023:         .map((crop) => crop.trim().toLowerCase())
 1024:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
 1025:         .toSet();
 1026: 
 1027:     final updatedCrops = existingCropsLower.contains(targetCrop.toLowerCase())
 1028:         ? bed.crops
 1029:         : [...bed.crops, targetCrop];
 1030: 
 1031:     late final CropBlock block;
 1032: 
 1033:     if (CropSpacing.isLargeCanopyCrop(targetCrop)) {
 1034:       final size = _clampDouble(
 1035:         spacing,
 1036:         _clampDouble(
 1037:           1.2,
 1038:           spacing * 0.5,
 1039:           bed.width < bed.height ? bed.width : bed.height,
 1040:         ),
 1041:         bed.width < bed.height ? bed.width : bed.height,
 1042:       );
 1043: 
 1044:       final centerX = ((startX + endX) / 2) - bed.x;
 1045:       final centerY = ((startY + endY) / 2) - bed.y;
 1046: 
 1047:       final blockX = _clampDouble(centerX - size / 2, 0, bed.width - size);
 1048:       final blockY = _clampDouble(centerY - size / 2, 0, bed.height - size);
 1049: 
 1050:       block = CropBlock(
 1051:         id: _nextCropBlockId(),
 1052:         cropName: targetCrop,
 1053:         x: blockX,
 1054:         y: blockY,
 1055:         width: size,
 1056:         height: size,
 1057:       );
 1058:     } else {
 1059:       final dx = (endX - startX).abs();
 1060:       final dy = (endY - startY).abs();
 1061:       final horizontal = dx >= dy;
 1062: 
 1063:       final rowThickness = _clampDouble(
 1064:         spacing * 2.2,
 1065:         _clampDouble(0.65, spacing, horizontal ? bed.height : bed.width),
 1066:         horizontal ? bed.height : bed.width,
 1067:       );
 1068: 
 1069:       final minRowLength = _clampDouble(
 1070:         spacing * 6,
 1071:         spacing,
 1072:         horizontal ? bed.width : bed.height,
 1073:       );
 1074: 
 1075:       final rawLength = horizontal ? dx : dy;
 1076:       final rowLength = _clampDouble(
 1077:         rawLength < minRowLength ? minRowLength : rawLength,
 1078:         spacing,
 1079:         horizontal ? bed.width : bed.height,
 1080:       );
 1081: 
 1082:       final centerX = ((startX + endX) / 2) - bed.x;
 1083:       final centerY = ((startY + endY) / 2) - bed.y;
 1084: 
 1085:       late final double blockX;
 1086:       late final double blockY;
 1087:       late final double blockWidth;
 1088:       late final double blockHeight;
 1089: 
 1090:       if (horizontal) {
 1091:         blockWidth = rowLength;
 1092:         blockHeight = rowThickness;
 1093: 
 1094:         blockX = _clampDouble(
 1095:           centerX - blockWidth / 2,
 1096:           0,
 1097:           bed.width - blockWidth,
 1098:         );
 1099: 
 1100:         blockY = _clampDouble(
 1101:           centerY - blockHeight / 2,
 1102:           0,
 1103:           bed.height - blockHeight,
 1104:         );
 1105:       } else {
 1106:         blockWidth = rowThickness;
 1107:         blockHeight = rowLength;
 1108: 
 1109:         blockX = _clampDouble(
 1110:           centerX - blockWidth / 2,
 1111:           0,
 1112:           bed.width - blockWidth,
 1113:         );
 1114: 
 1115:         blockY = _clampDouble(
 1116:           centerY - blockHeight / 2,
 1117:           0,
 1118:           bed.height - blockHeight,
 1119:         );
 1120:       }
 1121: 
 1122:       block = CropBlock(
 1123:         id: _nextCropBlockId(),
 1124:         cropName: targetCrop,
 1125:         x: blockX,
 1126:         y: blockY,
 1127:         width: blockWidth,
 1128:         height: blockHeight,
 1129:       );
 1130:     }
 1131: 
 1132:     _recordHistory();
 1133: 
 1134:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
 1135: 
 1136:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(
 1137:       crops: updatedCrops,
 1138:       cropBlocks: [...bed.cropBlocks, block],
 1139:     );
 1140: 
 1141:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
 1142: 
 1143:     selectedBedId = bed.id;
 1144: 
 1145:     notifyListeners();
 1146:   }
 1147: 
 1148:   void moveCropBlock({
 1149:     required String bedId,
 1150:     required String blockId,
 1151:     required double x,
 1152:     required double y,
 1153:   }) {
 1154:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
 1155:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
 1156: 
 1157:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
 1158: 
 1159:     final blockIndex = bed.cropBlocks.indexWhere(
 1160:       (block) => block.id == blockId,
 1161:     );
 1162: 
 1163:     if (blockIndex == -1) return;
 1164: 
 1165:     final block = bed.cropBlocks[blockIndex];
 1166: 
 1167:     final maxX = bed.width - block.width;
 1168:     final maxY = bed.height - block.height;
 1169: 
 1170:     final nextX = _clampDouble(x, 0, maxX < 0 ? 0 : maxX);
 1171:     final nextY = _clampDouble(y, 0, maxY < 0 ? 0 : maxY);
 1172: 
 1173:     if (nextX == block.x && nextY == block.y) return;
 1174: 
 1175:     final updatedBlocks = [...bed.cropBlocks];
 1176:     updatedBlocks[blockIndex] = block.copyWith(x: nextX, y: nextY);
 1177: 
 1178:     _recordHistory();
 1179: 
 1180:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
 1181:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(cropBlocks: updatedBlocks);
 1182: 
 1183:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
 1184: 
 1185:     selectedBedId = bed.id;
 1186: 
 1187:     notifyListeners();
 1188:   }
 1189: 
 1190:   void duplicateCropBlock({required String bedId, required String blockId}) {
 1191:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
 1192:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
 1193: 
 1194:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
 1195: 
 1196:     final blockIndex = bed.cropBlocks.indexWhere(
 1197:       (block) => block.id == blockId,
 1198:     );
 1199: 
 1200:     if (blockIndex == -1) return;
 1201: 
 1202:     final block = bed.cropBlocks[blockIndex];
 1203:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(block.cropName);
 1204: 
 1205:     final maxX = bed.width - block.width;
 1206:     final maxY = bed.height - block.height;
 1207: 
 1208:     final nextX = _clampDouble(block.x + spacing, 0, maxX < 0 ? 0 : maxX);
 1209: 
 1210:     var nextY = block.y;
 1211: 
 1212:     if (nextX == block.x) {
 1213:       nextY = _clampDouble(block.y + spacing, 0, maxY < 0 ? 0 : maxY);
 1214:     }
 1215: 
 1216:     final duplicate = block.copyWith(
 1217:       id: _nextCropBlockId(),
 1218:       x: nextX,
 1219:       y: nextY,
 1220:     );
 1221: 
 1222:     _recordHistory();
 1223: 
 1224:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
 1225: 
 1226:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(
 1227:       cropBlocks: [...bed.cropBlocks, duplicate],
 1228:     );
 1229: 
 1230:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
 1231: 
 1232:     selectedBedId = bed.id;
 1233: 
 1234:     notifyListeners();
 1235:   }
 1236: 
 1237:   void centerCropBlock({required String bedId, required String blockId}) {
 1238:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
 1239:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
 1240: 
 1241:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
 1242: 
 1243:     final blockIndex = bed.cropBlocks.indexWhere(
 1244:       (block) => block.id == blockId,
 1245:     );
 1246: 
 1247:     if (blockIndex == -1) return;
 1248: 
 1249:     final block = bed.cropBlocks[blockIndex];
 1250: 
 1251:     final nextX = _clampDouble(
 1252:       (bed.width - block.width) / 2,
 1253:       0,
 1254:       bed.width - block.width < 0 ? 0 : bed.width - block.width,
 1255:     );
 1256: 
 1257:     final nextY = _clampDouble(
 1258:       (bed.height - block.height) / 2,
 1259:       0,
 1260:       bed.height - block.height < 0 ? 0 : bed.height - block.height,
 1261:     );
 1262: 
 1263:     if (nextX == block.x && nextY == block.y) return;
 1264: 
 1265:     _recordHistory();
 1266: 
 1267:     final updatedBlocks = [...bed.cropBlocks];
 1268: 
 1269:     updatedBlocks[blockIndex] = block.copyWith(x: nextX, y: nextY);
 1270: 
 1271:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
 1272:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(cropBlocks: updatedBlocks);
 1273: 
 1274:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
 1275: 
 1276:     selectedBedId = bed.id;
 1277: 
 1278:     notifyListeners();
 1279:   }
 1280: 
 1281:   void removeCropBlock({required String bedId, required String blockId}) {
 1282:     final bedIndex = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == bedId);
 1283:     if (bedIndex == -1) return;
 1284: 
 1285:     final bed = beds[bedIndex];
 1286: 
 1287:     final updatedBlocks = bed.cropBlocks
 1288:         .where((block) => block.id != blockId)
 1289:         .toList();
 1290: 
 1291:     if (updatedBlocks.length == bed.cropBlocks.length) return;
 1292: 
 1293:     _recordHistory();
 1294: 
 1295:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
 1296: 
 1297:     updatedBeds[bedIndex] = bed.copyWith(cropBlocks: updatedBlocks);
 1298: 
 1299:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
 1300: 
 1301:     notifyListeners();
 1302:   }
 1303: 
 1304:   void updateSelectedBedStatus(BedStatus status) {
 1305:     _updateSelectedBed((bed) => bed.copyWith(status: status));
 1306:   }
 1307: 
 1308:   void updateSelectedBedHealth(String value) {
 1309:     final parsed = double.tryParse(value);
 1310:     if (parsed == null) return;
 1311: 
 1312:     final normalized = _clampDouble(parsed / 100, 0.0, 1.0);
 1313: 
 1314:     _updateSelectedBed((bed) => bed.copyWith(healthPercent: normalized));
 1315:   }
 1316: 
 1317:   void _updateSelectedBed(Bed Function(Bed bed) update) {
 1318:     if (selectedBedId == null) return;
 1319: 
 1320:     final index = beds.indexWhere((bed) => bed.id == selectedBedId);
 1321:     if (index == -1) return;
 1322: 
 1323:     final currentBed = beds[index];
 1324:     final updatedBed = update(currentBed);
 1325: 
 1326:     if (updatedBed == currentBed) return;
 1327: 
 1328:     if (!allowOverlap && _wouldOverlap(updatedBed, currentBed.id)) return;
 1329: 
 1330:     _recordHistory();
 1331: 
 1332:     final updatedBeds = [...beds];
 1333:     updatedBeds[index] = updatedBed;
 1334: 
 1335:     project = project.copyWith(beds: updatedBeds, updatedAt: DateTime.now());
 1336: 
 1337:     notifyListeners();
 1338:   }
 1339: 
 1340:   Offset _nextCropPlacementPosition({
 1341:     required Bed bed,
 1342:     required String cropName,
 1343:     required double spacing,
 1344:   }) {
 1345:     final existingForCrop = bed.cropPlacements
 1346:         .where(
 1347:           (placement) =>
 1348:               placement.cropName.trim().toLowerCase() ==
 1349:               cropName.trim().toLowerCase(),
 1350:         )
 1351:         .length;
 1352: 
 1353:     final columnCount = (bed.width / spacing).floor();
 1354:     final safeColumnCount = columnCount < 1 ? 1 : columnCount;
 1355: 
 1356:     final column = existingForCrop % safeColumnCount;
 1357:     final row = existingForCrop ~/ safeColumnCount;
 1358: 
 1359:     final rawX = spacing / 2 + column * spacing;
 1360:     final rawY = spacing / 2 + row * spacing;
 1361: 
 1362:     return Offset(
 1363:       _clampDouble(rawX, spacing / 2, bed.width - spacing / 2),
 1364:       _clampDouble(rawY, spacing / 2, bed.height - spacing / 2),
 1365:     );
 1366:   }
 1367: 
 1368:   Offset _nextCropBlockPosition({
 1369:     required Bed bed,
 1370:     required String cropName,
 1371:     required double blockWidth,
 1372:     required double blockHeight,
 1373:     required double spacing,
 1374:   }) {
 1375:     final existingForCrop = bed.cropBlocks
 1376:         .where(
 1377:           (block) =>
 1378:               block.cropName.trim().toLowerCase() ==
 1379:               cropName.trim().toLowerCase(),
 1380:         )
 1381:         .length;
 1382: 
 1383:     final availableWidth = bed.width - blockWidth;
 1384:     final availableHeight = bed.height - blockHeight;
 1385: 
 1386:     final columnCount = availableWidth <= 0
 1387:         ? 1
 1388:         : ((availableWidth / spacing).floor() + 1).clamp(1, 9999);
 1389: 
 1390:     final column = existingForCrop % columnCount;
 1391:     final row = existingForCrop ~/ columnCount;
 1392: 
 1393:     final rawX = column * spacing;
 1394:     final rawY = row * spacing;
 1395: 
 1396:     return Offset(
 1397:       _clampDouble(rawX, 0, availableWidth),
 1398:       _clampDouble(rawY, 0, availableHeight),
 1399:     );
 1400:   }
 1401: 
 1402:   double _snapCropCoordinate({
 1403:     required double value,
 1404:     required double spacing,
 1405:     required double max,
 1406:   }) {
 1407:     if (max <= 0) return 0;
 1408:     if (spacing <= 0) return _clampDouble(value, 0, max);
 1409: 
 1410:     final halfSpacing = spacing / 2;
 1411: 
 1412:     if (max <= halfSpacing) {
 1413:       return max / 2;
 1414:     }
 1415: 
 1416:     final snapped =
 1417:         ((value - halfSpacing) / spacing).round() * spacing + halfSpacing;
 1418: 
 1419:     return _clampDouble(snapped, halfSpacing, max - halfSpacing);
 1420:   }
 1421: 
 1422:   double _snapCropBlockCoordinate({
 1423:     required double value,
 1424:     required double spacing,
 1425:     required double min,
 1426:     required double max,
 1427:   }) {
 1428:     if (max < min) return min;
 1429:     if (spacing <= 0) return _clampDouble(value, min, max);
 1430: 
 1431:     final snapped = (value / spacing).round() * spacing;
 1432: 
 1433:     return _clampDouble(snapped, min, max);
 1434:   }
 1435: 
 1436:   double _snapCropBlockSize({
 1437:     required double value,
 1438:     required double spacing,
 1439:     required double min,
 1440:     required double max,
 1441:   }) {
 1442:     if (max < min) return min;
 1443:     if (spacing <= 0) return _clampDouble(value, min, max);
 1444: 
 1445:     final snapped = (value / spacing).round() * spacing;
 1446: 
 1447:     return _clampDouble(snapped, min, max);
 1448:   }
 1449: 
 1450:   bool _wouldOverlap(Bed candidate, String candidateId) {
 1451:     for (final other in beds) {
 1452:       if (other.id == candidateId) continue;
 1453: 
 1454:       if (_bedsOverlap(candidate, other)) {
 1455:         return true;
 1456:       }
 1457:     }
 1458: 
 1459:     return false;
 1460:   }
 1461: 
 1462:   bool _bedsOverlap(Bed a, Bed b) {
 1463:     final leftA = a.x;
 1464:     final rightA = a.x + a.width;
 1465:     final topA = a.y;
 1466:     final bottomA = a.y + a.height;
 1467: 
 1468:     final leftB = b.x;
 1469:     final rightB = b.x + b.width;
 1470:     final topB = b.y;
 1471:     final bottomB = b.y + b.height;
 1472: 
 1473:     return leftA < rightB && rightA > leftB && topA < bottomB && bottomA > topB;
 1474:   }
 1475: 
 1476:   void _recordHistory() {
 1477:     _undoStack.add(project);
 1478:     _redoStack.clear();
 1479: 
 1480:     const maxHistory = 50;
 1481: 
 1482:     if (_undoStack.length > maxHistory) {
 1483:       _undoStack.removeAt(0);
 1484:     }
 1485:   }
 1486: 
 1487:   double _snap(double value, double step) {
 1488:     return (value / step).round() * step;
 1489:   }
 1490: 
 1491:   double _clampDouble(double value, double min, double max) {
 1492:     if (max < min) return min;
 1493:     return value.clamp(min, max).toDouble();
 1494:   }
 1495: }

DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\features\planner\services\frost_forecast_service.dart
============================================================

    1: import 'dart:convert';
    2: 
    3: import 'package:http/http.dart' as http;
    4: 
    5: import '../ui/widgets/frost_risk_widget.dart';
    6: 
    7: class FrostForecastService {
    8:   const FrostForecastService();
    9: 
   10:   static const double defaultLatitude = -41.5134;
   11:   static const double defaultLongitude = 173.9612;
   12: 
   13:   Future<List<FrostForecastDay>> fetchForecast({
   14:     double latitude = defaultLatitude,
   15:     double longitude = defaultLongitude,
   16:   }) async {
   17:     final uri = Uri.https('api.open-meteo.com', '/v1/forecast', {
   18:       'latitude': latitude.toString(),
   19:       'longitude': longitude.toString(),
   20:       'daily': 'temperature_2m_min,temperature_2m_max,weather_code',
   21:       'timezone': 'auto',
   22:       'forecast_days': '7',
   23:     });
   24: 
   25:     final response = await http.get(uri);
   26: 
   27:     if (response.statusCode < 200 || response.statusCode >= 300) {
   28:       throw Exception('Weather request failed: ${response.statusCode}');
   29:     }
   30: 
   31:     final decoded = jsonDecode(response.body);
   32: 
   33:     if (decoded is! Map<String, dynamic>) {
   34:       throw Exception('Invalid weather response.');
   35:     }
   36: 
   37:     final daily = decoded['daily'];
   38: 
   39:     if (daily is! Map<String, dynamic>) {
   40:       throw Exception('Weather response missing daily forecast.');
   41:     }
   42: 
   43:     final times = _readList(daily['time']);
   44:     final lows = _readList(daily['temperature_2m_min']);
   45:     final highs = _readList(daily['temperature_2m_max']);
   46:     final codes = _readList(daily['weather_code']);
   47: 
   48:     final count = [
   49:       times.length,
   50:       lows.length,
   51:       highs.length,
   52:       codes.length,
   53:     ].reduce((a, b) => a < b ? a : b);
   54: 
   55:     final days = <FrostForecastDay>[];
   56: 
   57:     for (var i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   58:       final date = DateTime.tryParse(times[i].toString());
   59:       final low = _toDouble(lows[i]);
   60:       final high = _toDouble(highs[i]);
   61:       final code = _toInt(codes[i]);
   62: 
   63:       if (date == null || low == null || high == null) continue;
   64: 
   65:       days.add(
   66:         FrostForecastDay(
   67:           date: date,
   68:           lowC: low,
   69:           highC: high,
   70:           condition: _conditionFromCode(code),
   71:         ),
   72:       );
   73:     }
   74: 
   75:     if (days.isEmpty) {
   76:       throw Exception('No usable frost forecast data returned.');
   77:     }
   78: 
   79:     return days;
   80:   }
   81: 
   82:   static List<dynamic> _readList(Object? value) {
   83:     if (value is List) return value;
   84:     return const [];
   85:   }
   86: 
   87:   static double? _toDouble(Object? value) {
   88:     if (value is num) return value.toDouble();
   89:     if (value is String) return double.tryParse(value);
   90:     return null;
   91:   }
   92: 
   93:   static int _toInt(Object? value) {
   94:     if (value is int) return value;
   95:     if (value is num) return value.round();
   96:     if (value is String) return int.tryParse(value) ?? 0;
   97:     return 0;
   98:   }
   99: 
  100:   static String _conditionFromCode(int code) {
  101:     if (code == 0) return 'Clear';
  102:     if (code == 1 || code == 2 || code == 3) return 'Cloud';
  103:     if (code == 45 || code == 48) return 'Fog';
  104:     if (code >= 51 && code <= 67) return 'Rain';
  105:     if (code >= 71 && code <= 77) return 'Snow';
  106:     if (code >= 80 && code <= 82) return 'Showers';
  107:     if (code >= 95) return 'Storm';
  108:     return 'Weather';
  109:   }
  110: }

   18:   static String? consumePlant() {

   21:

   23:

    1: import 'dart:convert';

    6: 
    7: class ProjectStorageService {
    8:   static const String _currentProjectKey = 'garden_planner.current_project';
    9: 
   10:   Future<void> saveProject(GardenProject project) async {
   11:     final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
   12: 
   13:     await prefs.setString(_currentProjectKey, jsonEncode(project.toJson()));
   14:   }
   15: 
   16:   Future<GardenProject?> loadProject() async {
   17:     final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
   18:     final rawJson = prefs.getString(_currentProjectKey);
   19: 
   20:     if (rawJson == null || rawJson.trim().isEmpty) {
   21:       return null;
   22:     }
   23: 
   24:     final decoded = jsonDecode(rawJson);
   25: 
   26:     if (decoded is! Map<String, dynamic>) {
   27:       throw const FormatException('Saved project JSON must be an object.');
   28:     }
   29: 
   30:     return GardenProject.fromJson(decoded);
   31:   }
   32: 
   33:   Future<void> clearProject() async {
   34:     final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
   35: 
   36:     await prefs.remove(_currentProjectKey);
   37:   }
   38: }

    1: import 'dart:convert';
    2: 
    3: import 'package:http/http.dart' as http;
    4: 
    5: enum SpraySuitability { good, caution, noSpray }
    6: 
    7: class SprayConditions {
    8:   const SprayConditions({
    9:     required this.temperatureC,
   10:     required this.relativeHumidity,
   11:     required this.windSpeedKmh,
   12:     required this.windGustKmh,
   13:     required this.precipitationMm,
   14:     required this.uvIndex,
   15:     required this.weatherCode,
   16:     required this.updatedAt,
   17:   });
   18: 
   19:   final double temperatureC;
   20:   final int relativeHumidity;
   21:   final double windSpeedKmh;
   22:   final double windGustKmh;
   23:   final double precipitationMm;
   24:   final double uvIndex;
   25:   final int weatherCode;
   26:   final DateTime updatedAt;
   27: 
   28:   SpraySuitability get suitability {
   29:     if (precipitationMm > 0.2) return SpraySuitability.noSpray;
   30:     if (windSpeedKmh >= 18 || windGustKmh >= 28) {
   31:       return SpraySuitability.noSpray;
   32:     }
   33:     if (uvIndex >= 8) return SpraySuitability.noSpray;
   34:     if (temperatureC >= 29) return SpraySuitability.noSpray;
   35: 
   36:     if (windSpeedKmh >= 12 || windGustKmh >= 20) {
   37:       return SpraySuitability.caution;
   38:     }
   39:     if (relativeHumidity >= 90) return SpraySuitability.caution;
   40:     if (relativeHumidity <= 35) return SpraySuitability.caution;
   41:     if (uvIndex >= 6) return SpraySuitability.caution;
   42:     if (temperatureC >= 25) return SpraySuitability.caution;
   43: 
   44:     return SpraySuitability.good;
   45:   }
   46: 
   47:   String get conditionLabel {
   48:     if (precipitationMm > 0.2) return 'Rain';
   49:     if (weatherCode == 0) return 'Clear';
   50:     if (weatherCode == 1 || weatherCode == 2 || weatherCode == 3) {
   51:       return 'Cloud';
   52:     }
   53:     if (weatherCode == 45 || weatherCode == 48) return 'Fog';
   54:     if (weatherCode >= 51 && weatherCode <= 67) return 'Rain';
   55:     if (weatherCode >= 71 && weatherCode <= 77) return 'Snow';
   56:     if (weatherCode >= 80 && weatherCode <= 82) return 'Showers';
   57:     if (weatherCode >= 95) return 'Storm';
   58:     return 'Weather';
   59:   }
   60: 
   61:   String get recommendation {
   62:     switch (suitability) {
   63:       case SpraySuitability.good:
   64:         return 'Good spray window. Conditions are calm and dry.';
   65:       case SpraySuitability.caution:
   66:         return 'Spray with caution. Check wind, humidity, heat, and label limits.';
   67:       case SpraySuitability.noSpray:
   68:         return 'Do not spray now. Conditions are outside safe spray limits.';
   69:     }
   70:   }
   71: }
   72: 
   73: class SprayConditionsService {
   74:   const SprayConditionsService();
   75: 
   76:   static const double defaultLatitude = -41.5134;
   77:   static const double defaultLongitude = 173.9612;
   78: 
   79:   Future<SprayConditions> fetchCurrent({
   80:     double latitude = defaultLatitude,
   81:     double longitude = defaultLongitude,
   82:   }) async {
   83:     final uri = Uri.https('api.open-meteo.com', '/v1/forecast', {
   84:       'latitude': latitude.toString(),
   85:       'longitude': longitude.toString(),
   86:       'current':
   87:           'temperature_2m,relative_humidity_2m,precipitation,weather_code,wind_speed_10m,wind_gusts_10m,uv_index',
   88:       'wind_speed_unit': 'kmh',
   89:       'timezone': 'auto',
   90:       'forecast_days': '1',
   91:     });
   92: 
   93:     final response = await http.get(uri);
   94: 
   95:     if (response.statusCode < 200 || response.statusCode >= 300) {
   96:       throw Exception('Spray weather request failed: ${response.statusCode}');
   97:     }
   98:

  100: 
  101:     if (decoded is! Map<String, dynamic>) {
  102:       throw Exception('Invalid spray weather response.');
  103:     }
  104:

  107:     if (current is! Map<String, dynamic>) {
  108:       throw Exception('Spray weather response missing current conditions.');
  109:     }

  115:       temperatureC: _toDouble(current['temperature_2m']),
  116:       relativeHumidity: _toInt(current['relative_humidity_2m']),
  117:       windSpeedKmh: _toDouble(current['wind_speed_10m']),
  118:       windGustKmh: _toDouble(current['wind_gusts_10m']),
  119:       precipitationMm: _toDouble(current['precipitation']),
  120:       uvIndex: _toDouble(current['uv_index']),
  121:       weatherCode: _toInt(current['weather_code']),
  122:       updatedAt: updatedAt,
  123:     );
  124:   }
  125: 
  126:   static double _toDouble(Object? value) {
  127:     if (value is num) return value.toDouble();
  128:     if (value is String) return double.tryParse(value) ?? 0;
  129:     return 0;
  130:   }
  131: 
  132:   static int _toInt(Object? value) {
  133:     if (value is int) return value;
  134:     if (value is num) return value.round();
  135:     if (value is String) return int.tryParse(value) ?? 0;
  136:     return 0;
  137:   }

  141:   }
  142: 
  143:   List<Seedling> _filteredSeedlings() {
  144:     final seedlings = [...widget.seedlings]
  145:       ..sort((a, b) => b.sowDate.compareTo(a.sowDate));
  146: 
  147:     switch (filter) {
  148:       case SeedlingFilter.active:
  149:         return seedlings.where((s) => !s.isTransplanted).toList();
  150:       case SeedlingFilter.ready:
  151:         return seedlings.where(_isReady).toList();
  152:       case SeedlingFilter.overdue:
  153:         return seedlings.where(_isOverdue).toList();
  154:       case SeedlingFilter.transplanted:
  155:         return seedlings.where((s) => s.isTransplanted).toList();
  156:       case SeedlingFilter.all:
  157:         return seedlings;
  158:     }
  159:   }
  160: 
  161:   bool _isReady(Seedling seedling) {
  162:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return false;
  163:     final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(seedling.seedKey);
  164:     final age = seedling.daysSinceSowing(DateTime.now());
  165:     return age >= catalog.transplantMinDays;
  166:   }
  167: 
  168:   bool _isOverdue(Seedling seedling) {
  169:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return false;
  170:     final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(seedling.seedKey);
  171:     final age = seedling.daysSinceSowing(DateTime.now());
  172:     return age > catalog.transplantMaxDays;
  173:   }
  174: 
  175:   String _bedName(String? bedId) {
  176:     if (bedId == null || bedId.trim().isEmpty) return 'No bed assigned';
  177: 
  178:     for (final bed in widget.beds) {
  179:       if (bed.id == bedId) {
  180:         return bed.name.trim().isEmpty ? 'Bed ${bed.number}' : bed.name.trim();
  181:       }
  182:     }
  183: 
  184:     return 'Missing bed';
  185:   }
  186: 
  187:   void _quickSow(SowCalendarItem calendarItem) {
  188:     final seed = calendarItem.seed;
  189:     final direct = calendarItem.method == SowMethod.direct;
  190: 
  191:     widget.onAddSeedling(
  192:       Seedling(
  193:         id: 'seedling-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}',
  194:         seedKey: seed.key,
  195:         cropName: seed.cropName,
  196:         emoji: seed.emoji,
  197:         category: seed.category,
  198:         variety: '',
  199:         sowDate: DateTime.now(),
  200:         trayType: direct ? 'Direct sow' : 'Tray',
  201:         trayCount: 1,
  202:         location: direct ? 'Garden bed' : 'Seedling area',
  203:         notes: calendarItem.note,
  204:       ),
  205:     );
  206: 
  207:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  208:       SnackBar(content: Text('${seed.cropName} added to Seedlings.')),
  209:     );
  210:   }
  211: 
  212:   Future<void> _openEditDialog(Seedling seedling) async {
  213:     final result = await showDialog<Seedling>(
  214:       context: context,
  215:       builder: (context) {
  216:         return EditSeedlingDialog(seedling: seedling, beds: widget.beds);
  217:       },
  218:     );
  219: 
  220:     if (result == null) return;
  221: 
  222:     widget.onUpdateSeedling(seedling.id, (_) => result);
  223:   }
  224: 
  225:   Future<void> _openTransplantDialog(Seedling seedling) async {
  226:     if (widget.beds.isEmpty) {
  227:       ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  228:         const SnackBar(
  229:           content: Text('Add a bed before transplanting seedlings.'),
  230:         ),
  231:       );
  232:       return;
  233:     }
  234: 
  235:     final result = await showDialog<TransplantSeedlingResult>(
  236:       context: context,
  237:       builder: (context) {
  238:         return TransplantSeedlingDialogV2(
  239:           seedling: seedling,
  240:           beds: widget.beds,
  241:         );
  242:       },
  243:     );
  244: 
  245:     if (!mounted) return;
  246: 
  247:     if (result == null || result.bedId.trim().isEmpty) return;
  248: 
  249:     final transplant = widget.onTransplantSeedling;
  250: 
  251:     if (transplant == null) {
  252:       widget.onUpdateSeedling(
  253:         seedling.id,
  254:         (current) => current.copyWith(
  255:           bedId: result.bedId,
  256:           transplantedAt: DateTime.now(),
  257:         ),
  258:       );
  259:     } else {
  260:       transplant(
  261:         seedlingId: seedling.id,
  262:         bedId: result.bedId,
  263:         addCropBlockToMap: result.addCropBlockToMap,
  264:       );
  265:     }
  266: 
  267:     final bedName = _bedName(result.bedId);
  268: 
  269:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  270:       SnackBar(
  271:         content: Text(
  272:           result.addCropBlockToMap
  273:               ? '${seedling.cropName} transplanted to $bedName and added to the map.'
  274:               : '${seedling.cropName} transplanted to $bedName.',
  275:         ),
  276:       ),
  277:     );
  278: 
  279:     if (result.addCropBlockToMap) {
  280:       widget.onOpenMapView?.call();
  281:     }
  282:   }
  283: 
  284:   Future<void> _openAddDialog() async {
  285:     final result = await showDialog<Seedling>(
  286:       context: context,
  287:       builder: (context) {
  288:         return AddSeedlingDialog(beds: widget.beds);
  289:       },
  290:     );
  291: 
  292:     if (result == null) return;
  293:     widget.onAddSeedling(result);
  294:   }
  295: 
  296:   Future<void> _confirmDelete(Seedling seedling) async {
  297:     final confirmed = await showDialog<bool>(
  298:       context: context,
  299:       builder: (context) {
  300:         return AlertDialog(
  301:           backgroundColor: GardenTheme.panel,
  302:           title: const Text('Delete seedling?'),
  303:           content: Text(
  304:             'Delete ${seedling.cropName} from the Seedling Tracker â€¢ rev-20260425-061108?',
  305:           ),
  306:           actions: [
  307:             TextButton(
  308:               onPressed: () {
  309:                 Navigator.of(context).pop(false);
  310:               },
  311:               child: const Text('Cancel'),
  312:             ),
  313:             FilledButton(
  314:               onPressed: () {
  315:                 Navigator.of(context).pop(true);
  316:               },
  317:               child: const Text('Delete'),
  318:             ),
  319:           ],
  320:         );
  321:       },
  322:     );
  323: 
  324:     if (confirmed == true) {
  325:       widget.onDeleteSeedling(seedling.id);
  326:     }
  327:   }
  328: }

  499: class _PlantNowPanel extends StatelessWidget {
  500:   const _PlantNowPanel({
  501:     required this.plan,
  502:     required this.onQuickSow,
  503:     required this.onOpenCatalog,
  504:   });
  505: 
  506:   final MonthlySowPlan plan;
  507:   final ValueChanged<SowCalendarItem> onQuickSow;
  508:   final VoidCallback onOpenCatalog;
  509: 
  510:   @override
  511:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  512:     final nextMonth = plan.month == 12 ? 1 : plan.month + 1;
  513: 
  514:     return Container(
  515:       width: double.infinity,
  516:       margin: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(14, 0, 14, 10),
  517:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
  518:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  519:         color: GardenTheme.panel,
  520:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
  521:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  522:       ),
  523:       child: LayoutBuilder(
  524:         builder: (context, constraints) {
  525:           final stacked = constraints.maxWidth < 920;
  526: 
  527:           final current = _CalendarColumn(
  528:             title: 'Plant Now',
  529:             subtitle: SowCalendar.monthName(plan.month),
  530:             tray: plan.tray,
  531:             direct: plan.direct,
  532:             either: plan.either,
  533:             emptyText: 'No priority sowing listed for this month.',
  534:             onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
  535:           );
  536: 
  537:           final next = _CalendarColumn(
  538:             title: 'Prepare Next',
  539:             subtitle: SowCalendar.monthName(nextMonth),
  540:             tray: plan.nextMonthTray,
  541:             direct: plan.nextMonthDirect,
  542:             either: plan.nextMonthEither,
  543:             emptyText: 'No next-month items listed.',
  544:             onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
  545:           );
  546: 
  547:           if (stacked) {
  548:             return Column(
  549:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  550:               children: [
  551:                 _PlantNowIntro(onOpenCatalog: onOpenCatalog),
  552:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
  553:                 current,
  554:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
  555:                 next,
  556:               ],
  557:             );
  558:           }
  559: 
  560:           return Row(
  561:             crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  562:             children: [
  563:               Expanded(
  564:                 flex: 5,
  565:                 child: _PlantNowIntro(onOpenCatalog: onOpenCatalog),
  566:               ),
  567:               const SizedBox(width: 14),
  568:               Expanded(flex: 6, child: current),
  569:               const SizedBox(width: 14),
  570:               Expanded(flex: 5, child: next),
  571:             ],
  572:           );
  573:         },
  574:       ),
  575:     );
  576:   }
  577: }

  634: class _CalendarColumn extends StatelessWidget {
  635:   const _CalendarColumn({
  636:     required this.title,
  637:     required this.subtitle,
  638:     required this.tray,
  639:     required this.direct,
  640:     required this.either,
  641:     required this.emptyText,
  642:     required this.onQuickSow,
  643:   });
  644: 
  645:   final String title;
  646:   final String subtitle;
  647:   final List<SowCalendarItem> tray;
  648:   final List<SowCalendarItem> direct;
  649:   final List<SowCalendarItem> either;
  650:   final String emptyText;
  651:   final ValueChanged<SowCalendarItem> onQuickSow;
  652: 
  653:   @override
  654:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  655:     final hasItems = tray.isNotEmpty || direct.isNotEmpty || either.isNotEmpty;
  656: 
  657:     return Container(
  658:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(13),
  659:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  660:         color: Colors.white,
  661:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  662:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  663:       ),
  664:       child: Column(
  665:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  666:         children: [
  667:           Text(
  668:             title.toUpperCase(),
  669:             style: const TextStyle(
  670:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
  671:               fontSize: 10,
  672:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  673:               letterSpacing: 1.0,
  674:             ),
  675:           ),
  676:           const SizedBox(height: 3),
  677:           Text(
  678:             subtitle,
  679:             style: const TextStyle(
  680:               color: GardenTheme.ink,
  681:               fontSize: 18,
  682:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  683:             ),
  684:           ),
  685:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  686:           if (!hasItems)
  687:             Text(
  688:               emptyText,
  689:               style: const TextStyle(
  690:                 color: GardenTheme.muted,
  691:                 fontSize: 12,
  692:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  693:               ),
  694:             )
  695:           else ...[
  696:             if (tray.isNotEmpty)
  697:               _CalendarGroup(
  698:                 label: 'Start in trays',
  699:                 icon: Icons.inventory_2_outlined,
  700:                 items: tray,
  701:                 onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
  702:               ),
  703:             if (direct.isNotEmpty)
  704:               _CalendarGroup(
  705:                 label: 'Direct sow',
  706:                 icon: Icons.grass_outlined,
  707:                 items: direct,
  708:                 onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
  709:               ),
  710:             if (either.isNotEmpty)
  711:               _CalendarGroup(
  712:                 label: 'Tray or direct',
  713:                 icon: Icons.compare_arrows,
  714:                 items: either,
  715:                 onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
  716:               ),
  717:           ],
  718:         ],
  719:       ),
  720:     );
  721:   }
  722: }

  724: class _CalendarGroup extends StatelessWidget {
  725:   const _CalendarGroup({
  726:     required this.label,
  727:     required this.icon,
  728:     required this.items,
  729:     required this.onQuickSow,
  730:   });

  736: 
  737:   @override
  738:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {

  772:       ),
  773:     );

  777: class _CalendarSeedChip extends StatelessWidget {
  778:   const _CalendarSeedChip({required this.item, required this.onQuickSow});
  779: 
  780:   final SowCalendarItem item;
  781:   final VoidCallback onQuickSow;
  782: 
  783:   @override
  784:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  785:     final seed = item.seed;
  786: 
  787:     return Tooltip(
  788:       message: item.note,
  789:       child: Material(
  790:         color: const Color(0xFFEEF8F0),
  791:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  792:         child: InkWell(
  793:           onTap: onQuickSow,
  794:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  795:           child: Container(
  796:             height: 34,
  797:             padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10),
  798:             decoration: BoxDecoration(
  799:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  800:               border: Border.all(
  801:                 color: GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.25),
  802:               ),
  803:             ),
  804:             child: Row(
  805:               mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  806:               children: [
  807:                 Text(seed.emoji, style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 14)),
  808:                 const SizedBox(width: 5),
  809:                 Text(
  810:                   seed.cropName,
  811:                   style: const TextStyle(
  812:                     color: GardenTheme.good,
  813:                     fontSize: 11,
  814:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  815:                   ),
  816:                 ),
  817:                 const SizedBox(width: 5),

  979: class _SeedlingCard extends StatelessWidget {
  980:   const _SeedlingCard({
  981:     required this.seedling,
  982:     required this.bedName,
  983:     required this.onWater,
  984:     required this.onFeed,
  985:     required this.onTransplant,
  986:     required this.onEdit,
  987:     required this.onDelete,
  988:   });
  989: 
  990:   final Seedling seedling;
  991:   final String bedName;
  992:   final VoidCallback onWater;
  993:   final VoidCallback onFeed;
  994:   final VoidCallback onTransplant;
  995:   final VoidCallback onEdit;
  996:   final VoidCallback onDelete;
  997: 
  998:   @override
  999:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1000:     final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(seedling.seedKey);
 1001:     final age = seedling.daysSinceSowing(DateTime.now());
 1002:     final germinationStart = seedling.sowDate.add(
 1003:       Duration(days: catalog.germinationMinDays),
 1004:     );
 1005:     final germinationEnd = seedling.sowDate.add(
 1006:       Duration(days: catalog.germinationMaxDays),
 1007:     );
 1008:     final transplantStart = seedling.sowDate.add(
 1009:       Duration(days: catalog.transplantMinDays),
 1010:     );
 1011:     final transplantEnd = seedling.sowDate.add(
 1012:       Duration(days: catalog.transplantMaxDays),
 1013:     );
 1014:     final stage = _stageText(seedling, catalog, age);
 1015:     final color = _stageColor(seedling, catalog, age);
 1016:     final progress = _progress(seedling, catalog, age);
 1017: 
 1018:     return Container(
 1019:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1020:         color: GardenTheme.panel,
 1021:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
 1022:         border: Border.all(color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.34)),
 1023:       ),
 1024:       child: ClipRRect(
 1025:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
 1026:         child: Column(
 1027:           children: [
 1028:             Padding(
 1029:               padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(14, 14, 14, 10),
 1030:               child: Row(
 1031:                 crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1032:                 children: [
 1033:                   Text(seedling.emoji, style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 32)),
 1034:                   const SizedBox(width: 10),
 1035:                   Expanded(
 1036:                     child: Column(
 1037:                       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1038:                       children: [
 1039:                         Text(
 1040:                           seedling.cropName,
 1041:                           maxLines: 1,
 1042:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 1043:                           style: const TextStyle(
 1044:                             color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1045:                             fontSize: 17,
 1046:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1047:                           ),
 1048:                         ),
 1049:                         const SizedBox(height: 3),
 1050:                         Text(
 1051:                           seedling.variety.trim().isEmpty
 1052:                               ? seedling.category
 1053:                               : '${seedling.variety} - ${seedling.category}',
 1054:                           maxLines: 1,
 1055:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 1056:                           style: const TextStyle(
 1057:                             color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1058:                             fontSize: 12,
 1059:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1060:                           ),
 1061:                         ),
 1062:                       ],
 1063:                     ),
 1064:                   ),
 1065:                   const SizedBox(width: 8),
 1066:                   _StageBadge(label: stage, color: color),
 1067:                 ],
 1068:               ),
 1069:             ),
 1070:             Padding(
 1071:               padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 14),
 1072:               child: ClipRRect(
 1073:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
 1074:                 child: LinearProgressIndicator(
 1075:                   value: progress,
 1076:                   minHeight: 7,
 1077:                   backgroundColor: GardenTheme.paper,
 1078:                 ),
 1079:               ),
 1080:             ),
 1081:             const SizedBox(height: 10),
 1082:             const Divider(height: 1, color: GardenTheme.border),
 1083:             Expanded(
 1084:               child: Padding(
 1085:                 padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
 1086:                 child: Column(
 1087:                   children: [
 1088:                     Row(
 1089:                       children: [
 1090:                         Expanded(
 1091:                           child: _FactBox(label: 'Age', value: '$age days'),
 1092:                         ),
 1093:                         const SizedBox(width: 8),
 1094:                         Expanded(
 1095:                           child: _FactBox(
 1096:                             label: 'Sown',
 1097:                             value: _shortDate(seedling.sowDate),
 1098:                           ),
 1099:                         ),
 1100:                         const SizedBox(width: 8),
 1101:                         Expanded(
 1102:                           child: _FactBox(
 1103:                             label: 'Batch',
 1104:                             value: '${seedling.trayCount} ${seedling.trayType}',
 1105:                           ),
 1106:                         ),
 1107:                       ],
 1108:                     ),
 1109:                     const SizedBox(height: 10),
 1110:                     _TimelineRow(
 1111:                       icon: Icons.grass_outlined,
 1112:                       label: 'Germination',
 1113:                       value:
 1114:                           '${_shortDate(germinationStart)} to ${_shortDate(germinationEnd)}',
 1115:                     ),
 1116:                     _TimelineRow(
 1117:                       icon: Icons.yard_outlined,
 1118:                       label: 'Transplant',
 1119:                       value:
 1120:                           '${_shortDate(transplantStart)} to ${_shortDate(transplantEnd)}',
 1121:                     ),
 1122:                     _TimelineRow(
 1123:                       icon: Icons.place_outlined,
 1124:                       label: 'Location',
 1125:                       value: seedling.location.trim().isEmpty
 1126:                           ? 'Seedling area'
 1127:                           : seedling.location.trim(),
 1128:                     ),
 1129:                     _TimelineRow(
 1130:                       icon: Icons.grid_view_outlined,
 1131:                       label: 'Bed',
 1132:                       value: bedName,
 1133:                     ),
 1134:                     const Spacer(),
 1135:                     Row(
 1136:                       children: [
 1137:                         _MiniAction(
 1138:                           icon: Icons.water_drop_outlined,
 1139:                           label: 'Water',
 1140:                           onTap: onWater,
 1141:                         ),
 1142:                         const SizedBox(width: 7),
 1143:                         _MiniAction(
 1144:                           icon: Icons.compost_outlined,
 1145:                           label: 'Feed',
 1146:                           onTap: onFeed,
 1147:                         ),
 1148:                         const SizedBox(width: 7),
 1149:                         if (!seedling.isTransplanted)
 1150:                           _MiniAction(
 1151:                             icon: Icons.task_alt,
 1152:                             label: 'Transplant',
 1153:                             onTap: onTransplant,
 1154:                           ),
 1155:                         const Spacer(),
 1156:                         IconButton(
 1157:                           tooltip: 'Edit seedling',
 1158:                           onPressed: onEdit,
 1159:                           icon: const Icon(Icons.edit_outlined),
 1160:                           color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1161:                         ),
 1162:                         IconButton(
 1163:                           tooltip: 'Delete',
 1164:                           onPressed: onDelete,
 1165:                           icon: const Icon(Icons.delete_outline),
 1166:                           color: GardenTheme.bad,
 1167:                         ),
 1168:                       ],
 1169:                     ),
 1170:                   ],
 1171:                 ),
 1172:               ),
 1173:             ),
 1174:           ],
 1175:         ),
 1176:       ),
 1177:     );
 1178:   }
 1179: 
 1180:   static String _stageText(
 1181:     Seedling seedling,
 1182:     SeedCatalogItem catalog,
 1183:     int age,
 1184:   ) {
 1185:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return 'Transplanted';
 1186:     if (age > catalog.transplantMaxDays) return 'Overdue';
 1187:     if (age >= catalog.transplantMinDays) return 'Ready';
 1188:     if (age >= catalog.germinationMinDays) return 'Germinating';
 1189:     return 'Waiting';
 1190:   }
 1191: 
 1192:   static Color _stageColor(
 1193:     Seedling seedling,
 1194:     SeedCatalogItem catalog,
 1195:     int age,
 1196:   ) {
 1197:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return GardenTheme.good;
 1198:     if (age > catalog.transplantMaxDays) return GardenTheme.bad;
 1199:     if (age >= catalog.transplantMinDays) return GardenTheme.warn;
 1200:     if (age >= catalog.germinationMinDays) return GardenTheme.good;
 1201:     return GardenTheme.muted;
 1202:   }
 1203: 
 1204:   static double _progress(Seedling seedling, SeedCatalogItem catalog, int age) {
 1205:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return 1;
 1206: 
 1207:     final target = catalog.transplantMaxDays;
 1208:     if (target <= 0) return 0;
 1209: 
 1210:     return (age / target).clamp(0, 1).toDouble();
 1211:   }
 1212: }
 1213:

 1215:   const _StageBadge({required this.label, required this.color});

 1218:   final Color color;

 1221:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1222:     return Container(

 1224:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 9, vertical: 5),
 1225:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1226:         color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.12),
 1227:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
 1228:         border: Border.all(color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.28)),
 1229:       ),
 1230:       child: Text(
 1231:         label.toUpperCase(),
 1232:         maxLines: 1,
 1233:         overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 1234:         style: TextStyle(
 1235:           color: color,
 1236:           fontSize: 10,
 1237:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1238:           letterSpacing: 0.4,
 1239:         ),
 1240:       ),
 1241:     );
 1242:   }
 1243: }
