 1388: class AddSeedlingDialog extends StatefulWidget {
 1389:   const AddSeedlingDialog({super.key, required this.beds});
 1390: 
 1391:   final List<Bed> beds;
 1392: 
 1393:   @override
 1394:   State<AddSeedlingDialog> createState() => _AddSeedlingDialogState();
 1395: }
 1396: 
 1397: class _AddSeedlingDialogState extends State<AddSeedlingDialog> {
 1398:   final formKey = GlobalKey<FormState>();
 1399: 
 1400:   SeedCatalogItem selected = SeedCatalog.items.first;
 1401:   DateTime sowDate = DateTime.now();
 1402:   String? selectedBedId;
 1403: 
 1404:   late final TextEditingController varietyController;
 1405:   late final TextEditingController trayTypeController;
 1406:   late final TextEditingController trayCountController;
 1407:   late final TextEditingController locationController;
 1408:   late final TextEditingController notesController;
 1409: 
 1410:   @override
 1411:   void initState() {
 1412:     super.initState();
 1413: 
 1414:     varietyController = TextEditingController();
 1415:     trayTypeController = TextEditingController(text: 'Tray');
 1416:     trayCountController = TextEditingController(text: '1');
 1417:     locationController = TextEditingController(text: 'Seedling area');
 1418:     notesController = TextEditingController();
 1419:   }
 1420: 
 1421:   @override
 1422:   void dispose() {
 1423:     varietyController.dispose();
 1424:     trayTypeController.dispose();
 1425:     trayCountController.dispose();
 1426:     locationController.dispose();
 1427:     notesController.dispose();
 1428:     super.dispose();
 1429:   }
 1430: 
 1431:   @override
 1432:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1433:     return Dialog(
 1434:       backgroundColor: GardenTheme.panel,
 1435:       shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
 1436:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
 1437:         side: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1438:       ),
 1439:       child: ConstrainedBox(
 1440:         constraints: BoxConstraints(
 1441:           maxWidth: 620,
 1442:           maxHeight: MediaQuery.of(context).size.height * 0.88,
 1443:         ),
 1444:         child: SingleChildScrollView(
 1445:           padding: const EdgeInsets.all(22),
 1446:           child: Form(
 1447:             key: formKey,
 1448:             child: Column(
 1449:               mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
 1450:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1451:               children: [
 1452:                 const Text(
 1453:                   'Sow Seed',
 1454:                   style: TextStyle(
 1455:                     color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1456:                     fontSize: 24,
 1457:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1458:                     letterSpacing: -0.3,
 1459:                   ),
 1460:                 ),
 1461:                 const SizedBox(height: 6),
 1462:                 const Text(
 1463:                   'Add a seedling batch and track germination plus transplant timing.',
 1464:                   style: TextStyle(
 1465:                     color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1466:                     fontSize: 13,
 1467:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
 1468:                   ),
 1469:                 ),
 1470:                 const SizedBox(height: 18),
 1471:                 DropdownButtonFormField<String>(
 1472:                   initialValue: selected.key,
 1473:                   isExpanded: true,
 1474:                   decoration: _inputDecoration('SEED TYPE'),
 1475:                   items: [
 1476:                     for (final item in SeedCatalog.items)
 1477:                       DropdownMenuItem(
 1478:                         value: item.key,
 1479:                         child: Text('${item.emoji} ${item.cropName}'),
 1480:                       ),
 1481:                   ],
 1482:                   onChanged: (value) {
 1483:                     final key = value ?? selected.key;
 1484:                     setState(() {
 1485:                       selected = SeedCatalog.byKey(key);
 1486:                     });
 1487:                   },
 1488:                 ),
 1489:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1490:                 _TextField(
 1491:                   label: 'Variety',
 1492:                   controller: varietyController,
 1493:                   hintText: selected.varieties.isEmpty
 1494:                       ? 'Optional'
 1495:                       : selected.varieties.take(3).join(', '),
 1496:                 ),
 1497:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1498:                 LayoutBuilder(
 1499:                   builder: (context, constraints) {
 1500:                     final stacked = constraints.maxWidth < 560;
 1501: 
 1502:                     if (stacked) {
 1503:                       return Column(
 1504:                         children: [
 1505:                           _DateButton(
 1506:                             label: 'Sow date',
 1507:                             value: _shortDate(sowDate),
 1508:                             onTap: _pickSowDate,
 1509:                           ),
 1510:                           const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1511:                           _TextField(
 1512:                             label: 'Tray type',
 1513:                             controller: trayTypeController,
 1514:                             validator: _required,
 1515:                           ),
 1516:                           const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1517:                           _TextField(
 1518:                             label: 'Count',
 1519:                             controller: trayCountController,
 1520:                             keyboardType: TextInputType.number,
 1521:                             validator: _positiveInt,
 1522:                           ),
 1523:                         ],
 1524:                       );
 1525:                     }
 1526: 
 1527:                     return Row(
 1528:                       children: [
 1529:                         Expanded(
 1530:                           child: _DateButton(
 1531:                             label: 'Sow date',
 1532:                             value: _shortDate(sowDate),
 1533:                             onTap: _pickSowDate,
 1534:                           ),
 1535:                         ),
 1536:                         const SizedBox(width: 12),
 1537:                         Expanded(
 1538:                           child: _TextField(
 1539:                             label: 'Tray type',
 1540:                             controller: trayTypeController,
 1541:                             validator: _required,
 1542:                           ),
 1543:                         ),
 1544:                         const SizedBox(width: 12),
 1545:                         Expanded(
 1546:                           child: _TextField(
 1547:                             label: 'Count',
 1548:                             controller: trayCountController,
 1549:                             keyboardType: TextInputType.number,
 1550:                             validator: _positiveInt,
 1551:                           ),
 1552:                         ),
 1553:                       ],
 1554:                     );
 1555:                   },
 1556:                 ),
 1557:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1558:                 LayoutBuilder(
 1559:                   builder: (context, constraints) {
 1560:                     final stacked = constraints.maxWidth < 560;
 1561: 
 1562:                     final location = _TextField(
 1563:                       label: 'Location',
 1564:                       controller: locationController,
 1565:                       validator: _required,
 1566:                     );
 1567: 
 1568:                     final bed = DropdownButtonFormField<String?>(
 1569:                       initialValue: selectedBedId,
 1570:                       isExpanded: true,
 1571:                       decoration: _inputDecoration('ASSIGNED BED'),
 1572:                       items: [
 1573:                         const DropdownMenuItem<String?>(
 1574:                           value: null,
 1575:                           child: Text('No bed assigned'),
 1576:                         ),
 1577:                         for (final bed in widget.beds)
 1578:                           DropdownMenuItem<String?>(
 1579:                             value: bed.id,
 1580:                             child: Text(
 1581:                               bed.name.trim().isEmpty
 1582:                                   ? 'Bed ${bed.number}'
 1583:                                   : bed.name.trim(),
 1584:                               overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 1585:                             ),
 1586:                           ),
 1587:                       ],
 1588:                       onChanged: (value) {
 1589:                         setState(() {
 1590:                           selectedBedId = value;
 1591:                         });
 1592:                       },
 1593:                     );
 1594: 
 1595:                     if (stacked) {
 1596:                       return Column(
 1597:                         children: [location, const SizedBox(height: 12), bed],
 1598:                       );
 1599:                     }
 1600: 
 1601:                     return Row(
 1602:                       children: [
 1603:                         Expanded(child: location),
 1604:                         const SizedBox(width: 12),
 1605:                         Expanded(child: bed),
 1606:                       ],
 1607:                     );
 1608:                   },
 1609:                 ),
 1610:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1611:                 _TextField(
 1612:                   label: 'Notes',
 1613:                   controller: notesController,
 1614:                   maxLines: 3,
 1615:                 ),
 1616:                 const SizedBox(height: 14),
 1617:                 Container(
 1618:                   width: double.infinity,
 1619:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
 1620:                   decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1621:                     color: GardenTheme.paper,
 1622:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1623:                     border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1624:                   ),
 1625:                   child: Text(
 1626:                     '${selected.tip} Germination: ${selected.germinationMinDays}-${selected.germinationMaxDays} days. Transplant: ${selected.transplantMinDays}-${selected.transplantMaxDays} days.',
 1627:                     style: const TextStyle(
 1628:                       color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1629:                       fontSize: 12,
 1630:                       height: 1.35,
 1631:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1632:                     ),
 1633:                   ),
 1634:                 ),
 1635:                 const SizedBox(height: 22),
 1636:                 Wrap(
 1637:                   spacing: 10,
 1638:                   runSpacing: 10,
 1639:                   alignment: WrapAlignment.end,
 1640:                   children: [
 1641:                     TextButton(
 1642:                       onPressed: () {
 1643:                         Navigator.of(context).pop();
 1644:                       },
 1645:                       child: const Text('Cancel'),
 1646:                     ),
 1647:                     FilledButton(
 1648:                       onPressed: _submit,
 1649:                       child: const Text('Sow seed'),
 1650:                     ),
 1651:                   ],
 1652:                 ),
 1653:               ],
 1654:             ),
 1655:           ),
 1656:         ),
 1657:       ),
 1658:     );
 1659:   }
 1660: 
 1661:   Future<void> _pickSowDate() async {
 1662:     final result = await showDatePicker(
 1663:       context: context,
 1664:       initialDate: sowDate,
 1665:       firstDate: DateTime.now().subtract(const Duration(days: 365)),
 1666:       lastDate: DateTime.now().add(const Duration(days: 30)),
 1667:     );
 1668: 
 1669:     if (result == null) return;
 1670: 
 1671:     setState(() {
 1672:       sowDate = result;
 1673:     });
 1674:   }
 1675: 
 1676:   void _submit() {
 1677:     if (!formKey.currentState!.validate()) return;
 1678: 
 1679:     final id = 'seedling-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}';
 1680: 
 1681:     Navigator.of(context).pop(
 1682:       Seedling(
 1683:         id: id,
 1684:         seedKey: selected.key,
 1685:         cropName: selected.cropName,
 1686:         emoji: selected.emoji,
 1687:         category: selected.category,
 1688:         variety: varietyController.text.trim(),
 1689:         sowDate: sowDate,
 1690:         trayType: trayTypeController.text.trim(),
 1691:         trayCount: int.tryParse(trayCountController.text.trim()) ?? 1,
 1692:         location: locationController.text.trim(),
 1693:         notes: notesController.text.trim(),
 1694:         bedId: selectedBedId,
 1695:       ),
 1696:     );
 1697:   }
 1698: 
 1699:   String? _required(String? value) {
 1700:     if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty) {
 1701:       return 'Required';
 1702:     }
 1703:     return null;
 1704:   }
 1705: 
 1706:   String? _positiveInt(String? value) {
 1707:     final parsed = int.tryParse(value ?? '');
 1708:     if (parsed == null) return 'Enter a number';
 1709:     if (parsed < 1) return 'Minimum 1';
 1710:     return null;
 1711:   }
 1712: }
 1713: 
 1714: class _TextField extends StatelessWidget {
 1715:   const _TextField({
 1716:     required this.label,
 1717:     required this.controller,
 1718:     this.hintText,
 1719:     this.keyboardType,
 1720:     this.validator,
 1721:     this.maxLines = 1,
 1722:   });
 1723: 
 1724:   final String label;
 1725:   final TextEditingController controller;
 1726:   final String? hintText;
 1727:   final TextInputType? keyboardType;
 1728:   final String? Function(String?)? validator;
 1729:   final int maxLines;
 1730: 
 1731:   @override
 1732:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1733:     return TextFormField(
 1734:       controller: controller,
 1735:       keyboardType: keyboardType,
 1736:       validator: validator,
 1737:       maxLines: maxLines,
 1738:       style: const TextStyle(
 1739:         color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1740:         fontSize: 14,
 1741:         fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1742:       ),
 1743:       decoration: _inputDecoration(label, hintText: hintText),
 1744:     );
 1745:   }
 1746: }
 1747: 
 1748: class _DateButton extends StatelessWidget {
 1749:   const _DateButton({
 1750:     required this.label,
 1751:     required this.value,
 1752:     required this.onTap,
 1753:   });
 1754: 
 1755:   final String label;
 1756:   final String value;
 1757:   final VoidCallback onTap;
 1758: 
 1759:   @override
 1760:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1761:     return InkWell(
 1762:       onTap: onTap,
 1763:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1764:       child: InputDecorator(
 1765:         decoration: _inputDecoration(label),
 1766:         child: Text(
 1767:           value,
 1768:           style: const TextStyle(
 1769:             color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1770:             fontSize: 14,
 1771:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1772:           ),
 1773:         ),
 1774:       ),
 1775:     );
 1776:   }
 1777: }
 1778: 
 1779: InputDecoration _inputDecoration(String label, {String? hintText}) {
 1780:   return InputDecoration(
 1781:     labelText: label.toUpperCase(),
 1782:     hintText: hintText,
 1783:     labelStyle: const TextStyle(
 1784:       color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1785:       fontSize: 11,
 1786:       fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1787:       letterSpacing: 0.8,
 1788:     ),
 1789:     filled: true,
 1790:     fillColor: GardenTheme.paper,
 1791:     contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 12),
 1792:     enabledBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 1793:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1794:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1795:     ),
 1796:     focusedBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 1797:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1798:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.ink, width: 1.4),
 1799:     ),
 1800:     errorBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 1801:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1802:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.bad),
 1803:     ),
 1804:     focusedErrorBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 1805:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1806:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.bad, width: 1.4),
 1807:     ),
 1808:   );
 1809: }
 1810: 
 1811: String _shortDate(DateTime date) {
 1812:   return '${date.day.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}/${date.month.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}';
 1813: }

 2099:   Future<void> _pickSowDate() async {
 2100:     final result = await showDatePicker(
 2101:       context: context,
 2102:       initialDate: sowDate,
 2103:       firstDate: DateTime.now().subtract(const Duration(days: 365)),
 2104:       lastDate: DateTime.now().add(const Duration(days: 30)),
 2105:     );
 2106: 
 2107:     if (result == null) return;
 2108: 
 2109:     setState(() {
 2110:       sowDate = result;
 2111:     });
 2112:   }
 2113: 
 2114:   void _submit() {
 2115:     if (!formKey.currentState!.validate()) return;
 2116: 
 2117:     Navigator.of(context).pop(
 2118:       Seedling(
 2119:         id: widget.seedling.id,
 2120:         seedKey: selected.key,
 2121:         cropName: selected.cropName,
 2122:         emoji: selected.emoji,
 2123:         category: selected.category,
 2124:         variety: varietyController.text.trim(),
 2125:         sowDate: sowDate,
 2126:         trayType: trayTypeController.text.trim(),
 2127:         trayCount: int.tryParse(trayCountController.text.trim()) ?? 1,
 2128:         location: locationController.text.trim(),
 2129:         notes: notesController.text.trim(),
 2130:         bedId: selectedBedId,
 2131:         lastWateredAt: widget.seedling.lastWateredAt,
 2132:         lastFedAt: widget.seedling.lastFedAt,
 2133:         transplantedAt: widget.seedling.transplantedAt,
 2134:       ),
 2135:     );
 2136:   }
 2137: 
 2138:   String? _required(String? value) {
 2139:     if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty) {
 2140:       return 'Required';
 2141:     }
 2142: 
 2143:     return null;
 2144:   }
 2145: 
 2146:   String? _positiveInt(String? value) {
 2147:     final parsed = int.tryParse(value ?? '');
 2148: 
 2149:     if (parsed == null) return 'Enter a number';
 2150:     if (parsed < 1) return 'Minimum 1';
 2151: 
 2152:     return null;
 2153:   }
 2154: }

 2156: class TransplantSeedlingDialog extends StatefulWidget {
 2157:   const TransplantSeedlingDialog({
 2158:     super.key,
 2159:     required this.seedling,
 2160:     required this.beds,
 2161:   });
 2162: 
 2163:   final Seedling seedling;
 2164:   final List<Bed> beds;
 2165: 
 2166:   @override
 2167:   State<TransplantSeedlingDialog> createState() =>
 2168:       _TransplantSeedlingDialogState();
 2169: }
 2170: 
 2171: class _TransplantSeedlingDialogState extends State<TransplantSeedlingDialog> {
 2172:   String? selectedBedId;
 2173: 
 2174:   @override
 2175:   void initState() {
 2176:     super.initState();
 2177: 
 2178:     final existingBedId = widget.seedling.bedId;
 2179: 
 2180:     if (existingBedId != null &&
 2181:         widget.beds.any((bed) => bed.id == existingBedId)) {
 2182:       selectedBedId = existingBedId;
 2183:     } else if (widget.beds.isNotEmpty) {
 2184:       selectedBedId = widget.beds.first.id;
 2185:     }
 2186:   }
 2187: 
 2188:   @override
 2189:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 2190:     return AlertDialog(
 2191:       backgroundColor: GardenTheme.panel,
 2192:       title: const Text('Transplant to Bed'),
 2193:       content: ConstrainedBox(
 2194:         constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 460),
 2195:         child: Column(
 2196:           mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
 2197:           children: [
 2198:             Row(
 2199:               children: [
 2200:                 Text(
 2201:                   widget.seedling.emoji,
 2202:                   style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 30),
 2203:                 ),
 2204:                 const SizedBox(width: 10),
 2205:                 Expanded(
 2206:                   child: Text(
 2207:                     widget.seedling.variety.trim().isEmpty
 2208:                         ? widget.seedling.cropName
 2209:                         : '${widget.seedling.cropName} - ${widget.seedling.variety}',
 2210:                     style: const TextStyle(
 2211:                       color: GardenTheme.ink,
 2212:                       fontSize: 16,
 2213:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 2214:                     ),
 2215:                   ),
 2216:                 ),
 2217:               ],
 2218:             ),

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: 
    3: import '../../../../core/models/bed.dart';

    6: class ActionCards extends StatelessWidget {
    7:   const ActionCards({
    8:     super.key,
    9:     required this.beds,
   10:     required this.overlapCount,
   11:   });
   12: 
   13:   final List<Bed> beds;
   14:   final int overlapCount;
   15: 
   16:   @override
   17:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   18:     final attentionBeds = beds
   19:         .where((bed) => bed.status != BedStatus.ok)
   20:         .toList();
   21: 
   22:     final totalArea = beds.fold<double>(
   23:       0,
   24:       (sum, bed) => sum + bed.width * bed.height,
   25:     );
   26: 
   27:     final actions = <_PlannerAction>[
   28:       if (overlapCount > 0)
   29:         _PlannerAction(
   30:           priority: 'P1',
   31:           priorityColor: GardenTheme.bad,
   32:           title: 'Resolve overlapping beds',
   33:           meta: '$overlapCount bed${overlapCount == 1 ? '' : 's'} overlap',
   34:           description:
   35:               'Move or resize overlapping beds before finalizing the garden layout.',
   36:         ),
   37:       if (attentionBeds.isNotEmpty)
   38:         _PlannerAction(
   39:           priority: 'P2',
   40:           priorityColor: GardenTheme.warn,
   41:           title: 'Review ${attentionBeds.first.name}',
   42:           meta:
   43:               '${attentionBeds.length} bed${attentionBeds.length == 1 ? '' : 's'} need attention',
   44:           description:
   45:               'Status is not healthy. Check crops, size, and placement before finalizing the garden layout.',
   46:         ),
   47:       if (beds.isEmpty)
   48:         const _PlannerAction(
   49:           priority: 'P1',
   50:           priorityColor: GardenTheme.bad,
   51:           title: 'Add your first bed',
   52:           meta: 'No beds placed',
   53:           description:
   54:               'Create a bed to begin planning the garden layout on the meter-based canvas.',
   55:         )
   56:       else
   57:         _PlannerAction(
   58:           priority: 'P3',
   59:           priorityColor: GardenTheme.good,
   60:           title: 'Continue layout planning',
   61:           meta:
   62:               '${beds.length} beds Â· ${totalArea.toStringAsFixed(0)} mÂ² planned',
   63:           description:
   64:               'Adjust bed placement, crop labels, and health status before moving to crop layout or zoom controls.',
   65:         ),
   66:     ];
   67: 
   68:     return SizedBox(
   69:       height: 108,
   70:       child: ListView.separated(
   71:         scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
   72:         itemCount: actions.length,
   73:         separatorBuilder: (_, _) => const SizedBox(width: 12),
   74:         itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   75:           final action = actions[index];
   76: 
   77:           return _ActionCard(action: action);
   78:         },
   79:       ),
   80:     );
   81:   }
   82: }

  198:   String? _requiredValidator(String? value) {
  199:     if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty) {
  200:       return 'Required';
  201:     }
  202: 
  203:     return null;
  204:   }
  205: 
  206:   String? _positiveNumberValidator(String? value) {
  207:     final parsed = double.tryParse(value ?? '');
  208: 
  209:     if (parsed == null) {
  210:       return 'Enter a number';
  211:     }
  212: 
  213:     if (parsed <= 0) {
  214:       return 'Must be greater than 0';
  215:     }
  216: 
  217:     return null;
  218:   }
  219: 
  220:   void _submit() {
  221:     if (!formKey.currentState!.validate()) return;
  222: 
  223:     final crops = cropsController.text
  224:         .split(',')
  225:         .map((crop) => crop.trim())
  226:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
  227:         .toList();
  228: 
  229:     Navigator.of(context).pop(
  230:       AddBedDialogResult(
  231:         name: nameController.text.trim(),
  232:         zone: zoneController.text.trim(),
  233:         width: double.parse(widthController.text.trim()),
  234:         height: double.parse(heightController.text.trim()),
  235:         crops: crops,
  236:         status: status,
  237:       ),
  238:     );
  239:   }
  240: }

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: import '../../../../core/models/bed.dart';
    3: 
    4: class BedCard extends StatelessWidget {
    5:   const BedCard({
    6:     super.key,
    7:     required this.bed,
    8:     this.isSelected,
    9:     this.selected,
   10:     this.overlapping,
   11:     this.isOverlapping,
   12:     this.borderColor,
   13:     this.statusColor,
   14:     this.bedNumber,
   15:     this.index,
   16:     this.showDetails = true,
   17:     this.compact = false,
   18:   });

   20:   final Bed bed;
   21:   final bool? isSelected;
   22:   final bool? selected;
   23:   final bool? overlapping;
   24:   final bool? isOverlapping;

   27:   final int? bedNumber;
   28:   final int? index;
   29:   final bool showDetails;
   30:   final bool compact;
   31: 
   32:   bool get _selected => isSelected ?? selected ?? false;
   33:   bool get _overlapping => overlapping ?? isOverlapping ?? false;
   34:   int? get _number => bedNumber ?? index;
   35: 
   36:   @override
   37:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   38:     final theme = Theme.of(context);
   39: 
   40:     final woodBorder = _overlapping
   41:         ? const Color(0xFFB45309)

   43: 
   44:     final woodShadow = _overlapping
   45:         ? const Color(0x33B45309)

   49:         ? const Color(0xFFF3E1C8)

   53:         ? const Color(0xFFE8D3B6)
   54:         : const Color(0xFFF1F1EE);

   56:     final chipColor = statusColor ?? const Color(0xFF2F8F59);

   58:     return LayoutBuilder(
   59:       builder: (context, constraints) {
   60:         final width = constraints.maxWidth;
   61:         final height = constraints.maxHeight;
   62: 
   63:         final radius = BorderRadius.circular(compact ? 14 : 22);
   64:         final innerRadius = BorderRadius.circular(compact ? 10 : 18);
   65:         final rowCount = _rowCountFor(height);
   66:         final showCenterLabel = width > 170 && height > 95;
   67:         final showTopCard = width > 110 && height > 52;

   69:         return AnimatedContainer(
   70:           duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 160),

   73:             borderRadius: radius,
   74:             boxShadow: [

   79:                 offset: const Offset(0, 5),
   80:               ),

   84:                   blurRadius: 0,
   85:                   spreadRadius: 3,
   86:                 ),
   87:             ],
   88:           ),

  100:               padding: EdgeInsets.all(compact ? 5 : 7),

  104:                   fit: StackFit.expand,
  105:                   children: [

  107:                       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  108:                         gradient: LinearGradient(

  210:                                   '${(_number ?? 0) == 0 ? '' : _number}',
  211:                                   style: TextStyle(
  212:                                     color: Colors.white,
  213:                                     fontSize: compact ? 10 : 11,
  214:                                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  215:                                   ),
  216:                                 ),
  217:                               ),
  218:                               SizedBox(width: compact ? 7 : 9),
  219:                               Flexible(
  220:                                 child: Column(
  221:                                   crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  222:                                   mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  223:                                   children: [
  224:                                     Text(
  225:                                       bed.name,
  226:                                       maxLines: 1,
  227:                                       overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  228:                                       style: TextStyle(
  229:                                         fontSize: compact ? 11 : 12.5,
  230:                                         fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  231:                                         color: const Color(0xFF231F1A),
  232:                                       ),
  233:                                     ),
  234:                                     if (showDetails)
  235:                                       Padding(
  236:                                         padding: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 1),
  237:                                         child: Text(
  238:                                           '${bed.width.toStringAsFixed(1)}m x ${bed.height.toStringAsFixed(1)}m',
  239:                                           maxLines: 1,
  240:                                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  241:                                           style: TextStyle(
  242:                                             fontSize: compact ? 9 : 10,
  243:                                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
  244:                                             color: const Color(0xFF6B6B6B),
  245:                                           ),
  246:                                         ),
  247:                                       ),
  248:                                   ],
  249:                                 ),
  250:                               ),
  251:                             ],
  252:                           ),
  253:                         ),
  254:                       ),
  255:                   ],
  256:                 ),
  257:               ),
  258:             ),
  259:           ),
  260:         );
  261:       },
  262:     );
  263:   }
  264: 
  265:   int _rowCountFor(double height) {
  266:     if (height >= 220) return 4;
  267:     if (height >= 130) return 3;
  268:     return 2;
  269:   }
  270: 
  271:   double _rowHeightFor(double height, int rowCount) {
  272:     final available = height - 28;
  273:     final rowHeight = available / (rowCount * 1.9);
  274:     return rowHeight.clamp(16.0, 46.0);
  275:   }
  276: }
  277: 
  278: class _BedTexturePainter extends CustomPainter {
  279:   @override
  280:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
  281:     final minor = Paint()
  282:       ..color = const Color(0x0E000000)
  283:       ..strokeWidth = 0.6;
  284: 
  285:     for (double x = 0; x <= size.width; x += 20) {
  286:       canvas.drawLine(Offset(x, 0), Offset(x, size.height), minor);
  287:     }
  288: 
  289:     for (double y = 0; y <= size.height; y += 20) {
  290:       canvas.drawLine(Offset(0, y), Offset(size.width, y), minor);
  291:     }
  292:   }
  293: 
  294:   @override
  295:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant CustomPainter oldDelegate) => false;
  296: }

   74: 
   75:   Color _healthColor(double value) {
   76:     if (value >= 0.75) return GardenTheme.good;
   77:     if (value >= 0.45) return GardenTheme.warn;
   78:     return GardenTheme.bad;
   79:   }
   80: 
   81:   Color _statusColor(BedStatus status) {
   82:     switch (status) {
   83:       case BedStatus.ok:
   84:         return GardenTheme.good;
   85:       case BedStatus.warning:
   86:         return GardenTheme.warn;
   87:       case BedStatus.bad:
   88:         return GardenTheme.bad;
   89:       case BedStatus.hold:
   90:         return GardenTheme.hold;
   91:     }
   92:   }
   93: 
   94:   String _statusLabel(BedStatus status) {
   95:     switch (status) {
   96:       case BedStatus.ok:
   97:         return 'OK';
   98:       case BedStatus.warning:
   99:         return 'Review';
  100:       case BedStatus.bad:
  101:         return 'Issue';
  102:       case BedStatus.hold:
  103:         return 'Hold';
  104:     }
  105:   }
  106: 
  107:   String _rotationNote(Bed bed) {
  108:     if (bed.crops.isEmpty) {
  109:       return 'No crops assigned yet. Add crops before planning rotation.';
  110:     }
  111: 
  112:     return 'Rotate future annual crops away from ${bed.crops.first.toLowerCase()} where possible.';
  113:   }
  114: 
  115:   String _spacingNote(Bed bed) {
  116:     final area = bed.width * bed.height;
  117: 
  118:     if (area < 8) {
  119:       return 'Compact bed. Prefer small crops, herbs, or tight spacing.';
  120:     }
  121: 
  122:     if (area < 20) {
  123:       return 'Medium bed. Suitable for grouped crops or mixed companion planting.';
  124:     }
  125: 
  126:     return 'Large bed. Consider internal paths, crop zones, or multiple crop blocks.';
  127:   }
  128: }

  504: class _PlantedCropSummary extends StatelessWidget {
  505:   const _PlantedCropSummary({required this.bed});
  506: 
  507:   final Bed bed;
  508: 
  509:   @override
  510:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  511:     if (bed.cropPlacements.isEmpty && bed.cropBlocks.isEmpty) {
  512:       return Container(
  513:         width: double.infinity,
  514:         padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
  515:         decoration: BoxDecoration(
  516:           color: GardenTheme.paper,
  517:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  518:           border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  519:         ),
  520:         child: const Text(
  521:           'No crop icons or rows placed yet. Use PLACE ICON or PLACE ROW above to add draggable crop elements inside this bed.',
  522:           style: TextStyle(
  523:             color: GardenTheme.muted,
  524:             fontSize: 12,
  525:             height: 1.35,
  526:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
  527:           ),
  528:         ),
  529:       );
  530:     }
  531: 
  532:     final groupedIcons = <String, int>{};
  533:     final groupedRows = <String, int>{};
  534: 
  535:     for (final placement in bed.cropPlacements) {
  536:       final crop = placement.cropName.trim();
  537:       if (crop.isEmpty) continue;
  538:       groupedIcons[crop] = (groupedIcons[crop] ?? 0) + 1;
  539:     }
  540: 
  541:     for (final block in bed.cropBlocks) {
  542:       final crop = block.cropName.trim();
  543:       if (crop.isEmpty) continue;
  544:       groupedRows[crop] = (groupedRows[crop] ?? 0) + 1;
  545:     }
  546: 
  547:     final crops = <String>{...groupedIcons.keys, ...groupedRows.keys}.toList()
  548:       ..sort();
  549: 
  550:     return Container(
  551:       width: double.infinity,
  552:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
  553:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  554:         color: GardenTheme.paper,
  555:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  556:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  557:       ),
  558:       child: Column(
  559:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  560:         children: [
  561:           const Text(
  562:             'PLACED CROPS',
  563:             style: TextStyle(
  564:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
  565:               fontSize: 11,
  566:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  567:               letterSpacing: 1.1,
  568:             ),
  569:           ),
  570:           const SizedBox(height: 8),
  571:           for (final crop in crops) ...[
  572:             Row(
  573:               children: [
  574:                 Expanded(
  575:                   child: Text(
  576:                     crop,
  577:                     style: const TextStyle(
  578:                       color: GardenTheme.ink,
  579:                       fontSize: 13,
  580:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  581:                     ),
  582:                   ),
  583:                 ),
  584:                 Text(
  585:                   '${groupedIcons[crop] ?? 0} icons Â· ${groupedRows[crop] ?? 0} rows',
  586:                   style: const TextStyle(
  587:                     color: GardenTheme.good,
  588:                     fontSize: 12,
  589:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  590:                   ),
  591:                 ),
  592:               ],
  593:             ),
  594:             const SizedBox(height: 6),
  595:           ],
  596:         ],
  597:       ),
  598:     );
  599:   }
  600: }

  602: class InspectorTextField extends StatefulWidget {
  603:   const InspectorTextField({
  604:     super.key,
  605:     required this.label,
  606:     required this.value,
  607:     required this.onChanged,
  608:     this.hint,
  609:     this.suffix,
  610:     this.maxLines = 1,
  611:     this.keyboardType,
  612:   });
  613: 
  614:   final String label;
  615:   final String value;
  616:   final String? hint;
  617:   final String? suffix;
  618:   final int maxLines;
  619:   final TextInputType? keyboardType;
  620:   final ValueChanged<String> onChanged;
  621: 
  622:   @override
  623:   State<InspectorTextField> createState() => _InspectorTextFieldState();
  624: }
  625: 
  626: class _InspectorTextFieldState extends State<InspectorTextField> {
  627:   late final TextEditingController controller;
  628: 
  629:   @override
  630:   void initState() {
  631:     super.initState();
  632:     controller = TextEditingController(text: widget.value);
  633:   }
  634: 
  635:   @override
  636:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant InspectorTextField oldWidget) {
  637:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
  638: 
  639:     if (widget.value != oldWidget.value && controller.text != widget.value) {
  640:       controller.text = widget.value;
  641:       controller.selection = TextSelection.collapsed(
  642:         offset: controller.text.length,
  643:       );
  644:     }
  645:   }
  646: 
  647:   @override
  648:   void dispose() {
  649:     controller.dispose();
  650:     super.dispose();
  651:   }
  652: 
  653:   @override
  654:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  655:     return TextField(
  656:       controller: controller,
  657:       maxLines: widget.maxLines,
  658:       keyboardType: widget.keyboardType,
  659:       onChanged: widget.onChanged,
  660:       style: const TextStyle(
  661:         color: GardenTheme.ink,
  662:         fontSize: 14,
  663:         fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  664:       ),
  665:       decoration: InputDecoration(
  666:         labelText: widget.label.toUpperCase(),
  667:         hintText: widget.hint,
  668:         suffixText: widget.suffix,
  669:         labelStyle: const TextStyle(
  670:           color: GardenTheme.muted,
  671:           fontSize: 11,
  672:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  673:           letterSpacing: 0.8,
  674:         ),
  675:         hintStyle: const TextStyle(color: GardenTheme.muted, fontSize: 13),
  676:         suffixStyle: const TextStyle(
  677:           color: GardenTheme.muted,
  678:           fontSize: 12,
  679:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  680:         ),
  681:         filled: true,
  682:         fillColor: GardenTheme.paper,
  683:         contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
  684:           horizontal: 12,
  685:           vertical: 12,
  686:         ),
  687:         enabledBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
  688:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  689:           borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
  690:         ),
  691:         focusedBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
  692:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  693:           borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.ink, width: 1.4),
  694:         ),
  695:       ),
  696:     );
  697:   }
  698: }

  846: class CropPreview extends StatelessWidget {

  857:       );

  864:     );
  865:   }
  866: }

    7: class CropPlanningSection extends StatelessWidget {
    8:   const CropPlanningSection({
    9:     super.key,
   10:     required this.crops,
   11:     required this.cropPlacements,
   12:     required this.onRemoveCrop,
   13:     required this.onPlantCrop,
   14:     required this.onPlaceCropRow,
   15:   });
   16: 
   17:   final List<String> crops;
   18:   final List<CropPlacement> cropPlacements;
   19:   final ValueChanged<String> onRemoveCrop;
   20:   final ValueChanged<String> onPlantCrop;
   21:   final ValueChanged<String> onPlaceCropRow;
   22: 
   23:   @override
   24:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   25:     final cleanCrops = crops
   26:         .map((crop) => crop.trim())
   27:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
   28:         .toList();
   29: 
   30:     return Column(
   31:       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
   32:       children: [
   33:         const _SectionLabel(label: 'Crop Planning'),
   34:         const SizedBox(height: 8),
   35:         if (cleanCrops.isEmpty)
   36:           const _EmptyCropPlanningCard()
   37:         else
   38:           Column(
   39:             children: [
   40:               for (var i = 0; i < cleanCrops.length; i++) ...[
   41:                 _CropPlanningCard(
   42:                   crop: cleanCrops[i],
   43:                   index: i,
   44:                   plantedCount: _plantedCountFor(cleanCrops[i]),
   45:                   onRemoveCrop: onRemoveCrop,
   46:                   onPlantCrop: onPlantCrop,
   47:                   onPlaceCropRow: onPlaceCropRow,
   48:                 ),
   49:                 if (i != cleanCrops.length - 1) const SizedBox(height: 10),
   50:               ],
   51:             ],
   52:           ),
   53:         const SizedBox(height: 10),
   54:         const _CropPlanningHint(),
   55:       ],
   56:     );
   57:   }
   58: 
   59:   int _plantedCountFor(String cropName) {
   60:     final target = cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
   61: 
   62:     return cropPlacements.where((placement) {
   63:       return placement.cropName.trim().toLowerCase() == target;
   64:     }).length;
   65:   }
   66: }
   67:

   82:       ),
   83:     );
   84:   }
   85: }

  122: class _CropPlanningCard extends StatelessWidget {
  123:   const _CropPlanningCard({
  124:     required this.crop,
  125:     required this.index,
  126:     required this.plantedCount,
  127:     required this.onRemoveCrop,
  128:     required this.onPlantCrop,
  129:     required this.onPlaceCropRow,
  130:   });
  131: 
  132:   final String crop;
  133:   final int index;
  134:   final int plantedCount;
  135:   final ValueChanged<String> onRemoveCrop;
  136:   final ValueChanged<String> onPlantCrop;
  137:   final ValueChanged<String> onPlaceCropRow;
  138: 
  139:   @override
  140:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  141:     final color = _cropColor(index);
  142:     final category = _cropCategory(crop);
  143:     final spacingLabel = CropSpacing.spacingLabelForCrop(crop);
  144: 
  145:     return Container(
  146:       width: double.infinity,
  147:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(13),
  148:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  149:         color: Colors.white,
  150:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  151:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  152:         boxShadow: const [
  153:           BoxShadow(
  154:             color: Color(0x0F000000),
  155:             blurRadius: 10,
  156:             offset: Offset(0, 3),
  157:           ),
  158:         ],
  159:       ),
  160:       child: Column(
  161:         children: [
  162:           Row(
  163:             children: [
  164:               _CropIcon(
  165:                 label: crop.characters.first.toUpperCase(),
  166:                 color: color,
  167:               ),
  168:               const SizedBox(width: 10),
  169:               Expanded(
  170:                 child: Column(
  171:                   crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  172:                   children: [
  173:                     Text(
  174:                       crop,
  175:                       maxLines: 1,
  176:                       overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  177:                       style: const TextStyle(
  178:                         color: GardenTheme.ink,
  179:                         fontSize: 15,
  180:                         fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  181:                       ),
  182:                     ),
  183:                     const SizedBox(height: 3),
  184:                     Text(
  185:                       category,
  186:                       maxLines: 1,
  187:                       overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  188:                       style: const TextStyle(
  189:                         color: GardenTheme.muted,
  190:                         fontSize: 11,
  191:                         fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
  192:                       ),
  193:                     ),
  194:                   ],
  195:                 ),
  196:               ),
  197:               const SizedBox(width: 8),
  198:               _PlantedCountBadge(count: plantedCount, color: color),
  199:             ],
  200:           ),
  201:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  202:           Row(
  203:             children: [
  204:               Expanded(
  205:                 child: _InfoPill(
  206:                   label: spacingLabel,
  207:                   color: GardenTheme.muted,
  208:                   background: GardenTheme.paper,
  209:                 ),
  210:               ),
  211:               const SizedBox(width: 8),
  212:               _RemoveCropButton(crop: crop, onRemoveCrop: onRemoveCrop),
  213:             ],
  214:           ),
  215:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  216:           _PlaceIconButton(crop: crop, color: color, onPlantCrop: onPlantCrop),
  217:           const SizedBox(height: 8),
  218:           _PlaceRowButton(
  219:             crop: crop,
  220:             color: color,
  221:             onPlaceCropRow: onPlaceCropRow,
  222:           ),
  223:         ],
  224:       ),
  225:     );
  226:   }
  227: 
  228:   Color _cropColor(int index) {
  229:     final colors = [
  230:       GardenTheme.good,
  231:       GardenTheme.warn,
  232:       GardenTheme.hold,
  233:       GardenTheme.ink,
  234:     ];
  235: 
  236:     return colors[index % colors.length];
  237:   }
  238: 
  239:   String _cropCategory(String crop) {
  240:     final lower = crop.toLowerCase();
  241: 
  242:     if (lower.contains('strawberry') ||
  243:         lower.contains('raspberry') ||
  244:         lower.contains('blueberry')) {
  245:       return 'Berry crop';
  246:     }
  247: 
  248:     if (lower.contains('broccoli') ||
  249:         lower.contains('lettuce') ||
  250:         lower.contains('spinach') ||
  251:         lower.contains('kale')) {
  252:       return 'Leafy / brassica crop';
  253:     }
  254: 
  255:     if (lower.contains('tomato') ||
  256:         lower.contains('pepper') ||
  257:         lower.contains('cucumber')) {
  258:       return 'Fruit-bearing annual';
  259:     }
  260: 
  261:     if (lower.contains('basil') ||
  262:         lower.contains('mint') ||
  263:         lower.contains('parsley') ||
  264:         lower.contains('thyme')) {
  265:       return 'Herb / companion crop';
  266:     }
  267: 
  268:     return 'General crop';
  269:   }
  270: }
  271:

    6: class DecisionBanner extends StatelessWidget {
    7:   const DecisionBanner({
    8:     super.key,
    9:     required this.beds,
   10:     required this.overlapCount,
   11:   });
   12: 
   13:   final List<Bed> beds;
   14:   final int overlapCount;
   15: 
   16:   @override
   17:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   18:     final totalBeds = beds.length;
   19: 
   20:     final totalArea = beds.fold<double>(
   21:       0,
   22:       (sum, bed) => sum + bed.width * bed.height,
   23:     );
   24: 
   25:     final attentionBeds = beds
   26:         .where((bed) => bed.status != BedStatus.ok)
   27:         .toList();
   28: 
   29:     final hasOverlaps = overlapCount > 0;
   30:     final hasAttention = attentionBeds.isNotEmpty;
   31: 
   32:     final title = hasOverlaps
   33:         ? 'Layout Review Needed'
   34:         : hasAttention
   35:         ? 'Review Needed'
   36:         : 'Ready to Plan';
   37: 
   38:     final chipLabel = hasOverlaps
   39:         ? '$overlapCount Layout Issues'
   40:         : hasAttention
   41:         ? '${attentionBeds.length} Needs Attention'
   42:         : 'Layout Healthy';
   43: 
   44:     final body = hasOverlaps
   45:         ? '$overlapCount bed${overlapCount == 1 ? '' : 's'} overlap. Move or resize overlapping beds before finalizing.'
   46:         : hasAttention
   47:         ? 'Review ${attentionBeds.first.name} before finalizing the garden layout.'
   48:         : 'All active beds are currently marked healthy. Continue arranging or add more beds.';
   49: 
   50:     final accentColor = hasOverlaps
   51:         ? GardenTheme.bad
   52:         : hasAttention
   53:         ? GardenTheme.warn
   54:         : GardenTheme.good;
   55: 
   56:     return Container(
   57:       width: double.infinity,
   58:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
   59:       decoration: GardenTheme.panelDecoration(radius: 16),
   60:       child: Row(
   61:         children: [
   62:           Expanded(
   63:             flex: 12,
   64:             child: Container(
   65:               padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),

   67:                 color: GardenTheme.paper,
   68:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
   69:                 border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),

   73:                   Container(
   74:                     width: 5,

   77:                       color: accentColor,

   41: class _DraggableBedState extends State<DraggableBed> {

   43:   Offset resizeOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
   44:

   46:   Offset? plantDragCurrentLocal;
   47: 
   48:   bool moving = false;
   49:   bool resizing = false;
   50: 
   51:   bool get planting => widget.activePlantName != null;
   52: 
   53:   @override
   54:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant DraggableBed oldWidget) {
   55:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
   56: 
   57:     if (!moving) {
   58:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
   59:     }
   60: 
   61:     if (!resizing) {
   62:       resizeOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
   63:     }
   64: 
   65:     if (!planting) {
   66:       plantDragStartLocal = null;
   67:       plantDragCurrentLocal = null;
   68:     }
   69:   }
   70: 
   71:   @override
   72:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   73:     final left = widget.bed.x * widget.pixelsPerMeter + dragOffsetPixels.dx;
   74:     final top = widget.bed.y * widget.pixelsPerMeter + dragOffsetPixels.dy;
   75: 
   76:     final widthPx = _visualWidthPixels();
   77:     final heightPx = _visualHeightPixels();
   78: 
   79:     final overlapping = widget.controller.bedOverlaps(widget.bed.id);
   80: 
   81:     return Positioned(
   82:       left: left,
   83:       top: top,
   84:       width: widthPx,
   85:       height: heightPx,
   86:       child: Stack(
   87:         clipBehavior: Clip.none,
   88:         children: [
   89:           Positioned.fill(
   90:             child: GestureDetector(
   91:               behavior: HitTestBehavior.opaque,
   92:               onTapDown: planting ? _plantAtTap : null,
   93:               onTap: planting ? null : _selectOnly,
   94:               onDoubleTap: planting ? null : _openDetails,
   95:               onLongPress: planting ? null : _openDetails,
   96:               onPanStart: planting ? _startPlantDrag : null,
   97:               onPanUpdate: planting ? _updatePlantDrag : null,
   98:               onPanEnd: planting ? _endPlantDrag : null,
   99:               onPanCancel: planting ? _cancelPlantDrag : null,
  100:               child: _SimpleRaisedBedSurface(
  101:                 bed: widget.bed,
  102:                 selected: widget.selected,
  103:                 overlapping: overlapping,
  104:                 widthMeters: _visualWidthMeters(),
  105:                 heightMeters: _visualHeightMeters(),
  106:                 showLabels: widget.showLabels,
  107:                 planting: planting,
  108:               ),
  109:             ),
  110:           ),
  111: 
  112:           if (widget.showCrops)
  113:             Positioned.fill(
  114:               child: IgnorePointer(
  115:                 ignoring: planting,
  116:                 child: Padding(
  117:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(8, 34, 8, 8),
  118:                   child: ClipRRect(
  119:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  120:                     child: Stack(
  121:                       clipBehavior: Clip.hardEdge,
  122:                       children: [
  123:                         for (final block in widget.bed.cropBlocks)
  124:                           DraggableCropBlock(
  125:                             key: ValueKey(block.id),
  126:                             bedId: widget.bed.id,
  127:                             block: block,
  128:                             pixelsPerMeter: widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  129:                             controller: widget.controller,
  130:                           ),
  131:                       ],
  132:                     ),
  133:                   ),
  134:                 ),
  135:               ),
  136:             ),
  137: 
  138:           if (planting &&
  139:               plantDragStartLocal != null &&
  140:               plantDragCurrentLocal != null)
  141:             Positioned.fill(
  142:               child: IgnorePointer(
  143:                 child: CustomPaint(
  144:                   painter: _PlantDragPreviewPainter(
  145:                     start: plantDragStartLocal!,
  146:                     current: plantDragCurrentLocal!,
  147:                   ),
  148:                 ),
  149:               ),
  150:             ),
  151: 
  152:           if (widget.selected && !planting)
  153:             Positioned(
  154:               right: 8,
  155:               top: 8,
  156:               child: _MovePill(
  157:                 active: moving,
  158:                 onPanStart: _onMovePanStart,
  159:                 onPanUpdate: _onMovePanUpdate,
  160:                 onPanEnd: _onMovePanEnd,
  161:                 onPanCancel: _onMovePanCancel,
  162:               ),
  163:             ),
  164: 
  165:           if (widget.selected && !planting)
  166:             Positioned(
  167:               right: -8,
  168:               bottom: -8,
  169:               child: _ResizeKnob(
  170:                 active: resizing,
  171:                 warning: overlapping,
  172:                 onPanStart: _onResizePanStart,
  173:                 onPanUpdate: _onResizePanUpdate,
  174:                 onPanEnd: _onResizePanEnd,
  175:                 onPanCancel: _onResizePanCancel,
  176:               ),
  177:             ),
  178:         ],
  179:       ),
  180:     );
  181:   }
  182: 
  183:   void _selectOnly() {
  184:     widget.controller.selectBed(widget.bed.id);
  185:     widget.onFocusBed?.call();
  186:   }
  187: 
  188:   void _openDetails() {
  189:     widget.controller.selectBed(widget.bed.id);
  190:     widget.onOpenDetails?.call();
  191:   }
  192: 
  193:   void _plantAtTap(TapDownDetails details) {
  194:     final cropName = widget.activePlantName;
  195:     if (cropName == null) return;
  196: 
  197:     _addCropFromLocalPoints(
  198:       cropName: cropName,
  199:       startLocal: details.localPosition,
  200:       endLocal: details.localPosition,
  201:     );
  202: 
  203:     widget.onPlantPlaced?.call();
  204: 
  205:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  206:       SnackBar(content: Text('$cropName planted in ${widget.bed.name}.')),
  207:     );
  208:   }
  209: 
  210:   void _startPlantDrag(DragStartDetails details) {
  211:     setState(() {
  212:       plantDragStartLocal = details.localPosition;
  213:       plantDragCurrentLocal = details.localPosition;
  214:     });
  215:   }
  216: 
  217:   void _updatePlantDrag(DragUpdateDetails details) {
  218:     setState(() {
  219:       plantDragCurrentLocal = details.localPosition;
  220:     });
  221:   }
  222: 
  223:   void _endPlantDrag(DragEndDetails details) {
  224:     final cropName = widget.activePlantName;
  225:     final start = plantDragStartLocal;
  226:     final end = plantDragCurrentLocal;
  227: 
  228:     if (cropName == null || start == null || end == null) {
  229:       _cancelPlantDrag();
  230:       return;
  231:     }
  232: 
  233:     _addCropFromLocalPoints(
  234:       cropName: cropName,
  235:       startLocal: start,
  236:       endLocal: end,
  237:     );
  238: 
  239:     setState(() {
  240:       plantDragStartLocal = null;
  241:       plantDragCurrentLocal = null;
  242:     });
  243: 
  244:     widget.onPlantPlaced?.call();
  245: 
  246:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  247:       SnackBar(content: Text('$cropName planted in ${widget.bed.name}.')),
  248:     );
  249:   }
  250: 
  251:   void _cancelPlantDrag() {
  252:     setState(() {
  253:       plantDragStartLocal = null;
  254:       plantDragCurrentLocal = null;
  255:     });
  256:   }
  257: 
  258:   void _addCropFromLocalPoints({
  259:     required String cropName,
  260:     required Offset startLocal,
  261:     required Offset endLocal,
  262:   }) {
  263:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
  264:     final largeCanopy = CropSpacing.isLargeCanopyCrop(cropName);
  265: 
  266:     final startGarden = _localToGarden(startLocal);
  267:     var endGarden = _localToGarden(endLocal);
  268: 
  269:     final dragDistanceMeters = (endGarden - startGarden).distance;
  270: 
  271:     if (largeCanopy) {
  272:       final half = math.max(0.5, spacing / 2);
  273: 
  274:       widget.controller.addCropRowToBedRect(
  275:         bedId: widget.bed.id,
  276:         cropName: cropName,
  277:         startX: startGarden.dx - half,
  278:         startY: startGarden.dy - half,
  279:         endX: startGarden.dx + half,
  280:         endY: startGarden.dy + half,
  281:       );
  282:       return;
  283:     }
  284: 
  285:     if (dragDistanceMeters < spacing * 1.25) {
  286:       final rowLength = math.max(spacing * 3, 1.2);
  287:       endGarden = Offset(startGarden.dx + rowLength, startGarden.dy);
  288:     }
  289: 
  290:     widget.controller.addCropRowToBedRect(
  291:       bedId: widget.bed.id,
  292:       cropName: cropName,
  293:       startX: startGarden.dx,
  294:       startY: startGarden.dy,
  295:       endX: endGarden.dx,
  296:       endY: endGarden.dy,
  297:     );
  298:   }
  299: 
  300:   Offset _localToGarden(Offset local) {
  301:     return Offset(
  302:       widget.bed.x + local.dx / widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  303:       widget.bed.y + local.dy / widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  304:     );
  305:   }
  306: 
  307:   void _onMovePanStart(DragStartDetails details) {
  308:     widget.controller.selectBed(widget.bed.id);
  309:     setState(() {
  310:       moving = true;
  311:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  312:     });
  313:   }
  314: 
  315:   void _onMovePanUpdate(DragUpdateDetails details) {
  316:     if (!moving) return;
  317: 
  318:     setState(() {
  319:       dragOffsetPixels += details.delta;
  320:     });
  321:   }
  322: 
  323:   void _onMovePanEnd(DragEndDetails details) {
  324:     if (!moving) return;
  325: 
  326:     final nextX = widget.bed.x + dragOffsetPixels.dx / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  327:     final nextY = widget.bed.y + dragOffsetPixels.dy / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  328: 
  329:     setState(() {
  330:       moving = false;
  331:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  332:     });
  333: 
  334:     widget.controller.setBedPosition(
  335:       widget.bed.id,
  336:       x: nextX,
  337:       y: nextY,
  338:       snap: true,
  339:     );
  340:   }
  341: 
  342:   void _onMovePanCancel() {
  343:     setState(() {
  344:       moving = false;
  345:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  346:     });
  347:   }
  348: 
  349:   void _onResizePanStart(DragStartDetails details) {
  350:     widget.controller.selectBed(widget.bed.id);
  351:     setState(() {
  352:       resizing = true;
  353:       resizeOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  354:     });
  355:   }
  356: 
  357:   void _onResizePanUpdate(DragUpdateDetails details) {
  358:     if (!resizing) return;
  359: 
  360:     setState(() {
  361:       resizeOffsetPixels += details.delta;
  362:     });
  363:   }
  364: 
  365:   void _onResizePanEnd(DragEndDetails details) {
  366:     if (!resizing) return;
  367: 
  368:     final nextWidth =
  369:         widget.bed.width + resizeOffsetPixels.dx / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  370:     final nextHeight =
  371:         widget.bed.height + resizeOffsetPixels.dy / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  372: 
  373:     setState(() {
  374:       resizing = false;
  375:       resizeOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  376:     });
  377: 
  378:     widget.controller.resizeBed(
  379:       widget.bed.id,
  380:       width: nextWidth,
  381:       height: nextHeight,
  382:       snap: true,
  383:     );
  384:   }
  385: 
  386:   void _onResizePanCancel() {
  387:     setState(() {
  388:       resizing = false;
  389:       resizeOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  390:     });
  391:   }
  392: 
  393:   double _visualWidthPixels() {
  394:     final minWidthPixels = widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  395:     final rawWidth =
  396:         widget.bed.width * widget.pixelsPerMeter + resizeOffsetPixels.dx;
  397: 
  398:     return rawWidth < minWidthPixels ? minWidthPixels : rawWidth;
  399:   }
  400: 
  401:   double _visualHeightPixels() {
  402:     final minHeightPixels = widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  403:     final rawHeight =
  404:         widget.bed.height * widget.pixelsPerMeter + resizeOffsetPixels.dy;
  405: 
  406:     return rawHeight < minHeightPixels ? minHeightPixels : rawHeight;
  407:   }
  408: 
  409:   double _visualWidthMeters() => _visualWidthPixels() / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  410: 
  411:   double _visualHeightMeters() => _visualHeightPixels() / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  412: }

  635: class _BedStatusBadge extends StatelessWidget {

  836: class _PlantDragPreviewPainter extends CustomPainter {
  837:   const _PlantDragPreviewPainter({required this.start, required this.current});
  838: 
  839:   final Offset start;
  840:   final Offset current;
  841: 
  842:   @override
  843:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
  844:     final paint = Paint()
  845:       ..color = GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.85)
  846:       ..strokeWidth = 3
  847:       ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round;
  848: 
  849:     canvas.drawLine(start, current, paint);
  850: 
  851:     final dot = Paint()..color = GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.95);
  852: 
  853:     canvas.drawCircle(start, 5, dot);
  854:     canvas.drawCircle(current, 5, dot);
  855:   }
  856: 
  857:   @override
  858:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant _PlantDragPreviewPainter oldDelegate) {
  859:     return oldDelegate.start != start || oldDelegate.current != current;
  860:   }
  861: }
  862: 
  863: class _PlantingSurfacePainter extends CustomPainter {
  864:   @override
  865:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
  866:     final rowPaint = Paint()
  867:       ..color = const Color(0x24E8D8BE)
  868:       ..strokeWidth = 1.2
  869:       ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round;
  870: 
  871:     final finePaint = Paint()
  872:       ..color = const Color(0x14FFFFFF)
  873:       ..strokeWidth = 0.65
  874:       ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round;
  875: 
  876:     for (double y = 20; y <= size.height; y += 22) {
  877:       final path = Path()..moveTo(0, y);
  878:       for (double x = 0; x <= size.width; x += 50) {
  879:         path.quadraticBezierTo(x + 20, y + 4, x + 50, y);
  880:       }
  881:       canvas.drawPath(path, rowPaint);
  882:     }
  883: 
  884:     for (double y = 10; y <= size.height; y += 11) {
  885:       canvas.drawLine(Offset(0, y), Offset(size.width, y + 2), finePaint);
  886:     }
  887: 
  888:     final speck = Paint()..color = const Color(0x18FFFFFF);
  889:     for (double x = 8; x < size.width; x += 21) {
  890:       for (double y = 11; y < size.height; y += 19) {
  891:         final offset = ((x + y) % 13) / 13;
  892:         canvas.drawCircle(Offset(x + offset * 5, y), 0.8, speck);
  893:       }
  894:     }
  895: 
  896:     final shade = Paint()
  897:       ..shader = const LinearGradient(
  898:         begin: Alignment.topLeft,
  899:         end: Alignment.bottomRight,
  900:         colors: [Color(0x18FFFFFF), Color(0x00000000), Color(0x22000000)],
  901:       ).createShader(Offset.zero & size);
  902: 
  903:     canvas.drawRect(Offset.zero & size, shade);
  904:   }
  905: 
  906:   @override
  907:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant CustomPainter oldDelegate) => false;
  908: }

   13: class DraggableCropBlock extends StatefulWidget {

   15:     super.key,

   31: class _DraggableCropBlockState extends State<DraggableCropBlock> {
   32:   Offset dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
   33:   bool dragging = false;
   34:   bool selected = false;
   35:   int? activePointer;
   36: 
   37:   @override
   38:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant DraggableCropBlock oldWidget) {
   39:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
   40: 
   41:     if (!dragging) {
   42:       activePointer = null;
   43:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
   44:     }
   45:   }
   46: 
   47:   @override
   48:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   49:     final _compactSinglePlantFastPath =
   50:         widget.block.id.startsWith('single-plant-') ||
   51:         (widget.block.width <= 0.22 && widget.block.height <= 0.22);
   52: 
   53:     if (_compactSinglePlantFastPath) {
   54:       const markerSize = 26.0;
   55: 
   56:       final centerX =
   57:           (widget.block.x + widget.block.width / 2) * widget.pixelsPerMeter;
   58:       final centerY =
   59:           (widget.block.y + widget.block.height / 2) * widget.pixelsPerMeter;
   60: 
   61:       return Positioned(
   62:         left: centerX - markerSize / 2,
   63:         top: centerY - markerSize / 2,
   64:         width: markerSize,
   65:         height: markerSize,
   66:         child: _PrettySinglePlantMarker(cropName: widget.block.cropName),
   67:       );
   68:     }
   69: 
   70:     final cropName = widget.block.cropName.trim().isEmpty
   71:         ? 'Crop'
   72:         : widget.block.cropName.trim();
   73: 
   74:     final largeCanopy = CropSpacing.isLargeCanopyCrop(cropName);
   75:     final spacingMeters = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
   76:     final compactSinglePlant =
   77:         widget.block.id.startsWith('single-plant-') ||
   78:         (widget.block.width <= 0.22 && widget.block.height <= 0.22);
   79:     final estimatedCount = largeCanopy
   80:         ? 1
   81:         : math.max(
   82:             1,
   83:             CropSpacing.estimatedPlantCount(
   84:               cropName: cropName,
   85:               widthMeters: widget.block.width,
   86:               heightMeters: widget.block.height,
   87:             ),
   88:           );
   89: 
   90:     final left = widget.block.x * widget.pixelsPerMeter + dragOffsetPixels.dx;
   91:     final top = widget.block.y * widget.pixelsPerMeter + dragOffsetPixels.dy;
   92: 
   93:     final width = compactSinglePlant
   94:         ? 28.0
   95:         : math.max(26.0, widget.block.width * widget.pixelsPerMeter);
   96:     final height = compactSinglePlant
   97:         ? 28.0
   98:         : math.max(26.0, widget.block.height * widget.pixelsPerMeter);
   99: 
  100:     final plantStyle = _PlantEmojiStyle.forCrop(cropName);
  101: 
  102:     return Positioned(
  103:       left: left,
  104:       top: top,
  105:       width: width,
  106:       height: height,
  107:       child: Stack(
  108:         clipBehavior: Clip.none,
  109:         children: [
  110:           Positioned.fill(
  111:             child: Listener(
  112:               behavior: HitTestBehavior.opaque,
  113:               onPointerDown: _onPointerDown,
  114:               onPointerMove: _onPointerMove,
  115:               onPointerUp: _onPointerUp,
  116:               onPointerCancel: _onPointerCancel,
  117:               child: Tooltip(
  118:                 message:
  119:                     '$cropName\n$estimatedCount planted\n${CropSpacing.spacingLabelForCrop(cropName)}',
  120:                 child: AnimatedContainer(
  121:                   duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 90),
  122:                   decoration: BoxDecoration(
  123:                     color: dragging || selected
  124:                         ? GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.08)
  125:                         : Colors.transparent,
  126:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
  127:                     border: Border.all(
  128:                       color: dragging || selected
  129:                           ? GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.70)
  130:                           : Colors.transparent,
  131:                       width: dragging || selected ? 1.6 : 0,
  132:                     ),
  133:                   ),
  134:                   child: ClipRect(
  135:                     child: (largeCanopy || compactSinglePlant)
  136:                         ? _SingleCanopyPlant(
  137:                             cropName: cropName,
  138:                             style: plantStyle,
  139:                           )
  140:                         : _SpacingScaledPlantField(
  141:                             cropName: cropName,
  142:                             style: plantStyle,
  143:                             spacingMeters: spacingMeters,
  144:                             pixelsPerMeter: widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  145:                             blockWidthMeters: widget.block.width,
  146:                             blockHeightMeters: widget.block.height,
  147:                             estimatedCount: estimatedCount,
  148:                           ),
  149:                   ),
  150:                 ),
  151:               ),
  152:             ),
  153:           ),
  154:           if (estimatedCount > 1)
  155:             Positioned(
  156:               right: -7,
  157:               bottom: -7,
  158:               child: _MapCountBadge(count: estimatedCount),
  159:             ),
  160:           if (selected)
  161:             Positioned(
  162:               left: -10,
  163:               top: -10,
  164:               child: Builder(
  165:                 builder: (context) => _InfoButton(
  166:                   onPressed: () => _openPlantInfo(context, cropName),
  167:                 ),
  168:               ),
  169:             ),
  170:           if (selected)
  171:             Positioned(
  172:               right: -10,
  173:               top: -10,
  174:               child: _DeleteButton(
  175:                 onPressed: () {
  176:                   widget.controller.removeCropBlock(
  177:                     bedId: widget.bedId,
  178:                     blockId: widget.block.id,
  179:                   );
  180:                 },
  181:               ),
  182:             ),
  183:         ],
  184:       ),
  185:     );
  186:   }
  187: 
  188:   void _onPointerDown(PointerDownEvent event) {
  189:     activePointer = event.pointer;
  190: 
  191:     setState(() {
  192:       selected = true;
  193:       dragging = false;
  194:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  195:     });
  196:   }
  197: 
  198:   void _onPointerMove(PointerMoveEvent event) {
  199:     if (activePointer != event.pointer) return;
  200: 
  201:     setState(() {
  202:       dragging = true;
  203:       selected = true;
  204:       dragOffsetPixels += event.delta;
  205:     });
  206:   }
  207: 
  208:   void _onPointerUp(PointerUpEvent event) {
  209:     if (activePointer != event.pointer) return;
  210: 
  211:     if (!dragging) {
  212:       setState(() {
  213:         selected = !selected;
  214:         activePointer = null;
  215:       });
  216:       return;
  217:     }
  218: 
  219:     _commitMove();
  220:   }
  221: 
  222:   void _onPointerCancel(PointerCancelEvent event) {
  223:     if (activePointer != event.pointer) return;
  224: 
  225:     setState(() {
  226:       activePointer = null;
  227:       dragging = false;
  228:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  229:     });
  230:   }
  231: 
  232:   void _commitMove() {
  233:     final nextX = widget.block.x + dragOffsetPixels.dx / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  234:     final nextY = widget.block.y + dragOffsetPixels.dy / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  235: 
  236:     setState(() {
  237:       activePointer = null;
  238:       dragging = false;
  239:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  240:     });
  241: 
  242:     widget.controller.moveCropBlock(
  243:       bedId: widget.bedId,
  244:       blockId: widget.block.id,
  245:       x: nextX,
  246:       y: nextY,
  247:     );
  248:   }
  249: 
  250:   void _openPlantInfo(BuildContext context, String cropName) {

  254:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingLabelForCrop(cropName);
  255:

  328: class _PlantEmojiBubble extends StatelessWidget {
  329:   const _PlantEmojiBubble({

  331:     required this.style,
  332:     required this.bubbleSize,
  333:     required this.showLabel,
  334:   });
  335: 
  336:   final String cropName;
  337:   final _PlantEmojiStyle style;
  338:   final double bubbleSize;
  339:   final bool showLabel;
  340: 
  341:   static const List<String> emojiFontFallback = [
  342:     'Segoe UI Emoji',
  343:     'Apple Color Emoji',
  344:     'Noto Color Emoji',
  345:     'Twemoji Mozilla',
  346:   ];
  347: 
  348:   @override
  349:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {

  351:

  355:         Container(

  363:               width: style.perennial ? 2.1 : 1.35,
  364:             ),
  365:             boxShadow: const [

  367:                 color: Color(0x22000000),
  368:                 blurRadius: 5,
  369:                 offset: Offset(0, 2),
  370:               ),
  371:             ],
  372:           ),
  373:           child: Center(
  374:             child: GeneratedPlantIcon(cropName: cropName, size: iconSize),
  375:           ),
  376:         ),
  377:         if (showLabel) ...[
  378:           const SizedBox(height: 3),
  379:           Container(
  380:             constraints: BoxConstraints(
  381:               maxWidth: math.max(42, bubbleSize + 18),
  382:             ),
  383:             padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 4, vertical: 2),
  384:             decoration: BoxDecoration(
  385:               color: GardenTheme.panel.withValues(alpha: 0.94),
  386:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(5),
  387:               border: Border.all(
  388:                 color: GardenTheme.border.withValues(alpha: 0.85),
  389:               ),
  390:             ),
  391:             child: Text(
  392:               cropName,
  393:               maxLines: 1,
  394:               overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  395:               textAlign: TextAlign.center,
  396:               style: const TextStyle(
  397:                 color: GardenTheme.ink,
  398:                 fontSize: 8.5,
  399:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  400:               ),
  401:             ),
  402:           ),
  403:         ],
  404:       ],
