  409: class _SingleCanopyPlant extends StatelessWidget {
  410:   const _SingleCanopyPlant({required this.cropName, required this.style});
  411: 
  412:   final String cropName;
  413:   final _PlantEmojiStyle style;
  414: 
  415:   static const List<String> emojiFontFallback = [
  416:     'Segoe UI Emoji',
  417:     'Apple Color Emoji',
  418:     'Noto Color Emoji',
  419:     'Twemoji Mozilla',
  420:   ];
  421: 
  422:   @override
  423:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  424:     return LayoutBuilder(
  425:       builder: (context, constraints) {
  426:         final diameter = math.min(constraints.maxWidth, constraints.maxHeight);
  427:         final iconSize = (diameter * 0.30).clamp(26.0, 84.0).toDouble();
  428:         final labelWidth = math.min(140.0, math.max(82.0, diameter * 0.72));
  429: 
  430:         return Stack(
  431:           alignment: Alignment.center,
  432:           children: [
  433:             Container(
  434:               width: diameter,
  435:               height: diameter,
  436:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
  437:                 color: const Color(0xFFD0D0D0).withValues(alpha: 0.62),
  438:                 shape: BoxShape.circle,
  439:                 border: Border.all(
  440:                   color: style.borderColor.withValues(alpha: 0.24),
  441:                   width: 1.2,
  442:                 ),
  443:               ),
  444:             ),
  445:             Text(
  446:               style.emoji,
  447:               textAlign: TextAlign.center,
  448:               style: TextStyle(
  449:                 fontSize: iconSize,
  450:                 height: 1,
  451:                 fontFamilyFallback: emojiFontFallback,
  452:               ),
  453:             ),
  454:             Positioned(
  455:               bottom: math.max(6.0, diameter * 0.10),
  456:               child: Container(
  457:                 width: labelWidth,
  458:                 padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 6, vertical: 4),
  459:                 decoration: BoxDecoration(
  460:                   color: GardenTheme.panel.withValues(alpha: 0.96),
  461:                   borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(7),
  462:                   border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  463:                   boxShadow: const [
  464:                     BoxShadow(
  465:                       color: Color(0x16000000),
  466:                       blurRadius: 5,
  467:                       offset: Offset(0, 2),
  468:                     ),
  469:                   ],
  470:                 ),
  471:                 child: Text(
  472:                   cropName,
  473:                   maxLines: 1,
  474:                   overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  475:                   textAlign: TextAlign.center,
  476:                   style: const TextStyle(
  477:                     color: GardenTheme.ink,
  478:                     fontSize: 10,
  479:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  480:                   ),
  481:                 ),
  482:               ),
  483:             ),
  484:           ],
  485:         );
  486:       },
  487:     );
  488:   }
  489: }
  490: 
  491: class _SpacingScaledPlantField extends StatelessWidget {
  492:   const _SpacingScaledPlantField({
  493:     required this.cropName,
  494:     required this.style,
  495:     required this.spacingMeters,
  496:     required this.pixelsPerMeter,
  497:     required this.blockWidthMeters,
  498:     required this.blockHeightMeters,
  499:     required this.estimatedCount,
  500:   });
  501: 
  502:   final String cropName;
  503:   final _PlantEmojiStyle style;
  504:   final double spacingMeters;
  505:   final double pixelsPerMeter;
  506:   final double blockWidthMeters;
  507:   final double blockHeightMeters;
  508:   final int estimatedCount;
  509: 
  510:   @override
  511:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  512:     return LayoutBuilder(
  513:       builder: (context, constraints) {
  514:         final spacingPixels = math.max(12.0, spacingMeters * pixelsPerMeter);
  515: 
  516:         final isSingleRow =
  517:             math.min(blockWidthMeters, blockHeightMeters) < spacingMeters * 1.6;
  518: 
  519:         final isHorizontal = blockWidthMeters >= blockHeightMeters;
  520: 
  521:         final bubbleSize = _bubbleSizeForSpacing(spacingPixels);
  522:         final labelHeight = bubbleSize >= 34 ? 16.0 : 0.0;
  523:         final itemWidth = bubbleSize + 6;
  524:         final itemHeight = bubbleSize + labelHeight + 3;
  525: 
  526:         if (isSingleRow) {
  527:           return _singleRowLayout(
  528:             constraints: constraints,
  529:             horizontal: isHorizontal,
  530:             spacingPixels: spacingPixels,
  531:             itemWidth: itemWidth,
  532:             itemHeight: itemHeight,
  533:             bubbleSize: bubbleSize,
  534:             labelHeight: labelHeight,
  535:           );
  536:         }
  537: 
  538:         return _gridLayout(
  539:           constraints: constraints,
  540:           spacingPixels: spacingPixels,
  541:           itemWidth: itemWidth,
  542:           itemHeight: itemHeight,
  543:           bubbleSize: bubbleSize,
  544:           labelHeight: labelHeight,
  545:         );
  546:       },
  547:     );
  548:   }
  549: 
  550:   Widget _singleRowLayout({
  551:     required BoxConstraints constraints,
  552:     required bool horizontal,
  553:     required double spacingPixels,
  554:     required double itemWidth,
  555:     required double itemHeight,
  556:     required double bubbleSize,
  557:     required double labelHeight,
  558:   }) {
  559:     final availableLength = horizontal
  560:         ? constraints.maxWidth
  561:         : constraints.maxHeight;
  562:     final availableCross = horizontal
  563:         ? constraints.maxHeight
  564:         : constraints.maxWidth;
  565: 
  566:     final maxByLength = math.max(
  567:       1,
  568:       (availableLength / math.max(spacingPixels, itemWidth)).floor(),
  569:     );
  570: 
  571:     final count = math.max(1, math.min(estimatedCount, maxByLength));
  572: 
  573:     final totalLength = count == 1
  574:         ? itemWidth
  575:         : ((count - 1) * spacingPixels) + itemWidth;
  576: 
  577:     final start = ((availableLength - totalLength) / 2)
  578:         .clamp(0.0, math.max(0.0, availableLength - itemWidth))
  579:         .toDouble();
  580: 
  581:     final cross = ((availableCross - itemHeight) / 2)
  582:         .clamp(0.0, math.max(0.0, availableCross - itemHeight))
  583:         .toDouble();
  584: 
  585:     return Stack(
  586:       children: [
  587:         for (var index = 0; index < count; index++)
  588:           Positioned(
  589:             left: horizontal ? start + index * spacingPixels : cross,
  590:             top: horizontal ? cross : start + index * spacingPixels,
  591:             width: itemWidth,
  592:             height: itemHeight,
  593:             child: _PlantEmojiBubble(
  594:               cropName: cropName,
  595:               style: style,
  596:               bubbleSize: bubbleSize,
  597:               showLabel: labelHeight > 0,
  598:             ),
  599:           ),
  600:       ],
  601:     );
  602:   }
  603: 
  604:   Widget _gridLayout({
  605:     required BoxConstraints constraints,
  606:     required double spacingPixels,
  607:     required double itemWidth,
  608:     required double itemHeight,
  609:     required double bubbleSize,
  610:     required double labelHeight,
  611:   }) {
  612:     final columns = math.max(
  613:       1,
  614:       (constraints.maxWidth / math.max(spacingPixels, itemWidth)).floor(),
  615:     );
  616: 
  617:     final rows = math.max(
  618:       1,
  619:       (constraints.maxHeight / math.max(spacingPixels, itemHeight)).floor(),
  620:     );
  621: 
  622:     final visibleCount = math.max(1, math.min(estimatedCount, columns * rows));
  623: 
  624:     final gridWidth = columns == 1
  625:         ? itemWidth
  626:         : (columns - 1) * spacingPixels + itemWidth;
  627: 
  628:     final gridHeight = rows == 1
  629:         ? itemHeight
  630:         : (rows - 1) * spacingPixels + itemHeight;
  631: 
  632:     final originX = ((constraints.maxWidth - gridWidth) / 2)
  633:         .clamp(0.0, math.max(0.0, constraints.maxWidth - itemWidth))
  634:         .toDouble();
  635: 
  636:     final originY = ((constraints.maxHeight - gridHeight) / 2)
  637:         .clamp(0.0, math.max(0.0, constraints.maxHeight - itemHeight))
  638:         .toDouble();
  639: 
  640:     return Stack(
  641:       children: [
  642:         for (var index = 0; index < visibleCount; index++)
  643:           Positioned(
  644:             left: originX + (index % columns) * spacingPixels,
  645:             top: originY + (index ~/ columns) * spacingPixels,
  646:             width: itemWidth,
  647:             height: itemHeight,
  648:             child: _PlantEmojiBubble(
  649:               cropName: cropName,
  650:               style: style,
  651:               bubbleSize: bubbleSize,
  652:               showLabel: labelHeight > 0,
  653:             ),
  654:           ),
  655:       ],
  656:     );
  657:   }
  658: 
  659:   double _bubbleSizeForSpacing(double spacingPixels) {
  660:     if (spacingPixels < 14) return 14;
  661:     if (spacingPixels < 20) return 18;
  662:     if (spacingPixels < 28) return 24;
  663:     if (spacingPixels < 38) return 31;
  664:     if (spacingPixels < 52) return 38;
  665:     return 46;
  666:   }
  667: }
  668:

  968: class _PlantEmojiStyle {
  969:   const _PlantEmojiStyle({
  970:     required this.emoji,
  971:     required this.borderColor,
  972:     required this.perennial,
  973:   });
  974: 
  975:   final String emoji;
  976:   final Color borderColor;
  977:   final bool perennial;
  978: 
  979:   static _PlantEmojiStyle forCrop(String cropName) {
  980:     final crop = cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
  981: 
  982:     if (_containsAny(crop, [
  983:       'almond',
  984:       'apple',
  985:       'apricot',
  986:       'pear',
  987:       'plum',
  988:       'peach',
  989:       'citrus',
  990:     ])) {
  991:       return const _PlantEmojiStyle(
  992:         emoji: 'ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â°Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¸Ãƒâ€¦Ã¢â‚¬â„¢Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â³',
  993:         borderColor: GardenTheme.good,
  994:         perennial: true,
  995:       );
  996:     }
  997: 
  998:     if (_containsAny(crop, ['strawberry'])) {
  999:       return const _PlantEmojiStyle(
 1000:         emoji: 'ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â°Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¸Ãƒâ€šÃ‚ÂÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…â€œ',
 1001:         borderColor: GardenTheme.good,
 1002:         perennial: true,
 1003:       );
 1004:     }
 1005: 
 1006:     if (_containsAny(crop, ['raspberry', 'blackberry'])) {
 1007:       return const _PlantEmojiStyle(
 1008:         emoji: 'ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â°Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¸Ãƒâ€šÃ‚ÂÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â¡',
 1009:         borderColor: GardenTheme.good,
 1010:         perennial: true,
 1011:       );
 1012:     }
 1013: 
 1014:     if (_containsAny(crop, ['blueberry'])) {
 1015:       return const _PlantEmojiStyle(
 1016:         emoji: 'ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â°Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¸Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â«Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â',
 1017:         borderColor: GardenTheme.good,
 1018:         perennial: true,
 1019:       );
 1020:     }
 1021: 
 1022:     if (_containsAny(crop, ['broccoli'])) {
 1023:       return const _PlantEmojiStyle(
 1024:         emoji: 'ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â°Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¸Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¥Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¦',
 1025:         borderColor: GardenTheme.border,
 1026:         perennial: false,
 1027:       );
 1028:     }
 1029: 
 1030:     if (_containsAny(crop, [
 1031:       'basil',
 1032:       'agastache',
 1033:       'herb',
 1034:       'mint',
 1035:       'parsley',
 1036:       'thyme',
 1037:     ])) {
 1038:       return const _PlantEmojiStyle(
 1039:         emoji: 'ÃƒÆ’Ã‚Â°Ãƒâ€¦Ã‚Â¸Ãƒâ€¦Ã¢â‚¬â„¢Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â¿',
 1040:         borderColor: GardenTheme.good,

 1245: String _plantBadgeEmoji(String cropName) {

 1247: 
 1248:   if (name.contains('chilli') || name.contains('chili')) return '🌶️';

 1269:   if (name.contains('onion') ||
 1270:       name.contains('leek') ||
 1271:       name.contains('shallot')) {
 1272:     return '🧅';
 1273:   }
 1274: 
 1275:   if (name.contains('broccoli') ||
 1276:       name.contains('brassica') ||
 1277:       name.contains('brussels')) {
 1278:     return '🥦';
 1279:   }
 1280: 
 1281:   if (name.contains('lettuce') ||
 1282:       name.contains('spinach') ||
 1283:       name.contains('chicory') ||
 1284:       name.contains('cabbage') ||
 1285:       name.contains('kale') ||
 1286:       name.contains('silverbeet') ||
 1287:       name.contains('chard')) {
 1288:     return '🥬';
 1289:   }
 1290: 
 1291:   if (name.contains('corn') || name.contains('maize')) return '🌽';
 1292:   if (name.contains('cucumber') ||
 1293:       name.contains('courgette') ||
 1294:       name.contains('zucchini')) {
 1295:     return '🥒';
 1296:   }
 1297:

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: 
    3: import '../../../../core/models/crop_placement.dart';
    4: import '../../../../core/theme/garden_theme.dart';
    5: import '../../controller/garden_controller.dart';
    6: 
    7: class DraggableCropIcon extends StatefulWidget {
    8:   const DraggableCropIcon({
    9:     super.key,
   10:     required this.bedId,
   11:     required this.placement,
   12:     required this.pixelsPerMeter,
   13:     required this.controller,
   14:   });
   15: 
   16:   final String bedId;
   17:   final CropPlacement placement;
   18:   final double pixelsPerMeter;
   19:   final GardenController controller;
   20: 
   21:   @override
   22:   State<DraggableCropIcon> createState() => _DraggableCropIconState();
   23: }
   24: 
   25: class _DraggableCropIconState extends State<DraggableCropIcon> {
   26:   Offset dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
   27:   bool dragging = false;
   28:   int? activePointer;
   29: 
   30:   static const double iconSize = 28;
   31: 
   32:   @override
   33:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant DraggableCropIcon oldWidget) {
   34:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
   35: 
   36:     if (!dragging) {
   37:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
   38:       activePointer = null;
   39:     }
   40:   }
   41: 
   42:   @override
   43:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   44:     final left =
   45:         widget.placement.x * widget.pixelsPerMeter -
   46:         iconSize / 2 +
   47:         dragOffsetPixels.dx;
   48: 
   49:     final top =
   50:         widget.placement.y * widget.pixelsPerMeter -
   51:         iconSize / 2 +
   52:         dragOffsetPixels.dy;
   53: 
   54:     return Positioned(
   55:       left: left,
   56:       top: top,
   57:       width: iconSize,
   58:       height: iconSize,
   59:       child: Listener(
   60:         behavior: HitTestBehavior.opaque,
   61:         onPointerDown: _onPointerDown,
   62:         onPointerMove: _onPointerMove,
   63:         onPointerUp: _onPointerUp,
   64:         onPointerCancel: _onPointerCancel,
   65:         child: AnimatedScale(
   66:           scale: dragging ? 1.16 : 1.0,
   67:           duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 90),
   68:           child: Container(
   69:             alignment: Alignment.center,
   70:             decoration: BoxDecoration(
   71:               color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.96),
   72:               shape: BoxShape.circle,
   73:               border: Border.all(
   74:                 color: dragging
   75:                     ? GardenTheme.good
   76:                     : GardenTheme.ink.withValues(alpha: 0.28),
   77:                 width: dragging ? 2 : 1,
   78:               ),
   79:               boxShadow: const [
   80:                 BoxShadow(
   81:                   color: Color(0x33000000),
   82:                   blurRadius: 8,
   83:                   offset: Offset(0, 2),
   84:                 ),
   85:               ],
   86:             ),
   87:             child: Text(
   88:               _iconForCrop(widget.placement.cropName),
   89:               style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 16),
   90:             ),
   91:           ),
   92:         ),
   93:       ),
   94:     );
   95:   }
   96: 
   97:   void _onPointerDown(PointerDownEvent event) {
   98:     activePointer = event.pointer;
   99:     dragging = true;
  100:     dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  101:     setState(() {});
  102:   }
  103: 
  104:   void _onPointerMove(PointerMoveEvent event) {
  105:     if (activePointer != event.pointer) return;
  106: 
  107:     setState(() {
  108:       dragOffsetPixels += event.delta;
  109:     });
  110:   }
  111: 
  112:   void _onPointerUp(PointerUpEvent event) {
  113:     if (activePointer != event.pointer) return;
  114: 
  115:     final nextX =
  116:         widget.placement.x + dragOffsetPixels.dx / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  117:     final nextY =
  118:         widget.placement.y + dragOffsetPixels.dy / widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  119: 
  120:     setState(() {
  121:       dragging = false;
  122:       activePointer = null;
  123:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  124:     });
  125: 
  126:     widget.controller.moveCropPlacement(
  127:       bedId: widget.bedId,
  128:       placementId: widget.placement.id,
  129:       x: nextX,
  130:       y: nextY,
  131:     );
  132:   }
  133: 
  134:   void _onPointerCancel(PointerCancelEvent event) {
  135:     if (activePointer != event.pointer) return;
  136: 
  137:     setState(() {
  138:       dragging = false;
  139:       activePointer = null;
  140:       dragOffsetPixels = Offset.zero;
  141:     });
  142:   }
  143: 
  144:   String _iconForCrop(String cropName) {
  145:     final crop = cropName.toLowerCase();
  146: 
  147:     if (crop.contains('strawberry')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚ÂÃ¢â‚¬Å“';
  148:     if (crop.contains('raspberry')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â«Ã‚Â';
  149:     if (crop.contains('blueberry')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â«Ã‚Â';
  150: 
  151:     if (crop.contains('broccoli')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã‚Â¦';
  152:     if (crop.contains('lettuce')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã‚Â¬';
  153:     if (crop.contains('spinach')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã‚Â¬';
  154:     if (crop.contains('kale')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã‚Â¬';
  155: 
  156:     if (crop.contains('tomato')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚ÂÃ¢â‚¬Â¦';
  157:     if (crop.contains('pepper')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã…â€™Ã‚Â¶ÃƒÂ¯Ã‚Â¸Ã‚Â';
  158:     if (crop.contains('cucumber')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã¢â‚¬â„¢';

    1: import 'dart:math' as math;

    8: enum FrostRiskLevel { none, low, moderate, high, danger }
    9: 
   10: class FrostForecastDay {
   11:   const FrostForecastDay({
   12:     required this.date,
   13:     required this.lowC,
   14:     required this.highC,
   15:     required this.condition,
   16:   });
   17: 
   18:   final DateTime date;
   19:   final double lowC;
   20:   final double highC;
   21:   final String condition;
   22: }
   23: 
   24: class FrostRiskWidget extends StatefulWidget {
   25:   const FrostRiskWidget({
   26:     super.key,
   27:     this.compactMode = false,
   28:     this.latitude = FrostForecastService.defaultLatitude,
   29:     this.longitude = FrostForecastService.defaultLongitude,
   30:   });
   31: 
   32:   final double latitude;
   33:   final double longitude;
   34:   final bool compactMode;
   35: 
   36:   @override
   37:   State<FrostRiskWidget> createState() => _FrostRiskWidgetState();
   38: }
   39: 
   40: class _FrostRiskWidgetState extends State<FrostRiskWidget> {
   41:   final FrostForecastService service = const FrostForecastService();
   42: 
   43:   late Future<List<FrostForecastDay>> forecastFuture;
   44: 
   45:   @override
   46:   void initState() {
   47:     super.initState();
   48:     forecastFuture = _load();
   49:   }
   50: 
   51:   @override
   52:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant FrostRiskWidget oldWidget) {
   53:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
   54: 
   55:     if (oldWidget.latitude != widget.latitude ||
   56:         oldWidget.longitude != widget.longitude) {
   57:       forecastFuture = _load();
   58:     }
   59:   }
   60: 
   61:   Future<List<FrostForecastDay>> _load() {
   62:     return service.fetchForecast(
   63:       latitude: widget.latitude,
   64:       longitude: widget.longitude,
   65:     );
   66:   }
   67: 
   68:   void _refresh() {
   69:     setState(() {
   70:       forecastFuture = _load();
   71:     });
   72:   }
   73: 
   74:   @override
   75:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   76:     return FutureBuilder<List<FrostForecastDay>>(
   77:       future: forecastFuture,
   78:       builder: (context, snapshot) {
   79:         if (snapshot.connectionState == ConnectionState.waiting) {
   80:           return const _FrostLoading();
   81:         }
   82: 
   83:         if (snapshot.hasError) {
   84:           return _FrostError(
   85:             message: snapshot.error.toString(),
   86:             onRetry: _refresh,
   87:           );
   88:         }
   89: 
   90:         final days = snapshot.data ?? const <FrostForecastDay>[];
   91: 
   92:         if (days.isEmpty) {
   93:           return _FrostError(
   94:             message: 'No frost forecast data available.',
   95:             onRetry: _refresh,
   96:           );
   97:         }
   98: 
   99:         return _FrostContent(days: days, onRefresh: _refresh);
  100:       },
  101:     );
  102:   }
  103: }
  104: 
  105: class _FrostLoading extends StatelessWidget {
  106:   const _FrostLoading();
  107: 
  108:   @override
  109:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  110:     return Container(
  111:       width: double.infinity,
  112:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
  113:       decoration: const BoxDecoration(
  114:         color: GardenTheme.panel,
  115:         border: Border(bottom: BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border)),
  116:       ),
  117:       child: const Row(
  118:         children: [
  119:           SizedBox(
  120:             width: 18,
  121:             height: 18,
  122:             child: CircularProgressIndicator(strokeWidth: 2),
  123:           ),
  124:           SizedBox(width: 10),
  125:           Text(
  126:             'Loading frost forecast...',
  127:             style: TextStyle(
  128:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
  129:               fontSize: 12,
  130:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  131:             ),
  132:           ),
  133:         ],
  134:       ),
  135:     );
  136:   }
  137: }
  138: 
  139: class _FrostError extends StatelessWidget {
  140:   const _FrostError({required this.message, required this.onRetry});
  141: 
  142:   final String message;
  143:   final VoidCallback onRetry;
  144: 
  145:   @override
  146:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  147:     return Container(
  148:       width: double.infinity,
  149:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
  150:       decoration: const BoxDecoration(

  153:       ),

  155:         children: [
  156:           const Icon(Icons.warning_amber, color: GardenTheme.warn, size: 18),
  157:           const SizedBox(width: 10),
  158:           Expanded(
  159:             child: Text(
  160:               message,
  161:               maxLines: 2,
  162:               overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,

  164:                 color: GardenTheme.muted,

  166:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  167:               ),

  177: 
  178: class _FrostContent extends StatelessWidget {
  179:   const _FrostContent({required this.days, required this.onRefresh});
  180: 
  181:   final List<FrostForecastDay> days;
  182:   final VoidCallback onRefresh;
  183: 
  184:   @override
  185:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  186:     final today = days.isEmpty ? null : days.first;
  187:     final tomorrow = days.length > 1 ? days[1] : null;
  188:     final level = _overallRisk(days);
  189:     final score = _riskScore(days);
  190: 
  191:     return Container(
  192:       width: double.infinity,
  193:       decoration: const BoxDecoration(
  194:         color: GardenTheme.panel,
  195:         border: Border(bottom: BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border)),
  196:       ),
  197:       child: Column(
  198:         children: [
  199:           if (level != FrostRiskLevel.none)
  200:             _FrostAlertBanner(level: level, today: today, tomorrow: tomorrow),
  201:           Padding(
  202:             padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12, 10, 12, 12),
  203:             child: LayoutBuilder(
  204:               builder: (context, constraints) {
  205:                 final compact = constraints.maxWidth < 840;
  206: 
  207:                 final header = _FrostHeader(
  208:                   level: level,
  209:                   today: today,
  210:                   tomorrow: tomorrow,
  211:                   onRefresh: onRefresh,
  212:                 );
  213: 
  214:                 final scoreBar = _FrostScoreBar(score: score);
  215:                 final grid = _FrostSevenDayGrid(days: days);
  216: 
  217:                 if (compact) {
  218:                   return Column(
  219:                     crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  220:                     children: [
  221:                       header,
  222:                       const SizedBox(height: 12),
  223:                       scoreBar,
  224:                       const SizedBox(height: 12),
  225:                       grid,
  226:                     ],
  227:                   );
  228:                 }
  229: 
  230:                 return Row(
  231:                   crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  232:                   children: [
  233:                     Expanded(
  234:                       flex: 4,
  235:                       child: Column(
  236:                         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  237:                         children: [
  238:                           header,
  239:                           const SizedBox(height: 12),
  240:                           scoreBar,
  241:                         ],
  242:                       ),
  243:                     ),
  244:                     const SizedBox(width: 16),
  245:                     Expanded(flex: 5, child: grid),
  246:                   ],
  247:                 );
  248:               },
  249:             ),
  250:           ),
  251:         ],
  252:       ),
  253:     );
  254:   }
  255: 
  256:   static FrostRiskLevel _overallRisk(List<FrostForecastDay> days) {
  257:     if (days.isEmpty) return FrostRiskLevel.none;
  258: 
  259:     final lowest = days.take(3).map((day) => day.lowC).reduce(math.min);
  260: 
  261:     if (lowest <= -2) return FrostRiskLevel.danger;
  262:     if (lowest <= 0) return FrostRiskLevel.high;
  263:     if (lowest <= 2) return FrostRiskLevel.moderate;
  264:     if (lowest <= 4) return FrostRiskLevel.low;
  265:     return FrostRiskLevel.none;
  266:   }
  267: 
  268:   static double _riskScore(List<FrostForecastDay> days) {
  269:     if (days.isEmpty) return 0;
  270: 
  271:     final lowest = days.take(3).map((day) => day.lowC).reduce(math.min);
  272: 
  273:     if (lowest <= -3) return 1;
  274:     if (lowest >= 8) return 0;
  275: 
  276:     return ((8 - lowest) / 11).clamp(0, 1).toDouble();
  277:   }
  278: }
  279: 
  280: class _FrostAlertBanner extends StatelessWidget {
  281:   const _FrostAlertBanner({
  282:     required this.level,
  283:     required this.today,
  284:     required this.tomorrow,
  285:   });
  286: 
  287:   final FrostRiskLevel level;
  288:   final FrostForecastDay? today;
  289:   final FrostForecastDay? tomorrow;
  290: 
  291:   @override
  292:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  293:     final color = _riskColor(level);
  294:     final background = _riskBackground(level);
  295: 
  296:     return Container(
  297:       width: double.infinity,
  298:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 14, vertical: 10),
  299:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  300:         color: background,
  301:         border: Border(
  302:           bottom: BorderSide(color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.22)),
  303:         ),
  304:       ),
  305:       child: Row(
  306:         children: [
  307:           Icon(Icons.ac_unit, color: color, size: 17),
  308:           const SizedBox(width: 8),
  309:           Expanded(
  310:             child: Text(
  311:               _alertCopy(),
  312:               style: TextStyle(
  313:                 color: color,
  314:                 fontSize: 12,
  315:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  316:                 height: 1.25,
  317:               ),
  318:             ),
  319:           ),
  320:         ],
  321:       ),
  322:     );
  323:   }
  324: 
  325:   String _alertCopy() {
  326:     final tonight = today == null
  327:         ? null
  328:         : '${today!.lowC.toStringAsFixed(0)}\u00B0C tonight';
  329:     final tomorrowText = tomorrow == null
  330:         ? null
  331:         : '${tomorrow!.lowC.toStringAsFixed(0)}\u00B0C tomorrow night';
  332: 
  333:     switch (level) {
  334:       case FrostRiskLevel.danger:
  335:         return 'Danger frost risk. Cover tender crops and avoid transplanting. ${_join(tonight, tomorrowText)}.';
  336:       case FrostRiskLevel.high:
  337:         return 'High frost risk. Protect seedlings and tender crops. ${_join(tonight, tomorrowText)}.';
  338:       case FrostRiskLevel.moderate:
  339:         return 'Possible frost risk. Check exposed seedlings and young plantings. ${_join(tonight, tomorrowText)}.';
  340:       case FrostRiskLevel.low:
  341:         return 'Low frost risk. Monitor tender crops in exposed beds. ${_join(tonight, tomorrowText)}.';
  342:       case FrostRiskLevel.none:
  343:         return 'No frost risk detected.';
  344:     }
  345:   }
  346: 
  347:   String _join(String? a, String? b) {
  348:     final parts = [a, b].whereType<String>().where((v) => v.isNotEmpty);
  349:     return parts.join('. ');
  350:   }
  351: }

  489: class _FrostSevenDayGrid extends StatelessWidget {

  506:             children: [

  509:             ],
  510:           );
  511:         }

  513:         return Row(
  514:           children: [
  515:             for (var i = 0; i < visibleDays.length; i++) ...[
  516:               Expanded(child: _FrostDayCard(day: visibleDays[i])),
  517:               if (i != visibleDays.length - 1) const SizedBox(width: 7),

  519:           ],

  522:     );

  630:                       ],
  631:                     ),

  643:                     alignment: Alignment.centerRight,
  644:                     child: Container(

  650:                         border: Border.all(color: Colors.white, width: 2),
  651:                         boxShadow: const [

  653:                             color: Color(0x33000000),
  654:                             blurRadius: 4,
  655:                             offset: Offset(0, 1),
  656:                           ),
  657:                         ],
  658:                       ),

  660:                   ),
  661:                 ),

  664:           ),

  669:           children: [
  670:             Text('LOW', style: _scaleLabelStyle),
  671:             Text('MOD', style: _scaleLabelStyle),
  672:             Text('HIGH', style: _scaleLabelStyle),
  673:             Text('DANGER', style: _scaleLabelStyle),
  674:           ],
  675:         ),
  676:       ],
  677:     );
  678:   }

  680: 
  681: const TextStyle _scaleLabelStyle = TextStyle(
  682:   color: GardenTheme.muted,
  683:   fontSize: 9,
  684:   fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  685:   letterSpacing: 0.8,
  686: );
  687: 
  688: FrostRiskLevel _levelForLow(double lowC) {
  689:   if (lowC <= -2) return FrostRiskLevel.danger;
  690:   if (lowC <= 0) return FrostRiskLevel.high;
  691:   if (lowC <= 2) return FrostRiskLevel.moderate;
  692:   if (lowC <= 4) return FrostRiskLevel.low;
  693:   return FrostRiskLevel.none;
  694: }
  695: 
  696: Color _riskColor(FrostRiskLevel level) {
  697:   switch (level) {
  698:     case FrostRiskLevel.none:
  699:       return GardenTheme.muted;
  700:     case FrostRiskLevel.low:
  701:       return GardenTheme.good;
  702:     case FrostRiskLevel.moderate:
  703:       return GardenTheme.warn;
  704:     case FrostRiskLevel.high:
  705:       return GardenTheme.hold;
  706:     case FrostRiskLevel.danger:
  707:       return GardenTheme.bad;
  708:   }
  709: }
  710: 
  711: Color _riskBackground(FrostRiskLevel level) {
  712:   switch (level) {
  713:     case FrostRiskLevel.none:
  714:       return GardenTheme.paper;
  715:     case FrostRiskLevel.low:
  716:       return const Color(0xFFEEF8F0);
  717:     case FrostRiskLevel.moderate:
  718:       return const Color(0xFFFFF3E5);
  719:     case FrostRiskLevel.high:
  720:       return const Color(0xFFEFF3FF);
  721:     case FrostRiskLevel.danger:
  722:       return const Color(0xFFFFF0F3);
  723:   }
  724: }
  725: 
  726: String _riskTitle(FrostRiskLevel level) {
  727:   switch (level) {
  728:     case FrostRiskLevel.none:
  729:       return 'No frost expected';
  730:     case FrostRiskLevel.low:
  731:       return 'Low frost risk';
  732:     case FrostRiskLevel.moderate:
  733:       return 'Moderate frost risk';
  734:     case FrostRiskLevel.high:
  735:       return 'High frost risk';
  736:     case FrostRiskLevel.danger:
  737:       return 'Danger frost risk';
  738:   }
  739: }
  740: 
  741: String _riskLabel(FrostRiskLevel level) {
  742:   switch (level) {
  743:     case FrostRiskLevel.none:
  744:       return 'NONE';
  745:     case FrostRiskLevel.low:
  746:       return 'LOW';
  747:     case FrostRiskLevel.moderate:
  748:       return 'MOD';
  749:     case FrostRiskLevel.high:
  750:       return 'HIGH';
  751:     case FrostRiskLevel.danger:
  752:       return 'DANGER';
  753:   }
  754: }
  755: 
  756: String _dayLabel(DateTime date) {
  757:   const labels = ['MON', 'TUE', 'WED', 'THU', 'FRI', 'SAT', 'SUN'];
  758: 
  759:   return labels[date.weekday - 1];
  760: }

    1: import 'dart:async';
    2: import 'dart:convert';
    3: 
    4: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    5: import 'package:http/http.dart' as http;
    6: 
    7: class LivePlantNowPanel extends StatefulWidget {
    8:   const LivePlantNowPanel({super.key});
    9: 
   10:   @override
   11:   State<LivePlantNowPanel> createState() => _LivePlantNowPanelState();
   12: }
   13: 
   14: class _LivePlantNowPanelState extends State<LivePlantNowPanel> {
   15:   static const double latitude = -41.5042;
   16:   static const double longitude = 173.9662;
   17: 
   18:   static const _fallback = _WeatherSnapshot(
   19:     source: 'Fallback',
   20:     rootSoilTemp: 8.4,
   21:     surfaceSoilTemp: 10.9,
   22:     deepSoilTemp: 8.9,
   23:     airTemp: 12.0,
   24:     humidity: 83,
   25:     windKmh: 8,
   26:     solar: 150,
   27:     updated: 'offline',
   28:   );
   29: 
   30:   _WeatherSnapshot _weather = _fallback;
   31:   bool _loading = false;
   32:   String? _notice;
   33: 
   34:   @override
   35:   void initState() {
   36:     super.initState();
   37:     unawaited(_refresh());
   38:   }
   39: 
   40:   Future<void> _refresh() async {
   41:     setState(() {
   42:       _loading = true;
   43:       _notice = null;
   44:     });
   45: 
   46:     try {
   47:       final uri = Uri.https('api.open-meteo.com', '/v1/forecast', {
   48:         'latitude': latitude.toString(),
   49:         'longitude': longitude.toString(),
   50:         'hourly': [
   51:           'soil_temperature_0cm',
   52:           'soil_temperature_6cm',
   53:           'soil_temperature_18cm',
   54:           'temperature_2m',
   55:           'relative_humidity_2m',
   56:           'wind_speed_10m',
   57:           'shortwave_radiation',
   58:         ].join(','),
   59:         'forecast_days': '1',
   60:         'wind_speed_unit': 'kmh',
   61:         'timezone': 'Pacific/Auckland',
   62:       });
   63: 
   64:       final response = await http.get(uri).timeout(const Duration(seconds: 8));
   65:       if (response.statusCode < 200 || response.statusCode >= 300) {
   66:         throw StateError('Weather unavailable');
   67:       }
   68: 
   69:       final json = jsonDecode(response.body) as Map<String, dynamic>;
   70:       final hourly = json['hourly'] as Map<String, dynamic>?;
   71:       if (hourly == null) {
   72:         throw StateError('Weather unavailable');
   73:       }
   74: 
   75:       final index = _nearestHourIndex(hourly['time']);
   76:       final snapshot = _WeatherSnapshot(
   77:         source: 'Live',
   78:         rootSoilTemp:
   79:             _numAt(hourly['soil_temperature_6cm'], index) ??
   80:             _fallback.rootSoilTemp,
   81:         surfaceSoilTemp:
   82:             _numAt(hourly['soil_temperature_0cm'], index) ??
   83:             _fallback.surfaceSoilTemp,
   84:         deepSoilTemp:
   85:             _numAt(hourly['soil_temperature_18cm'], index) ??
   86:             _fallback.deepSoilTemp,
   87:         airTemp: _numAt(hourly['temperature_2m'], index) ?? _fallback.airTemp,
   88:         humidity:
   89:             (_numAt(hourly['relative_humidity_2m'], index) ??
   90:                     _fallback.humidity)
   91:                 .round(),
   92:         windKmh: (_numAt(hourly['wind_speed_10m'], index) ?? _fallback.windKmh)
   93:             .round(),
   94:         solar: (_numAt(hourly['shortwave_radiation'], index) ?? _fallback.solar)
   95:             .round(),
   96:         updated: _timeLabel(),
   97:       );
   98: 
   99:       if (mounted) {
  100:         setState(() {
  101:           _weather = snapshot;
  102:           _notice = null;
  103:         });
  104:       }
  105:     } catch (_) {
  106:       if (mounted) {
  107:         setState(() {
  108:           _weather = _fallback;
  109:           _notice = 'Live weather unavailable. Using offline fallback values.';
  110:         });
  111:       }
  112:     } finally {
  113:       if (mounted) {
  114:         setState(() => _loading = false);
  115:       }
  116:     }
  117:   }
  118: 
  119:   @override
  120:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  121:     final ready = _groups
  122:         .where((group) => _weather.rootSoilTemp >= group.minimumSoilTemp)
  123:         .toList();
  124: 
  125:     final notReady = _groups
  126:         .where((group) => _weather.rootSoilTemp < group.minimumSoilTemp)
  127:         .toList();
  128: 
  129:     return Container(
  130:       width: double.infinity,
  131:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
  132:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  133:         color: const Color(0xFFEBF8EF),
  134:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  135:         border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFBFDCC8)),
  136:       ),
  137:       child: Column(
  138:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  139:         children: [
  140:           Wrap(
  141:             spacing: 10,
  142:             runSpacing: 8,
  143:             crossAxisAlignment: WrapCrossAlignment.center,
  144:             alignment: WrapAlignment.spaceBetween,
  145:             children: [
  146:               const Text(
  147:                 'Live soil-temp planting guide',
  148:                 style: TextStyle(
  149:                   color: Color(0xFF1A5C34),
  150:                   fontSize: 15,

  197:                 detail: 'now',
  198:               ),

  203:             ready.isEmpty
  204:                 ? 'Good to plant now: soil is still cool. Start hardy crops in trays.'

  206:             style: const TextStyle(
  207:               color: Color(0xFF1A5C34),
  208:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  209:             ),
  210:           ),

  212:           Text(
  213:             notReady.isEmpty
  214:                 ? 'Nothing is blocked by soil temperature right now.'
  215:                 : 'Too cold for: ${notReady.map((g) => '${g.name} needs ${g.minimumSoilTemp.toStringAsFixed(0)} C').join(', ')}.',
  216:             style: const TextStyle(
  217:               color: Color(0xFF5B5148),
  218:               fontSize: 12,
  219:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  220:               height: 1.35,
  221:             ),
  222:           ),
  223:           const SizedBox(height: 6),
  224:           Text(
  225:             'Updated: ${_weather.updated}. Wind ${_weather.windKmh} km/h. Solar ${_weather.solar} W/m2.',
  226:             style: const TextStyle(
  227:               color: Color(0xFF757068),
  228:               fontSize: 11,
  229:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  230:             ),
  231:           ),
  232:           if (_notice != null) ...[
  233:             const SizedBox(height: 8),
  234:             Text(
  235:               _notice!,
  236:               style: const TextStyle(
  237:                 color: Color(0xFF7A4010),
  238:                 fontSize: 12,
  239:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  240:               ),
  241:             ),
  242:           ],
  243:         ],
  244:       ),
  245:     );
  246:   }
  247: 
  248:   static int _nearestHourIndex(dynamic values) {
  249:     if (values is! List || values.isEmpty) return 0;
  250: 
  251:     final now = DateTime.now();
  252:     var bestIndex = 0;
  253:     var bestDiff = const Duration(days: 999);
  254: 
  255:     for (var i = 0; i < values.length; i++) {
  256:       final raw = values[i];
  257:       if (raw is! String) continue;
  258: 
  259:       final parsed = DateTime.tryParse(raw);
  260:       if (parsed == null) continue;
  261: 
  262:       final diff = parsed.difference(now).abs();
  263:       if (diff < bestDiff) {
  264:         bestDiff = diff;
  265:         bestIndex = i;
  266:       }
  267:     }
  268: 
  269:     return bestIndex;
  270:   }
  271: 
  272:   static double? _numAt(dynamic values, int index) {
  273:     if (values is! List || values.isEmpty) return null;
  274: 
  275:     final safeIndex = index.clamp(0, values.length - 1);
  276:     final value = values[safeIndex];
  277: 
  278:     if (value is num) return value.toDouble();
  279:     return null;
  280:   }
  281: 
  282:   static String _timeLabel() {
  283:     final now = DateTime.now();
  284:     final hour = now.hour.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
  285:     final minute = now.minute.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
  286:     return '$hour:$minute';
  287:   }
  288: }
  289:

  297:     required this.humidity,
  298:     required this.windKmh,
  299:     required this.solar,
  300:     required this.updated,
  301:   });

  304:   final double rootSoilTemp;
  305:   final double surfaceSoilTemp;
  306:   final double deepSoilTemp;
  307:   final double airTemp;
  308:   final int humidity;
  309:   final int windKmh;
  310:   final int solar;
  311:   final String updated;
  312: }

    7: class LiveSoilTempPlantingGuide extends StatefulWidget {
    8:   const LiveSoilTempPlantingGuide({super.key, this.onQuickSowSeedKey});
    9: 
   10:   final ValueChanged<String>? onQuickSowSeedKey;
   11: 
   12:   @override
   13:   State<LiveSoilTempPlantingGuide> createState() =>
   14:       _LiveSoilTempPlantingGuideState();
   15: }
   16: 
   17: class _LiveSoilTempPlantingGuideState extends State<LiveSoilTempPlantingGuide> {
   18:   static const double latitude = -41.5042;
   19:   static const double longitude = 173.9662;
   20: 
   21:   static const _WeatherSnapshot fallback = _WeatherSnapshot(
   22:     source: 'Fallback',
   23:     rootSoilTemp: 8.4,
   24:     surfaceSoilTemp: 10.9,
   25:     deepSoilTemp: 8.9,
   26:     airTemp: 12.0,
   27:     humidity: 83,
   28:     windKmh: 8,
   29:     solar: 150,
   30:     updated: 'offline',
   31:     apiTime: null,
   32:   );
   33: 
   34:   _WeatherSnapshot weather = fallback;
   35:   bool loading = false;
   36:   String? notice;
   37:   String? lastError;
   38:   Timer? autoRefreshTimer;
   39: 
   40:   @override
   41:   void initState() {
   42:     super.initState();
   43:     unawaited(refresh());
   44: 
   45:     autoRefreshTimer = Timer.periodic(
   46:       const Duration(minutes: 15),
   47:       (_) => unawaited(refresh(silent: true)),
   48:     );
   49:   }
   50: 
   51:   @override
   52:   void dispose() {
   53:     autoRefreshTimer?.cancel();
   54:     super.dispose();
   55:   }
   56: 
   57:   Future<void> refresh({bool silent = false}) async {
   58:     if (!silent) {
   59:       setState(() {
   60:         loading = true;
   61:         notice = null;
   62:         lastError = null;
   63:       });
   64:     }
   65: 
   66:     try {
   67:       final uri = Uri.parse(
   68:         'https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast'
   69:         '?latitude=-41.5042'
   70:         '&longitude=173.9662'
   71:         '&hourly=soil_temperature_0cm,soil_temperature_6cm,soil_temperature_18cm,temperature_2m,relative_humidity_2m,wind_speed_10m,shortwave_radiation'
   72:         '&forecast_days=2'
   73:         '&wind_speed_unit=kmh'
   74:         '&timezone=auto',
   75:       );
   76: 
   77:       final response = await http
   78:           .get(
   79:             uri,
   80:             headers: const {
   81:               'Accept': 'application/json',
   82:               'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
   83:             },
   84:           )
   85:           .timeout(const Duration(seconds: 12));
   86: 
   87:       if (response.statusCode < 200 || response.statusCode >= 300) {
   88:         throw StateError(
   89:           'Open-Meteo returned HTTP ${response.statusCode}: ${response.body}',
   90:         );
   91:       }
   92: 
   93:       final decoded = jsonDecode(response.body) as Map<String, dynamic>;
   94:       final hourly = decoded['hourly'] as Map<String, dynamic>?;
   95: 
   96:       if (hourly == null) {
   97:         throw StateError('Open-Meteo response did not include hourly data.');
   98:       }
   99: 
  100:       final index = _nearestHourIndex(hourly['time']);
  101:       final apiTime = _stringAt(hourly['time'], index);
  102: 
  103:       final next = _WeatherSnapshot(
  104:         source: 'Live',
  105:         rootSoilTemp:
  106:             _numberAt(hourly['soil_temperature_6cm'], index) ??
  107:             fallback.rootSoilTemp,
  108:         surfaceSoilTemp:
  109:             _numberAt(hourly['soil_temperature_0cm'], index) ??
  110:             fallback.surfaceSoilTemp,
  111:         deepSoilTemp:
  112:             _numberAt(hourly['soil_temperature_18cm'], index) ??
  113:             fallback.deepSoilTemp,
  114:         airTemp: _numberAt(hourly['temperature_2m'], index) ?? fallback.airTemp,
  115:         humidity:
  116:             (_numberAt(hourly['relative_humidity_2m'], index) ??
  117:                     fallback.humidity)
  118:                 .round(),
  119:         windKmh:
  120:             (_numberAt(hourly['wind_speed_10m'], index) ?? fallback.windKmh)
  121:                 .round(),
  122:         solar:
  123:             (_numberAt(hourly['shortwave_radiation'], index) ?? fallback.solar)
  124:                 .round(),
  125:         updated: _timeLabel(),
  126:         apiTime: apiTime,
  127:       );
  128: 
  129:       if (!mounted) return;
  130: 
  131:       setState(() {
  132:         weather = next;
  133:         notice = null;
  134:         lastError = null;
  135:       });
  136:     } catch (error) {
  137:       if (!mounted) return;
  138: 
  139:       setState(() {
  140:         weather = fallback;
  141:         notice = 'Live weather unavailable. Using fallback soil data.';
  142:         lastError = error.toString();
  143:       });
  144:     } finally {
  145:       if (mounted) {
  146:         setState(() => loading = false);
  147:       }
  148:     }
  149:   }
  150: 
  151:   @override
  152:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  153:     final plantNow = plantGroups
  154:         .where((group) => weather.rootSoilTemp >= group.minimumSoilTemp)
  155:         .toList();
  156: 
  157:     final nearlyReady = plantGroups
  158:         .where(
  159:           (group) =>
  160:               weather.rootSoilTemp < group.minimumSoilTemp &&
  161:               group.minimumSoilTemp - weather.rootSoilTemp <= 2.5,
  162:         )
  163:         .toList();
  164: 
  165:     final tooCold = plantGroups
  166:         .where(
  167:           (group) =>
  168:               weather.rootSoilTemp < group.minimumSoilTemp &&
  169:               !nearlyReady.contains(group),
  170:         )
  171:         .toList();
  172: 
  173:     return Container(
  174:       width: double.infinity,
  175:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(13),
  176:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  177:         color: const Color(0xFFEBF8EF),
  178:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  179:         border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFBFDCC8)),
  180:       ),
  181:       child: Column(
  182:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  183:         children: [
  184:           _header(context),
  185:           const SizedBox(height: 12),
  186:           _metrics(),
  187:           const SizedBox(height: 12),
  188:           _summary(plantNow),
  189:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  190:           _groupSection(
  191:             title: 'Plant now',
  192:             groups: plantNow,
  193:             color: const Color(0xFF227A47),
  194:             emptyText:
  195:                 'No crop groups are fully ready from soil temperature alone.',
  196:             enableActions: true,
  197:           ),
  198:           if (nearlyReady.isNotEmpty) ...[
  199:             const SizedBox(height: 10),
  200:             _groupSection(
  201:               title: 'Nearly ready',
  202:               groups: nearlyReady,
  203:               color: const Color(0xFFA86412),
  204:               showShortfall: true,
  205:             ),
  206:           ],
  207:           if (tooCold.isNotEmpty) ...[

  209:             _groupSection(
  210:               title: 'Too cold',
  211:               groups: tooCold,
  212:               color: const Color(0xFF9B2C20),
  213:               showShortfall: true,
  214:             ),
  215:           ],
  216:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  217:           _footer(),
  218:           if (lastError != null) ...[

  220:             _errorDetails(),
  221:           ],
  222:         ],
  223:       ),
  224:     );
  225:   }

  328:   Widget _groupSection({
  329:     required String title,

  331:     required Color color,
  332:     String? emptyText,
  333:     bool showShortfall = false,
  334:     bool enableActions = false,
  335:   }) {
  336:     if (groups.isEmpty && emptyText != null) {
  337:       return Text(
  338:         emptyText,
  339:         style: const TextStyle(
  340:           color: Color(0xFF757068),
  341:           fontSize: 12,
  342:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  343:         ),
  344:       );
  345:     }
  346: 
  347:     return Column(
  348:       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  349:       children: [
  350:         Text(
  351:           title.toUpperCase(),
  352:           style: TextStyle(
  353:             color: color,
  354:             fontSize: 11,
  355:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  356:             letterSpacing: 0.8,
  357:           ),
  358:         ),
  359:         const SizedBox(height: 6),
  360:         ...groups.map((group) {
  361:           final shortfall = (group.minimumSoilTemp - weather.rootSoilTemp)
  362:               .clamp(0, 99);
  363: 
  364:           return Container(
  365:             width: double.infinity,
  366:             margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 6),
  367:             padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10, vertical: 9),
  368:             decoration: BoxDecoration(
  369:               color: Colors.white,
  370:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(11),
  371:               border: Border.all(color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.35)),
  372:             ),
  373:             child: Column(
  374:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  375:               children: [
  376:                 Row(
  377:                   crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  378:                   children: [
  379:                     Icon(
  380:                       showShortfall ? Icons.schedule : Icons.check_circle,
  381:                       size: 17,
  382:                       color: color,
  383:                     ),
  384:                     const SizedBox(width: 8),
  385:                     Expanded(
  386:                       child: RichText(
  387:                         text: TextSpan(
  388:                           style: const TextStyle(
  389:                             color: Color(0xFF514B43),
  390:                             fontSize: 12,
  391:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  392:                             height: 1.35,
  393:                           ),

  395:                             TextSpan(

  397:                               style: TextStyle(
  398:                                 color: color,

  400:                               ),
  401:                             ),
  402:                             TextSpan(text: group.exampleLabels.join(', ')),
  403:                             TextSpan(text: ' - ${group.method}.'),
  404:                           ],
  405:                         ),
  406:                       ),
  407:                     ),
  408:                     if (showShortfall) ...[
  409:                       const SizedBox(width: 8),
  410:                       Text(
  411:                         '+${shortfall.toStringAsFixed(1)} C',
  412:                         style: TextStyle(
  413:                           color: color,
  414:                           fontSize: 11,
  415:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  416:                         ),
  417:                       ),
  418:                     ],
  419:                   ],
  420:                 ),
  421:                 if (enableActions &&
  422:                     group.actions.isNotEmpty &&
  423:                     widget.onQuickSowSeedKey != null) ...[
  424:                   const SizedBox(height: 8),
  425:                   Wrap(
  426:                     spacing: 6,
  427:                     runSpacing: 6,
  428:                     children: group.actions.map((action) {
  429:                       return OutlinedButton.icon(
  430:                         onPressed: () =>
  431:                             widget.onQuickSowSeedKey!(action.seedKey),
  432:                         icon: const Icon(Icons.add, size: 15),
  433:                         label: Text('Sow ${action.label}'),
  434:                         style: OutlinedButton.styleFrom(
  435:                           visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
  436:                           foregroundColor: const Color(0xFF227A47),
  437:                           side: const BorderSide(color: Color(0xFFBFDCC8)),
  438:                           backgroundColor: const Color(0xFFF8FFFA),
  439:                           textStyle: const TextStyle(
  440:                             fontSize: 12,
  441:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  442:                           ),
  443:                         ),
  444:                       );
  445:                     }).toList(),
  446:                   ),
  447:                 ],
  448:               ],
  449:             ),
  450:           );
  451:         }),
  452:       ],

  558: 
  559:   static int _nearestHourIndex(dynamic values) {
  560:     if (values is! List || values.isEmpty) return 0;
  561: 
  562:     final now = DateTime.now();
  563:     var bestIndex = 0;
  564:     var bestDiff = const Duration(days: 999);
  565: 
  566:     for (var i = 0; i < values.length; i++) {
  567:       final raw = values[i];
  568:       if (raw is! String) continue;
  569: 
  570:       final parsed = DateTime.tryParse(raw);
  571:       if (parsed == null) continue;
  572: 
  573:       final diff = parsed.difference(now).abs();
  574:       if (diff < bestDiff) {
  575:         bestDiff = diff;
  576:         bestIndex = i;
  577:       }
  578:     }
  579: 
  580:     return bestIndex;
  581:   }
  582: 
  583:   static double? _numberAt(dynamic values, int index) {
  584:     if (values is! List || values.isEmpty) return null;
  585: 
  586:     final safeIndex = index.clamp(0, values.length - 1).toInt();
  587:     final value = values[safeIndex];
  588: 
  589:     if (value is num) return value.toDouble();
  590:     return null;
  591:   }
  592: 
  593:   static String? _stringAt(dynamic values, int index) {
  594:     if (values is! List || values.isEmpty) return null;
  595: 
  596:     final safeIndex = index.clamp(0, values.length - 1).toInt();
  597:     final value = values[safeIndex];
  598: 
  599:     if (value is String) return value;
  600:     return null;
  601:   }
  602: 
  603:   static String _timeLabel() {
  604:     final now = DateTime.now();
  605:     final hour = now.hour.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
  606:     final minute = now.minute.toString().padLeft(2, '0');
  607:     return '$hour:$minute';
  608:   }
  609: }

   25:     scrollController.dispose();

   82: class _BedSummaryCard extends StatelessWidget {
   83:   const _BedSummaryCard({required this.bed, required this.onTap});
   84: 
   85:   final Bed bed;
   86:   final VoidCallback onTap;
   87: 
   88:   @override
   89:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   90:     final statusColor = _statusColor(bed.status);
   91:     final statusLabel = _statusLabel(bed.status);
   92:     final area = bed.width * bed.height;
   93:     final plantedCount = bed.cropPlacements.length + bed.cropBlocks.length;
   94:     final cleanCrops = bed.crops
   95:         .map((crop) => crop.toString().trim())
   96:         .where((crop) => crop.isNotEmpty)
   97:         .toList();
   98: 
   99:     return Material(
  100:       color: Colors.white,
  101:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
  102:       child: InkWell(
  103:         onTap: onTap,

  206:   Color _statusColor(BedStatus status) {
  207:     switch (status) {
  208:       case BedStatus.ok:
  209:         return GardenTheme.good;
  210:       case BedStatus.warning:
  211:         return GardenTheme.warn;
  212:       case BedStatus.bad:
  213:         return GardenTheme.bad;
  214:       case BedStatus.hold:
  215:         return GardenTheme.hold;
  216:     }
  217:   }
  218: 
  219:   String _statusLabel(BedStatus status) {
  220:     switch (status) {
  221:       case BedStatus.ok:
  222:         return 'On track';
  223:       case BedStatus.warning:
  224:         return 'Attention';
  225:       case BedStatus.bad:
  226:         return 'Issue';
  227:       case BedStatus.hold:
  228:         return 'Hold';
  229:     }
  230:   }

  357:                 const SizedBox(width: 5),
  358:                 Text(
  359:                   label,
  360:                   style: const TextStyle(
  361:                     color: GardenTheme.ink,

  363:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  364:                   ),
  365:                 ),
  366:               ],
  367:             ],
  368:           ),
  369:         ),
  370:       ),
  371:     );
  372:   }

  375: class _MetricsWrap extends StatelessWidget {
  376:   const _MetricsWrap({required this.cards});
  377: 
  378:   final List<_MetricData> cards;
  379: 
  380:   @override
  381:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  382:     return LayoutBuilder(
  383:       builder: (context, constraints) {
  384:         final width = constraints.maxWidth;
  385:         final columns = width >= 1260
  386:             ? 6
  387:             : width >= 980
  388:             ? 3
  389:             : width >= 640
  390:             ? 2
  391:             : 1;
  392: 
  393:         final cardWidth = (width - ((columns - 1) * 10)) / columns;
  394: 
  395:         return Wrap(
  396:           spacing: 10,
  397:           runSpacing: 10,
  398:           children: [
  399:             for (final card in cards)
  400:               SizedBox(
  401:                 width: cardWidth,
  402:                 height: 92,
  403:                 child: _MetricCard(data: card),
  404:               ),
  405:           ],
  406:         );
  407:       },
  408:     );
  409:   }
  410: }

    1: import 'dart:math' as math;
    2:

    4:

   13: class PlannerMapView extends StatefulWidget {
   14:   const PlannerMapView({
   15:     super.key,
   16:     required this.controller,
   17:     required this.beds,
   18:     required this.canvasWidth,
   19:     required this.canvasHeight,
   20:     required this.pixelsPerMeter,
   21:     required this.gridVisible,
   22:     required this.labelsVisible,
   23:     required this.cropRowsVisible,
   24:     required this.instructionsVisible,
   25:     required this.onOpenBedDetails,
   26:     required this.onFitMap,
   27:     required this.onResetZoom,
   28:     required this.onGridVisibleChanged,
   29:     required this.onLabelsVisibleChanged,
   30:     required this.onCropRowsVisibleChanged,
   31:     required this.onInstructionsVisibleChanged,
   32:   });
   33: 
   34:   final GardenController controller;
   35:   final List<Bed> beds;
   36:   final double canvasWidth;
   37:   final double canvasHeight;
   38:   final double pixelsPerMeter;
   39: 
   40:   final bool gridVisible;
   41:   final bool labelsVisible;
   42:   final bool cropRowsVisible;
   43:   final bool instructionsVisible;
   44: 
   45:   final ValueChanged<Bed> onOpenBedDetails;
   46:   final VoidCallback onFitMap;
   47:   final VoidCallback onResetZoom;
   48: 
   49:   final ValueChanged<bool> onGridVisibleChanged;
   50:   final ValueChanged<bool> onLabelsVisibleChanged;
   51:   final ValueChanged<bool> onCropRowsVisibleChanged;
   52:   final ValueChanged<bool> onInstructionsVisibleChanged;
   53: 
   54:   @override
   55:   State<PlannerMapView> createState() => _PlannerMapViewState();
   56: }
   57: 
   58: class _PlannerMapViewState extends State<PlannerMapView> {
   59:   String? selectedBedId;
   60:   String? activePlantName;
   61: 
   62:   static const String buildMarker = 'one-bed-only-force-20260426_085802';
   63: 
   64:   Bed? get selectedBed {
   65:     if (widget.beds.isEmpty) return null;
   66: 
   67:     final id = selectedBedId ?? widget.controller.selectedBedId;
   68: 
   69:     for (final bed in widget.beds) {
   70:       if (bed.id == id) return bed;
   71:     }
   72: 
   73:     return widget.beds.first;
   74:   }
   75: 
   76:   @override
   77:   void initState() {
   78:     super.initState();
   79: 
   80:     if (widget.beds.isNotEmpty) {
   81:       selectedBedId = widget.controller.selectedBedId ?? widget.beds.first.id;
   82:       widget.controller.selectBed(selectedBedId!);
   83:     }
   84:   }
   85: 
   86:   @override
   87:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant PlannerMapView oldWidget) {
   88:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
   89: 
   90:     if (widget.beds.isEmpty) {
   91:       selectedBedId = null;
   92:       activePlantName = null;
   93:       return;
   94:     }
   95: 
   96:     final stillExists = widget.beds.any((bed) => bed.id == selectedBedId);
   97: 
   98:     if (!stillExists) {
   99:       selectedBedId = widget.controller.selectedBedId ?? widget.beds.first.id;
  100:       widget.controller.selectBed(selectedBedId!);
  101:       activePlantName = null;
  102:     }
  103:   }
  104: 
  105:   @override
  106:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  107:     final bed = selectedBed;
  108: 
  109:     return Stack(
  110:       children: [
  111:         const Positioned.fill(child: _MapBackdrop()),
  112:         Positioned(
  113:           left: 14,
  114:           top: 14,
  115:           bottom: 14,
  116:           width: 300,
  117:           child: AnimatedBuilder(
  118:             animation: widget.controller,
  119:             builder: (context, _) {
  120:               return PlantPickerPanel(
  121:                 key: const ValueKey('one-bed-force-plant-picker-panel'),
  122:                 controller: widget.controller,
  123:                 onPlantChosen: _startPlantPlacement,
  124:               );
  125:             },
  126:           ),
  127:         ),
  128:         Positioned.fill(
  129:           left: 326,
  130:           child: bed == null
  131:               ? const _NoBedPanel()
  132:               : _OneBedWorkspace(
  133:                   marker: buildMarker,
  134:                   bed: bed,
  135:                   beds: widget.beds,
  136:                   controller: widget.controller,
  137:                   activePlantName: activePlantName,
  138:                   showLabels: widget.labelsVisible,
  139:                   showCropRows: widget.cropRowsVisible,
  140:                   showInstructions: widget.instructionsVisible,
  141:                   controls: MapViewControls(
  142:                     gridVisible: widget.gridVisible,
  143:                     labelsVisible: widget.labelsVisible,
  144:                     cropRowsVisible: widget.cropRowsVisible,
  145:                     instructionsVisible: widget.instructionsVisible,
  146:                     onFitMap: widget.onFitMap,
  147:                     onResetZoom: widget.onResetZoom,
  148:                     onGridVisibleChanged: widget.onGridVisibleChanged,
  149:                     onLabelsVisibleChanged: widget.onLabelsVisibleChanged,
  150:                     onCropRowsVisibleChanged: widget.onCropRowsVisibleChanged,
  151:                     onInstructionsVisibleChanged:
  152:                         widget.onInstructionsVisibleChanged,
  153:                   ),
  154:                   onSelectBed: _selectBed,
  155:                   onOpenDetails: () => widget.onOpenBedDetails(bed),
  156:                   onClearPlant: () {
  157:                     setState(() {
  158:                       activePlantName = null;
  159:                     });
  160:                   },
  161:                   onPlantPlaced: () {
  162:                     setState(() {
  163:                       activePlantName = null;
  164:                     });
  165:                   },
  166:                 ),
  167:         ),
  168:       ],
  169:     );
  170:   }
  171: 
  172:   void _selectBed(Bed bed) {
  173:     widget.controller.selectBed(bed.id);
  174: 
  175:     setState(() {
  176:       selectedBedId = bed.id;
  177:       activePlantName = null;
  178:     });
  179:   }
  180: 
  181:   void _startPlantPlacement(String cropName) {
  182:     final bed = selectedBed;
  183: 
  184:     if (bed == null) {
  185:       ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  186:         const SnackBar(content: Text('Add a bed before placing plants.')),
  187:       );
  188:       return;
  189:     }
  190: 
  191:     widget.controller.selectBed(bed.id);
  192: 
  193:     setState(() {
  194:       activePlantName = cropName;
  195:     });
  196: 
  197:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  198:       SnackBar(content: Text('Placing $cropName in ${bed.name}.')),
  199:     );
  200:   }
  201: }
  202: 
  203: class _OneBedWorkspace extends StatelessWidget {
  204:   const _OneBedWorkspace({
  205:     required this.marker,
  206:     required this.bed,
  207:     required this.beds,
  208:     required this.controller,
  209:     required this.activePlantName,
  210:     required this.showLabels,
  211:     required this.showCropRows,
  212:     required this.showInstructions,
  213:     required this.controls,
  214:     required this.onSelectBed,
  215:     required this.onOpenDetails,
  216:     required this.onClearPlant,
  217:     required this.onPlantPlaced,
  218:   });
  219: 
  220:   final String marker;
  221:   final Bed bed;
  222:   final List<Bed> beds;
  223:   final GardenController controller;
  224:   final String? activePlantName;
  225:   final bool showLabels;
  226:   final bool showCropRows;
  227:   final bool showInstructions;
  228:   final Widget controls;
  229:   final ValueChanged<Bed> onSelectBed;
  230:   final VoidCallback onOpenDetails;
  231:   final VoidCallback onClearPlant;
  232:   final VoidCallback onPlantPlaced;
  233: 
  234:   @override
  235:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  236:     final ppm = _pixelsPerMeterForBed(bed);
  237: 
  238:     return Padding(
  239:       padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(12, 14, 18, 18),
  240:       child: Column(
  241:         children: [
  242:           _Header(
  243:             marker: marker,
  244:             bed: bed,
  245:             activePlantName: activePlantName,
  246:             controls: controls,
  247:             onOpenDetails: onOpenDetails,
  248:             onClearPlant: onClearPlant,
  249:           ),
  250:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  251:           _BedSwitcher(
  252:             beds: beds,
  253:             selectedBedId: bed.id,
  254:             onSelectBed: onSelectBed,
  255:           ),
  256:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  257:           Expanded(
  258:             child: _BedCanvas(
  259:               key: ValueKey('one-bed-${bed.id}-${activePlantName ?? 'none'}'),
  260:               bed: bed,
  261:               controller: controller,
  262:               pixelsPerMeter: ppm,
  263:               activePlantName: activePlantName,
  264:               showLabels: showLabels,
  265:               showCropRows: showCropRows,
  266:               showInstructions: showInstructions,
  267:               onPlantPlaced: onPlantPlaced,
  268:             ),
  269:           ),
  270:         ],
  271:       ),
  272:     );
  273:   }
  274: 
  275:   static double _pixelsPerMeterForBed(Bed bed) {
  276:     final longest = math.max(bed.width, bed.height);
  277: 
  278:     if (longest <= 2.5) return 150;
  279:     if (longest <= 4.0) return 120;
  280:     if (longest <= 6.0) return 92;
  281:     if (longest <= 8.5) return 74;
  282: 
  283:     return 62;
  284:   }
  285: }
  286: 
  287: class _Header extends StatelessWidget {
  288:   const _Header({
  289:     required this.marker,
  290:     required this.bed,
  291:     required this.activePlantName,
  292:     required this.controls,
  293:     required this.onOpenDetails,
  294:     required this.onClearPlant,
  295:   });
  296: 
  297:   final String marker;
  298:   final Bed bed;
  299:   final String? activePlantName;
  300:   final Widget controls;
  301:   final VoidCallback onOpenDetails;
  302:   final VoidCallback onClearPlant;
  303: 
  304:   @override
  305:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  306:     final area = bed.width * bed.height;
  307: 
  308:     return Tooltip(
  309:       message: marker,
  310:       child: Container(
  311:         padding: const EdgeInsets.all(13),
  312:         decoration: BoxDecoration(
  313:           color: Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.94),
  314:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),
  315:           border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFD8D0C0)),
  316:           boxShadow: const [
  317:             BoxShadow(
  318:               color: Color(0x14000000),
  319:               blurRadius: 18,
  320:               offset: Offset(0, 7),
  321:             ),
  322:           ],
  323:         ),
  324:         child: Row(
  325:           children: [
  326:             Container(
  327:               width: 42,
  328:               height: 42,
  329:               alignment: Alignment.center,
  330:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
  331:                 color: const Color(0xFF227A47),
  332:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  333:               ),
  334:               child: Text(
  335:                 bed.number.toString(),
  336:                 style: const TextStyle(
  337:                   color: Colors.white,
  338:                   fontSize: 15,
  339:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  340:                 ),
  341:               ),
  342:             ),
  343:             const SizedBox(width: 12),
  344:             Expanded(
  345:               child: Column(
  346:                 crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  347:                 children: [
  348:                   Text(
  349:                     bed.name,
  350:                     maxLines: 1,
  351:                     overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  352:                     style: const TextStyle(
  353:                       color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
  354:                       fontSize: 18,
  355:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  356:                     ),
  357:                   ),
  358:                   const SizedBox(height: 3),
  359:                   Text(
  360:                     '${bed.width.toStringAsFixed(1)}m x ${bed.height.toStringAsFixed(1)}m - ${area.toStringAsFixed(1)} m2 - ${bed.cropBlocks.length} crop blocks',
  361:                     maxLines: 1,
  362:                     overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  363:                     style: const TextStyle(
  364:                       color: Color(0xFF75695C),
  365:                       fontSize: 12,
  366:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  367:                     ),
  368:                   ),
  369:                 ],
  370:               ),
  371:             ),
  372:             if (activePlantName != null) ...[
  373:               _ActivePlantPill(
  374:                 plantName: activePlantName!,
  375:                 onClear: onClearPlant,
  376:               ),
  377:               const SizedBox(width: 8),
  378:             ],
  379:             OutlinedButton.icon(
  380:               onPressed: onOpenDetails,
  381:               icon: const Icon(Icons.open_in_new, size: 16),
  382:               label: const Text('Details'),
  383:             ),
  384:             const SizedBox(width: 8),
  385:             Flexible(
  386:               child: Align(alignment: Alignment.centerRight, child: controls),
  387:             ),
  388:           ],
  389:         ),
  390:       ),
  391:     );
  392:   }
  393: }
