  395: class _BedSwitcher extends StatelessWidget {
  396:   const _BedSwitcher({
  397:     required this.beds,
  398:     required this.selectedBedId,
  399:     required this.onSelectBed,
  400:   });
  401: 
  402:   final List<Bed> beds;
  403:   final String selectedBedId;
  404:   final ValueChanged<Bed> onSelectBed;
  405: 
  406:   @override
  407:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  408:     return SizedBox(
  409:       height: 58,
  410:       child: ListView.separated(
  411:         scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
  412:         itemCount: beds.length,
  413:         separatorBuilder: (context, index) => const SizedBox(width: 8),
  414:         itemBuilder: (context, index) {
  415:           final bed = beds[index];
  416:           final selected = bed.id == selectedBedId;
  417:           final area = bed.width * bed.height;
  418: 
  419:           return InkWell(
  420:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  421:             onTap: () => onSelectBed(bed),
  422:             child: AnimatedContainer(
  423:               duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 140),
  424:               padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 8),
  425:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
  426:                 color: selected ? const Color(0xFF1B1A17) : Colors.white,
  427:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  428:                 border: Border.all(
  429:                   color: selected
  430:                       ? const Color(0xFF1B1A17)
  431:                       : const Color(0xFFD8D0C0),
  432:                 ),
  433:               ),
  434:               child: Row(
  435:                 mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  436:                 children: [
  437:                   Container(
  438:                     width: 28,
  439:                     height: 28,
  440:                     alignment: Alignment.center,
  441:                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
  442:                       color: selected
  443:                           ? const Color(0xFF227A47)
  444:                           : const Color(0xFFEAF6EE),
  445:                       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
  446:                     ),
  447:                     child: Text(
  448:                       bed.number.toString(),
  449:                       style: TextStyle(
  450:                         color: selected
  451:                             ? Colors.white
  452:                             : const Color(0xFF227A47),
  453:                         fontSize: 12,
  454:                         fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  455:                       ),
  456:                     ),
  457:                   ),
  458:                   const SizedBox(width: 8),
  459:                   ConstrainedBox(
  460:                     constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 190),
  461:                     child: Column(
  462:                       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  463:                       children: [
  464:                         Text(
  465:                           bed.name,
  466:                           maxLines: 1,
  467:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  468:                           style: TextStyle(
  469:                             color: selected
  470:                                 ? Colors.white
  471:                                 : const Color(0xFF1B1A17),
  472:                             fontSize: 12,
  473:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  474:                           ),
  475:                         ),
  476:                         const SizedBox(height: 2),
  477:                         Text(
  478:                           '${area.toStringAsFixed(1)} m2 - ${bed.cropBlocks.length} blocks',
  479:                           maxLines: 1,
  480:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  481:                           style: TextStyle(
  482:                             color: selected
  483:                                 ? Colors.white.withValues(alpha: 0.70)
  484:                                 : const Color(0xFF75695C),
  485:                             fontSize: 10,
  486:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  487:                           ),
  488:                         ),
  489:                       ],
  490:                     ),
  491:                   ),
  492:                 ],
  493:               ),
  494:             ),
  495:           );
  496:         },
  497:       ),
  498:     );
  499:   }
  500: }
  501: 
  502: class _BedCanvas extends StatefulWidget {
  503:   const _BedCanvas({
  504:     super.key,
  505:     required this.bed,
  506:     required this.controller,
  507:     required this.pixelsPerMeter,
  508:     required this.activePlantName,
  509:     required this.showLabels,
  510:     required this.showCropRows,
  511:     required this.showInstructions,
  512:     required this.onPlantPlaced,
  513:   });
  514: 
  515:   final Bed bed;
  516:   final GardenController controller;
  517:   final double pixelsPerMeter;
  518:   final String? activePlantName;
  519:   final bool showLabels;
  520:   final bool showCropRows;
  521:   final bool showInstructions;
  522:   final VoidCallback onPlantPlaced;
  523: 
  524:   @override
  525:   State<_BedCanvas> createState() => _BedCanvasState();
  526: }
  527: 
  528: class _BedCanvasState extends State<_BedCanvas> {
  529:   Offset? dragStartLocal;
  530:   Offset? dragCurrentLocal;
  531: 
  532:   bool get planting => widget.activePlantName != null;
  533: 
  534:   @override
  535:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant _BedCanvas oldWidget) {
  536:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
  537: 
  538:     if (!planting || oldWidget.activePlantName != widget.activePlantName) {
  539:       dragStartLocal = null;
  540:       dragCurrentLocal = null;
  541:     }
  542:   }
  543: 
  544:   @override
  545:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  546:     final width = widget.bed.width * widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  547:     final height = widget.bed.height * widget.pixelsPerMeter;
  548: 
  549:     return Container(
  550:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  551:         color: const Color(0xFFF7EFE3),
  552:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(22),
  553:         border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFD8D0C0)),
  554:       ),
  555:       child: ClipRRect(
  556:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(22),
  557:         child: Stack(
  558:           children: [
  559:             Positioned.fill(
  560:               child: CustomPaint(painter: const _BackdropDotsPainter()),
  561:             ),
  562:             Center(
  563:               child: SingleChildScrollView(
  564:                 scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
  565:                 child: SingleChildScrollView(
  566:                   child: Container(
  567:                     width: width,
  568:                     height: height,
  569:                     margin: const EdgeInsets.all(30),
  570:                     padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
  571:                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
  572:                       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(26),
  573:                       gradient: const LinearGradient(
  574:                         begin: Alignment.topLeft,
  575:                         end: Alignment.bottomRight,
  576:                         colors: [
  577:                           Color(0xFFB77A43),
  578:                           Color(0xFF8C5629),
  579:                           Color(0xFF6E3F1F),
  580:                         ],
  581:                       ),
  582:                       boxShadow: const [
  583:                         BoxShadow(
  584:                           color: Color(0x26000000),
  585:                           blurRadius: 24,
  586:                           offset: Offset(0, 12),
  587:                         ),
  588:                       ],
  589:                     ),
  590:                     child: GestureDetector(
  591:                       behavior: HitTestBehavior.opaque,
  592:                       onTapDown: planting ? _plantAtTap : null,
  593:                       onPanStart: planting ? _startPlantDrag : null,
  594:                       onPanUpdate: planting ? _updatePlantDrag : null,
  595:                       onPanEnd: planting ? _endPlantDrag : null,
  596:                       onPanCancel: planting ? _cancelPlantDrag : null,
  597:                       child: ClipRRect(
  598:                         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
  599:                         child: Container(
  600:                           decoration: const BoxDecoration(
  601:                             gradient: LinearGradient(
  602:                               begin: Alignment.topLeft,
  603:                               end: Alignment.bottomRight,
  604:                               colors: [
  605:                                 Color(0xFF4C3325),
  606:                                 Color(0xFF60402B),
  607:                                 Color(0xFF3B281F),
  608:                               ],
  609:                             ),
  610:                           ),
  611:                           child: Stack(
  612:                             children: [
  613:                               Positioned.fill(
  614:                                 child: CustomPaint(
  615:                                   painter: _BedGridPainter(
  616:                                     pixelsPerMeter: widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  617:                                   ),
  618:                                 ),
  619:                               ),
  620:                               if (widget.showCropRows)
  621:                                 Positioned.fill(
  622:                                   child: Stack(
  623:                                     clipBehavior: Clip.hardEdge,
  624:                                     children: [
  625:                                       for (final block in widget.bed.cropBlocks)
  626:                                         DraggableCropBlock(
  627:                                           key: ValueKey(block.id),
  628:                                           bedId: widget.bed.id,
  629:                                           block: block,
  630:                                           pixelsPerMeter: widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  631:                                           controller: widget.controller,
  632:                                         ),
  633:                                     ],
  634:                                   ),
  635:                                 ),
  636:                               if (widget.showLabels)
  637:                                 Positioned(
  638:                                   left: 14,
  639:                                   top: 14,
  640:                                   child: _BedCanvasBadge(bed: widget.bed),
  641:                                 ),
  642:                               if (widget.showInstructions)
  643:                                 Positioned(
  644:                                   right: 14,
  645:                                   top: 14,
  646:                                   child: _CanvasHint(planting: planting),
  647:                                 ),
  648:                               if (planting)
  649:                                 Positioned(
  650:                                   left: 14,
  651:                                   bottom: 14,
  652:                                   child: _PlantingBadge(
  653:                                     plantName: widget.activePlantName!,
  654:                                   ),
  655:                                 ),
  656:                               if (planting &&
  657:                                   dragStartLocal != null &&
  658:                                   dragCurrentLocal != null)
  659:                                 Positioned.fill(
  660:                                   child: IgnorePointer(
  661:                                     child: CustomPaint(
  662:                                       painter: _PlantDragPreviewPainter(
  663:                                         start: dragStartLocal!,
  664:                                         current: dragCurrentLocal!,
  665:                                       ),
  666:                                     ),
  667:                                   ),
  668:                                 ),
  669:                             ],
  670:                           ),
  671:                         ),
  672:                       ),
  673:                     ),
  674:                   ),
  675:                 ),
  676:               ),
  677:             ),
  678:           ],
  679:         ),
  680:       ),
  681:     );
  682:   }
  683: 
  684:   void _plantAtTap(TapDownDetails details) {
  685:     final cropName = widget.activePlantName;
  686:     if (cropName == null) return;
  687: 
  688:     _addCropFromLocalPoints(
  689:       cropName: cropName,
  690:       startLocal: details.localPosition,
  691:       endLocal: details.localPosition,
  692:     );
  693:   }
  694: 
  695:   void _startPlantDrag(DragStartDetails details) {
  696:     setState(() {
  697:       dragStartLocal = details.localPosition;
  698:       dragCurrentLocal = details.localPosition;
  699:     });
  700:   }
  701: 
  702:   void _updatePlantDrag(DragUpdateDetails details) {
  703:     setState(() {
  704:       dragCurrentLocal = details.localPosition;
  705:     });
  706:   }
  707: 
  708:   void _endPlantDrag(DragEndDetails details) {
  709:     final cropName = widget.activePlantName;
  710:     final start = dragStartLocal;
  711:     final end = dragCurrentLocal;
  712: 
  713:     if (cropName == null || start == null || end == null) {
  714:       _cancelPlantDrag();
  715:       return;
  716:     }
  717: 
  718:     _addCropFromLocalPoints(
  719:       cropName: cropName,
  720:       startLocal: start,
  721:       endLocal: end,
  722:     );
  723:   }
  724: 
  725:   void _cancelPlantDrag() {
  726:     setState(() {
  727:       dragStartLocal = null;
  728:       dragCurrentLocal = null;
  729:     });
  730:   }
  731: 
  732:   void _addCropFromLocalPoints({
  733:     required String cropName,
  734:     required Offset startLocal,
  735:     required Offset endLocal,
  736:   }) {
  737:     final spacing = CropSpacing.spacingMetersForCrop(cropName);
  738:     final largeCanopy = CropSpacing.isLargeCanopyCrop(cropName);
  739: 
  740:     final startGarden = _localToGarden(startLocal);
  741:     var endGarden = _localToGarden(endLocal);
  742: 
  743:     final dragDistanceMeters = (endGarden - startGarden).distance;
  744: 
  745:     if (largeCanopy) {
  746:       final half = math.max(0.5, spacing / 2);
  747: 
  748:       widget.controller.addCropRowToBedRect(
  749:         bedId: widget.bed.id,
  750:         cropName: cropName,
  751:         startX: startGarden.dx - half,
  752:         startY: startGarden.dy - half,
  753:         endX: startGarden.dx + half,
  754:         endY: startGarden.dy + half,
  755:       );
  756:     } else {
  757:       if (dragDistanceMeters < spacing * 1.25) {
  758:         final rowLength = math.max(spacing * 3, 1.2);
  759:         endGarden = Offset(startGarden.dx + rowLength, startGarden.dy);
  760:       }
  761: 
  762:       widget.controller.addCropRowToBedRect(
  763:         bedId: widget.bed.id,
  764:         cropName: cropName,
  765:         startX: startGarden.dx,
  766:         startY: startGarden.dy,
  767:         endX: endGarden.dx,
  768:         endY: endGarden.dy,
  769:       );
  770:     }
  771: 
  772:     setState(() {
  773:       dragStartLocal = null;
  774:       dragCurrentLocal = null;
  775:     });
  776: 
  777:     widget.onPlantPlaced();
  778: 
  779:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  780:       SnackBar(content: Text('$cropName planted in ${widget.bed.name}.')),
  781:     );
  782:   }
  783: 
  784:   Offset _localToGarden(Offset local) {
  785:     return Offset(
  786:       widget.bed.x + local.dx / widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  787:       widget.bed.y + local.dy / widget.pixelsPerMeter,
  788:     );
  789:   }
  790: }
  791: 
  792: class _ActivePlantPill extends StatelessWidget {
  793:   const _ActivePlantPill({required this.plantName, required this.onClear});
  794: 
  795:   final String plantName;
  796:   final VoidCallback onClear;
  797: 
  798:   @override
  799:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  800:     return Container(
  801:       height: 36,
  802:       padding: const EdgeInsets.only(left: 12, right: 4),
  803:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  804:         color: const Color(0xFFEAF6EE),
  805:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  806:         border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFB8DDC8)),
  807:       ),
  808:       child: Row(
  809:         mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  810:         children: [
  811:           Text(
  812:             'Placing $plantName',
  813:             style: const TextStyle(
  814:               color: Color(0xFF227A47),
  815:               fontSize: 12,
  816:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  817:             ),
  818:           ),
  819:           IconButton(
  820:             onPressed: onClear,
  821:             icon: const Icon(Icons.close, size: 16),
  822:             color: const Color(0xFF227A47),
  823:             visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
  824:           ),
  825:         ],
  826:       ),
  827:     );
  828:   }
  829: }

  956: }
  957: 
  958: class _BackdropDotsPainter extends CustomPainter {
  959:   const _BackdropDotsPainter();
  960: 
  961:   @override
  962:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
  963:     final paint = Paint()..color = const Color(0x0CA86412);
  964: 
  965:     for (double x = 24; x < size.width; x += 44) {
  966:       for (double y = 22; y < size.height; y += 42) {
  967:         final wobble = ((x + y) % 23) / 23;
  968:         canvas.drawCircle(Offset(x + wobble * 5, y), 1.0, paint);
  969:       }
  970:     }
  971:   }
  972: 
  973:   @override
  974:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant CustomPainter oldDelegate) => false;
  975: }
  976: 
  977: class _BedGridPainter extends CustomPainter {
  978:   const _BedGridPainter({required this.pixelsPerMeter});
  979: 
  980:   final double pixelsPerMeter;
  981: 
  982:   @override
  983:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
  984:     final meterPaint = Paint()
  985:       ..color = const Color(0x26E8D8BE)
  986:       ..strokeWidth = 1.1;
  987: 
  988:     final halfMeterPaint = Paint()
  989:       ..color = const Color(0x14E8D8BE)
  990:       ..strokeWidth = 0.7;
  991: 
  992:     final rowPaint = Paint()
  993:       ..color = const Color(0x20FFFFFF)
  994:       ..strokeWidth = 1.2
  995:       ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round;
  996: 
  997:     final halfStep = pixelsPerMeter / 2;
  998: 
  999:     var index = 0;
 1000:     for (double x = 0; x <= size.width; x += halfStep) {
 1001:       canvas.drawLine(
 1002:         Offset(x, 0),
 1003:         Offset(x, size.height),
 1004:         index.isEven ? meterPaint : halfMeterPaint,
 1005:       );
 1006:       index++;
 1007:     }
 1008: 
 1009:     index = 0;
 1010:     for (double y = 0; y <= size.height; y += halfStep) {
 1011:       canvas.drawLine(
 1012:         Offset(0, y),
 1013:         Offset(size.width, y),
 1014:         index.isEven ? meterPaint : halfMeterPaint,
 1015:       );
 1016:       index++;
 1017:     }
 1018: 
 1019:     for (double y = 24; y <= size.height; y += 26) {
 1020:       final path = Path()..moveTo(0, y);
 1021:       for (double x = 0; x <= size.width; x += 56) {
 1022:         path.quadraticBezierTo(x + 22, y + 4, x + 56, y);
 1023:       }
 1024:       canvas.drawPath(path, rowPaint);
 1025:     }
 1026:   }
 1027: 
 1028:   @override
 1029:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant _BedGridPainter oldDelegate) {
 1030:     return oldDelegate.pixelsPerMeter != pixelsPerMeter;
 1031:   }
 1032: }
 1033: 
 1034: class _PlantDragPreviewPainter extends CustomPainter {
 1035:   const _PlantDragPreviewPainter({required this.start, required this.current});
 1036: 
 1037:   final Offset start;
 1038:   final Offset current;
 1039: 
 1040:   @override
 1041:   void paint(Canvas canvas, Size size) {
 1042:     final paint = Paint()
 1043:       ..color = GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.92)
 1044:       ..strokeWidth = 4
 1045:       ..strokeCap = StrokeCap.round;
 1046: 
 1047:     canvas.drawLine(start, current, paint);
 1048: 
 1049:     final dot = Paint()..color = GardenTheme.good;
 1050:     canvas.drawCircle(start, 6, dot);
 1051:     canvas.drawCircle(current, 6, dot);
 1052:   }
 1053: 
 1054:   @override
 1055:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant _PlantDragPreviewPainter oldDelegate) {
 1056:     return oldDelegate.start != start || oldDelegate.current != current;
 1057:   }
 1058: }

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: import 'package:flutter/services.dart';
    3: 
    4: class PlannerShortcuts extends StatelessWidget {
    5:   const PlannerShortcuts({
    6:     super.key,
    7:     required this.child,
    8:     required this.onSave,
    9:     required this.onUndo,
   10:     required this.onRedo,
   11:     required this.onFitMap,
   12:     required this.onResetZoom,
   13:   });
   14: 
   15:   final Widget child;
   16:   final VoidCallback onSave;
   17:   final VoidCallback? onUndo;
   18:   final VoidCallback? onRedo;
   19:   final VoidCallback onFitMap;
   20:   final VoidCallback onResetZoom;
   21: 
   22:   @override
   23:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   24:     return Shortcuts(
   25:       shortcuts: <ShortcutActivator, Intent>{
   26:         const SingleActivator(LogicalKeyboardKey.keyS, control: true):
   27:             const _SaveIntent(),
   28:         const SingleActivator(LogicalKeyboardKey.keyZ, control: true):
   29:             const _UndoIntent(),
   30:         const SingleActivator(LogicalKeyboardKey.keyY, control: true):
   31:             const _RedoIntent(),
   32:         const SingleActivator(LogicalKeyboardKey.keyF): const _FitMapIntent(),
   33:         const SingleActivator(LogicalKeyboardKey.digit0):
   34:             const _ResetZoomIntent(),
   35:       },
   36:       child: Actions(
   37:         actions: <Type, Action<Intent>>{
   38:           _SaveIntent: CallbackAction<_SaveIntent>(
   39:             onInvoke: (_) {
   40:               onSave();
   41:               return null;
   42:             },
   43:           ),
   44:           _UndoIntent: CallbackAction<_UndoIntent>(
   45:             onInvoke: (_) {
   46:               onUndo?.call();
   47:               return null;
   48:             },
   49:           ),
   50:           _RedoIntent: CallbackAction<_RedoIntent>(
   51:             onInvoke: (_) {
   52:               onRedo?.call();
   53:               return null;
   54:             },
   55:           ),
   56:           _FitMapIntent: CallbackAction<_FitMapIntent>(
   57:             onInvoke: (_) {
   58:               onFitMap();
   59:               return null;
   60:             },
   61:           ),
   62:           _ResetZoomIntent: CallbackAction<_ResetZoomIntent>(
   63:             onInvoke: (_) {
   64:               onResetZoom();
   65:               return null;
   66:             },
   67:           ),
   68:         },
   69:         child: Focus(autofocus: true, child: child),
   70:       ),
   71:     );
   72:   }
   73: }
   74: 
   75: class _SaveIntent extends Intent {
   76:   const _SaveIntent();
   77: }
   78: 
   79: class _UndoIntent extends Intent {
   80:   const _UndoIntent();
   81: }
   82: 
   83: class _RedoIntent extends Intent {
   84:   const _RedoIntent();
   85: }
   86: 
   87: class _FitMapIntent extends Intent {
   88:   const _FitMapIntent();
   89: }
   90: 
   91: class _ResetZoomIntent extends Intent {
   92:   const _ResetZoomIntent();
   93: }

  129:       ],
  130:     );
  131:

  133:   }

  253:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  254:     return SingleChildScrollView(
  255:       padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(10, 10, 10, 12),
  256:       child: Column(
  257:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  258:         children: [
  259:           SingleChildScrollView(
  260:             scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
  261:             child: Row(
  262:               children: [
  263:                 _AreaTabs(value: viewMode, onChanged: onViewModeChanged),
  264:                 const SizedBox(width: 10),
  265:                 _PrimaryButton(
  266:                   icon: Icons.add,
  267:                   label: 'Add bed',
  268:                   onPressed: onAddBed,
  269:                 ),
  270:                 const SizedBox(width: 10),
  271:                 _ProjectMenu(
  272:                   onOpenSettings: onOpenSettings,
  273:                   onSaveProject: onSaveProject,
  274:                   onLoadProject: onLoadProject,
  275:                   onImportJson: onImportJson,
  276:                   onExportJson: onExportJson,
  277:                   onClearSavedProject: onClearSavedProject,
  278:                   onResetDemoProject: onResetDemoProject,
  279:                 ),
  280:               ],
  281:             ),
  282:           ),
  283:           if (_showBedTools) ...[
  284:             const SizedBox(height: 10),
  285:             Row(
  286:               children: [
  287:                 Expanded(
  288:                   child: _SearchBox(
  289:                     initialValue: searchQuery,
  290:                     compact: true,
  291:                     onChanged: onSearchChanged,
  292:                   ),
  293:                 ),
  294:                 const SizedBox(width: 8),
  295:                 _FilterMenu(value: filterMode, onChanged: onFilterModeChanged),
  296:               ],
  297:             ),
  298:           ],
  299:           if (_showMapTools) ...[
  300:             const SizedBox(height: 10),
  301:             SingleChildScrollView(
  302:               scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
  303:               child: Row(
  304:                 children: [
  305:                   _ZoomControl(
  306:                     zoomPercent: zoomPercent,
  307:                     onZoomIn: onZoomIn,
  308:                     onZoomOut: onZoomOut,
  309:                     onResetZoom: onResetZoom,
  310:                   ),
  311:                   const SizedBox(width: 8),
  312:                   _StatusPill(
  313:                     icon: allowOverlap
  314:                         ? Icons.check_circle_outline
  315:                         : Icons.block_outlined,
  316:                     label: allowOverlap ? 'Overlap On' : 'Overlap Off',
  317:                     color: allowOverlap ? GardenTheme.good : GardenTheme.bad,
  318:                     background: allowOverlap
  319:                         ? const Color(0xFFEEF8F0)
  320:                         : const Color(0xFFFFF0EE),
  321:                     onTap: () => onAllowOverlapChanged(!allowOverlap),
  322:                   ),
  323:                   const SizedBox(width: 8),
  324:                   _IconAction(
  325:                     icon: Icons.undo,
  326:                     label: 'Undo',
  327:                     onPressed: onUndo,
  328:                   ),
  329:                   const SizedBox(width: 8),
  330:                   _IconAction(
  331:                     icon: Icons.redo,
  332:                     label: 'Redo',
  333:                     onPressed: onRedo,
  334:                   ),
  335:                   if (onDeleteSelected != null) ...[
  336:                     const SizedBox(width: 8),
  337:                     _DangerButton(
  338:                       icon: Icons.delete_outline,
  339:                       label: 'Delete bed',
  340:                       onPressed: onDeleteSelected!,
  341:                     ),
  342:                   ],
  343:                 ],
  344:               ),
  345:             ),
  346:           ],
  347:         ],
  348:       ),
  349:     );
  350:   }
  351: }
  352: 
  353: class _AreaTabs extends StatelessWidget {
  354:   const _AreaTabs({required this.value, required this.onChanged});
  355: 
  356:   final BedViewMode value;
  357:   final ValueChanged<BedViewMode> onChanged;
  358: 
  359:   @override
  360:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  361:     return Container(
  362:       height: 46,
  363:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(4),
  364:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  365:         color: GardenTheme.paper,
  366:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
  367:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  368:       ),
  369:       child: Row(
  370:         mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  371:         children: [
  372:           _AreaTab(
  373:             label: 'Dashboard',
  374:             icon: Icons.dashboard_customize_outlined,
  375:             selected: value == BedViewMode.dashboard,
  376:             onTap: () => onChanged(BedViewMode.dashboard),
  377:           ),
  378:           _AreaTab(
  379:             label: 'Seedlings',
  380:             icon: Icons.spa_outlined,
  381:             selected: value == BedViewMode.seedlings,
  382:             onTap: () => onChanged(BedViewMode.seedlings),
  383:           ),
  384:           _AreaTab(
  385:             label: 'Map',
  386:             icon: Icons.map_outlined,
  387:             selected: value == BedViewMode.map,
  388:             onTap: () => onChanged(BedViewMode.map),
  389:           ),
  390:           _AreaTab(
  391:             label: 'Beds',
  392:             icon: Icons.view_agenda_outlined,
  393:             selected: value == BedViewMode.cards,
  394:             onTap: () => onChanged(BedViewMode.cards),
  395:           ),
  396:         ],
  397:       ),
  398:     );
  399:   }

  402: class _AreaTab extends StatelessWidget {
  403:   const _AreaTab({
  404:     required this.label,
  405:     required this.icon,
  406:     required this.selected,
  407:     required this.onTap,
  408:   });
  409: 
  410:   final String label;
  411:   final IconData icon;
  412:   final bool selected;
  413:   final VoidCallback onTap;
  414: 
  415:   @override
  416:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  417:     return Material(
  418:       color: selected ? GardenTheme.ink : Colors.transparent,
  419:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  420:       child: InkWell(
  421:         onTap: onTap,
  422:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  423:         child: Container(
  424:           height: 38,
  425:           padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 13),
  426:           child: Row(
  427:             children: [
  428:               Icon(
  429:                 icon,
  430:                 size: 16,
  431:                 color: selected ? GardenTheme.cream : GardenTheme.ink,
  432:               ),
  433:               const SizedBox(width: 6),
  434:               Text(
  435:                 label,
  436:                 style: TextStyle(
  437:                   color: selected ? GardenTheme.cream : GardenTheme.ink,
  438:                   fontSize: 12,
  439:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  440:                 ),
  441:               ),
  442:             ],
  443:           ),
  444:         ),
  445:       ),
  446:     );
  447:   }
  448: }
  449: 
  450: class _SearchBox extends StatefulWidget {
  451:   const _SearchBox({
  452:     required this.initialValue,
  453:     required this.compact,
  454:     required this.onChanged,
  455:   });
  456: 
  457:   final String initialValue;
  458:   final bool compact;
  459:   final ValueChanged<String> onChanged;
  460: 
  461:   @override
  462:   State<_SearchBox> createState() => _SearchBoxState();
  463: }
  464: 
  465: class _SearchBoxState extends State<_SearchBox> {
  466:   late final TextEditingController controller;
  467: 
  468:   @override
  469:   void initState() {
  470:     super.initState();
  471:     controller = TextEditingController(text: widget.initialValue);
  472:   }
  473: 
  474:   @override
  475:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant _SearchBox oldWidget) {
  476:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
  477: 
  478:     if (oldWidget.initialValue != widget.initialValue &&
  479:         controller.text != widget.initialValue) {
  480:       controller.text = widget.initialValue;
  481:       controller.selection = TextSelection.collapsed(
  482:         offset: controller.text.length,
  483:       );
  484:     }
  485:   }
  486: 
  487:   @override
  488:   void dispose() {
  489:     controller.dispose();
  490:     super.dispose();
  491:   }
  492: 
  493:   @override
  494:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  495:     return SizedBox(
  496:       width: widget.compact ? null : 360,
  497:       height: 44,
  498:       child: TextField(
  499:         controller: controller,
  500:         onChanged: widget.onChanged,
  501:         style: const TextStyle(
  502:           color: GardenTheme.ink,
  503:           fontSize: 13,
  504:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  505:         ),
  506:         decoration: InputDecoration(
  507:           hintText: 'Search beds, crops, zones',
  508:           prefixIcon: const Icon(
  509:             Icons.search,
  510:             color: GardenTheme.muted,
  511:             size: 18,
  512:           ),
  513:           filled: true,
  514:           fillColor: Colors.white,
  515:           contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12),
  516:           enabledBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
  517:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  518:             borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
  519:           ),
  520:           focusedBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
  521:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  522:             borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.ink, width: 1.3),
  523:           ),
  524:         ),
  525:       ),
  526:     );
  527:   }
  528: }
  529: 
  530: class _FilterMenu extends StatelessWidget {
  531:   const _FilterMenu({required this.value, required this.onChanged});
  532: 
  533:   final BedFilterMode value;
  534:   final ValueChanged<BedFilterMode> onChanged;
  535: 
  536:   @override
  537:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  538:     return PopupMenuButton<BedFilterMode>(
  539:       tooltip: 'Filter beds',
  540:       color: GardenTheme.panel,
  541:       elevation: 10,
  542:       offset: const Offset(0, 44),
  543:       shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
  544:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
  545:         side: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
  546:       ),
  547:       onSelected: onChanged,
  548:       itemBuilder: (context) {
  549:         return [
  550:           _filterItem(BedFilterMode.all, 'All beds', Icons.layers_outlined),
  551:           _filterItem(BedFilterMode.healthy, 'Healthy', Icons.check_circle),
  552:           _filterItem(
  553:             BedFilterMode.attention,
  554:             'Needs attention',
  555:             Icons.warning_amber,
  556:           ),
  557:           _filterItem(BedFilterMode.issues, 'Issues / hold', Icons.block),
  558:           _filterItem(BedFilterMode.withCrops, 'With crops', Icons.eco),
  559:         ];
  560:       },
  561:       child: _PillButton(icon: Icons.filter_list, label: _filterLabel(value)),
  562:     );
  563:   }
  564: 
  565:   PopupMenuItem<BedFilterMode> _filterItem(
  566:     BedFilterMode mode,
  567:     String label,
  568:     IconData icon,
  569:   ) {
  570:     final selected = mode == value;
  571: 
  572:     return PopupMenuItem<BedFilterMode>(
  573:       value: mode,
  574:       child: Row(
  575:         children: [
  576:           Icon(
  577:             selected ? Icons.check_circle : icon,
  578:             size: 17,
  579:             color: selected ? GardenTheme.good : GardenTheme.ink,
  580:           ),
  581:           const SizedBox(width: 10),
  582:           Text(
  583:             label,
  584:             style: TextStyle(
  585:               color: GardenTheme.ink,
  586:               fontSize: 13,
  587:               fontWeight: selected ? FontWeight.w900 : FontWeight.w700,
  588:             ),
  589:           ),
  590:         ],
  591:       ),
  592:     );
  593:   }
  594: 
  595:   String _filterLabel(BedFilterMode mode) {
  596:     switch (mode) {
  597:       case BedFilterMode.all:
  598:         return 'Filter';
  599:       case BedFilterMode.healthy:
  600:         return 'Healthy';
  601:       case BedFilterMode.attention:
  602:         return 'Attention';
  603:       case BedFilterMode.issues:
  604:         return 'Issues';
  605:       case BedFilterMode.withCrops:
  606:         return 'Crops';
  607:     }
  608:   }
  609: }
  610: 
  611: class _ZoomControl extends StatelessWidget {
  612:   const _ZoomControl({
  613:     required this.zoomPercent,
  614:     required this.onZoomIn,
  615:     required this.onZoomOut,
  616:     required this.onResetZoom,
  617:   });
  618: 
  619:   final int zoomPercent;
  620:   final VoidCallback onZoomIn;
  621:   final VoidCallback onZoomOut;
  622:   final VoidCallback onResetZoom;
  623: 
  624:   @override
  625:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  626:     return Container(
  627:       height: 44,
  628:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  629:         color: Colors.white,
  630:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  631:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  632:       ),
  633:       child: Row(
  634:         mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  635:         children: [
  636:           _SmallIconButton(
  637:             icon: Icons.remove,
  638:             tooltip: 'Zoom out',
  639:             onPressed: onZoomOut,
  640:           ),
  641:           InkWell(
  642:             onTap: onResetZoom,
  643:             child: Container(
  644:               height: 44,
  645:               alignment: Alignment.center,
  646:               padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 11),
  647:               decoration: const BoxDecoration(
  648:                 border: Border.symmetric(
  649:                   vertical: BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
  650:                 ),
  651:               ),
  652:               child: Text(
  653:                 '$zoomPercent%',
  654:                 style: const TextStyle(
  655:                   color: GardenTheme.ink,
  656:                   fontSize: 12,
  657:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  658:                 ),
  659:               ),
  660:             ),
  661:           ),
  662:           _SmallIconButton(
  663:             icon: Icons.add,
  664:             tooltip: 'Zoom in',
  665:             onPressed: onZoomIn,
  666:           ),
  667:         ],
  668:       ),
  669:     );
  670:   }
  671: }

  675:     required this.icon,

  678:   });

  691:         child: SizedBox(
  692:           width: 38,

  694:           child: Icon(icon, size: 17, color: GardenTheme.ink),
  695:         ),
  696:       ),
  697:     );
  698:   }

  701: class _ProjectMenu extends StatelessWidget {
  702:   const _ProjectMenu({
  703:     required this.onOpenSettings,
  704:     required this.onSaveProject,
  705:     required this.onLoadProject,
  706:     required this.onImportJson,
  707:     required this.onExportJson,
  708:     required this.onClearSavedProject,
  709:     required this.onResetDemoProject,
  710:   });
  711: 
  712:   final VoidCallback onOpenSettings;
  713:   final VoidCallback onSaveProject;
  714:   final VoidCallback onLoadProject;
  715:   final VoidCallback onImportJson;
  716:   final VoidCallback onExportJson;
  717:   final VoidCallback onClearSavedProject;
  718:   final VoidCallback onResetDemoProject;
  719: 
  720:   @override
  721:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  722:     return PopupMenuButton<_MenuAction>(
  723:       tooltip: 'Project options',
  724:       color: GardenTheme.panel,
  725:       elevation: 10,
  726:       offset: const Offset(0, 46),
  727:       shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
  728:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
  729:         side: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
  730:       ),
  731:       onSelected: (action) => action.callback(),
  732:       itemBuilder: (context) {
  733:         return [
  734:           _sectionHeader('Project'),
  735:           _menuItem(
  736:             label: 'Project Settings',
  737:             icon: Icons.tune,
  738:             callback: onOpenSettings,
  739:           ),
  740:           _menuItem(
  741:             label: 'Save Project',
  742:             icon: Icons.save_outlined,
  743:             callback: onSaveProject,
  744:           ),
  745:           _menuItem(
  746:             label: 'Load Project',
  747:             icon: Icons.folder_open_outlined,
  748:             callback: onLoadProject,
  749:           ),
  750:           const PopupMenuDivider(),
  751:           _sectionHeader('Data'),
  752:           _menuItem(
  753:             label: 'Import JSON',
  754:             icon: Icons.upload_file,
  755:             callback: onImportJson,
  756:           ),
  757:           _menuItem(
  758:             label: 'Export JSON',
  759:             icon: Icons.download,
  760:             callback: onExportJson,
  761:           ),
  762:           const PopupMenuDivider(),
  763:           _sectionHeader('Reset'),
  764:           _menuItem(
  765:             label: 'Clear Saved Project',
  766:             icon: Icons.cleaning_services_outlined,
  767:             callback: onClearSavedProject,
  768:           ),
  769:           _menuItem(
  770:             label: 'Reset Demo Project',
  771:             icon: Icons.restart_alt,
  772:             destructive: true,
  773:             callback: onResetDemoProject,
  774:           ),
  775:         ];
  776:       },
  777:       child: _PillButton(icon: Icons.folder_outlined, label: 'Project'),
  778:     );
  779:   }
  780: }

  870: class _IconAction extends StatelessWidget {
  871:   const _IconAction({
  872:     required this.icon,
  873:     required this.label,
  874:     required this.onPressed,
  875:   });
  876: 
  877:   final IconData icon;
  878:   final String label;
  879:   final VoidCallback? onPressed;
  880: 
  881:   @override
  882:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  883:     final enabled = onPressed != null;
  884: 
  885:     return Material(
  886:       color: Colors.white,
  887:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  888:       child: InkWell(
  889:         onTap: onPressed,
  890:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  891:         child: Container(
  892:           height: 44,
  893:           padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12),
  894:           decoration: BoxDecoration(
  895:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  896:             border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  897:           ),
  898:           child: Row(
  899:             children: [
  900:               Icon(
  901:                 icon,
  902:                 size: 15,
  903:                 color: enabled
  904:                     ? GardenTheme.ink
  905:                     : GardenTheme.muted.withValues(alpha: 0.45),
  906:               ),
  907:               const SizedBox(width: 6),
  908:               Text(
  909:                 label,
  910:                 style: TextStyle(
  911:                   color: enabled
  912:                       ? GardenTheme.ink
  913:                       : GardenTheme.muted.withValues(alpha: 0.45),
  914:                   fontSize: 12,
  915:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  916:                 ),
  917:               ),
  918:             ],
  919:           ),
  920:         ),
  921:       ),
  922:     );
  923:   }
  924: }
  925: 
  926: class _PillButton extends StatelessWidget {
  927:   const _PillButton({required this.icon, required this.label});
  928: 
  929:   final IconData icon;
  930:   final String label;
  931: 
  932:   @override
  933:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  934:     return Container(
  935:       height: 44,
  936:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 13),
  937:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  938:         color: Colors.white,
  939:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  940:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  941:       ),
  942:       child: Row(
  943:         children: [
  944:           Icon(icon, size: 16, color: GardenTheme.ink),
  945:           const SizedBox(width: 6),
  946:           Text(
  947:             label,
  948:             style: const TextStyle(
  949:               color: GardenTheme.ink,
  950:               fontSize: 12,
  951:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  952:             ),
  953:           ),
  954:           const SizedBox(width: 4),
  955:           const Icon(
  956:             Icons.keyboard_arrow_down,
  957:             size: 16,
  958:             color: GardenTheme.muted,
  959:           ),

 1020: }
 1021: 
 1022: PopupMenuItem<_MenuAction> _menuItem({
 1023:   required String label,
 1024:   required IconData icon,
 1025:   required VoidCallback callback,
 1026:   bool enabled = true,
 1027:   bool destructive = false,
 1028: }) {
 1029:   return PopupMenuItem<_MenuAction>(
 1030:     value: _MenuAction(callback),
 1031:     enabled: enabled,
 1032:     child: Row(
 1033:       children: [
 1034:         Icon(
 1035:           icon,
 1036:           size: 17,
 1037:           color: !enabled
 1038:               ? GardenTheme.muted.withValues(alpha: 0.45)
 1039:               : destructive
 1040:               ? GardenTheme.bad
 1041:               : GardenTheme.ink,
 1042:         ),
 1043:         const SizedBox(width: 10),
 1044:         Expanded(
 1045:           child: Text(
 1046:             label,
 1047:             style: TextStyle(
 1048:               color: !enabled
 1049:                   ? GardenTheme.muted.withValues(alpha: 0.45)
 1050:                   : destructive
 1051:                   ? GardenTheme.bad
 1052:                   : GardenTheme.ink,
 1053:               fontSize: 13,
 1054:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1055:             ),
 1056:           ),
 1057:         ),
 1058:       ],
 1059:     ),
 1060:   );
 1061: }
 1062: 
 1063: PopupMenuItem<_MenuAction> _sectionHeader(String label) {
 1064:   return PopupMenuItem<_MenuAction>(
 1065:     enabled: false,
 1066:     height: 28,
 1067:     child: Text(
 1068:       label.toUpperCase(),
 1069:       style: const TextStyle(
 1070:         color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1071:         fontSize: 10,
 1072:         fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1073:         letterSpacing: 1.1,
 1074:       ),
 1075:     ),
 1076:   );
 1077: }

   45: class _PlantInfoLibraryViewState extends State<PlantInfoLibraryView> {
   46:   void _selectPlantForMap(_PlantProfile profile) {
   47:     final cropName = profile.name.trim().isEmpty
   48:         ? profile.key.trim()
   49:         : profile.name.trim();
   50: 
   51:     if (cropName.isEmpty) return;
   52: 
   53:     if (widget.onPlantChosen != null) {
   54:       widget.onPlantChosen!(cropName);
   55:       return;
   56:     }
   57: 
   58:     PlantingSelectionBridge.selectPlant(cropName);
   59: 
   60:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
   61:       SnackBar(content: Text('$cropName selected. Open Map to plant it.')),
   62:     );
   63:   }
   64: 
   65:   late final List<_PlantProfile> _profiles;
   66: 
   67:   final Map<String, _SeasonInfo> _seasonCache = {};
   68:   final Map<String, List<PlantTypeGroup>> _groupCache = {};
   69:   final Map<String, List<PlantVariety>> _varietyCache = {};
   70:   final Map<String, PlantProfileData> _profileDataCache = {};
   71: 
   72:   _PlantInfoCategory activeCategory = _PlantInfoCategory.all;
   73:   _PlantActionFilter activeFilter = _PlantActionFilter.recommendedNow;
   74:   int activeMonth = DateTime.now().month;
   75:   String activeSpeciesFilter = 'All species';
   76:   String query = '';
   77: 
   78:   @override
   79:   void initState() {
   80:     super.initState();
   81: 
   82:     _profiles = generatedPlantSvgs.keys.map(_profileForIconKey).toList()
   83:       ..sort((a, b) => a.name.compareTo(b.name));
   84:   }
   85: 
   86:   List<_PlantProfile> get visibleProfiles {
   87:     final normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();
   88: 
   89:     return _profiles.where((profile) {
   90:       if (activeCategory != _PlantInfoCategory.all &&
   91:           profile.category != activeCategory) {
   92:         return false;
   93:       }
   94: 
   95:       if (!_matchesSpecies(profile)) return false;
   96: 
   97:       if (normalizedQuery.isNotEmpty &&
   98:           !profile.name.toLowerCase().contains(normalizedQuery) &&
   99:           !profile.key.toLowerCase().contains(normalizedQuery) &&
  100:           !profile.family.toLowerCase().contains(normalizedQuery)) {
  101:         return false;
  102:       }
  103: 
  104:       return _matchesFilter(profile);
  105:     }).toList();
  106:   }
  107: 
  108:   @override
  109:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  110:     final visible = visibleProfiles;
  111: 
  112:     return Container(
  113:       color: const Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
  114:       child: Column(
  115:         children: [
  116:           _header(visible.length),
  117:           _seasonAssumptionBar(),
  118:           _categoryTabs(),
  119:           _monthSearchRow(),
  120:           _speciesFilterRail(),
  121:           _actionFilterRail(),
  122:           Expanded(
  123:             child: visible.isEmpty
  124:                 ? _emptyState()
  125:                 : GridView.builder(
  126:                     padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(22, 18, 22, 34),
  127:                     cacheExtent: 700,
  128:                     addAutomaticKeepAlives: false,
  129:                     addRepaintBoundaries: true,
  130:                     itemCount: visible.length,
  131:                     gridDelegate:
  132:                         const SliverGridDelegateWithMaxCrossAxisExtent(
  133:                           maxCrossAxisExtent: 315,
  134:                           mainAxisSpacing: 22,
  135:                           crossAxisSpacing: 22,
  136:                           mainAxisExtent: 420,
  137:                         ),
  138:                     itemBuilder: (context, index) {
  139:                       final profile = visible[index];
  140:                       final season = _seasonInfo(profile);
  141:                       final groups = _groupsFor(profile);
  142:                       final varieties = _varietiesFor(profile);
  143:                       final matchedVariety = _bestVarietyForProfile(
  144:                         profile,
  145:                         varieties,
  146:                       );
  147:                       final profileData = _profileDataFor(profile);
  148: 
  149:                       return _PlantInfoCard(
  150:                         profile: profile,
  151:                         season: season,
  152:                         groups: groups,
  153:                         varietyCount: varieties.length,
  154:                         matchedVariety: matchedVariety,
  155:                         profileData: profileData,
  156:                         onTap: () => _openDetails(profile),
  157:                       );
  158:                     },
  159:                   ),
  160:           ),
  161:         ],
  162:       ),
  163:     );
  164:   }

  277:   Widget _categoryTab(_PlantInfoCategory category) {
  278:     final selected = activeCategory == category;
  279:     final scoped = category == _PlantInfoCategory.all
  280:         ? _profiles
  281:         : _profiles.where((profile) => profile.category == category).toList();
  282: 
  283:     final filtered = scoped.where(_matchesSpecies).where(_matchesFilter).length;
  284: 
  285:     return InkWell(
  286:       onTap: () {
  287:         setState(() {
  288:           activeCategory = category;
  289:           activeSpeciesFilter = 'All species';
  290:           query = '';
  291:         });
  292:       },
  293:       child: Container(
  294:         height: double.infinity,
  295:         width: 155,

  297:         decoration: BoxDecoration(
  298:           border: Border(
  299:             bottom: BorderSide(
  300:               color: selected ? GardenTheme.good : Colors.transparent,
  301:               width: 2.5,
  302:             ),
  303:           ),
  304:         ),
  305:         child: Row(
  306:           mainAxisAlignment: MainAxisAlignment.center,
  307:           children: [
  308:             Text(
  309:               _categoryLabel(category).toUpperCase(),
  310:               style: TextStyle(
  311:                 color: selected ? GardenTheme.ink : GardenTheme.muted,
  312:                 fontSize: 10.5,
  313:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  314:                 letterSpacing: 1.1,
  315:               ),
  316:             ),
  317:             const SizedBox(width: 8),
  318:             Container(
  319:               padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 7, vertical: 3),
  320:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
  321:                 color: selected
  322:                     ? GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.12)
  323:                     : GardenTheme.border,
  324:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  325:               ),
  326:               child: Text(
  327:                 activeFilter == _PlantActionFilter.all
  328:                     ? scoped.length.toString()
  329:                     : '$filtered/${scoped.length}',
  330:                 style: TextStyle(
  331:                   color: selected ? GardenTheme.good : GardenTheme.muted,
  332:                   fontSize: 9.5,
  333:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,

  335:               ),
  336:             ),
  337:           ],
  338:         ),
