  569:   }
  570: 
  571:   bool _matchesFilter(_PlantProfile profile) {
  572:     final info = _seasonInfo(profile);
  573: 
  574:     switch (activeFilter) {
  575:       case _PlantActionFilter.all:
  576:         return true;
  577:       case _PlantActionFilter.recommendedNow:
  578:         return info.sowableNow &&
  579:             (info.status == _HarvestStatus.safe ||
  580:                 info.status == _HarvestStatus.perennial);
  581:       case _PlantActionFilter.sowableNow:
  582:         return info.sowableNow;
  583:       case _PlantActionFilter.harvestSafe:
  584:         return info.status == _HarvestStatus.safe;
  585:       case _PlantActionFilter.risky:
  586:         return info.status == _HarvestStatus.risky;
  587:       case _PlantActionFilter.tooLate:
  588:         return info.status == _HarvestStatus.tooLate;
  589:       case _PlantActionFilter.startTrays:
  590:         return info.activeCalendarItems.any(
  591:           (item) => item.method == SowMethod.tray,
  592:         );
  593:       case _PlantActionFilter.directSow:
  594:         return info.activeCalendarItems.any(
  595:           (item) => item.method == SowMethod.direct,
  596:         );
  597:       case _PlantActionFilter.trayOrDirect:
  598:         return info.activeCalendarItems.any(
  599:           (item) => item.method == SowMethod.either,
  600:         );
  601:       case _PlantActionFilter.transplantSoon:
  602:         return info.transplantSoon;
  603:       case _PlantActionFilter.prepareNextMonth:
  604:         return info.nextMonthCalendarItems.isNotEmpty;
  605:       case _PlantActionFilter.perennials:
  606:         return info.perennial;
  607:       case _PlantActionFilter.fastCrops:
  608:         return info.daysNeeded > 0 && info.daysNeeded <= 75;
  609:       case _PlantActionFilter.longSeason:
  610:         return info.daysNeeded >= 120;
  611:       case _PlantActionFilter.noCalendar:
  612:         return info.calendarItems.isEmpty;
  613:     }
  614:   }
  615: 
  616:   _PlantProfile _profileForIconKey(String key) {
  617:     final catalog = _catalogForKey(key);
  618:     final displayName = _displayNameForKey(key);
  619: 
  620:     return _PlantProfile(
  621:       key: key,
  622:       name: displayName,
  623:       family: catalog?.category ?? _familyFallback(key),
  624:       catalog: catalog,
  625:       category: _categoryFor(key, catalog),
  626:     );
  627:   }
  628: 
  629:   _SeasonInfo _seasonInfo(_PlantProfile profile) {
  630:     final cacheKey = '${profile.key}|$activeMonth';
  631: 
  632:     final cached = _seasonCache[cacheKey];
  633:     if (cached != null) return cached;
  634: 
  635:     final calendarItems = _calendarItemsFor(profile);
  636:     final activeItems = calendarItems
  637:         .where((item) => item.isForMonth(activeMonth))
  638:         .toList();
  639:     final nextItems = calendarItems
  640:         .where((item) => item.isForMonth(_nextMonth(activeMonth)))
  641:         .toList();
  642: 
  643:     final perennial = _isPerennial(profile);
  644:     final transplantSoon = _isLikelyTransplantSoon(calendarItems);
  645:     final bestActive = _bestViability(profile, activeItems);
  646:     final nextGoodMonth = _nextGoodSowMonth(profile, calendarItems);
  647:     final nextAnyMonth = _nextAnySowMonth(calendarItems);
  648: 
  649:     final info = _SeasonInfo(
  650:       calendarItems: calendarItems,
  651:       activeCalendarItems: activeItems,
  652:       nextMonthCalendarItems: nextItems,
  653:       sowableNow: activeItems.isNotEmpty,
  654:       perennial: perennial,
  655:       transplantSoon: transplantSoon,
  656:       status: bestActive.status,
  657:       daysNeeded: bestActive.daysNeeded,
  658:       daysAvailable: bestActive.daysAvailable,
  659:       reason: bestActive.reason,
  660:       nextGoodMonth: nextGoodMonth,
  661:       nextAnyMonth: nextAnyMonth,
  662:     );
  663: 
  664:     _seasonCache[cacheKey] = info;
  665: 
  666:     return info;
  667:   }
  668: 
  669:   _HarvestResult _bestViability(
  670:     _PlantProfile profile,
  671:     List<SowCalendarItem> items,
  672:   ) {
  673:     if (_isPerennial(profile)) {
  674:       return const _HarvestResult(
  675:         status: _HarvestStatus.perennial,
  676:         daysNeeded: 0,
  677:         daysAvailable: 365,
  678:         reason:
  679:             'Long-term or perennial crop. Treat as a multi-season planting.',
  680:       );
  681:     }
  682: 
  683:     if (items.isEmpty) {
  684:       return const _HarvestResult(
  685:         status: _HarvestStatus.unknown,
  686:         daysNeeded: 0,
  687:         daysAvailable: 0,
  688:         reason: 'Not listed as sowable for this month.',
  689:       );
  690:     }
  691: 
  692:     final ranked =
  693:         items.map((item) => _harvestViability(profile, item)).toList()..sort(
  694:           (a, b) => _statusRank(a.status).compareTo(_statusRank(b.status)),
  695:         );
  696: 
  697:     return ranked.first;
  698:   }
  699: 
  700:   _HarvestResult _harvestViability(
  701:     _PlantProfile profile,
  702:     SowCalendarItem item,
  703:   ) {
  704:     final catalog = profile.catalog ?? item.seed;
  705:     final daysNeeded = _daysNeededToHarvest(catalog, item.method);
  706:     final daysAvailable = _daysAvailableToHarvestDeadline(profile, activeMonth);
  707:     final margin = daysAvailable - daysNeeded;
  708: 
  709:     if (margin >= 21) {
  710:       return _HarvestResult(
  711:         status: _HarvestStatus.safe,
  712:         daysNeeded: daysNeeded,
  713:         daysAvailable: daysAvailable,
  714:         reason: 'Enough estimated time before the crop season closes.',
  715:       );
  716:     }
  717: 
  718:     if (margin >= 0) {
  719:       return _HarvestResult(
  720:         status: _HarvestStatus.risky,
  721:         daysNeeded: daysNeeded,
  722:         daysAvailable: daysAvailable,
  723:         reason: 'Possible, but timing is tight.',
  724:       );
  725:     }
  726: 
  727:     return _HarvestResult(
  728:       status: _HarvestStatus.tooLate,
  729:       daysNeeded: daysNeeded,
  730:       daysAvailable: daysAvailable,
  731:       reason: 'Calendar allows sowing, but harvest is unlikely in time.',
  732:     );
  733:   }
  734: 
  735:   List<SowCalendarItem> _calendarItemsFor(_PlantProfile profile) {
  736:     final profileKey = _normalize(profile.key);
  737:     final profileName = _normalize(profile.name);
  738: 
  739:     return SowCalendar.items.where((item) {
  740:       final seedKey = _normalize(item.seedKey);
  741:       final cropName = _normalize(item.seed.cropName);
  742: 
  743:       return seedKey == profileKey ||
  744:           cropName == profileKey ||
  745:           seedKey == profileName ||
  746:           cropName == profileName ||
  747:           profileKey.contains(seedKey) ||
  748:           seedKey.contains(profileKey);
  749:     }).toList();
  750:   }
  751: 
  752:   SeedCatalogItem? _catalogForKey(String key) {
  753:     final normalizedKey = _normalize(key);
  754: 
  755:     for (final item in SeedCatalog.items) {
  756:       final catalogKey = _normalize(item.key);
  757:       final cropName = _normalize(item.cropName);
  758: 
  759:       if (catalogKey == normalizedKey ||
  760:           cropName == normalizedKey ||
  761:           normalizedKey.contains(catalogKey) ||
  762:           catalogKey.contains(normalizedKey)) {
  763:         return item;
  764:       }
  765:     }
  766: 
  767:     return null;
  768:   }
  769: 
  770:   List<PlantTypeGroup> _groupsFor(_PlantProfile profile) {
  771:     return _groupCache.putIfAbsent(
  772:       profile.key,
  773:       () => PlantVarietyCatalog.groupsForCrop(profile.key),
  774:     );
  775:   }
  776: 
  777:   List<PlantVariety> _varietiesFor(_PlantProfile profile) {
  778:     return _varietyCache.putIfAbsent(
  779:       profile.key,
  780:       () => PlantVarietyCatalog.varietiesForCrop(profile.key),
  781:     );
  782:   }
  783: 
  784:   PlantProfileData _profileDataFor(_PlantProfile profile) {
  785:     return _profileDataCache.putIfAbsent(
  786:       profile.key,
  787:       () => PlantProfileData.forCrop(profile.key, family: profile.family),
  788:     );
  789:   }
  790: 
  791:   PlantVariety? _bestVarietyForProfile(
  792:     _PlantProfile profile,
  793:     List<PlantVariety> varieties,
  794:   ) {
  795:     if (varieties.isEmpty) return null;
  796: 
  797:     final profileKey = _normalizeForCompare(profile.key);
  798:     final profileName = _normalizeForCompare(profile.name);
  799: 
  800:     for (final variety in varieties) {
  801:       final varietyName = _normalizeForCompare(variety.name);
  802: 
  803:       if (profileKey == varietyName ||
  804:           profileName == varietyName ||
  805:           profileKey.contains(varietyName) ||
  806:           varietyName.contains(profileKey) ||
  807:           profileName.contains(varietyName) ||
  808:           varietyName.contains(profileName)) {
  809:         return variety;
  810:       }
  811: 
  812:       for (final alias in variety.alsoKnownAs) {
  813:         final normalizedAlias = _normalizeForCompare(alias);
  814: 
  815:         if (profileKey == normalizedAlias ||
  816:             profileName == normalizedAlias ||
  817:             profileKey.contains(normalizedAlias) ||
  818:             normalizedAlias.contains(profileKey) ||
  819:             profileName.contains(normalizedAlias) ||
  820:             normalizedAlias.contains(profileName)) {
  821:           return variety;
  822:         }
  823:       }
  824:     }
  825: 
  826:     final key = profileKey;
  827: 
  828:     if (key.contains('broccolini')) {
  829:       return varieties.firstWhere(
  830:         (v) => _normalizeForCompare(v.name).contains('broccolini'),
  831:         orElse: () => varieties.first,
  832:       );
  833:     }
  834: 
  835:     if (key.contains('chinese') || key.contains('gai lan')) {
  836:       return varieties.firstWhere(
  837:         (v) => _normalizeForCompare(v.name).contains('chinese'),
  838:         orElse: () => varieties.first,
  839:       );
  840:     }
  841: 
  842:     if (key.contains('romanesco')) {
  843:       return varieties.firstWhere(
  844:         (v) => _normalizeForCompare(v.name).contains('romanesco'),
  845:         orElse: () => varieties.first,
  846:       );
  847:     }
  848: 
  849:     if (key.contains('purple')) {
  850:       return varieties.firstWhere(
  851:         (v) => _normalizeForCompare(v.name).contains('purple'),
  852:         orElse: () => varieties.first,
  853:       );
  854:     }
  855: 
  856:     if (key.contains('sprouting')) {
  857:       return varieties.firstWhere(
  858:         (v) => _normalizeForCompare(v.name).contains('sprouting'),
  859:         orElse: () => varieties.first,
  860:       );
  861:     }
  862: 
  863:     return varieties.first;
  864:   }
  865: 
  866:   int _daysNeededToHarvest(SeedCatalogItem catalog, SowMethod method) {
  867:     final direct =
  868:         catalog.germinationMaxDays + catalog.harvestDaysFromTransplant;
  869:     final tray =
  870:         catalog.germinationMaxDays +
  871:         catalog.transplantMaxDays +
  872:         catalog.harvestDaysFromTransplant;
  873: 
  874:     switch (method) {
  875:       case SowMethod.direct:
  876:         return direct;
  877:       case SowMethod.tray:
  878:         return tray;
  879:       case SowMethod.either:
  880:         return direct < tray ? direct : tray;
  881:     }
  882:   }
  883: 
  884:   int _daysAvailableToHarvestDeadline(_PlantProfile profile, int month) {
  885:     final deadline = _harvestDeadlineMonth(profile);
  886:     final monthsAvailable = _monthsUntilInclusive(month, deadline);
  887: 
  888:     return monthsAvailable * 30;
  889:   }
  890: 
  891:   int _harvestDeadlineMonth(_PlantProfile profile) {
  892:     final value = '${profile.key} ${profile.name} ${profile.family}'
  893:         .toLowerCase();
  894: 
  895:     if (profile.category == _PlantInfoCategory.trees) return 12;
  896: 
  897:     if (value.contains('tomato') ||
  898:         value.contains('capsicum') ||
  899:         value.contains('pepper') ||
  900:         value.contains('chilli') ||
  901:         value.contains('chili') ||
  902:         value.contains('eggplant') ||
  903:         value.contains('cucumber') ||
  904:         value.contains('zucchini') ||
  905:         value.contains('courgette') ||
  906:         value.contains('pumpkin') ||
  907:         value.contains('squash') ||
  908:         value.contains('melon') ||
  909:         value.contains('watermelon') ||
  910:         value.contains('corn') ||
  911:         value.contains('basil') ||
  912:         value.contains('nightshade') ||
  913:         value.contains('cucurbit')) {
  914:       return 4;
  915:     }
  916: 
  917:     if (value.contains('lettuce') ||
  918:         value.contains('spinach') ||
  919:         value.contains('kale') ||
  920:         value.contains('broccoli') ||
  921:         value.contains('cabbage') ||
  922:         value.contains('cauliflower') ||
  923:         value.contains('radish') ||
  924:         value.contains('carrot') ||
  925:         value.contains('beet') ||
  926:         value.contains('brassica')) {
  927:       return 11;
  928:     }
  929: 
  930:     return 12;
  931:   }
  932: 
  933:   bool _isLikelyTransplantSoon(List<SowCalendarItem> items) {
  934:     return items.any((item) {
  935:       if (item.method == SowMethod.direct) return false;
  936: 
  937:       return item.months.contains(_previousMonth(activeMonth)) ||
  938:           item.months.contains(_previousMonth(_previousMonth(activeMonth)));
  939:     });
  940:   }
  941: 
  942:   int? _nextGoodSowMonth(
  943:     _PlantProfile profile,
  944:     List<SowCalendarItem> calendarItems,
  945:   ) {
  946:     for (var offset = 0; offset < 12; offset++) {
  947:       final month = _shiftMonth(activeMonth, offset);
  948:       final items = calendarItems.where((item) => item.isForMonth(month));
  949:       final good = items.any((item) {
  950:         final result = _harvestViabilityForMonth(profile, item, month);
  951: 
  952:         return result.status == _HarvestStatus.safe ||
  953:             result.status == _HarvestStatus.perennial;
  954:       });
  955: 
  956:       if (good) return month;
  957:     }
  958: 
  959:     return null;
  960:   }
  961: 
  962:   int? _nextAnySowMonth(List<SowCalendarItem> calendarItems) {
  963:     for (var offset = 0; offset < 12; offset++) {
  964:       final month = _shiftMonth(activeMonth, offset);
  965:       if (calendarItems.any((item) => item.isForMonth(month))) return month;
  966:     }
  967: 
  968:     return null;
  969:   }
  970: 
  971:   _HarvestResult _harvestViabilityForMonth(
  972:     _PlantProfile profile,
  973:     SowCalendarItem item,
  974:     int month,
  975:   ) {
  976:     if (_isPerennial(profile)) {
  977:       return const _HarvestResult(
  978:         status: _HarvestStatus.perennial,
  979:         daysNeeded: 0,
  980:         daysAvailable: 365,
  981:         reason: 'Long-term or perennial crop.',
  982:       );
  983:     }
  984: 
  985:     final catalog = profile.catalog ?? item.seed;
  986:     final daysNeeded = _daysNeededToHarvest(catalog, item.method);
  987:     final daysAvailable = _daysAvailableToHarvestDeadline(profile, month);
  988:     final margin = daysAvailable - daysNeeded;
  989: 
  990:     if (margin >= 21) {
  991:       return _HarvestResult(
  992:         status: _HarvestStatus.safe,
  993:         daysNeeded: daysNeeded,
  994:         daysAvailable: daysAvailable,
  995:         reason: 'Enough estimated time to mature.',
  996:       );
  997:     }
  998: 
  999:     if (margin >= 0) {
 1000:       return _HarvestResult(
 1001:         status: _HarvestStatus.risky,
 1002:         daysNeeded: daysNeeded,
 1003:         daysAvailable: daysAvailable,
 1004:         reason: 'Possible but tight.',
 1005:       );
 1006:     }
 1007: 
 1008:     return _HarvestResult(
 1009:       status: _HarvestStatus.tooLate,
 1010:       daysNeeded: daysNeeded,
 1011:       daysAvailable: daysAvailable,
 1012:       reason: 'Likely too late to mature.',
 1013:     );
 1014:   }
 1015: 
 1016:   void _openDetails(_PlantProfile profile) {
 1017:     final info = _seasonInfo(profile);
 1018:     final groups = _groupsFor(profile);
 1019:     final varieties = _varietiesFor(profile);
 1020:     final data = _profileDataFor(profile);
 1021: 
 1022:     showDialog<void>(
 1023:       context: context,
 1024:       builder: (context) {
 1025:         return AlertDialog(
 1026:           backgroundColor: const Color(0xFFFEFCF7),
 1027:           shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
 1028:             borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),
 1029:             side: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1030:           ),
 1031:           title: Text(profile.name),
 1032:           content: ConstrainedBox(
 1033:             constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 620),
 1034:             child: SingleChildScrollView(
 1035:               child: Column(
 1036:                 mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
 1037:                 children: [
 1038:                   GeneratedPlantIcon(cropName: profile.key, size: 118),
 1039:                   const SizedBox(height: 16),
 1040:                   _dialogRow('Decision', _statusLabel(info.status)),
 1041:                   _dialogRow(
 1042:                     'Days needed vs available',
 1043:                     info.daysNeeded <= 0
 1044:                         ? 'Not a single-season crop or no calendar match.'
 1045:                         : '${info.daysNeeded} days needed · ${info.daysAvailable} days available',
 1046:                   ),
 1047:                   _dialogRow('Reason', info.reason),
 1048:                   _dialogRow('Category', _categoryLabel(profile.category)),
 1049:                   _dialogRow('Family', profile.family),
 1050:                   _dialogRow(
 1051:                     'Spacing',
 1052:                     CropSpacing.spacingLabelForCrop(profile.name),
 1053:                   ),
 1054:                   _dialogRow('Recommended layout', data.recommendedLayout),
 1055:                   _dialogRow('Sowing depth', data.sowDepth),
 1056:                   _dialogRow('Sun', data.sun),
 1057:                   _dialogRow('Water', data.water),
 1058:                   _dialogRow('Soil', data.soil),
 1059:                   _dialogRow('Rotation family', data.rotationFamily),
 1060:                   _dialogRow('Succession', data.succession),
 1061:                   _dialogRow('Frost / temperature', data.frost),
 1062:                   _dialogRow('Container suitability', data.container),
 1063:                   _dialogRow('Support', data.support),
 1064:                   _dialogRow('Planner use', data.plannerUse),
 1065:                   if (data.warnings.isNotEmpty)
 1066:                     _dialogRow('Warnings', data.warnings.join('\n')),
 1067:                   if (groups.isNotEmpty)
 1068:                     for (final group in groups) _varietyGroupCard(group)
 1069:                   else
 1070:                     _dialogRow(
 1071:                       'Subtypes',
 1072:                       'No subtype group exists for this plant yet.',
 1073:                     ),
 1074:                   if (varieties.isNotEmpty)
 1075:                     _dialogRow(
 1076:                       'Subtype count',
 1077:                       '${varieties.length} subtype${varieties.length == 1 ? '' : 's'} listed.',
 1078:                     ),
 1079:                   if (info.activeCalendarItems.isNotEmpty)
 1080:                     for (final item in info.activeCalendarItems)
 1081:                       _dialogRow(
 1082:                         _methodLabel(item.method),
 1083:                         '${_monthList(item.months)}\n${item.note}',
 1084:                       )
 1085:                   else if (info.calendarItems.isNotEmpty)
 1086:                     _dialogRow(
 1087:                       'Calendar',
 1088:                       'Not listed for ${SowCalendar.monthName(activeMonth)}. Windows: ${info.calendarItems.map((item) => '${_methodLabel(item.method)} ${_monthList(item.months)}').join(' · ')}',
 1089:                     )
 1090:                   else
 1091:                     _dialogRow('Calendar', 'No sow-calendar entry yet.'),
 1092:                 ],
 1093:               ),
 1094:             ),
 1095:           ),
 1096:           actions: [
 1097:             FilledButton.icon(
 1098:               onPressed: () {
 1099:                 Navigator.of(context).pop();
 1100:                 _selectPlantForMap(profile);
 1101:               },
 1102:               icon: const Icon(Icons.add_location_alt_outlined),
 1103:               label: const Text('Plant on map'),
 1104:             ),
 1105:             TextButton(
 1106:               onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pop(),
 1107:               child: const Text('Close'),
 1108:             ),
 1109:           ],
 1110:         );
 1111:       },
 1112:     );
 1113:   }
 1114: 
 1115:   Widget _varietyGroupCard(PlantTypeGroup group) {
 1116:     return Container(
 1117:       width: double.infinity,
 1118:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 9),
 1119:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
 1120:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1121:         color: const Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
 1122:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1123:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1124:       ),
 1125:       child: Column(
 1126:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1127:         children: [
 1128:           Text(
 1129:             group.title.toUpperCase(),
 1130:             style: const TextStyle(
 1131:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1132:               fontSize: 10,
 1133:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1134:               letterSpacing: 1.0,
 1135:             ),
 1136:           ),
 1137:           const SizedBox(height: 6),
 1138:           Text(
 1139:             group.summary,
 1140:             style: const TextStyle(
 1141:               color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1142:               fontSize: 13,
 1143:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
 1144:               height: 1.35,
 1145:             ),
 1146:           ),
 1147:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
 1148:           for (final variety in group.varieties) _varietyTile(variety),
 1149:         ],
 1150:       ),
 1151:     );
 1152:   }
 1153: 
 1154:   Widget _varietyTile(PlantVariety variety) {
 1155:     return Container(
 1156:       width: double.infinity,
 1157:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 8),
 1158:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(10),
 1159:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1160:         color: const Color(0xFFFEFCF7),
 1161:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
 1162:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1163:       ),
 1164:       child: Column(
 1165:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1166:         children: [
 1167:           Text(
 1168:             variety.name,
 1169:             style: const TextStyle(
 1170:               color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1171:               fontSize: 13,
 1172:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1173:             ),
 1174:           ),
 1175:           if (variety.alsoKnownAs.isNotEmpty) ...[
 1176:             const SizedBox(height: 3),
 1177:             Text(
 1178:               'Also known as: ${variety.alsoKnownAs.join(', ')}',
 1179:               style: const TextStyle(
 1180:                 color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1181:                 fontSize: 11,
 1182:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1183:               ),
 1184:             ),
 1185:           ],
 1186:           const SizedBox(height: 7),
 1187:           Wrap(
 1188:             spacing: 6,
 1189:             runSpacing: 6,
 1190:             children: [
 1191:               _detailPill('${variety.spacingCm}cm spacing'),
 1192:               _detailPill(variety.daysToMaturity),
 1193:               _detailPill(variety.difficulty),
 1194:             ],
 1195:           ),
 1196:           const SizedBox(height: 8),
 1197:           Text('Use: ${variety.bestUse}', style: _detailBodyStyle),
 1198:           const SizedBox(height: 4),
 1199:           Text('Sow/plant: ${variety.sowingNote}', style: _detailBodyStyle),
 1200:           const SizedBox(height: 4),
 1201:           Text('Harvest: ${variety.harvestNote}', style: _detailBodyStyle),
 1202:         ],
 1203:       ),
 1204:     );
 1205:   }
 1206: 
 1207:   Widget _detailPill(String label) {
 1208:     return Container(
 1209:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 4),
 1210:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1211:         color: GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.10),
 1212:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
 1213:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.good.withValues(alpha: 0.24)),
 1214:       ),
 1215:       child: Text(
 1216:         label,
 1217:         style: const TextStyle(
 1218:           color: GardenTheme.good,
 1219:           fontSize: 10,
 1220:           fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1221:         ),
 1222:       ),
 1223:     );
 1224:   }
 1225:

 1227:     color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1228:     fontSize: 12,
 1229:     fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1230:     height: 1.3,
 1231:   );

 1233:   static Widget _dialogRow(String label, String value) {
 1234:     return Container(
 1235:       width: double.infinity,
 1236:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 9),
 1237:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
 1238:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1239:         color: const Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
 1240:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 1241:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1242:       ),
 1243:       child: Column(
 1244:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1245:         children: [
 1246:           Text(
 1247:             label.toUpperCase(),
 1248:             style: const TextStyle(
 1249:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1250:               fontSize: 10,
 1251:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1252:               letterSpacing: 1.0,
 1253:             ),
 1254:           ),
 1255:           const SizedBox(height: 4),
 1256:           Text(
 1257:             value,
 1258:             style: const TextStyle(
 1259:               color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1260:               fontSize: 13,
 1261:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
 1262:               height: 1.35,
 1263:             ),
 1264:           ),
 1265:         ],
 1266:       ),
 1267:     );
 1268:   }
 1269: 
 1270:   List<String> _speciesChoices() {
 1271:     final scoped = activeCategory == _PlantInfoCategory.all
 1272:         ? _profiles
 1273:         : _profiles.where((profile) => profile.category == activeCategory);
 1274: 
 1275:     final values = <String>{
 1276:       'All species',
 1277:       for (final profile in scoped) _speciesForProfile(profile),
 1278:     }.toList();
 1279: 
 1280:     values.sort((a, b) {
 1281:       if (a == 'All species') return -1;
 1282:       if (b == 'All species') return 1;
 1283:       return a.compareTo(b);
 1284:     });
 1285: 
 1286:     return values;
 1287:   }
 1288: 
 1289:   bool _matchesSpecies(_PlantProfile profile) {
 1290:     if (activeSpeciesFilter == 'All species') return true;
 1291: 
 1292:     return _speciesForProfile(profile) == activeSpeciesFilter;
 1293:   }
 1294: 
 1295:   String _speciesForProfile(_PlantProfile profile) {
 1296:     final value = '${profile.key} ${profile.name} ${profile.family}'
 1297:         .toLowerCase();
 1298: 
 1299:     if (value.contains('broccoli') ||
 1300:         value.contains('cabbage') ||
 1301:         value.contains('cauliflower') ||
 1302:         value.contains('kale') ||
 1303:         value.contains('brussels') ||
 1304:         value.contains('brassica')) {
 1305:       return 'Brassica';
 1306:     }
 1307: 
 1308:     if (value.contains('lettuce') ||
 1309:         value.contains('spinach') ||
 1310:         value.contains('silverbeet') ||
 1311:         value.contains('chard') ||
 1312:         value.contains('rocket') ||
 1313:         value.contains('arugula') ||
 1314:         value.contains('leafy')) {
 1315:       return 'Leafy green';
 1316:     }
 1317: 
 1318:     if (value.contains('onion') ||
 1319:         value.contains('garlic') ||
 1320:         value.contains('leek') ||
 1321:         value.contains('shallot') ||
 1322:         value.contains('chive') ||
 1323:         value.contains('allium')) {
 1324:       return 'Allium';
 1325:     }
 1326: 
 1327:     if (value.contains('tomato') ||
 1328:         value.contains('pepper') ||
 1329:         value.contains('capsicum') ||
 1330:         value.contains('chilli') ||
 1331:         value.contains('chili') ||
 1332:         value.contains('eggplant') ||
 1333:         value.contains('aubergine') ||
 1334:         value.contains('nightshade')) {
 1335:       return 'Nightshade';
 1336:     }
 1337: 
 1338:     if (value.contains('cucumber') ||
 1339:         value.contains('zucchini') ||
 1340:         value.contains('courgette') ||
 1341:         value.contains('pumpkin') ||
 1342:         value.contains('squash') ||
 1343:         value.contains('melon') ||
 1344:         value.contains('watermelon') ||
 1345:         value.contains('cucurbit')) {
 1346:       return 'Cucurbit';
 1347:     }
 1348: 
 1349:     if (value.contains('carrot') ||
 1350:         value.contains('beet') ||
 1351:         value.contains('beetroot') ||
 1352:         value.contains('radish') ||
 1353:         value.contains('turnip') ||
 1354:         value.contains('swede') ||
 1355:         value.contains('parsnip') ||
 1356:         value.contains('potato') ||
 1357:         value.contains('kumara') ||
 1358:         value.contains('sweet potato')) {
 1359:       return 'Root crop';
 1360:     }
 1361: 
 1362:     if (value.contains('bean') ||
 1363:         value.contains('pea') ||
 1364:         value.contains('lentil') ||
 1365:         value.contains('legume')) {
 1366:       return 'Legume';
 1367:     }
 1368: 
 1369:     if (profile.category == _PlantInfoCategory.herbs ||
 1370:         value.contains('basil') ||
 1371:         value.contains('mint') ||
 1372:         value.contains('parsley') ||
 1373:         value.contains('coriander') ||
 1374:         value.contains('cilantro') ||
 1375:         value.contains('dill') ||
 1376:         value.contains('thyme') ||
 1377:         value.contains('rosemary') ||
 1378:         value.contains('sage') ||
 1379:         value.contains('oregano') ||
 1380:         value.contains('lavender')) {
 1381:       return 'Herb';
 1382:     }
 1383: 
 1384:     if (value.contains('strawberry') ||
 1385:         value.contains('raspberry') ||
 1386:         value.contains('blueberry') ||
 1387:         value.contains('blackberry') ||
 1388:         value.contains('berry')) {
 1389:       return 'Berry';
 1390:     }
 1391: 
 1392:     if (value.contains('apple') ||
 1393:         value.contains('pear') ||
 1394:         value.contains('peach') ||
 1395:         value.contains('plum') ||
 1396:         value.contains('apricot') ||
 1397:         value.contains('citrus') ||
 1398:         value.contains('lemon') ||
 1399:         value.contains('orange') ||
 1400:         value.contains('mandarin') ||
 1401:         value.contains('lime') ||
 1402:         value.contains('fig')) {
 1403:       return 'Fruit tree';
 1404:     }
 1405: 
 1406:     if (profile.category == _PlantInfoCategory.trees ||
 1407:         value.contains('tree') ||
 1408:         value.contains('oak') ||
 1409:         value.contains('maple') ||
 1410:         value.contains('birch') ||
 1411:         value.contains('palm')) {
 1412:       return 'Tree';
 1413:     }
 1414: 
 1415:     return 'General';
 1416:   }
 1417: 
 1418:   bool _isPerennial(_PlantProfile profile) {
 1419:     final value = '${profile.key} ${profile.name}'.toLowerCase();
 1420: 
 1421:     return profile.category == _PlantInfoCategory.trees ||
 1422:         value.contains('berry') ||
 1423:         value.contains('strawberry') ||
 1424:         value.contains('raspberry') ||
 1425:         value.contains('blueberry') ||
 1426:         value.contains('blackberry') ||
 1427:         value.contains('asparagus') ||
 1428:         value.contains('artichoke') ||
 1429:         value.contains('rosemary') ||
 1430:         value.contains('thyme') ||
 1431:         value.contains('mint') ||
 1432:         value.contains('lavender') ||
 1433:         value.contains('sage');
 1434:   }
 1435: 
 1436:   _PlantInfoCategory _categoryFor(String key, SeedCatalogItem? catalog) {
 1437:     final value = '$key ${catalog?.category ?? ''}'.toLowerCase();
 1438: 
 1439:     if (_isHerbName(value)) return _PlantInfoCategory.herbs;
 1440: 
 1441:     if (value.contains('tree') ||
 1442:         value.contains('bush') ||
 1443:         value.contains('berry') ||
 1444:         value.contains('bonsai') ||
 1445:         value.contains('palm') ||
 1446:         value.contains('oak') ||
 1447:         value.contains('maple') ||
 1448:         value.contains('birch') ||
 1449:         value.contains('magnolia') ||
 1450:         value.contains('apple') ||
 1451:         value.contains('apricot') ||
 1452:         value.contains('citrus') ||
 1453:         value.contains('fig') ||
 1454:         value.contains('peach') ||
 1455:         value.contains('pear') ||
 1456:         value.contains('plum')) {
 1457:       return _PlantInfoCategory.trees;
 1458:     }
 1459: 
 1460:     return _PlantInfoCategory.vegetables;
 1461:   }
 1462: 
 1463:   static bool _isHerbName(String value) {
 1464:     const herbs = {
 1465:       'basil',
 1466:       'chives',
 1467:       'cilantro',
 1468:       'coriander',
 1469:       'dill',
 1470:       'lavender',
 1471:       'mint',
 1472:       'oregano',
 1473:       'parsley',
 1474:       'rosemary',
 1475:       'sage',
 1476:       'thyme',
 1477:       'tarragon',
 1478:       'echinacea',
 1479:       'agastache',
 1480:       'catnip',
 1481:       'chamomile',
 1482:       'fennel',
 1483:       'lemon_balm',
 1484:       'marjoram',
 1485:       'savory',
 1486:       'sorrel',
 1487:       'yarrow',
 1488:     };
 1489: 
 1490:     for (final herb in herbs) {
 1491:       if (value == herb || value.contains(herb)) return true;
 1492:     }
 1493: 
 1494:     return false;
 1495:   }

 1591: 
 1592:   static String _monthList(List<int> months) {
 1593:     if (months.isEmpty) return 'None';
 1594: 
 1595:     return months.map(SowCalendar.monthName).join(', ');
 1596:   }
 1597: 
 1598:   static String _displayNameForKey(String key) {
 1599:     return key
 1600:         .replaceAll('_', ' ')
 1601:         .replaceAll('-', ' ')
 1602:         .split(' ')
 1603:         .where((part) => part.trim().isNotEmpty)
 1604:         .map((part) => part[0].toUpperCase() + part.substring(1))
 1605:         .join(' ');
 1606:   }
 1607: 
 1608:   static String _familyFallback(String key) {
 1609:     final value = key.toLowerCase();
 1610: 
 1611:     if (_isHerbName(value)) return 'Herb';
 1612:     if (value.contains('tree') || value.contains('berry')) return 'Perennial';
 1613:     if (value.contains('onion') || value.contains('garlic')) return 'Allium';
 1614:     if (value.contains('broccoli') || value.contains('cabbage')) {
 1615:       return 'Brassica';
 1616:     }
 1617:     if (value.contains('tomato') || value.contains('pepper')) {
 1618:       return 'Nightshade';
 1619:     }
 1620: 
 1621:     return 'Plant';
 1622:   }
 1623: 
 1624:   static String _normalize(String value) {
 1625:     return value
 1626:         .trim()
 1627:         .toLowerCase()
 1628:         .replaceAll('&', 'and')
 1629:         .replaceAll('-', '_')
 1630:         .replaceAll(' ', '_')
 1631:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'[^a-z0-9_]+'), '_')
 1632:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'_+'), '_')
 1633:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'^_|_$'), '');
 1634:   }
 1635: 
 1636:   static String _normalizeForCompare(String value) {
 1637:     return value
 1638:         .trim()
 1639:         .toLowerCase()
 1640:         .replaceAll('&', 'and')
 1641:         .replaceAll('-', ' ')
 1642:         .replaceAll('_', ' ')
 1643:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'[^a-z0-9]+'), ' ')
 1644:         .replaceAll(RegExp(r'\s+'), ' ')
 1645:         .trim();
 1646:   }
 1647: 
 1648:   static int _previousMonth(int month) {
 1649:     return month == 1 ? 12 : month - 1;
 1650:   }
 1651: 
 1652:   static int _nextMonth(int month) {
 1653:     return month == 12 ? 1 : month + 1;
 1654:   }
 1655: 
 1656:   static int _shiftMonth(int month, int offset) {
 1657:     var result = month;
 1658: 
 1659:     for (var i = 0; i < offset; i++) {
 1660:       result = _nextMonth(result);
 1661:     }
 1662: 
 1663:     return result;
 1664:   }
 1665: 
 1666:   static int _monthsUntilInclusive(int fromMonth, int toMonth) {
 1667:     if (fromMonth <= toMonth) {
 1668:       return toMonth - fromMonth + 1;
 1669:     }
 1670: 
 1671:     return (12 - fromMonth + 1) + toMonth;
 1672:   }
 1673: 
 1674:   static int _statusRank(_HarvestStatus status) {
 1675:     return switch (status) {
 1676:       _HarvestStatus.safe => 0,
 1677:       _HarvestStatus.perennial => 1,
 1678:       _HarvestStatus.risky => 2,
 1679:       _HarvestStatus.tooLate => 3,
 1680:       _HarvestStatus.unknown => 4,
 1681:     };
 1682:   }
 1683: }
 1684: 
 1685: class _PlantInfoCard extends StatelessWidget {
 1686:   const _PlantInfoCard({
 1687:     required this.profile,
 1688:     required this.season,
 1689:     required this.groups,
 1690:     required this.varietyCount,
 1691:     required this.matchedVariety,
 1692:     required this.profileData,
 1693:     required this.onTap,
 1694:   });
 1695: 
 1696:   final _PlantProfile profile;
 1697:   final _SeasonInfo season;
 1698:   final List<PlantTypeGroup> groups;
 1699:   final int varietyCount;
 1700:   final PlantVariety? matchedVariety;
 1701:   final PlantProfileData profileData;
 1702:   final VoidCallback onTap;
 1703: 
 1704:   @override
 1705:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1706:     final statusColor = _PlantInfoLibraryViewState._statusColor(season.status);
 1707:     final groupTitle = groups.isEmpty ? profile.family : groups.first.title;
 1708: 
 1709:     final title = profile.name.toUpperCase();
 1710:     final subtitle = varietyCount > 0
 1711:         ? '$groupTitle · $varietyCount type${varietyCount == 1 ? '' : 's'}'
 1712:         : groupTitle;
 1713: 
 1714:     final timingText = season.daysNeeded <= 0
 1715:         ? _nextWindowText(season)
 1716:         : '${season.daysNeeded}d needed · ${season.daysAvailable}d left';
 1717: 
 1718:     final varietyText = matchedVariety == null
 1719:         ? 'No subtype profile yet'
 1720:         : matchedVariety!.name;
 1721: 
 1722:     final spacingText = matchedVariety == null
 1723:         ? CropSpacing.spacingLabelForCrop(profile.name)
 1724:         : '${matchedVariety!.spacingCm}cm spacing';
 1725: 
 1726:     return RepaintBoundary(
 1727:       child: Tooltip(
 1728:         message: profile.name,
 1729:         waitDuration: const Duration(milliseconds: 300),
 1730:         child: Material(
 1731:           color: Colors.transparent,
 1732:           borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),
 1733:           clipBehavior: Clip.hardEdge,
 1734:           child: InkWell(
 1735:             onTap: onTap,
 1736:             child: Container(
 1737:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1738:                 color: const Color(0xFFFEFCF7),
 1739:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(20),
 1740:                 border: Border.all(
 1741:                   color: statusColor.withValues(alpha: 0.40),
 1742:                   width: 1.35,
 1743:                 ),
 1744:               ),
 1745:               child: Column(
 1746:                 children: [
 1747:                   _StatusBand(
 1748:                     color: statusColor,
 1749:                     icon: _statusIcon(season.status),
 1750:                     label: _PlantInfoLibraryViewState._statusLabel(
 1751:                       season.status,
 1752:                     ),
 1753:                   ),
 1754:                   Expanded(
 1755:                     child: SingleChildScrollView(
 1756:                       physics: const ClampingScrollPhysics(),
 1757:                       padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(13, 11, 13, 11),
 1758:                       child: Column(
 1759:                         mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
 1760:                         children: [
 1761:                           Container(
 1762:                             width: 76,
 1763:                             height: 76,
 1764:                             padding: const EdgeInsets.all(9),
 1765:                             decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1766:                               color: const Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
 1767:                               shape: BoxShape.circle,
 1768:                               border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1769:                             ),
 1770:                             child: Center(
 1771:                               child: GeneratedPlantIcon(
 1772:                                 cropName: profile.key,
 1773:                                 size: 56,
 1774:                               ),
 1775:                             ),
 1776:                           ),
 1777:                           const SizedBox(height: 9),
 1778:                           Text(
 1779:                             title,
 1780:                             textAlign: TextAlign.center,
 1781:                             maxLines: 2,
 1782:                             overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 1783:                             style: const TextStyle(
 1784:                               color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1785:                               fontSize: 12,
 1786:                               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1787:                               letterSpacing: 0.7,
 1788:                               height: 1.13,
 1789:                             ),
 1790:                           ),
 1791:                           const SizedBox(height: 4),
 1792:                           Text(
 1793:                             subtitle,
 1794:                             textAlign: TextAlign.center,
 1795:                             maxLines: 1,
 1796:                             overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 1797:                             style: const TextStyle(
 1798:                               color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1799:                               fontSize: 10,
 1800:                               fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
 1801:                             ),
 1802:                           ),
 1803:                           const SizedBox(height: 10),
 1804:                           _SafeSummaryBox(
 1805:                             varietyText: varietyText,
 1806:                             spacingText: spacingText,
 1807:                             timingText: timingText,
 1808:                           ),
 1809:                           const SizedBox(height: 10),

 1844:   static IconData _statusIcon(_HarvestStatus status) {
 1845:     return switch (status) {
 1846:       _HarvestStatus.safe => Icons.check_circle_outline,
 1847:       _HarvestStatus.risky => Icons.warning_amber_outlined,
 1848:       _HarvestStatus.tooLate => Icons.block_outlined,
 1849:       _HarvestStatus.perennial => Icons.park_outlined,
 1850:       _HarvestStatus.unknown => Icons.info_outline,
 1851:     };
 1852:   }
 1853: 
 1854:   static String _nextWindowText(_SeasonInfo info) {
 1855:     if (info.nextGoodMonth != null) {
 1856:       return 'Best ${SowCalendar.monthName(info.nextGoodMonth!)}';
 1857:     }
 1858: 
 1859:     if (info.nextAnyMonth != null) {
 1860:       return 'Next ${SowCalendar.monthName(info.nextAnyMonth!)}';
 1861:     }
 1862: 
 1863:     return 'No window';
 1864:   }

   23: class _PlantPickerPanelState extends State<PlantPickerPanel> {
   24:   String activeCategory = 'vegetables';
   25:   String query = '';
   26: 
   27:   List<_PlantIconEntry> get visibleEntries {
   28:     final keys = generatedPlantCategories[activeCategory] ?? const <String>[];
   29:     final normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();
   30: 
   31:     final entries = keys
   32:         .where((key) => generatedPlantSvgs.containsKey(key))
   33:         .map(
   34:           (key) => _PlantIconEntry(
   35:             key: key,
   36:             name: _displayNameForKey(key),
   37:             category: activeCategory,
   38:           ),
   39:         )
   40:         .where((entry) {
   41:           if (normalizedQuery.isEmpty) return true;
   42: 
   43:           return entry.key.toLowerCase().contains(normalizedQuery) ||
   44:               entry.name.toLowerCase().contains(normalizedQuery);
   45:         })
   46:         .toList();
   47: 
   48:     return entries;
   49:   }
   50: 
   51:   int _countForCategory(String category) {
   52:     final keys = generatedPlantCategories[category] ?? const <String>[];
   53: 
   54:     return keys.where((key) => generatedPlantSvgs.containsKey(key)).length;
   55:   }
   56: 
   57:   @override
   58:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   59:     final entries = visibleEntries;
   60: 
   61:     return Container(
   62:       clipBehavior: Clip.antiAlias,
   63:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
   64:         color: const Color(0xFFFEFCF7),
   65:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
   66:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border, width: 1.5),

   69:         children: [
   70:           _header(),
   71:           _tabs(),
   72:           _searchBox(),

   74:             child: entries.isEmpty
   75:                 ? const Center(
   76:                     child: Text(
   77:                       'No plants found',
   78:                       style: TextStyle(
   79:                         color: GardenTheme.muted,

   81:                         fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
   82:                       ),
   83:                     ),

   86:                     padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
   87:                     itemCount: entries.length,

   89:                         const SliverGridDelegateWithMaxCrossAxisExtent(

   91:                           mainAxisSpacing: 14,
   92:                           crossAxisSpacing: 14,
   93:                           childAspectRatio: 0.84,
   94:                         ),
   95:                     itemBuilder: (context, index) {
   96:                       final entry = entries[index];
   97: 
   98:                       return _PlantIconCard(

  100:                         onTap: () => widget.onPlantChosen(entry.name),
  101:                       );
  102:                     },
  103:                   ),
  104:           ),
  105:           _footer(),
  106:         ],
  107:       ),
  108:     );

  308:   static String _displayNameForKey(String key) {
  309:     return key
  310:         .split('_')
  311:         .where((part) => part.trim().isNotEmpty)
  312:         .map((part) {
  313:           if (part.isEmpty) return part;
  314:           return part[0].toUpperCase() + part.substring(1);
  315:         })
  316:         .join(' ');
  317:   }
  318: }

  320: class _PlantIconCard extends StatelessWidget {
  321:   const _PlantIconCard({required this.entry, required this.onTap});

  324:   final VoidCallback onTap;
  325: 
  326:   @override

  335:           onTap: onTap,

  339:             padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(10, 14, 10, 10),

  349:                 ),

  231:   String? _requiredValidator(String? value) {
  232:     if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty) {
  233:       return 'Required';
  234:     }
  235: 
  236:     return null;
  237:   }
  238: 
  239:   String? _dimensionValidator(String? value) {
  240:     final parsed = double.tryParse(value ?? '');
  241: 
  242:     if (parsed == null) {
  243:       return 'Enter a number';
  244:     }
  245: 
  246:     if (parsed < 5) {
  247:       return 'Minimum 5m';
  248:     }
  249: 
  250:     if (parsed > 100) {
  251:       return 'Maximum 100m';
  252:     }
  253: 
  254:     return null;
  255:   }
  256: 
  257:   String? _latitudeValidator(String? value) {
  258:     final parsed = double.tryParse(value ?? '');
  259: 
  260:     if (parsed == null) {
  261:       return 'Enter a number';
  262:     }
  263: 
  264:     if (parsed < -90 || parsed > 90) {
  265:       return 'Use -90 to 90';
  266:     }
  267: 
  268:     return null;
  269:   }
  270: 
  271:   String? _longitudeValidator(String? value) {
  272:     final parsed = double.tryParse(value ?? '');
  273: 
  274:     if (parsed == null) {
  275:       return 'Enter a number';
  276:     }
  277: 
  278:     if (parsed < -180 || parsed > 180) {
  279:       return 'Use -180 to 180';
  280:     }
  281: 
  282:     return null;
  283:   }
  284: 
  285:   void _submit() {

  294:         latitude: double.parse(latitudeController.text.trim()),
  295:         longitude: double.parse(longitudeController.text.trim()),
  296:       ),
  297:     );
  298:   }

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';

   12: enum SeedlingFilter { active, ready, overdue, transplanted, all }
   13: 
   14: class SeedlingsView extends StatefulWidget {
   15:   const SeedlingsView({
   16:     super.key,
   17:     required this.seedlings,
   18:     this.beds = const [],

   44: class _SeedlingsViewState extends State<SeedlingsView> {
   45:   SeedlingFilter filter = SeedlingFilter.active;
   46:   bool showPlantNow = false;
   47:   String? _pendingQuickSowUndoId;
   48:   String? _pendingQuickSowUndoLabel;
   49: 
   50:   final ScrollController _scrollController = ScrollController();
   51:   final GlobalKey _seedlingCardsAnchorKey = GlobalKey();
   52:   String? _highlightedSeedlingId;
   53:   @override
   54:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   55:     final filtered = _filteredSeedlings();
   56:     final plan = SowCalendar.planFor(DateTime.now());
   57:     final workItems = _todaysWorkItems();
   58: 
   59:     return Container(
   60:       color: GardenTheme.cream,
   61:       child: CustomScrollView(
   62:         controller: _scrollController,
   63:         slivers: [
   64:           SliverToBoxAdapter(
   65:             child: SoilWaterDemandPanel(onQuickSowSeedKey: _quickSowBySeedKey),

   69:               child: _InlineQuickSowUndoStrip(
   70:                 label: _pendingQuickSowUndoLabel!,
