   72:                 onDismiss: _dismissPendingQuickSowUndo,
   73:               ),
   74:             ),
   75:           SliverToBoxAdapter(
   76:             child: _TodaysWorkStrip(
   77:               items: workItems,
   78:               onWater: _waterSeedling,
   79:               onFeed: _feedSeedling,
   80:               onTransplant: _openTransplantDialog,
   81:               onEdit: _openEditDialog,
   82:             ),
   83:           ),
   84:           if (showPlantNow)
   85:             SliverToBoxAdapter(
   86:               child: _PlantNowPanel(
   87:                 plan: plan,
   88:                 onQuickSow: _quickSow,
   89:                 onOpenCatalog: _openAddDialog,
   90:               ),
   91:             ),
   92:           SliverToBoxAdapter(
   93:             child: SizedBox(key: _seedlingCardsAnchorKey, height: 1),
   94:           ),
   95:           if (filtered.isEmpty)
   96:             SliverFillRemaining(
   97:               hasScrollBody: false,
   98:               child: _EmptySeedlingsState(onAdd: _openAddDialog),
   99:             )
  100:           else
  101:             SliverPadding(
  102:               padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
  103:               sliver: SliverLayoutBuilder(
  104:                 builder: (context, constraints) {
  105:                   final width = constraints.crossAxisExtent;
  106:                   final columns = width >= 1180
  107:                       ? 3
  108:                       : width >= 760
  109:                       ? 2
  110:                       : 1;
  111: 
  112:                   return SliverGrid(
  113:                     delegate: SliverChildBuilderDelegate((context, index) {
  114:                       final seedling = filtered[index];
  115: 
  116:                       return _SeedlingCard(
  117:                         seedling: seedling,
  118:                         bedName: _bedName(seedling.bedId),
  119:                         highlighted: seedling.id == _highlightedSeedlingId,
  120:                         onEdit: () => _openEditDialog(seedling),
  121:                         onWater: () {
  122:                           widget.onUpdateSeedling(
  123:                             seedling.id,
  124:                             (current) =>
  125:                                 current.copyWith(lastWateredAt: DateTime.now()),
  126:                           );
  127:                         },
  128:                         onFeed: () {
  129:                           widget.onUpdateSeedling(
  130:                             seedling.id,
  131:                             (current) =>
  132:                                 current.copyWith(lastFedAt: DateTime.now()),
  133:                           );
  134:                         },
  135:                         onTransplant: () => _openTransplantDialog(seedling),
  136:                         onDelete: () {
  137:                           _confirmDelete(seedling);
  138:                         },
  139:                       );
  140:                     }, childCount: filtered.length),
  141:                     gridDelegate: SliverGridDelegateWithFixedCrossAxisCount(
  142:                       crossAxisCount: columns,
  143:                       mainAxisSpacing: 14,
  144:                       crossAxisSpacing: 14,
  145:                       mainAxisExtent: 590,
  146:                     ),
  147:                   );
  148:                 },
  149:               ),
  150:             ),
  151:         ],
  152:       ),
  153:     );
  154:   }
  155: 
  156:   List<Seedling> _filteredSeedlings() {
  157:     final seedlings = [...widget.seedlings]
  158:       ..sort((a, b) => b.sowDate.compareTo(a.sowDate));
  159: 
  160:     switch (filter) {
  161:       case SeedlingFilter.active:
  162:         return seedlings.where((s) => !s.isTransplanted).toList();
  163:       case SeedlingFilter.ready:
  164:         return seedlings.where(_isReady).toList();
  165:       case SeedlingFilter.overdue:
  166:         return seedlings.where(_isOverdue).toList();
  167:       case SeedlingFilter.transplanted:
  168:         return seedlings.where((s) => s.isTransplanted).toList();
  169:       case SeedlingFilter.all:
  170:         return seedlings;
  171:     }
  172:   }
  173: 
  174:   bool _isReady(Seedling seedling) {
  175:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return false;
  176:     final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(seedling.seedKey);
  177:     final age = seedling.daysSinceSowing(DateTime.now());
  178:     return age >= catalog.transplantMinDays;
  179:   }
  180: 
  181:   bool _isOverdue(Seedling seedling) {
  182:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return false;
  183:     final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(seedling.seedKey);
  184:     final age = seedling.daysSinceSowing(DateTime.now());
  185:     return age > catalog.transplantMaxDays;
  186:   }
  187: 
  188:   String _bedName(String? bedId) {
  189:     if (bedId == null || bedId.trim().isEmpty) return 'No bed assigned';
  190: 
  191:     for (final bed in widget.beds) {
  192:       if (bed.id == bedId) {
  193:         return bed.name.trim().isEmpty ? 'Bed ${bed.number}' : bed.name.trim();
  194:       }
  195:     }
  196: 
  197:     return 'Missing bed';
  198:   }
  199: 
  200:   void _waterSeedling(Seedling seedling) {
  201:     widget.onUpdateSeedling(
  202:       seedling.id,
  203:       (current) => current.copyWith(lastWateredAt: DateTime.now()),
  204:     );
  205: 
  206:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  207:       SnackBar(content: Text('${seedling.cropName} marked watered.')),
  208:     );
  209:   }
  210: 
  211:   void _feedSeedling(Seedling seedling) {
  212:     widget.onUpdateSeedling(
  213:       seedling.id,
  214:       (current) => current.copyWith(lastFedAt: DateTime.now()),
  215:     );
  216: 
  217:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(
  218:       context,
  219:     ).showSnackBar(SnackBar(content: Text('${seedling.cropName} marked fed.')));
  220:   }
  221: 
  222:   List<_SeedlingWorkItem> _todaysWorkItems() {
  223:     final now = DateTime.now();
  224:     final items = <_SeedlingWorkItem>[];
  225: 
  226:     for (final seedling in widget.seedlings) {
  227:       if (seedling.isTransplanted) continue;
  228: 
  229:       final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(seedling.seedKey);
  230:       final age = seedling.daysSinceSowing(now);
  231: 
  232:       if (age > catalog.transplantMaxDays) {
  233:         items.add(
  234:           _SeedlingWorkItem(
  235:             seedling: seedling,
  236:             kind: _SeedlingWorkKind.overdue,
  237:             reason:
  238:                 '${age - catalog.transplantMaxDays} days past transplant window',
  239:           ),
  240:         );
  241:       } else if (age >= catalog.transplantMinDays) {
  242:         items.add(
  243:           _SeedlingWorkItem(
  244:             seedling: seedling,
  245:             kind: _SeedlingWorkKind.ready,
  246:             reason: 'Ready to transplant',
  247:           ),
  248:         );
  249:       }
  250: 
  251:       if (_isWaterDueFor(seedling)) {
  252:         items.add(
  253:           _SeedlingWorkItem(
  254:             seedling: seedling,
  255:             kind: _SeedlingWorkKind.water,
  256:             reason: seedling.lastWateredAt == null
  257:                 ? 'Never watered'
  258:                 : 'Last watered ${_seedlingRelativeDate(seedling.lastWateredAt)}',
  259:           ),
  260:         );
  261:       }
  262: 
  263:       if (_isFeedDueFor(seedling, age)) {
  264:         items.add(
  265:           _SeedlingWorkItem(
  266:             seedling: seedling,
  267:             kind: _SeedlingWorkKind.feed,
  268:             reason: seedling.lastFedAt == null
  269:                 ? 'No feed recorded'
  270:                 : 'Last fed ${_seedlingRelativeDate(seedling.lastFedAt)}',
  271:           ),
  272:         );
  273:       }
  274:     }
  275: 
  276:     items.sort((a, b) {
  277:       final priority = a.priority.compareTo(b.priority);
  278:       if (priority != 0) return priority;
  279:       return a.seedling.cropName.compareTo(b.seedling.cropName);
  280:     });
  281: 
  282:     return items;
  283:   }
  284: 
  285:   bool _isWaterDueFor(Seedling seedling) {
  286:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return false;
  287: 
  288:     final lastWateredAt = seedling.lastWateredAt;
  289:     if (lastWateredAt == null) return true;
  290: 
  291:     return _seedlingDaysSince(lastWateredAt) >= 2;
  292:   }
  293: 
  294:   bool _isFeedDueFor(Seedling seedling, int ageDays) {
  295:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return false;
  296: 
  297:     final startDay = _feedStartDayForCategory(seedling.category);
  298:     final intervalDays = _feedIntervalDaysForCategory(seedling.category);
  299: 
  300:     if (ageDays < startDay) return false;
  301: 
  302:     final lastFedAt = seedling.lastFedAt;
  303:     if (lastFedAt == null) return true;
  304: 
  305:     return _seedlingDaysSince(lastFedAt) >= intervalDays;
  306:   }
  307: 
  308:   int _feedStartDayForCategory(String category) {
  309:     switch (category.trim().toLowerCase()) {
  310:       case 'fruiting':
  311:         return 21;
  312:       case 'cucurbit':
  313:         return 14;
  314:       case 'brassica':
  315:         return 14;
  316:       case 'leafy':
  317:         return 14;
  318:       case 'herb':
  319:         return 21;
  320:       default:
  321:         return 14;
  322:     }
  323:   }
  324: 
  325:   int _feedIntervalDaysForCategory(String category) {
  326:     switch (category.trim().toLowerCase()) {
  327:       case 'fruiting':
  328:         return 7;
  329:       case 'cucurbit':
  330:         return 7;
  331:       case 'brassica':
  332:         return 10;
  333:       case 'leafy':
  334:         return 14;
  335:       case 'herb':
  336:         return 21;
  337:       default:
  338:         return 10;
  339:     }
  340:   }
  341: 
  342:   void _scrollToSeedlingCards() {
  343:     WidgetsBinding.instance.addPostFrameCallback((_) {
  344:       if (!mounted) return;
  345: 
  346:       final anchorContext = _seedlingCardsAnchorKey.currentContext;
  347: 
  348:       if (anchorContext != null) {
  349:         Scrollable.ensureVisible(
  350:           anchorContext,
  351:           duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 420),
  352:           curve: Curves.easeOutCubic,
  353:           alignment: 0.04,
  354:         );
  355:         return;
  356:       }
  357: 
  358:       if (_scrollController.hasClients) {
  359:         _scrollController.animateTo(
  360:           _scrollController.position.maxScrollExtent,
  361:           duration: const Duration(milliseconds: 420),
  362:           curve: Curves.easeOutCubic,
  363:         );
  364:       }
  365:     });
  366:   }
  367: 
  368:   void _focusSeedlingCardsAfterQuickSow() {
  369:     setState(() {
  370:       filter = SeedlingFilter.active;
  371:       showPlantNow = false;
  372:     });
  373: 
  374:     _scrollToSeedlingCards();
  375:   }
  376: 
  377:   void _quickSow(SowCalendarItem calendarItem) {
  378:     final seed = calendarItem.seed;
  379:     final direct = calendarItem.method == SowMethod.direct;
  380: 
  381:     widget.onAddSeedling(
  382:       Seedling(
  383:         id: 'seedling-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}',
  384:         seedKey: seed.key,
  385:         cropName: seed.cropName,
  386:         emoji: seed.emoji,
  387:         category: seed.category,
  388:         variety: '',
  389:         sowDate: DateTime.now(),
  390:         trayType: direct ? 'Direct sow' : 'Tray',
  391:         trayCount: 1,
  392:         location: direct ? 'Garden bed' : 'Seedling area',
  393:         notes: calendarItem.note,
  394:       ),
  395:     );
  396:   }
  397: 
  398:   void _highlightSeedling(String seedlingId) {
  399:     setState(() {
  400:       _highlightedSeedlingId = seedlingId;
  401:     });
  402: 
  403:     Future.delayed(const Duration(seconds: 4), () {
  404:       if (!mounted) return;
  405:       if (_highlightedSeedlingId != seedlingId) return;
  406: 
  407:       setState(() {
  408:         _highlightedSeedlingId = null;
  409:       });
  410:     });
  411:   }
  412: 
  413:   void _clearHighlight(String seedlingId) {
  414:     if (_highlightedSeedlingId != seedlingId) return;
  415: 
  416:     setState(() {
  417:       _highlightedSeedlingId = null;
  418:     });
  419:   }
  420: 
  421:   SeedCatalogItem _resolveSeedCatalogItem(String query) {
  422:     return SeedCatalog.byKey(query);
  423:   }
  424: 
  425:   void _setPendingQuickSowUndo(String seedlingId, String label) {
  426:     setState(() {
  427:       _pendingQuickSowUndoId = seedlingId;
  428:       _pendingQuickSowUndoLabel = label;
  429:     });
  430:   }
  431: 
  432:   void _dismissPendingQuickSowUndo() {
  433:     setState(() {
  434:       _pendingQuickSowUndoId = null;
  435:       _pendingQuickSowUndoLabel = null;
  436:     });
  437:   }
  438: 
  439:   void _undoPendingQuickSow() {
  440:     final id = _pendingQuickSowUndoId;
  441:     if (id == null) return;
  442: 
  443:     widget.onDeleteSeedling(id);
  444: 
  445:     if (_highlightedSeedlingId == id) {
  446:       setState(() {
  447:         _highlightedSeedlingId = null;
  448:       });
  449:     }
  450: 
  451:     setState(() {
  452:       _pendingQuickSowUndoId = null;
  453:       _pendingQuickSowUndoLabel = null;
  454:     });
  455:   }
  456: 
  457:   String _quickSowEmojiFor(String seedKey, String fallback) {
  458:     final key = seedKey.trim().toLowerCase().replaceAll('_', ' ');
  459: 
  460:     if (key.contains('carrot') ||
  461:         key.contains('parsnip') ||
  462:         key.contains('salsify')) {
  463:       return '\u{1F955}';
  464:     }
  465:     if (key.contains('potato')) return '\u{1F954}';
  466:     if (key.contains('kumara') ||
  467:         key.contains('sweet') ||
  468:         key.contains('yacon')) {
  469:       return '\u{1F360}';
  470:     }
  471:     if (key.contains('onion') ||
  472:         key.contains('leek') ||
  473:         key.contains('shallot')) {
  474:       return '\u{1F9C5}';
  475:     }
  476:     if (key.contains('garlic')) return '\u{1F9C4}';
  477:     if (key.contains('broccoli') || key.contains('cauliflower'))
  478:       return '\u{1F966}';
  479:     if (key.contains('lettuce') ||
  480:         key.contains('spinach') ||
  481:         key.contains('kale') ||
  482:         key.contains('cabbage') ||
  483:         key.contains('chard') ||
  484:         key.contains('rocket') ||
  485:         key.contains('choi')) {
  486:       return '\u{1F96C}';
  487:     }
  488:     if (key.contains('tomato')) return '\u{1F345}';
  489:     if (key.contains('chilli')) return '\u{1F336}';
  490:     if (key.contains('eggplant')) return '\u{1F346}';
  491:     if (key.contains('cucumber') || key.contains('zucchini'))
  492:       return '\u{1F952}';
  493:     if (key.contains('corn')) return '\u{1F33D}';
  494:     if (key.contains('beans')) return '\u{1FAD8}';
  495:     if (key.contains('peas')) return '\u{1FADB}';
  496:     if (fallback.trim().isNotEmpty) return fallback;
  497: 
  498:     return '\u{1F331}';
  499:   }
  500: 
  501:   String _quickSowCategoryFor(String seedKey, String fallback) {
  502:     final key = seedKey.trim().toLowerCase().replaceAll('_', ' ');
  503: 
  504:     if (key.contains('carrot') ||
  505:         key.contains('beet') ||
  506:         key.contains('radish') ||
  507:         key.contains('turnip') ||
  508:         key.contains('parsnip') ||
  509:         key.contains('swede') ||
  510:         key.contains('rutabaga') ||
  511:         key.contains('salsify') ||
  512:         key.contains('scorzonera') ||
  513:         key.contains('celeriac') ||
  514:         key.contains('potato') ||
  515:         key.contains('kumara') ||
  516:         key.contains('yacon')) {
  517:       return 'Root';
  518:     }
  519: 
  520:     if (key.contains('onion') ||
  521:         key.contains('leek') ||
  522:         key.contains('shallot') ||
  523:         key.contains('chives') ||
  524:         key.contains('garlic')) {
  525:       return 'Allium';
  526:     }
  527: 
  528:     if (key.contains('broccoli') ||
  529:         key.contains('cabbage') ||
  530:         key.contains('kale') ||
  531:         key.contains('cauliflower') ||
  532:         key.contains('kohlrabi') ||
  533:         key.contains('brussels') ||
  534:         key.contains('choi')) {
  535:       return 'Brassica';
  536:     }
  537: 
  538:     if (key.contains('lettuce') ||
  539:         key.contains('spinach') ||
  540:         key.contains('silverbeet') ||
  541:         key.contains('rocket') ||
  542:         key.contains('mizuna') ||
  543:         key.contains('tatsoi') ||
  544:         key.contains('endive') ||
  545:         key.contains('chicory') ||
  546:         key.contains('radicchio') ||
  547:         key.contains('collards') ||
  548:         key.contains('cress') ||
  549:         key.contains('celery')) {
  550:       return 'Leafy';
  551:     }
  552: 
  553:     if (fallback.trim().isNotEmpty) return fallback;
  554: 
  555:     return 'Vegetable';
  556:   }
  557: 
  558:   String _plantingMethodForQuickSow(SeedCatalogItem seed) {
  559:     final key = seed.key.trim().toLowerCase();
  560:     final name = seed.cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
  561:     final text = '$key $name';
  562: 
  563:     if (text.contains('garlic')) return 'Plant cloves';
  564:     if (text.contains('potato') && !text.contains('sweet'))
  565:       return 'Plant tubers';
  566:     if (text.contains('kumara') ||
  567:         text.contains('sweet_potato') ||
  568:         text.contains('sweet potato')) {
  569:       return 'Plant slips';
  570:     }
  571:     if (text.contains('yacon')) return 'Plant crowns';
  572: 
  573:     if (text.contains('carrot') ||
  574:         text.contains('beet') ||
  575:         text.contains('radish') ||
  576:         text.contains('turnip') ||
  577:         text.contains('parsnip') ||
  578:         text.contains('swede') ||
  579:         text.contains('rutabaga') ||
  580:         text.contains('salsify') ||
  581:         text.contains('scorzonera') ||
  582:         text.contains('beans') ||
  583:         text.contains('peas') ||
  584:         text.contains('corn')) {
  585:       return 'Direct sow';
  586:     }
  587: 
  588:     if (text.contains('lettuce') ||
  589:         text.contains('spinach') ||
  590:         text.contains('silverbeet') ||
  591:         text.contains('rocket') ||
  592:         text.contains('mizuna') ||
  593:         text.contains('tatsoi') ||
  594:         text.contains('endive') ||
  595:         text.contains('pak') ||
  596:         text.contains('bok')) {
  597:       return 'Direct or tray';
  598:     }
  599: 
  600:     return 'Start tray';
  601:   }
  602: 
  603:   String _quickSowLocationForMethod(String method) {
  604:     switch (method) {
  605:       case 'Direct sow':
  606:       case 'Plant cloves':
  607:       case 'Plant tubers':
  608:       case 'Plant slips':
  609:       case 'Plant crowns':
  610:         return 'Garden bed';
  611:       case 'Direct or tray':
  612:         return 'Garden bed or seedling area';
  613:       default:
  614:         return 'Seedling area';
  615:     }
  616:   }
  617: 
  618:   void _quickSowBySeedKey(String seedKey) {
  619:     final quickSowParts = seedKey.split('::');
  620:     final baseSeedKey = quickSowParts.first.trim();
  621:     final selectedVariety = quickSowParts.length > 1
  622:         ? quickSowParts.sublist(1).join('::').trim()
  623:         : '';
  624: 
  625:     final seed = SeedCatalog.byKey(baseSeedKey);
  626:     final method = _plantingMethodForQuickSow(seed);
  627:     final seedlingId = 'seedling-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}';
  628: 
  629:     final seedling = Seedling(
  630:       id: seedlingId,
  631:       seedKey: seed.key,
  632:       cropName: seed.cropName,
  633:       emoji: _quickSowEmojiFor(baseSeedKey, seed.emoji),
  634:       category: _quickSowCategoryFor(baseSeedKey, seed.category),
  635:       variety: selectedVariety,
  636:       sowDate: DateTime.now(),
  637:       trayType: method,
  638:       trayCount: 1,
  639:       location: _quickSowLocationForMethod(method),
  640:       notes: selectedVariety.trim().isEmpty
  641:           ? '$method from the Blenheim soil-temperature and season-fit panel.'
  642:           : '$method - $selectedVariety from the Blenheim soil-temperature and season-fit panel.',
  643:     );
  644: 
  645:     widget.onAddSeedling(seedling);
  646: 
  647:     if (mounted) {
  648:       filter = SeedlingFilter.active;
  649:       showPlantNow = false;
  650:     }
  651: 
  652:     _focusSeedlingCardsAfterQuickSow();
  653:     _highlightSeedling(seedling.id);
  654:     _setPendingQuickSowUndo(seedling.id, seed.cropName);
  655:   }
  656: 
  657:   Future<void> _openEditDialog(Seedling seedling) async {
  658:     final result = await showDialog<Seedling>(
  659:       context: context,
  660:       builder: (context) {
  661:         return EditSeedlingDialog(seedling: seedling, beds: widget.beds);
  662:       },
  663:     );
  664: 
  665:     if (result == null) return;
  666: 
  667:     widget.onUpdateSeedling(seedling.id, (_) => result);
  668:   }
  669: 
  670:   Future<void> _openTransplantDialog(Seedling seedling) async {
  671:     if (widget.beds.isEmpty) {
  672:       ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  673:         const SnackBar(
  674:           content: Text('Add a bed before transplanting seedlings.'),
  675:         ),
  676:       );
  677:       return;
  678:     }
  679: 
  680:     final result = await showDialog<TransplantSeedlingResult>(
  681:       context: context,
  682:       builder: (context) {
  683:         return TransplantSeedlingDialogV2(
  684:           seedling: seedling,
  685:           beds: widget.beds,
  686:         );
  687:       },
  688:     );
  689: 
  690:     if (!mounted) return;
  691: 
  692:     if (result == null || result.bedId.trim().isEmpty) return;
  693: 
  694:     final transplant = widget.onTransplantSeedling;
  695: 
  696:     if (transplant == null) {
  697:       widget.onUpdateSeedling(
  698:         seedling.id,
  699:         (current) => current.copyWith(
  700:           bedId: result.bedId,
  701:           transplantedAt: DateTime.now(),
  702:         ),
  703:       );
  704:     } else {
  705:       transplant(
  706:         seedlingId: seedling.id,
  707:         bedId: result.bedId,
  708:         addCropBlockToMap: result.addCropBlockToMap,
  709:       );
  710:     }
  711: 
  712:     final bedName = _bedName(result.bedId);
  713: 
  714:     ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).showSnackBar(
  715:       SnackBar(
  716:         content: Text(
  717:           result.addCropBlockToMap
  718:               ? '${seedling.cropName} transplanted to $bedName and added to the map.'
  719:               : '${seedling.cropName} transplanted to $bedName.',
  720:         ),
  721:       ),
  722:     );
  723: 
  724:     if (result.addCropBlockToMap) {
  725:       widget.onOpenMapView?.call();
  726:     }
  727:   }
  728: 
  729:   Future<void> _openAddDialog() async {
  730:     final result = await showDialog<Seedling>(
  731:       context: context,
  732:       builder: (context) {
  733:         return AddSeedlingDialog(beds: widget.beds);
  734:       },
  735:     );
  736: 
  737:     if (result == null) return;
  738:     widget.onAddSeedling(result);
  739:   }
  740: 
  741:   Future<void> _confirmDelete(Seedling seedling) async {
  742:     final confirmed = await showDialog<bool>(
  743:       context: context,
  744:       builder: (context) {
  745:         return AlertDialog(
  746:           backgroundColor: GardenTheme.panel,
  747:           title: const Text('Delete seedling?'),
  748:           content: Text(
  749:             'Delete ${seedling.cropName} from the Seedling Tracker?',
  750:           ),
  751:           actions: [
  752:             TextButton(
  753:               onPressed: () {
  754:                 Navigator.of(context).pop(false);
  755:               },
  756:               child: const Text('Cancel'),
  757:             ),
  758:             FilledButton(
  759:               onPressed: () {
  760:                 Navigator.of(context).pop(true);
  761:               },
  762:               child: const Text('Delete'),
  763:             ),
  764:           ],
  765:         );
  766:       },
  767:     );
  768: 
  769:     if (confirmed == true) {
  770:       widget.onDeleteSeedling(seedling.id);
  771:     }
  772:   }
  773: }
  774: 
  775: enum _SeedlingWorkKind { water, feed, ready, overdue }
  776: 
  777: class _SeedlingWorkItem {
  778:   const _SeedlingWorkItem({
  779:     required this.seedling,
  780:     required this.kind,
  781:     required this.reason,
  782:   });
  783: 
  784:   final Seedling seedling;
  785:   final _SeedlingWorkKind kind;
  786:   final String reason;
  787: 
  788:   int get priority {
  789:     switch (kind) {
  790:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.overdue:
  791:         return 0;
  792:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.ready:
  793:         return 1;
  794:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.water:
  795:         return 2;
  796:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.feed:
  797:         return 3;
  798:     }
  799:   }
  800: 
  801:   String get actionLabel {
  802:     switch (kind) {
  803:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.water:
  804:         return 'Water';
  805:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.feed:
  806:         return 'Feed';
  807:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.ready:
  808:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.overdue:
  809:         return 'Transplant';
  810:     }
  811:   }
  812: 
  813:   IconData get icon {
  814:     switch (kind) {
  815:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.water:
  816:         return Icons.water_drop_outlined;
  817:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.feed:
  818:         return Icons.compost_outlined;
  819:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.ready:
  820:         return Icons.task_alt;
  821:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.overdue:
  822:         return Icons.warning_amber_rounded;
  823:     }
  824:   }
  825: 
  826:   Color get color {
  827:     switch (kind) {
  828:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.water:
  829:         return const Color(0xFF1A6A9A);
  830:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.feed:
  831:         return GardenTheme.warn;
  832:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.ready:
  833:         return GardenTheme.good;
  834:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.overdue:
  835:         return GardenTheme.bad;
  836:     }
  837:   }
  838: 
  839:   String get groupLabel {
  840:     switch (kind) {
  841:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.water:
  842:         return 'Water due';
  843:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.feed:
  844:         return 'Feed due';
  845:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.ready:
  846:         return 'Ready';
  847:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.overdue:
  848:         return 'Overdue';
  849:     }
  850:   }
  851: }
  852: 
  853: class _TodaysWorkStrip extends StatelessWidget {
  854:   const _TodaysWorkStrip({
  855:     required this.items,
  856:     required this.onWater,
  857:     required this.onFeed,
  858:     required this.onTransplant,
  859:     required this.onEdit,
  860:   });
  861: 
  862:   final List<_SeedlingWorkItem> items;
  863:   final ValueChanged<Seedling> onWater;
  864:   final ValueChanged<Seedling> onFeed;
  865:   final ValueChanged<Seedling> onTransplant;
  866:   final ValueChanged<Seedling> onEdit;
  867:   @override
  868:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  869:     final waterCount = _count(_SeedlingWorkKind.water);
  870:     final feedCount = _count(_SeedlingWorkKind.feed);
  871:     final readyCount = _count(_SeedlingWorkKind.ready);
  872:     final overdueCount = _count(_SeedlingWorkKind.overdue);
  873:     final visibleItems = items.take(6).toList();
  874: 
  875:     return Container(
  876:       width: double.infinity,
  877:       margin: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(14, 0, 14, 10),
  878:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
  879:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  880:         color: GardenTheme.panel,
  881:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
  882:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  883:       ),
  884:       child: Column(
  885:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  886:         children: [
  887:           LayoutBuilder(
  888:             builder: (context, constraints) {
  889:               final compact = constraints.maxWidth < 760;
  890: 
  891:               final title = Row(
  892:                 children: [
  893:                   Container(
  894:                     width: 34,
  895:                     height: 34,
  896:                     decoration: BoxDecoration(
  897:                       color: GardenTheme.ink,
  898:                       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  899:                     ),
  900:                     child: const Icon(
  901:                       Icons.bolt_outlined,
  902:                       color: GardenTheme.cream,
  903:                       size: 18,
  904:                     ),
  905:                   ),
  906:                   const SizedBox(width: 10),
  907:                   const Expanded(
  908:                     child: Column(
  909:                       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  910:                       children: [
  911:                         Text(
  912:                           "Today's work",
  913:                           maxLines: 1,
  914:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  915:                           style: TextStyle(
  916:                             color: GardenTheme.ink,
  917:                             fontSize: 17,
  918:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  919:                           ),
  920:                         ),
  921:                         SizedBox(height: 2),
  922:                         Text(
  923:                           'Only actions due now. Full details stay in each seedling card.',
  924:                           maxLines: 1,
  925:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  926:                           style: TextStyle(
  927:                             color: GardenTheme.muted,
  928:                             fontSize: 12,
  929:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  930:                           ),
  931:                         ),
  932:                       ],
  933:                     ),
  934:                   ),
  935:                 ],
  936:               );
  937: 
  938:               final counts = Wrap(
  939:                 spacing: 8,
  940:                 runSpacing: 8,
  941:                 children: [
  942:                   _WorkCountPill(
  943:                     label: 'Water',
  944:                     value: waterCount,
  945:                     color: const Color(0xFF1A6A9A),
  946:                   ),
  947:                   _WorkCountPill(
  948:                     label: 'Feed',
  949:                     value: feedCount,
  950:                     color: GardenTheme.warn,
  951:                   ),
  952:                   _WorkCountPill(
  953:                     label: 'Ready',
  954:                     value: readyCount,
  955:                     color: GardenTheme.good,
  956:                   ),
  957:                   _WorkCountPill(
  958:                     label: 'Overdue',
  959:                     value: overdueCount,
  960:                     color: GardenTheme.bad,
  961:                   ),
  962:                 ],
  963:               );
  964: 
  965:               if (compact) {
  966:                 return Column(
  967:                   crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  968:                   children: [title, const SizedBox(height: 12), counts],
  969:                 );
  970:               }
  971: 
  972:               return Row(
  973:                 crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.center,
  974:                 children: [
  975:                   Expanded(child: title),
  976:                   const SizedBox(width: 16),
  977:                   counts,
  978:                 ],
  979:               );
  980:             },
  981:           ),
  982:           const SizedBox(height: 12),
  983:           if (items.isEmpty)
  984:             Container(
  985:               width: double.infinity,
  986:               padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 11),
  987:               decoration: BoxDecoration(
  988:                 color: const Color(0xFFE6F5EC),
  989:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
  990:                 border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFB8DDC8)),
  991:               ),
  992:               child: const Text(
  993:                 'All clear - no seedling actions due today.',
  994:                 style: TextStyle(
  995:                   color: GardenTheme.good,
  996:                   fontSize: 13,
  997:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  998:                 ),
  999:               ),
 1000:             )
 1001:           else
 1002:             Wrap(
 1003:               spacing: 10,
 1004:               runSpacing: 10,
 1005:               children: [
 1006:                 for (final item in visibleItems)
 1007:                   _TodaysWorkCard(
 1008:                     item: item,
 1009:                     onWater: onWater,
 1010:                     onFeed: onFeed,
 1011:                     onTransplant: onTransplant,
 1012:                     onEdit: onEdit,
 1013:                   ),
 1014:                 if (items.length > visibleItems.length)
 1015:                   _MoreWorkCard(extraCount: items.length - visibleItems.length),
 1016:               ],
 1017:             ),
 1018:         ],
 1019:       ),
 1020:     );
 1021:   }
 1022: 
 1023:   int _count(_SeedlingWorkKind kind) {
 1024:     return items.where((item) => item.kind == kind).length;
 1025:   }
 1026: }

 1153: 
 1154:   void _runPrimaryAction() {
 1155:     switch (item.kind) {
 1156:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.water:
 1157:         onWater(item.seedling);
 1158:         return;
 1159:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.feed:
 1160:         onFeed(item.seedling);
 1161:         return;
 1162:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.ready:
 1163:       case _SeedlingWorkKind.overdue:
 1164:         onTransplant(item.seedling);
 1165:         return;
 1166:     }
 1167:   }
 1168: }

 1294: 
 1295: String _expectedHarvestForSeedling(Seedling seedling) {
 1296:   final key = seedling.seedKey.trim().isNotEmpty
 1297:       ? seedling.seedKey
 1298:       : seedling.cropName;
 1299: 
 1300:   final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(key);
 1301:   return 'Expected ${_expectedHarvestForCatalog(catalog, seedling.sowDate)}';
 1302: }
 1303: 
 1304: String _expectedHarvestForCatalog(SeedCatalogItem catalog, DateTime sowDate) {
 1305:   final key = catalog.key.trim().toLowerCase();
 1306:   final category = catalog.category.trim().toLowerCase();
 1307: 
 1308:   if (key == 'garlic') {
 1309:     final start = _nextMonthDayOnOrAfter(sowDate, 12, 1);
 1310:     final end = DateTime(start.year + 1, 1, 31);
 1311:     return _harvestMonthRange(start, end);
 1312:   }
 1313: 
 1314:   if (key == 'kumara' || key == 'sweet_potato' || key == 'yacon') {
 1315:     final start = _nextMonthDayOnOrAfter(sowDate, 3, 1);
 1316:     final end = DateTime(start.year, 5, 31);
 1317:     return _harvestMonthRange(start, end);
 1318:   }
 1319: 
 1320:   if (key == 'potato') {
 1321:     final start = sowDate.add(const Duration(days: 100));
 1322:     final end = start.add(const Duration(days: 45));
 1323:     return _harvestMonthRange(start, end);
 1324:   }
 1325: 
 1326:   final days = _harvestDaysForForecast(catalog, category);
 1327:   final start = sowDate.add(Duration(days: days));
 1328:   final end = start.add(const Duration(days: 28));
 1329: 
 1330:   return _harvestMonthRange(start, end);
 1331: }
 1332: 
 1333: int _harvestDaysForForecast(SeedCatalogItem catalog, String category) {
 1334:   final key = catalog.key.trim().toLowerCase();
 1335: 
 1336:   if (key == 'garlic') return 230;
 1337:   if (key == 'yacon') return 210;
 1338:   if (key == 'potato') return 100;
 1339:   if (key == 'kumara' || key == 'sweet_potato') return 120;
 1340: 
 1341:   if (catalog.harvestDaysFromTransplant > 0) {
 1342:     return catalog.harvestDaysFromTransplant;
 1343:   }
 1344: 
 1345:   if (category.contains('leaf')) return 45;
 1346:   if (category.contains('brassica')) return 75;
 1347:   if (category.contains('root')) return 70;
 1348:   if (category.contains('allium')) return 120;
 1349:   if (category.contains('legume')) return 65;
 1350:   if (category.contains('fruiting')) return 85;
 1351:   if (category.contains('cucurbit')) return 75;
 1352:   if (category.contains('herb')) return 45;
 1353: 
 1354:   return 70;
 1355: }
 1356: 
 1357: DateTime _nextMonthDayOnOrAfter(DateTime after, int month, int day) {
 1358:   var result = DateTime(after.year, month, day);
 1359: 
 1360:   if (result.isBefore(after)) {
 1361:     result = DateTime(after.year + 1, month, day);
 1362:   }
 1363: 
 1364:   return result;
 1365: }
 1366: 
 1367: String _harvestMonthRange(DateTime start, DateTime end) {
 1368:   final startLabel = _harvestMonthLabel(start);
 1369:   final endLabel = _harvestMonthLabel(end);
 1370: 
 1371:   if (startLabel == endLabel) return startLabel;
 1372: 
 1373:   return '$startLabel-$endLabel';
 1374: }
 1375: 
 1376: String _harvestMonthLabel(DateTime date) {
 1377:   const months = <int, String>{
 1378:     1: 'Jan',
 1379:     2: 'Feb',
 1380:     3: 'Mar',
 1381:     4: 'Apr',
 1382:     5: 'May',
 1383:     6: 'Jun',
 1384:     7: 'Jul',
 1385:     8: 'Aug',
 1386:     9: 'Sep',
 1387:     10: 'Oct',
 1388:     11: 'Nov',
 1389:     12: 'Dec',
 1390:   };
 1391: 
 1392:   return months[date.month] ?? '${date.month}';
 1393: }
 1394: 
 1395: class _SuccessionPlan {
 1396:   const _SuccessionPlan({
 1397:     required this.intervalDays,
 1398:     required this.stopMonth,
 1399:     required this.stopDay,
 1400:     required this.note,
 1401:   });
 1402: 
 1403:   final int intervalDays;
 1404:   final int stopMonth;
 1405:   final int stopDay;
 1406:   final String note;
 1407: }
 1408: 
 1409: String _successionForSeedling(Seedling seedling) {
 1410:   final key = seedling.seedKey.trim().isNotEmpty
 1411:       ? seedling.seedKey
 1412:       : seedling.cropName;
 1413: 
 1414:   final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(key);
 1415:   final plan = _successionPlanForCatalog(catalog);
 1416: 
 1417:   if (plan == null) return 'No repeat needed';
 1418: 
 1419:   final nowRaw = DateTime.now();
 1420:   final now = DateTime(nowRaw.year, nowRaw.month, nowRaw.day);
 1421:   final sowDate = DateTime(
 1422:     seedling.sowDate.year,
 1423:     seedling.sowDate.month,
 1424:     seedling.sowDate.day,
 1425:   );
 1426: 
 1427:   final stopDate = _successionStopDateOnOrAfter(
 1428:     now,
 1429:     plan.stopMonth,
 1430:     plan.stopDay,
 1431:   );
 1432: 
 1433:   if (now.isAfter(stopDate)) {
 1434:     return 'Window closed - resume next season';
 1435:   }
 1436: 
 1437:   final nextDate = sowDate.add(Duration(days: plan.intervalDays));
 1438: 
 1439:   if (!nextDate.isAfter(now)) {
 1440:     return 'Due now - ${plan.note} until ${_successionDateLabel(stopDate)}';
 1441:   }
 1442: 
 1443:   final daysUntil = nextDate.difference(now).inDays;
 1444: 
 1445:   if (nextDate.isAfter(stopDate)) {
 1446:     return 'No repeat - season window ends ${_successionDateLabel(stopDate)}';
 1447:   }
 1448: 
 1449:   return 'In ${daysUntil}d - ${plan.note} until ${_successionDateLabel(stopDate)}';
 1450: }
 1451: 
 1452: _SuccessionPlan? _successionPlanForCatalog(SeedCatalogItem catalog) {
 1453:   final key = catalog.key.trim().toLowerCase();
 1454:   final name = catalog.cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
 1455:   final category = catalog.category.trim().toLowerCase();
 1456:   final text = '$key $name $category';
 1457: 
 1458:   if (text.contains('radish') || text.contains('cress')) {
 1459:     return const _SuccessionPlan(
 1460:       intervalDays: 10,
 1461:       stopMonth: 5,
 1462:       stopDay: 31,
 1463:       note: 'sow small batches',
 1464:     );
 1465:   }
 1466: 
 1467:   if (text.contains('lettuce') ||
 1468:       text.contains('rocket') ||
 1469:       text.contains('mizuna') ||
 1470:       text.contains('tatsoi') ||
 1471:       text.contains('pak') ||
 1472:       text.contains('bok') ||
 1473:       text.contains('mustard') ||
 1474:       text.contains('coriander') ||
 1475:       text.contains('dill')) {
 1476:     return const _SuccessionPlan(
 1477:       intervalDays: 14,
 1478:       stopMonth: 5,
 1479:       stopDay: 31,
 1480:       note: 'sow another batch',
 1481:     );
 1482:   }
 1483: 
 1484:   if (text.contains('spinach') ||
 1485:       text.contains('silverbeet') ||
 1486:       text.contains('carrot') ||
 1487:       text.contains('beetroot') ||
 1488:       text.contains('turnip') ||
 1489:       text.contains('peas') ||
 1490:       text.contains('snow_peas') ||
 1491:       text.contains('sugar_snap_peas')) {
 1492:     return const _SuccessionPlan(
 1493:       intervalDays: 21,
 1494:       stopMonth: 5,
 1495:       stopDay: 31,
 1496:       note: 'sow again',
 1497:     );
 1498:   }
 1499: 
 1500:   if (text.contains('broccoli') ||
 1501:       text.contains('cabbage') ||
 1502:       text.contains('kale') ||
 1503:       text.contains('cauliflower')) {
 1504:     return const _SuccessionPlan(
 1505:       intervalDays: 28,
 1506:       stopMonth: 5,
 1507:       stopDay: 15,
 1508:       note: 'start another tray',
 1509:     );
 1510:   }
 1511: 
 1512:   if (text.contains('beans') || text.contains('sweetcorn')) {
 1513:     return const _SuccessionPlan(
 1514:       intervalDays: 21,
 1515:       stopMonth: 12,
 1516:       stopDay: 31,
 1517:       note: 'sow warm-season batches',
 1518:     );
 1519:   }
 1520: 
 1521:   return null;
 1522: }
 1523: 
 1524: DateTime _successionStopDateOnOrAfter(DateTime today, int month, int day) {
 1525:   var result = DateTime(today.year, month, day);
 1526: 
 1527:   if (result.isBefore(today)) {
 1528:     result = DateTime(today.year + 1, month, day);
 1529:   }
 1530: 
 1531:   return result;
 1532: }
 1533: 
 1534: String _successionDateLabel(DateTime date) {
 1535:   const months = <int, String>{
 1536:     1: 'Jan',
 1537:     2: 'Feb',
 1538:     3: 'Mar',
 1539:     4: 'Apr',
 1540:     5: 'May',
 1541:     6: 'Jun',
 1542:     7: 'Jul',
 1543:     8: 'Aug',
 1544:     9: 'Sep',
 1545:     10: 'Oct',
 1546:     11: 'Nov',
 1547:     12: 'Dec',
 1548:   };
 1549: 
 1550:   final month = months[date.month] ?? '${date.month}';
 1551:   return '$month ${date.day}';
 1552: }

 1722: class _PlantNowPanel extends StatelessWidget {
 1723:   const _PlantNowPanel({
 1724:     required this.plan,
 1725:     required this.onQuickSow,
 1726:     required this.onOpenCatalog,
 1727:   });
 1728: 
 1729:   final MonthlySowPlan plan;
 1730:   final ValueChanged<SowCalendarItem> onQuickSow;
 1731:   final VoidCallback onOpenCatalog;
 1732:   @override
 1733:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1734:     final nextMonth = plan.month == 12 ? 1 : plan.month + 1;
 1735: 
 1736:     return Container(
 1737:       width: double.infinity,
 1738:       margin: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(14, 0, 14, 10),
 1739:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
 1740:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1741:         color: GardenTheme.panel,
 1742:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
 1743:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1744:       ),
 1745:       child: LayoutBuilder(
 1746:         builder: (context, constraints) {
 1747:           final stacked = constraints.maxWidth < 920;
 1748: 
 1749:           final current = _CalendarColumn(
 1750:             title: 'Plant Now',
 1751:             subtitle: SowCalendar.monthName(plan.month),
 1752:             tray: plan.tray,
 1753:             direct: plan.direct,
 1754:             either: plan.either,
 1755:             emptyText: 'No priority sowing listed for this month.',
 1756:             onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
 1757:           );
 1758: 
 1759:           final next = _CalendarColumn(
 1760:             title: 'Prepare Next',
 1761:             subtitle: SowCalendar.monthName(nextMonth),
 1762:             tray: plan.nextMonthTray,
 1763:             direct: plan.nextMonthDirect,
 1764:             either: plan.nextMonthEither,
 1765:             emptyText: 'No next-month items listed.',
 1766:             onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
 1767:           );
 1768: 
 1769:           if (stacked) {
 1770:             return Column(
 1771:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1772:               children: [
 1773:                 _PlantNowIntro(onOpenCatalog: onOpenCatalog),
 1774:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1775:                 current,
 1776:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1777:                 next,
 1778:               ],
 1779:             );
 1780:           }
 1781: 
 1782:           return Row(
 1783:             crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1784:             children: [
 1785:               Expanded(
 1786:                 flex: 5,
 1787:                 child: _PlantNowIntro(onOpenCatalog: onOpenCatalog),
 1788:               ),
 1789:               const SizedBox(width: 14),
 1790:               Expanded(flex: 6, child: current),
 1791:               const SizedBox(width: 14),
 1792:               Expanded(flex: 5, child: next),
 1793:             ],
 1794:           );
 1795:         },
 1796:       ),
 1797:     );
 1798:   }
 1799: }

 1858: class _CalendarColumn extends StatelessWidget {
 1859:   const _CalendarColumn({
 1860:     required this.title,
 1861:     required this.subtitle,
 1862:     required this.tray,
 1863:     required this.direct,
 1864:     required this.either,
 1865:     required this.emptyText,
 1866:     required this.onQuickSow,
 1867:   });
 1868: 
 1869:   final String title;
 1870:   final String subtitle;
 1871:   final List<SowCalendarItem> tray;
 1872:   final List<SowCalendarItem> direct;
 1873:   final List<SowCalendarItem> either;
 1874:   final String emptyText;
 1875:   final ValueChanged<SowCalendarItem> onQuickSow;
 1876:   @override
 1877:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1878:     final hasItems = tray.isNotEmpty || direct.isNotEmpty || either.isNotEmpty;
 1879: 
 1880:     return Container(
 1881:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(13),
 1882:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1883:         color: Colors.white,
 1884:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
 1885:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 1886:       ),
 1887:       child: Column(
 1888:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1889:         children: [
 1890:           Text(
 1891:             title.toUpperCase(),
 1892:             style: const TextStyle(
 1893:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1894:               fontSize: 10,
 1895:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1896:               letterSpacing: 1.0,
 1897:             ),
 1898:           ),
 1899:           const SizedBox(height: 3),
 1900:           Text(
 1901:             subtitle,
 1902:             style: const TextStyle(
 1903:               color: GardenTheme.ink,
 1904:               fontSize: 18,
 1905:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1906:             ),
 1907:           ),
 1908:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
 1909:           if (!hasItems)
 1910:             Text(
 1911:               emptyText,
 1912:               style: const TextStyle(
 1913:                 color: GardenTheme.muted,
 1914:                 fontSize: 12,
 1915:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 1916:               ),
 1917:             )
 1918:           else ...[
 1919:             if (tray.isNotEmpty)
 1920:               _CalendarGroup(
 1921:                 label: 'Start in trays',
 1922:                 icon: Icons.inventory_2_outlined,
 1923:                 items: tray,
 1924:                 onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
 1925:               ),
 1926:             if (direct.isNotEmpty)
 1927:               _CalendarGroup(
 1928:                 label: 'Direct sow',
 1929:                 icon: Icons.grass_outlined,
 1930:                 items: direct,
 1931:                 onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
 1932:               ),
 1933:             if (either.isNotEmpty)
 1934:               _CalendarGroup(
 1935:                 label: 'Tray or direct',
 1936:                 icon: Icons.compare_arrows,
 1937:                 items: either,
 1938:                 onQuickSow: onQuickSow,
 1939:               ),
 1940:           ],
 1941:         ],
 1942:       ),
 1943:     );
 1944:   }
 1945: }

 2197: class _SeedlingCard extends StatelessWidget {
 2198:   const _SeedlingCard({
 2199:     required this.seedling,
 2200:     required this.bedName,
 2201:     required this.onWater,
 2202:     required this.onFeed,
 2203:     required this.onTransplant,
 2204:     required this.onEdit,
 2205:     required this.onDelete,
 2206:     this.highlighted = false,
 2207:   });
 2208: 
 2209:   final Seedling seedling;
 2210:   final String bedName;
 2211:   final VoidCallback onWater;
 2212:   final VoidCallback onFeed;
 2213:   final VoidCallback onTransplant;
 2214:   final VoidCallback onEdit;
 2215:   final VoidCallback onDelete;
 2216:   final bool highlighted;
 2217:   @override
 2218:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 2219:     final catalog = SeedCatalog.byKey(seedling.seedKey);
 2220:     final age = seedling.daysSinceSowing(DateTime.now());
 2221:     final germinationStart = seedling.sowDate.add(
 2222:       Duration(days: catalog.germinationMinDays),
 2223:     );
 2224:     final germinationEnd = seedling.sowDate.add(
 2225:       Duration(days: catalog.germinationMaxDays),
 2226:     );
 2227:     final transplantStart = seedling.sowDate.add(
 2228:       Duration(days: catalog.transplantMinDays),
 2229:     );
 2230:     final transplantEnd = seedling.sowDate.add(
 2231:       Duration(days: catalog.transplantMaxDays),
 2232:     );
 2233:     final stage = _stageText(seedling, catalog, age);
 2234:     final color = _stageColor(seedling, catalog, age);
 2235:     final progress = _progress(seedling, catalog, age);
 2236: 
 2237:     return Container(
 2238:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 2239:         color: highlighted ? const Color(0xFFFFF8E6) : GardenTheme.panel,
 2240:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
 2241:         border: Border.all(
 2242:           color: highlighted ? GardenTheme.warn : color.withValues(alpha: 0.34),
 2243:           width: highlighted ? 2 : 1,
 2244:         ),
 2245:       ),
 2246:       child: ClipRRect(
 2247:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
 2248:         child: Column(
 2249:           children: [
 2250:             Padding(
 2251:               padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(14, 14, 14, 10),
 2252:               child: Row(
 2253:                 crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 2254:                 children: [
 2255:                   Text(seedling.emoji, style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 32)),
 2256:                   const SizedBox(width: 10),
 2257:                   Expanded(
 2258:                     child: Column(
 2259:                       crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 2260:                       children: [
 2261:                         Text(
 2262:                           seedling.cropName,
 2263:                           maxLines: 1,
 2264:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 2265:                           style: const TextStyle(
 2266:                             color: GardenTheme.ink,
 2267:                             fontSize: 17,
 2268:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 2269:                           ),
 2270:                         ),
 2271:                         const SizedBox(height: 3),
 2272:                         Text(
 2273:                           seedling.variety.trim().isEmpty
 2274:                               ? seedling.category
 2275:                               : '${seedling.variety} - ${seedling.category}',
 2276:                           maxLines: 1,
 2277:                           overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 2278:                           style: const TextStyle(
 2279:                             color: GardenTheme.muted,
 2280:                             fontSize: 12,
 2281:                             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 2282:                           ),
 2283:                         ),
 2284:                       ],
 2285:                     ),
 2286:                   ),

 2288:                   _StageBadge(label: stage, color: color),
 2289:                 ],
 2290:               ),
 2291:             ),
 2292:             Padding(

 2294:               child: ClipRRect(
 2295:                 borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
 2296:                 child: LinearProgressIndicator(
 2297:                   value: progress,
 2298:                   minHeight: 7,
 2299:                   backgroundColor: GardenTheme.paper,
 2300:                 ),
 2301:               ),

 2305:             Expanded(
 2306:               child: Padding(
 2307:                 padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
 2308:                 child: Column(
 2309:                   children: [
 2310:                     Row(

 2314:                         ),

 2320:                           ),

 2327:                           ),
 2328:                         ),
 2329:                       ],

 2336:                     ),

 2338:                       icon: Icons.repeat,
 2339:                       label: 'Next sow',
 2340:                       value: _successionForSeedling(seedling),
 2341:                     ),
 2342:                     _SeedlingActivitySummary(
 2343:                       seedling: seedling,
 2344:                       catalog: catalog,
 2345:                       ageDays: age,
 2346:                     ),
 2347:                     const SizedBox(height: 8),
 2348:                     const Spacer(),
 2349:                     Row(
 2350:                       children: [
 2351:                         _MiniAction(
 2352:                           icon: Icons.water_drop_outlined,
 2353:                           label: 'Water',
 2354:                           onTap: onWater,
 2355:                         ),
 2356:                         const SizedBox(width: 7),
 2357:                         _MiniAction(
 2358:                           icon: Icons.compost_outlined,
 2359:                           label: 'Feed',
 2360:                           onTap: onFeed,
 2361:                         ),
 2362:                         const SizedBox(width: 7),
 2363:                         if (!seedling.isTransplanted)
 2364:                           _MiniAction(
 2365:                             icon: Icons.task_alt,
 2366:                             label: 'Transplant',
 2367:                             onTap: onTransplant,
 2368:                           ),
 2369:                         const Spacer(),
 2370:                         IconButton(
 2371:                           tooltip: 'Edit seedling',
 2372:                           onPressed: onEdit,
 2373:                           icon: const Icon(Icons.edit_outlined),
 2374:                           color: GardenTheme.ink,
 2375:                         ),
 2376:                         IconButton(
 2377:                           tooltip: 'Delete',
 2378:                           onPressed: onDelete,
 2379:                           icon: const Icon(Icons.delete_outline),
 2380:                           color: GardenTheme.bad,
 2381:                         ),
 2382:                       ],
 2383:                     ),
 2384:                   ],
 2385:                 ),
 2386:               ),
 2387:             ),
 2388:           ],
 2389:         ),
 2390:       ),
 2391:     );
 2392:   }
 2393: 
 2394:   static String _stageText(
 2395:     Seedling seedling,
 2396:     SeedCatalogItem catalog,
 2397:     int age,
 2398:   ) {
 2399:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return 'Transplanted';
 2400:     if (age > catalog.transplantMaxDays) return 'Overdue';
 2401:     if (age >= catalog.transplantMinDays) return 'Ready';
 2402:     if (age >= catalog.germinationMinDays) return 'Germinating';
 2403:     return 'Waiting';
 2404:   }
 2405: 
 2406:   static Color _stageColor(
 2407:     Seedling seedling,
 2408:     SeedCatalogItem catalog,
 2409:     int age,
 2410:   ) {
 2411:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return GardenTheme.good;
 2412:     if (age > catalog.transplantMaxDays) return GardenTheme.bad;
 2413:     if (age >= catalog.transplantMinDays) return GardenTheme.warn;
 2414:     if (age >= catalog.germinationMinDays) return GardenTheme.good;
 2415:     return GardenTheme.muted;
 2416:   }
 2417: 
 2418:   static double _progress(Seedling seedling, SeedCatalogItem catalog, int age) {
 2419:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return 1;
 2420: 
 2421:     final target = catalog.transplantMaxDays;
 2422:     if (target <= 0) return 0;
 2423: 
 2424:     return (age / target).clamp(0, 1).toDouble();
 2425:   }
 2426: }

 2444:         label.toUpperCase(),
 2445:         maxLines: 1,
 2446:         overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,

 2448:           color: color,

 2598: class _SeedlingActivitySummary extends StatelessWidget {
 2599:   const _SeedlingActivitySummary({
 2600:     required this.seedling,
 2601:     required this.catalog,
 2602:     required this.ageDays,
 2603:   });
 2604: 
 2605:   final Seedling seedling;
 2606:   final SeedCatalogItem catalog;
 2607:   final int ageDays;
 2608:   @override
 2609:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 2610:     final nextAction = _nextAction();
 2611:     final nextActionColor = _nextActionColor(nextAction);
 2612: 
 2613:     return Container(
 2614:       width: double.infinity,
 2615:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 4),
 2616:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(10),
 2617:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 2618:         color: GardenTheme.paper,
 2619:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 2620:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 2621:       ),
 2622:       child: Column(
 2623:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 2624:         children: [
 2625:           const Text(
 2626:             'ACTIVITY',
 2627:             maxLines: 1,
 2628:             overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 2629:             style: TextStyle(
 2630:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
 2631:               fontSize: 9,
 2632:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 2633:               letterSpacing: 0.8,
 2634:             ),
 2635:           ),
 2636:           const SizedBox(height: 8),
 2637:           Wrap(
 2638:             spacing: 7,
 2639:             runSpacing: 7,
 2640:             children: [
 2641:               _ActivityPill(
 2642:                 label: 'Sown',
 2643:                 value: _shortDate(seedling.sowDate),
 2644:                 icon: Icons.calendar_today_outlined,
 2645:                 color: GardenTheme.ink,
 2646:               ),
 2647:               _ActivityPill(
 2648:                 label: 'Watered',
 2649:                 value: _seedlingRelativeDate(seedling.lastWateredAt),
 2650:                 icon: Icons.water_drop_outlined,
 2651:                 color: _isWaterDue() ? GardenTheme.warn : GardenTheme.good,
 2652:               ),
 2653:               _ActivityPill(
 2654:                 label: 'Fed',
 2655:                 value: _seedlingRelativeDate(seedling.lastFedAt),
 2656:                 icon: Icons.compost_outlined,
 2657:                 color: _isFeedDue() ? GardenTheme.warn : GardenTheme.good,
 2658:               ),
 2659:               _ActivityPill(
 2660:                 label: 'Germination',
 2661:                 value:
 2662:                     '${catalog.germinationMinDays}-${catalog.germinationMaxDays} days',
 2663:                 icon: Icons.grass_outlined,
 2664:                 color: GardenTheme.ink,
 2665:               ),
 2666:               _ActivityPill(
 2667:                 label: 'Transplant',
 2668:                 value:
 2669:                     '${catalog.transplantMinDays}-${catalog.transplantMaxDays} days',
 2670:                 icon: Icons.yard_outlined,
 2671:                 color: GardenTheme.ink,
 2672:               ),
 2673:               _ActivityPill(
 2674:                 label: 'Next',
 2675:                 value: nextAction,
 2676:                 icon: Icons.bolt_outlined,
 2677:                 color: nextActionColor,
 2678:                 wide: true,
 2679:               ),
 2680:             ],
 2681:           ),
 2682:         ],
 2683:       ),
 2684:     );
 2685:   }
 2686: 
 2687:   bool _isWaterDue() {
 2688:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return false;
 2689: 
 2690:     final lastWateredAt = seedling.lastWateredAt;
 2691:     if (lastWateredAt == null) return true;
 2692: 
 2693:     return _seedlingDaysSince(lastWateredAt) >= 2;
 2694:   }
 2695: 
 2696:   bool _isFeedDue() {
 2697:     return _feedStatus() == 'Feed due';
 2698:   }
 2699: 
 2700:   String _feedStatus() {
 2701:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return 'No action';
 2702: 
 2703:     final startDay = _feedStartDay();
 2704:     final intervalDays = _feedIntervalDays();
 2705: 
 2706:     if (ageDays < startDay) return 'Do not feed yet';
 2707: 
 2708:     final lastFedAt = seedling.lastFedAt;
 2709: 
 2710:     if (lastFedAt == null) return 'Feed due';
 2711: 
 2712:     final daysSinceFeed = _seedlingDaysSince(lastFedAt);
 2713: 
 2714:     if (daysSinceFeed >= intervalDays) return 'Feed due';
 2715: 
 2716:     return 'Recently fed';
 2717:   }
 2718: 
 2719:   int _feedStartDay() {
 2720:     switch (seedling.category.trim().toLowerCase()) {
 2721:       case 'fruiting':
 2722:         return 21;
 2723:       case 'cucurbit':
 2724:         return 14;
 2725:       case 'brassica':
 2726:         return 14;
 2727:       case 'leafy':
 2728:         return 14;
 2729:       case 'herb':
 2730:         return 21;
 2731:       default:
 2732:         return 14;
 2733:     }
 2734:   }
 2735: 
 2736:   int _feedIntervalDays() {
 2737:     switch (seedling.category.trim().toLowerCase()) {
 2738:       case 'fruiting':
 2739:         return 7;
 2740:       case 'cucurbit':
 2741:         return 7;
 2742:       case 'brassica':
 2743:         return 10;
 2744:       case 'leafy':
 2745:         return 14;
 2746:       case 'herb':
 2747:         return 21;
 2748:       default:
 2749:         return 10;
 2750:     }
 2751:   }
 2752: 
 2753:   String _nextAction() {
 2754:     if (seedling.isTransplanted) return 'No action';
 2755: 
 2756:     if (ageDays >= catalog.transplantMinDays) {
 2757:       return 'Ready to transplant';
 2758:     }
 2759: 
 2760:     if (_isWaterDue()) return 'Water due';
 2761: 
 2762:     final feedStatus = _feedStatus();
 2763: 
 2764:     if (feedStatus != 'No action') {
 2765:       return feedStatus;
 2766:     }
 2767: 
 2768:     return 'No action';
 2769:   }
 2770: 
 2771:   Color _nextActionColor(String action) {
 2772:     switch (action) {
 2773:       case 'Ready to transplant':
 2774:       case 'Water due':
 2775:       case 'Feed due':
 2776:         return GardenTheme.warn;
 2777:       case 'Do not feed yet':
 2778:         return GardenTheme.muted;
 2779:       case 'Recently fed':
 2780:         return GardenTheme.good;
 2781:       default:
 2782:         return GardenTheme.good;
 2783:     }
 2784:   }
 2785: }
 2786: 
 2787: class _ActivityPill extends StatelessWidget {
 2788:   const _ActivityPill({
 2789:     required this.label,
 2790:     required this.value,
 2791:     required this.icon,
 2792:     required this.color,
 2793:     this.wide = false,
 2794:   });
 2795: 
 2796:   final String label;
 2797:   final String value;
 2798:   final IconData icon;
 2799:   final Color color;
 2800:   final bool wide;
 2801:   @override
 2802:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 2803:     return Container(
 2804:       width: wide ? 172 : 126,
 2805:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 8, vertical: 7),
 2806:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 2807:         color: Colors.white,
 2808:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
 2809:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 2810:       ),
 2811:       child: Row(
 2812:         children: [
 2813:           Icon(icon, color: color, size: 14),
 2814:           const SizedBox(width: 6),
 2815:           Expanded(
 2816:             child: Column(
 2817:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 2818:               children: [
 2819:                 Text(
 2820:                   label.toUpperCase(),
 2821:                   maxLines: 1,
 2822:                   overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 2823:                   style: const TextStyle(
 2824:                     color: GardenTheme.muted,
 2825:                     fontSize: 8,
 2826:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 2827:                     letterSpacing: 0.5,
 2828:                   ),
 2829:                 ),
 2830:                 const SizedBox(height: 2),
 2831:                 Text(
 2832:                   value,
 2833:                   maxLines: 1,
 2834:                   overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 2835:                   style: TextStyle(
 2836:                     color: color,
 2837:                     fontSize: 11,
 2838:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 2839:                   ),
 2840:                 ),
 2841:               ],
 2842:             ),
 2843:           ),
 2844:         ],
 2845:       ),
 2846:     );
 2847:   }
 2848: }
 2849: 
 2850: String _seedlingRelativeDate(DateTime? date) {
 2851:   if (date == null) return 'Never';
 2852: 
 2853:   final days = _seedlingDaysSince(date);
 2854: 
 2855:   if (days <= 0) return 'Today';
 2856:   if (days == 1) return 'Yesterday';
 2857: 
 2858:   return '$days days ago';
 2859: }
 2860: 
 2861: int _seedlingDaysSince(DateTime date) {
 2862:   final now = DateTime.now();
 2863:   final today = DateTime(now.year, now.month, now.day);
 2864:   final target = DateTime(date.year, date.month, date.day);
 2865: 
 2866:   return today.difference(target).inDays;
 2867: }

 2888:   late final TextEditingController locationController;

 2890:

 2894:

 2902:   @override

 2906:     trayCountController.dispose();

 2911: 
 2912:   @override
 2913:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 2914:     return Dialog(
 2915:       backgroundColor: GardenTheme.panel,
 2916:       shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
 2917:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
 2918:         side: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
 2919:       ),
 2920:       child: ConstrainedBox(
 2921:         constraints: BoxConstraints(
 2922:           maxWidth: 620,
 2923:           maxHeight: MediaQuery.of(context).size.height * 0.88,
 2924:         ),
 2925:         child: SingleChildScrollView(
 2926:           padding: const EdgeInsets.all(22),
 2927:           child: Form(
 2928:             key: formKey,
 2929:             child: Column(
 2930:               mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
 2931:               crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 2932:               children: [
 2933:                 const Text(
 2934:                   'Sow Seed',
 2935:                   style: TextStyle(

 2943:                 const Text(
 2944:                   'Add a seedling batch and track germination plus transplant timing.',
 2945:                   style: TextStyle(
 2946:                     color: GardenTheme.muted,

 2948:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
 2949:                   ),
 2950:                 ),
 2951:                 const SizedBox(height: 18),
 2952:                 DropdownButtonFormField<String>(
 2953:                   initialValue: selected.key,
 2954:                   isExpanded: true,
 2955:                   decoration: _inputDecoration('SEED TYPE'),
 2956:                   items: [
 2957:                     for (final item in SeedCatalog.items)
 2958:                       DropdownMenuItem(
 2959:                         value: item.key,
 2960:                         child: Text('${item.emoji} ${item.cropName}'),
 2961:                       ),
 2962:                   ],
 2963:                   onChanged: (value) {
 2964:                     final key = value ?? selected.key;
 2965:                     setState(() {
 2966:                       selected = SeedCatalog.byKey(key);
 2967:                     });
 2968:                   },
 2969:                 ),
 2970:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 2971:                 _TextField(
 2972:                   label: 'Variety',
 2973:                   controller: varietyController,
 2974:                   hintText: selected.varieties.isEmpty
 2975:                       ? 'Optional'
 2976:                       : selected.varieties.take(3).join(', '),
 2977:                 ),
 2978:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 2979:                 LayoutBuilder(
 2980:                   builder: (context, constraints) {
 2981:                     final stacked = constraints.maxWidth < 560;
 2982: 
 2983:                     if (stacked) {
 2984:                       return Column(
 2985:                         children: [
 2986:                           _DateButton(
 2987:                             label: 'Sow date',
 2988:                             value: _shortDate(sowDate),
 2989:                             onTap: _pickSowDate,
 2990:                           ),
