 2992:                           _TextField(
 2993:                             label: 'Tray type',
 2994:                             controller: trayTypeController,
 2995:                             validator: _required,
 2996:                           ),
 2997:                           const SizedBox(height: 12),
 2998:                           _TextField(
 2999:                             label: 'Count',
 3000:                             controller: trayCountController,
 3001:                             keyboardType: TextInputType.number,
 3002:                             validator: _positiveInt,
 3003:                           ),
 3004:                         ],
 3005:                       );
 3006:                     }
 3007: 
 3008:                     return Row(
 3009:                       children: [
 3010:                         Expanded(
 3011:                           child: _DateButton(
 3012:                             label: 'Sow date',
 3013:                             value: _shortDate(sowDate),
 3014:                             onTap: _pickSowDate,
 3015:                           ),
 3016:                         ),
 3017:                         const SizedBox(width: 12),
 3018:                         Expanded(
 3019:                           child: _TextField(
 3020:                             label: 'Tray type',
 3021:                             controller: trayTypeController,
 3022:                             validator: _required,
 3023:                           ),
 3024:                         ),
 3025:                         const SizedBox(width: 12),
 3026:                         Expanded(
 3027:                           child: _TextField(
 3028:                             label: 'Count',
 3029:                             controller: trayCountController,
 3030:                             keyboardType: TextInputType.number,
 3031:                             validator: _positiveInt,
 3032:                           ),
 3033:                         ),
 3034:                       ],
 3035:                     );
 3036:                   },
 3037:                 ),
 3038:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 3039:                 LayoutBuilder(
 3040:                   builder: (context, constraints) {
 3041:                     final stacked = constraints.maxWidth < 560;
 3042: 
 3043:                     final location = _TextField(
 3044:                       label: 'Location',
 3045:                       controller: locationController,
 3046:                       validator: _required,
 3047:                     );
 3048: 
 3049:                     final bed = DropdownButtonFormField<String?>(
 3050:                       initialValue: selectedBedId,
 3051:                       isExpanded: true,
 3052:                       decoration: _inputDecoration('ASSIGNED BED'),
 3053:                       items: [
 3054:                         const DropdownMenuItem<String?>(
 3055:                           value: null,
 3056:                           child: Text('No bed assigned'),
 3057:                         ),
 3058:                         for (final bed in widget.beds)
 3059:                           DropdownMenuItem<String?>(
 3060:                             value: bed.id,
 3061:                             child: Text(
 3062:                               bed.name.trim().isEmpty
 3063:                                   ? 'Bed ${bed.number}'
 3064:                                   : bed.name.trim(),
 3065:                               overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 3066:                             ),
 3067:                           ),
 3068:                       ],
 3069:                       onChanged: (value) {
 3070:                         setState(() {
 3071:                           selectedBedId = value;
 3072:                         });
 3073:                       },
 3074:                     );
 3075: 
 3076:                     if (stacked) {
 3077:                       return Column(
 3078:                         children: [location, const SizedBox(height: 12), bed],
 3079:                       );
 3080:                     }
 3081: 
 3082:                     return Row(
 3083:                       children: [
 3084:                         Expanded(child: location),
 3085:                         const SizedBox(width: 12),
 3086:                         Expanded(child: bed),
 3087:                       ],
 3088:                     );
 3089:                   },
 3090:                 ),
 3091:                 const SizedBox(height: 12),
 3092:                 _TextField(
 3093:                   label: 'Notes',
 3094:                   controller: notesController,
 3095:                   maxLines: 3,
 3096:                 ),
 3097:                 const SizedBox(height: 14),
 3098:                 Container(
 3099:                   width: double.infinity,
 3100:                   padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
 3101:                   decoration: BoxDecoration(
 3102:                     color: GardenTheme.paper,
 3103:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 3104:                     border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
 3105:                   ),
 3106:                   child: Text(
 3107:                     '${selected.tip} Germination: ${selected.germinationMinDays}-${selected.germinationMaxDays} days. Transplant: ${selected.transplantMinDays}-${selected.transplantMaxDays} days.',
 3108:                     style: const TextStyle(
 3109:                       color: GardenTheme.muted,
 3110:                       fontSize: 12,
 3111:                       height: 1.35,
 3112:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 3113:                     ),
 3114:                   ),
 3115:                 ),
 3116:                 const SizedBox(height: 22),
 3117:                 Wrap(
 3118:                   spacing: 10,
 3119:                   runSpacing: 10,
 3120:                   alignment: WrapAlignment.end,
 3121:                   children: [
 3122:                     TextButton(
 3123:                       onPressed: () {
 3124:                         Navigator.of(context).pop();
 3125:                       },
 3126:                       child: const Text('Cancel'),
 3127:                     ),
 3128:                     FilledButton(
 3129:                       onPressed: _submit,
 3130:                       child: const Text('Sow seed'),
 3131:                     ),
 3132:                   ],
 3133:                 ),
 3134:               ],
 3135:             ),
 3136:           ),
 3137:         ),
 3138:       ),
 3139:     );
 3140:   }
 3141: 
 3142:   Future<void> _pickSowDate() async {
 3143:     final result = await showDatePicker(
 3144:       context: context,
 3145:       initialDate: sowDate,
 3146:       firstDate: DateTime.now().subtract(const Duration(days: 365)),
 3147:       lastDate: DateTime.now().add(const Duration(days: 30)),
 3148:     );
 3149: 
 3150:     if (result == null) return;
 3151: 
 3152:     setState(() {
 3153:       sowDate = result;
 3154:     });
 3155:   }
 3156: 
 3157:   void _submit() {
 3158:     if (!formKey.currentState!.validate()) return;
 3159: 
 3160:     final id = 'seedling-${DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch}';
 3161: 
 3162:     Navigator.of(context).pop(
 3163:       Seedling(
 3164:         id: id,
 3165:         seedKey: selected.key,
 3166:         cropName: selected.cropName,
 3167:         emoji: selected.emoji,
 3168:         category: selected.category,
 3169:         variety: varietyController.text.trim(),
 3170:         sowDate: sowDate,
 3171:         trayType: trayTypeController.text.trim(),
 3172:         trayCount: int.tryParse(trayCountController.text.trim()) ?? 1,
 3173:         location: locationController.text.trim(),
 3174:         notes: notesController.text.trim(),
 3175:         bedId: selectedBedId,
 3176:       ),
 3177:     );
 3178:   }
 3179: 
 3180:   String? _required(String? value) {
 3181:     if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty) {
 3182:       return 'Required';
 3183:     }
 3184:     return null;
 3185:   }
 3186: 
 3187:   String? _positiveInt(String? value) {
 3188:     final parsed = int.tryParse(value ?? '');
 3189:     if (parsed == null) return 'Enter a number';
 3190:     if (parsed < 1) return 'Minimum 1';
 3191:     return null;
 3192:   }
 3193: }
 3194: 
 3195: class _TextField extends StatelessWidget {
 3196:   const _TextField({
 3197:     required this.label,
 3198:     required this.controller,
 3199:     this.hintText,
 3200:     this.keyboardType,
 3201:     this.validator,
 3202:     this.maxLines = 1,
 3203:   });
 3204: 
 3205:   final String label;
 3206:   final TextEditingController controller;
 3207:   final String? hintText;
 3208:   final TextInputType? keyboardType;
 3209:   final String? Function(String?)? validator;
 3210:   final int maxLines;
 3211:   @override
 3212:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 3213:     return TextFormField(
 3214:       controller: controller,
 3215:       keyboardType: keyboardType,
 3216:       validator: validator,
 3217:       maxLines: maxLines,
 3218:       style: const TextStyle(
 3219:         color: GardenTheme.ink,
 3220:         fontSize: 14,
 3221:         fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 3222:       ),
 3223:       decoration: _inputDecoration(label, hintText: hintText),
 3224:     );
 3225:   }
 3226: }
 3227: 
 3228: class _DateButton extends StatelessWidget {
 3229:   const _DateButton({
 3230:     required this.label,
 3231:     required this.value,
 3232:     required this.onTap,
 3233:   });
 3234: 
 3235:   final String label;
 3236:   final String value;
 3237:   final VoidCallback onTap;
 3238:   @override
 3239:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 3240:     return InkWell(
 3241:       onTap: onTap,
 3242:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 3243:       child: InputDecorator(
 3244:         decoration: _inputDecoration(label),
 3245:         child: Text(
 3246:           value,
 3247:           style: const TextStyle(
 3248:             color: GardenTheme.ink,
 3249:             fontSize: 14,
 3250:             fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
 3251:           ),
 3252:         ),
 3253:       ),
 3254:     );
 3255:   }
 3256: }
 3257: 
 3258: InputDecoration _inputDecoration(String label, {String? hintText}) {
 3259:   return InputDecoration(
 3260:     labelText: label.toUpperCase(),
 3261:     hintText: hintText,
 3262:     labelStyle: const TextStyle(
 3263:       color: GardenTheme.muted,
 3264:       fontSize: 11,
 3265:       fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 3266:       letterSpacing: 0.8,
 3267:     ),
 3268:     filled: true,
 3269:     fillColor: GardenTheme.paper,
 3270:     contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 12),
 3271:     enabledBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 3272:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 3273:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.border),
 3274:     ),
 3275:     focusedBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 3276:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 3277:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.ink, width: 1.4),
 3278:     ),
 3279:     errorBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 3280:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 3281:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.bad),
 3282:     ),
 3283:     focusedErrorBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
 3284:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
 3285:       borderSide: const BorderSide(color: GardenTheme.bad, width: 1.4),
 3286:     ),
 3287:   );
 3288: }
 3289: 
 3290: String _shortDate(DateTime date) {
 3291:   return '${date.day.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}/${date.month.toString().padLeft(2, '0')}';
 3292: }

 3578:   Future<void> _pickSowDate() async {

 3580:       context: context,

 3593:   void _submit() {
 3594:     if (!formKey.currentState!.validate()) return;
 3595: 
 3596:     Navigator.of(context).pop(
 3597:       Seedling(
 3598:         id: widget.seedling.id,
 3599:         seedKey: selected.key,
 3600:         cropName: selected.cropName,
 3601:         emoji: selected.emoji,
 3602:         category: selected.category,
 3603:         variety: varietyController.text.trim(),
 3604:         sowDate: sowDate,
 3605:         trayType: trayTypeController.text.trim(),
 3606:         trayCount: int.tryParse(trayCountController.text.trim()) ?? 1,
 3607:         location: locationController.text.trim(),
 3608:         notes: notesController.text.trim(),
 3609:         bedId: selectedBedId,
 3610:         lastWateredAt: widget.seedling.lastWateredAt,
 3611:         lastFedAt: widget.seedling.lastFedAt,
 3612:         transplantedAt: widget.seedling.transplantedAt,
 3613:       ),
 3614:     );
 3615:   }

 3617:   String? _required(String? value) {
 3618:     if (value == null || value.trim().isEmpty) {
 3619:       return 'Required';
 3620:     }
 3621: 
 3622:     return null;
 3623:   }
 3624: 
 3625:   String? _positiveInt(String? value) {
 3626:     final parsed = int.tryParse(value ?? '');
 3627: 
 3628:     if (parsed == null) return 'Enter a number';
 3629:     if (parsed < 1) return 'Minimum 1';
 3630: 
 3631:     return null;
 3632:   }
 3633: }

 3979: 
 3980:   Bed? _selectedBed() {
 3981:     final id = selectedBedId;
 3982:     if (id == null || id.isEmpty) return null;
 3983: 
 3984:     for (final bed in widget.beds) {
 3985:       if (bed.id == id) return bed;
 3986:     }
 3987: 
 3988:     return null;
 3989:   }
 3990: 
 3991:   void _submit() {
 3992:     final id = selectedBedId;
 3993:     if (id == null || id.trim().isEmpty) return;
 3994: 
 3995:     Navigator.of(context).pop(
 3996:       TransplantSeedlingResult(bedId: id, addCropBlockToMap: addCropBlockToMap),
 3997:     );
 3998:   }
 3999: }

 4046: class _TransplantBedChoice extends StatelessWidget {

 4051:   });
 4052:

   48:         ],
   49:       ),
   50:       clipBehavior: Clip.antiAlias,
   51:       child: Column(
   52:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
   53:         children: [
   54:           _PanelHeader(
   55:             isLowWaterDemand: isLowWaterDemand,
   56:             buildMarker: SoilWaterDemandPanel.buildMarker,
   57:           ),
   58:           const Divider(height: 1, color: Color(0xFFD8D0C0)),
   59:           LayoutBuilder(
   60:             builder: (context, constraints) {
   61:               final wide = constraints.maxWidth >= 760;
   62: 
   63:               if (wide) {
   64:                 return IntrinsicHeight(
   65:                   child: Row(
   66:                     crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.stretch,
   67:                     children: [
   68:                       Expanded(child: _buildSoilSide()),
   69:                       const VerticalDivider(
   70:                         width: 1,
   71:                         thickness: 1,
   72:                         color: Color(0xFFD8D0C0),
   73:                       ),
   74:                       const Expanded(child: _WaterSide()),
   75:                     ],
   76:                   ),
   77:                 );
   78:               }
   79: 
   80:               return Column(
   81:                 children: [
   82:                   _buildSoilSide(),
   83:                   const Divider(height: 1, color: Color(0xFFD8D0C0)),
   84:                   const _WaterSide(),
   85:                 ],
   86:               );
   87:             },
   88:           ),
   89:         ],
   90:       ),
   91:     );
   92:   }

  297:                             onAdd: widget.onQuickSowSeedKey == null
  298:                                 ? null
  299:                                 : () => widget.onQuickSowSeedKey!(cropKey),
  300:                             onExplain: () {
  301:                               setState(() {
  302:                                 detailCropKey = detailCropKey == cropKey
  303:                                     ? null
  304:                                     : cropKey;
  305:                               });
  306:                             },
  307:                             detailOpen: detailCropKey == cropKey,
  308:                           ),
  309:                       ],
  310:                     ),
  311:                     if (detailCropKey != null &&
  312:                         group.cropKeys.contains(detailCropKey))
  313:                       Padding(
  314:                         padding: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 10),
  315:                         child: _RecommendationDetailCard(
  316:                           crop: SeedCatalog.byKey(detailCropKey!),
  317:                           onClose: () {
  318:                             setState(() {
  319:                               detailCropKey = null;
  320:                             });
  321:                           },
  322:                           onAddVariety: widget.onQuickSowSeedKey == null
  323:                               ? null
  324:                               : (variety) => widget.onQuickSowSeedKey!(
  325:                                   '${detailCropKey!}::$variety',
  326:                                 ),
  327:                           onAdd: widget.onQuickSowSeedKey == null
  328:                               ? null
  329:                               : () => widget.onQuickSowSeedKey!(detailCropKey!),
  330:                         ),
  331:                       ),
  332:                   ],
  333:                 ),
  334:               ),
  335:           ],
  336:         ],
  337:       ),
  338:     );
  339:   }
  340: 
  341:   Widget _groupTile(_QuickSowGroup group) {
  342:     final isExpanded = expandedGroup == group.keyName;
  343: 
  344:     final background = group.ready
  345:         ? const Color(0xFFE6F5EC)
  346:         : const Color(0xFFFDECEF);
  347:     final border = group.ready
  348:         ? const Color(0xFFB8DDC8)
  349:         : const Color(0xFFF4B8C8);
  350:     final foreground = group.ready
  351:         ? const Color(0xFF227A47)
  352:         : const Color(0xFFA6261A);
  353: 
  354:     return Container(
  355:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 7),
  356:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 9),
  357:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  358:         color: background,
  359:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(10),
  360:         border: Border.all(color: border),
  361:       ),
  362:       child: Row(
  363:         children: [
  364:           Icon(
  365:             group.ready ? Icons.check_circle : Icons.close,
  366:             color: foreground,
  367:             size: 17,
  368:           ),
  369:           const SizedBox(width: 9),
  370:           Expanded(
  371:             flex: 5,
  372:             child: Text(
  373:               group.label,
  374:               maxLines: 1,
  375:               overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  376:               style: TextStyle(
  377:                 color: foreground,
  378:                 fontSize: 14,
  379:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  380:               ),
  381:             ),
  382:           ),
  383:           const SizedBox(width: 8),
  384:           Expanded(
  385:             flex: 6,
  386:             child: Text(
  387:               group.detail,
  388:               maxLines: 1,
  389:               overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  390:               textAlign: TextAlign.right,
  391:               style: TextStyle(
  392:                 color: foreground,
  393:                 fontSize: 12,
  394:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  395:               ),
  396:             ),
  397:           ),
  398:           if (group.ready && widget.onQuickSowSeedKey != null) ...[
  399:             const SizedBox(width: 10),
  400:             FilledButton.icon(
  401:               onPressed: () {
  402:                 setState(() {
  403:                   expandedGroup = isExpanded ? null : group.keyName;
  404:                   detailCropKey = null;
  405:                 });
  406:               },
  407:               icon: Icon(isExpanded ? Icons.expand_less : Icons.add, size: 15),
  408:               label: Text(isExpanded ? 'Hide' : 'Choose'),
  409:               style: FilledButton.styleFrom(
  410:                 backgroundColor: const Color(0xFF1B1A17),
  411:                 foregroundColor: const Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
  412:                 minimumSize: const Size(92, 32),
  413:                 padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10),
  414:                 textStyle: const TextStyle(
  415:                   fontSize: 12,
  416:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  417:                 ),
  418:                 shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
  419:                   borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  420:                 ),
  421:               ),
  422:             ),
  423:           ],
  424:         ],
  425:       ),
  426:     );
  427:   }
  428: }
  429: 
  430: class _QuickSowGroup {
  431:   const _QuickSowGroup({
  432:     required this.keyName,
  433:     required this.label,
  434:     required this.detail,
  435:     required this.ready,
  436:     required this.cropKeys,
  437:   });
  438: 
  439:   factory _QuickSowGroup.ready({
  440:     required String keyName,
  441:     required String label,
  442:     required int thresholdC,
  443:     required List<String> cropKeys,
  444:   }) {
  445:     return _QuickSowGroup(
  446:       keyName: keyName,
  447:       label: label,
  448:       detail: 'Ready - soil 8.4\u00B0C >= $thresholdC\u00B0C',
  449:       ready: true,
  450:       cropKeys: cropKeys,
  451:     );
  452:   }
  453: 
  454:   factory _QuickSowGroup.tooCold({
  455:     required String keyName,
  456:     required String label,
  457:     required double neededMoreC,
  458:     required List<String> cropKeys,
  459:   }) {
  460:     return _QuickSowGroup(
  461:       keyName: keyName,
  462:       label: label,
  463:       detail: 'Too cold - need ${neededMoreC.toStringAsFixed(1)}\u00B0C more',
  464:       ready: false,
  465:       cropKeys: cropKeys,
  466:     );
  467:   }
  468: 
  469:   final String keyName;
  470:   final String label;
  471:   final String detail;
  472:   final bool ready;
  473:   final List<String> cropKeys;
  474: }
  475: 
  476: enum _SeasonFit { good, tight, wait, tooLate }
  477: 
  478: class _BlenheimSeasonRule {
  479:   const _BlenheimSeasonRule({
  480:     required this.label,
  481:     required this.sowStartMonth,
  482:     required this.sowStartDay,
  483:     required this.sowEndMonth,
  484:     required this.sowEndDay,
  485:     required this.harvestStartMonth,
  486:     required this.harvestStartDay,
  487:     required this.harvestEndMonth,
  488:     required this.harvestEndDay,
  489:     required this.note,
  490:     this.allowOverwinter = false,
  491:   });
  492: 
  493:   final String label;
  494:   final int sowStartMonth;
  495:   final int sowStartDay;
  496:   final int sowEndMonth;
  497:   final int sowEndDay;
  498:   final int harvestStartMonth;
  499:   final int harvestStartDay;
  500:   final int harvestEndMonth;
  501:   final int harvestEndDay;
  502:   final String note;
  503:   final bool allowOverwinter;
  504: 
  505:   DateTime sowStartFor(DateTime today) {
  506:     return _dateNearToday(
  507:       today,
  508:       sowStartMonth,
  509:       sowStartDay,
  510:       sowEndMonth,
  511:       sowEndDay,
  512:     ).start;
  513:   }
  514: 
  515:   DateTime sowEndFor(DateTime today) {
  516:     return _dateNearToday(
  517:       today,
  518:       sowStartMonth,
  519:       sowStartDay,
  520:       sowEndMonth,
  521:       sowEndDay,
  522:     ).end;
  523:   }
  524: 
  525:   DateTime harvestStartAfter(DateTime sowDate) {
  526:     var start = DateTime(sowDate.year, harvestStartMonth, harvestStartDay);
  527:     var end = DateTime(sowDate.year, harvestEndMonth, harvestEndDay);
  528: 
  529:     if (end.isBefore(start)) {
  530:       end = DateTime(end.year + 1, end.month, end.day);
  531:     }
  532: 
  533:     while (end.isBefore(sowDate)) {
  534:       start = DateTime(start.year + 1, start.month, start.day);
  535:       end = DateTime(end.year + 1, end.month, end.day);
  536:     }
  537: 
  538:     return start;
  539:   }
  540: 
  541:   DateTime harvestEndAfter(DateTime sowDate) {
  542:     var start = DateTime(sowDate.year, harvestStartMonth, harvestStartDay);
  543:     var end = DateTime(sowDate.year, harvestEndMonth, harvestEndDay);
  544: 
  545:     if (end.isBefore(start)) {
  546:       end = DateTime(end.year + 1, end.month, end.day);
  547:     }
  548: 
  549:     while (end.isBefore(sowDate)) {
  550:       start = DateTime(start.year + 1, start.month, start.day);
  551:       end = DateTime(end.year + 1, end.month, end.day);
  552:     }
  553: 
  554:     return end;
  555:   }
  556: 
  557:   static _Window _dateNearToday(
  558:     DateTime today,
  559:     int startMonth,
  560:     int startDay,
  561:     int endMonth,
  562:     int endDay,
  563:   ) {
  564:     var start = DateTime(today.year, startMonth, startDay);
  565:     var end = DateTime(today.year, endMonth, endDay);
  566: 
  567:     if (end.isBefore(start)) {
  568:       end = DateTime(end.year + 1, end.month, end.day);
  569:     }
  570: 
  571:     if (today.isAfter(end)) {
  572:       start = DateTime(start.year + 1, start.month, start.day);
  573:       end = DateTime(end.year + 1, end.month, end.day);
  574:     }
  575: 
  576:     return _Window(start: start, end: end);
  577:   }
  578: }
  579: 
  580: class _Window {
  581:   const _Window({required this.start, required this.end});
  582: 
  583:   final DateTime start;
  584:   final DateTime end;
  585: }
  586: 
  587: class _CropChoiceChip extends StatelessWidget {
  588:   const _CropChoiceChip({
  589:     required this.crop,
  590:     required this.onAdd,
  591:     required this.onExplain,
  592:     required this.detailOpen,
  593:   });
  594: 
  595:   final SeedCatalogItem crop;
  596:   final VoidCallback? onAdd;
  597:   final VoidCallback onExplain;
  598:   final bool detailOpen;
  599: 
  600:   @override
  601:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  602:     final fit = RecommendationModel.seasonFit(crop);
  603:     final fitColor = RecommendationModel.seasonFitColor(fit);
  604:     final fitLabel = RecommendationModel.seasonFitLabel(fit);
  605:     final method = RecommendationModel.plantingActionFor(crop);
  606:     final rule = RecommendationModel.ruleFor(crop);
  607:     final daysNeeded = RecommendationModel.daysNeeded(crop);
  608:     final harvestText = RecommendationModel.harvestText(crop);
  609:     final enabled =
  610:         onAdd != null && fit != _SeasonFit.wait && fit != _SeasonFit.tooLate;
  611: 
  612:     return Material(
  613:       color: RecommendationModel.seasonFitBackground(fit),
  614:       borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
  615:       child: InkWell(
  616:         onTap: onExplain,
  617:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
  618:         child: Opacity(
  619:           opacity: enabled ? 1 : 0.72,
  620:           child: Container(
  621:             constraints: const BoxConstraints(minWidth: 210, maxWidth: 278),
  622:             padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(10, 9, 8, 9),
  623:             decoration: BoxDecoration(
  624:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
  625:               border: Border.all(
  626:                 color: detailOpen ? fitColor : fitColor.withValues(alpha: 0.38),
  627:                 width: detailOpen ? 2 : 1,
  628:               ),
  629:             ),
  630:             child: Row(
  631:               mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  632:               children: [
  633:                 _CropIconBadge(crop: crop, color: fitColor),
  634:                 const SizedBox(width: 9),
  635:                 Expanded(
  636:                   child: Column(
  637:                     crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  638:                     children: [
  639:                       Text(
  640:                         crop.cropName,
  641:                         maxLines: 1,
  642:                         overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  643:                         style: const TextStyle(
  644:                           color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
  645:                           fontSize: 13,
  646:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  647:                         ),
  648:                       ),
  649:                       const SizedBox(height: 2),
  650:                       Text(
  651:                         '$method - $fitLabel',
  652:                         maxLines: 1,
  653:                         overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  654:                         style: TextStyle(
  655:                           color: fitColor,
  656:                           fontSize: 10,
  657:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  658:                         ),
  659:                       ),
  660:                       const SizedBox(height: 2),
  661:                       Text(
  662:                         '${rule.label} - ${daysNeeded}d - $harvestText',
  663:                         maxLines: 1,
  664:                         overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  665:                         style: const TextStyle(
  666:                           color: Color(0xFF757068),
  667:                           fontSize: 10,
  668:                           fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  669:                         ),
  670:                       ),
  671:                     ],
  672:                   ),
  673:                 ),
  674:                 const SizedBox(width: 4),
  675:                 Column(
  676:                   mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  677:                   children: [
  678:                     IconButton(
  679:                       tooltip: 'Why this recommendation?',
  680:                       onPressed: onExplain,
  681:                       icon: Icon(detailOpen ? Icons.info : Icons.info_outline),
  682:                       color: fitColor,
  683:                       iconSize: 18,
  684:                       visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
  685:                       padding: EdgeInsets.zero,
  686:                       constraints: const BoxConstraints(
  687:                         minWidth: 28,
  688:                         minHeight: 28,
  689:                       ),
  690:                     ),
  691:                     IconButton(
  692:                       tooltip: enabled ? 'Add crop' : 'Not recommended now',
  693:                       onPressed: enabled ? onAdd : null,
  694:                       icon: Icon(enabled ? Icons.add_circle : Icons.block),
  695:                       color: enabled ? fitColor : const Color(0xFF9D968E),
  696:                       iconSize: 18,
  697:                       visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
  698:                       padding: EdgeInsets.zero,
  699:                       constraints: const BoxConstraints(
  700:                         minWidth: 28,
  701:                         minHeight: 28,
  702:                       ),
  703:                     ),
  704:                   ],
  705:                 ),
  706:               ],
  707:             ),
  708:           ),
  709:         ),
  710:       ),
  711:     );
  712:   }
  713: }
  714: 
  715: class _PlantingInstructions {
  716:   const _PlantingInstructions({
  717:     required this.depth,
  718:     required this.spacing,
  719:     required this.rows,
  720:     required this.note,
  721:   });
  722: 
  723:   final String depth;
  724:   final String spacing;
  725:   final String rows;
  726:   final String note;
  727: }
  728: 
  729: class _PlantingInstructionBlock extends StatelessWidget {
  730:   const _PlantingInstructionBlock({required this.instructions});
  731: 
  732:   final _PlantingInstructions instructions;
  733: 
  734:   @override
  735:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  736:     return Container(
  737:       width: double.infinity,
  738:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 4, bottom: 12),
  739:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
  740:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  741:         color: const Color(0xFFFFFBF5),
  742:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  743:         border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFE8D8BE)),
  744:       ),
  745:       child: Column(
  746:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  747:         children: [
  748:           const Row(
  749:             children: [
  750:               Icon(
  751:                 Icons.straighten_outlined,
  752:                 color: Color(0xFFA86412),
  753:                 size: 16,
  754:               ),
  755:               SizedBox(width: 7),
  756:               Text(
  757:                 'Planting instructions',
  758:                 style: TextStyle(
  759:                   color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
  760:                   fontSize: 13,
  761:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  762:                 ),
  763:               ),
  764:             ],
  765:           ),
  766:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  767:           Wrap(
  768:             spacing: 8,
  769:             runSpacing: 8,
  770:             children: [
  771:               _InstructionTile(

  775:               ),

  779:                 icon: Icons.open_in_full,
  780:               ),
  781:               _InstructionTile(
  782:                 label: 'Rows',
  783:                 value: instructions.rows,
  784:                 icon: Icons.table_rows_outlined,
  785:               ),
  786:             ],
  787:           ),

  789:           Row(
  790:             crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  791:             children: [

  872: class _VarietyChoiceBlock extends StatelessWidget {
  873:   const _VarietyChoiceBlock({required this.crop, required this.onAddVariety});
  874: 
  875:   final SeedCatalogItem crop;
  876:   final ValueChanged<String>? onAddVariety;
  877: 
  878:   @override
  879:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  880:     final varieties = crop.varieties;
  881: 
  882:     if (varieties.isEmpty) {
  883:       return const SizedBox.shrink();
  884:     }
  885: 
  886:     return Container(
  887:       width: double.infinity,
  888:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 4, bottom: 12),
  889:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
  890:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  891:         color: const Color(0xFFF2F0FF),
  892:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  893:         border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFCFC8F3)),
  894:       ),
  895:       child: Column(
  896:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
  897:         children: [
  898:           const Row(
  899:             children: [
  900:               Icon(
  901:                 Icons.local_florist_outlined,
  902:                 color: Color(0xFF5F53C7),
  903:                 size: 16,
  904:               ),
  905:               SizedBox(width: 7),
  906:               Text(
  907:                 'Varieties',
  908:                 style: TextStyle(
  909:                   color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
  910:                   fontSize: 13,
  911:                   fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  912:                 ),
  913:               ),
  914:             ],
  915:           ),
  916:           const SizedBox(height: 9),
  917:           Wrap(
  918:             spacing: 8,
  919:             runSpacing: 8,
  920:             children: [
  921:               for (final variety in varieties)
  922:                 ActionChip(
  923:                   onPressed: onAddVariety == null
  924:                       ? null
  925:                       : () => onAddVariety!(variety),
  926:                   avatar: Text(
  927:                     crop.emoji,
  928:                     style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 15),
  929:                   ),
  930:                   backgroundColor: Colors.white,
  931:                   side: const BorderSide(color: Color(0xFFCFC8F3)),
  932:                   shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
  933:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  934:                   ),
  935:                   label: Text(
  936:                     variety,
  937:                     style: const TextStyle(
  938:                       color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
  939:                       fontSize: 12,
  940:                       fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  941:                     ),
  942:                   ),
  943:                 ),
  944:             ],
  945:           ),
  946:           const SizedBox(height: 8),
  947:           const Text(
  948:             'Tap a variety to add it directly to the Seedling Tracker.',
  949:             style: TextStyle(
  950:               color: Color(0xFF757068),
  951:               fontSize: 11,
  952:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  953:             ),
  954:           ),
  955:         ],
  956:       ),
  957:     );
  958:   }
  959: }
  960: 
  961: class _EnvironmentalRiskBlock extends StatelessWidget {
  962:   const _EnvironmentalRiskBlock({required this.crop});
  963: 
  964:   final SeedCatalogItem crop;
  965: 
  966:   @override
  967:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  968:     final transplantRisk = _transplantRiskFor(crop);
  969:     final diseaseRisk = _diseaseRiskFor(crop);
  970: 
  971:     return Container(
  972:       width: double.infinity,
  973:       margin: const EdgeInsets.only(top: 4, bottom: 12),
  974:       child: Column(
  975:         children: [
  976:           _RiskCard(
  977:             icon: Icons.move_down_outlined,
  978:             title: 'Transplant risk',
  979:             level: transplantRisk.level,
  980:             color: transplantRisk.color,
  981:             why: transplantRisk.why,
  982:             advice: transplantRisk.advice,
  983:             watchTitle: null,
  984:             watchItems: const [],
  985:           ),
  986:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
  987:           _RiskCard(
  988:             icon: Icons.biotech_outlined,
  989:             title: 'Disease risk',
  990:             level: diseaseRisk.level,
  991:             color: diseaseRisk.color,
  992:             why: diseaseRisk.why,
  993:             advice: diseaseRisk.advice,
  994:             watchTitle: 'Watch for',
  995:             watchItems: diseaseRisk.watchItems,
  996:           ),
  997:         ],
  998:       ),
  999:     );
 1000:   }
 1001: 
 1002:   static _TransplantRiskData _transplantRiskFor(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1003:     final cropText = '${crop.key} ${crop.cropName} ${crop.category}'
 1004:         .toLowerCase();
 1005: 
 1006:     final isTender =
 1007:         cropText.contains('tomato') ||
 1008:         cropText.contains('capsicum') ||
 1009:         cropText.contains('chilli') ||
 1010:         cropText.contains('eggplant') ||
 1011:         cropText.contains('cucumber') ||
 1012:         cropText.contains('zucchini') ||
 1013:         cropText.contains('pumpkin') ||
 1014:         cropText.contains('melon') ||
 1015:         cropText.contains('beans');
 1016: 
 1017:     if (isTender) {
 1018:       return const _TransplantRiskData(
 1019:         level: 'High',
 1020:         color: Color(0xFFA6261A),
 1021:         why: [
 1022:           'overnight low is near the frost-sensitive range',
 1023:           'tender warm-season seedlings are vulnerable to cold stress',
 1024:           'weather is marginal for transplanting',
 1025:         ],
 1026:         advice: 'Wait for warmer nights before transplanting.',
 1027:         watchItems: [],
 1028:       );
 1029:     }
 1030: 
 1031:     return const _TransplantRiskData(
 1032:       level: 'Medium',
 1033:       color: Color(0xFFA86412),
 1034:       why: [
 1035:         'overnight low is near frost range',
 1036:         'seedling may be ready but weather is marginal',
 1037:         'wind exposure can increase transplant stress',
 1038:       ],
 1039:       advice:
 1040:           'Transplant tomorrow morning if conditions are calmer; water in gently.',
 1041:       watchItems: [],
 1042:     );
 1043:   }
 1044: 
 1045:   static _DiseaseRiskData _diseaseRiskFor(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1046:     final cropText = '${crop.key} ${crop.cropName} ${crop.category}'
 1047:         .toLowerCase();
 1048: 
 1049:     final dampingOffCrops =
 1050:         cropText.contains('leaf') ||
 1051:         cropText.contains('lettuce') ||
 1052:         cropText.contains('spinach') ||
 1053:         cropText.contains('brassica') ||
 1054:         cropText.contains('broccoli') ||
 1055:         cropText.contains('cabbage') ||
 1056:         cropText.contains('cauliflower') ||
 1057:         cropText.contains('tray');
 1058: 
 1059:     if (SoilWaterDemandPanel.humidity >= 80 || dampingOffCrops) {
 1060:       return const _DiseaseRiskData(
 1061:         level: 'High humidity period',
 1062:         color: Color(0xFFA86412),
 1063:         why: [
 1064:           'humidity is high enough to favour fungal pressure',
 1065:           'dense seedlings and still air increase damping-off risk',
 1066:         ],
 1067:         watchItems: ['mildew', 'damping off', 'fungal leaf spots'],
 1068:         advice: 'Avoid overhead watering. Increase spacing. Vent trays.',
 1069:       );
 1070:     }
 1071: 
 1072:     return const _DiseaseRiskData(
 1073:       level: 'Low',
 1074:       color: Color(0xFF227A47),
 1075:       why: ['current humidity is not in the highest risk band'],
 1076:       watchItems: ['early leaf spots', 'poor airflow'],
 1077:       advice: 'Water at soil level and keep seedlings spaced.',
 1078:     );
 1079:   }
 1080: }
 1081: 
 1082: class _TransplantRiskData {
 1083:   const _TransplantRiskData({
 1084:     required this.level,
 1085:     required this.color,
 1086:     required this.why,
 1087:     required this.advice,
 1088:     required this.watchItems,
 1089:   });
 1090: 
 1091:   final String level;
 1092:   final Color color;
 1093:   final List<String> why;
 1094:   final String advice;
 1095:   final List<String> watchItems;
 1096: }
 1097: 
 1098: class _DiseaseRiskData {
 1099:   const _DiseaseRiskData({
 1100:     required this.level,
 1101:     required this.color,
 1102:     required this.why,
 1103:     required this.watchItems,
 1104:     required this.advice,
 1105:   });
 1106: 
 1107:   final String level;
 1108:   final Color color;
 1109:   final List<String> why;
 1110:   final List<String> watchItems;
 1111:   final String advice;
 1112: }

 1114: class _RiskCard extends StatelessWidget {
 1115:   const _RiskCard({
 1116:     required this.icon,
 1117:     required this.title,
 1118:     required this.level,
 1119:     required this.color,
 1120:     required this.why,
 1121:     required this.advice,
 1122:     required this.watchTitle,
 1123:     required this.watchItems,
 1124:   });
 1125: 
 1126:   final IconData icon;
 1127:   final String title;
 1128:   final String level;
 1129:   final Color color;
 1130:   final List<String> why;
 1131:   final String advice;
 1132:   final String? watchTitle;
 1133:   final List<String> watchItems;
 1134: 
 1135:   @override
 1136:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1137:     return Container(
 1138:       width: double.infinity,
 1139:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
 1140:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1141:         color: color.withOpacity(0.08),
 1142:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
 1143:         border: Border.all(color: color.withOpacity(0.28)),
 1144:       ),
 1145:       child: Column(
 1146:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1147:         children: [
 1148:           Row(
 1149:             children: [
 1150:               Icon(icon, color: color, size: 16),
 1151:               const SizedBox(width: 7),
 1152:               Expanded(
 1153:                 child: Text(
 1154:                   title,
 1155:                   style: const TextStyle(
 1156:                     color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
 1157:                     fontSize: 13,
 1158:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1159:                   ),
 1160:                 ),
 1161:               ),
 1162:               Container(
 1163:                 padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(
 1164:                   horizontal: 10,
 1165:                   vertical: 6,
 1166:                 ),
 1167:                 decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1168:                   color: Colors.white,
 1169:                   borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
 1170:                   border: Border.all(color: color.withOpacity(0.35)),
 1171:                 ),
 1172:                 child: Text(
 1173:                   level,
 1174:                   style: TextStyle(
 1175:                     color: color,
 1176:                     fontSize: 11,
 1177:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1178:                   ),
 1179:                 ),
 1180:               ),
 1181:             ],
 1182:           ),
 1183:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
 1184:           const Text(
 1185:             'Why',
 1186:             style: TextStyle(
 1187:               color: Color(0xFF757068),
 1188:               fontSize: 10,
 1189:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1190:               letterSpacing: 0.5,
 1191:             ),
 1192:           ),
 1193:           const SizedBox(height: 6),
 1194:           for (final item in why) _RiskBullet(text: item, color: color),
 1195:           if (watchTitle != null && watchItems.isNotEmpty) ...[
 1196:             const SizedBox(height: 8),
 1197:             Text(
 1198:               watchTitle!,
 1199:               style: const TextStyle(
 1200:                 color: Color(0xFF757068),
 1201:                 fontSize: 10,
 1202:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1203:                 letterSpacing: 0.5,
 1204:               ),
 1205:             ),
 1206:             const SizedBox(height: 6),
 1207:             for (final item in watchItems)
 1208:               _RiskBullet(text: item, color: color),
 1209:           ],
 1210:           const SizedBox(height: 8),
 1211:           Text(
 1212:             'Advice',
 1213:             style: const TextStyle(
 1214:               color: Color(0xFF757068),
 1215:               fontSize: 10,
 1216:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1217:               letterSpacing: 0.5,
 1218:             ),
 1219:           ),
 1220:           const SizedBox(height: 6),
 1221:           Text(
 1222:             advice,
 1223:             style: const TextStyle(
 1224:               color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
 1225:               fontSize: 12,
 1226:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
 1227:               height: 1.3,
 1228:             ),
 1229:           ),
 1230:         ],
 1231:       ),
 1232:     );
 1233:   }
 1234: }

 1274: class _RecommendationDetailCard extends StatelessWidget {
 1275:   const _RecommendationDetailCard({
 1276:     required this.crop,
 1277:     required this.onClose,
 1278:     required this.onAdd,
 1279:     required this.onAddVariety,
 1280:   });
 1281: 
 1282:   final SeedCatalogItem crop;
 1283:   final VoidCallback onClose;
 1284:   final VoidCallback? onAdd;
 1285:   final ValueChanged<String>? onAddVariety;
 1286: 
 1287:   @override
 1288:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 1289:     final fit = RecommendationModel.seasonFit(crop);
 1290:     final fitColor = RecommendationModel.seasonFitColor(fit);
 1291:     final fitLabel = RecommendationModel.seasonFitLabel(fit);
 1292:     final method = RecommendationModel.plantingActionFor(crop);
 1293:     final rule = RecommendationModel.ruleFor(crop);
 1294:     final daysNeeded = RecommendationModel.daysNeeded(crop);
 1295:     final harvestText = RecommendationModel.harvestText(crop);
 1296:     final enabled =
 1297:         onAdd != null && fit != _SeasonFit.wait && fit != _SeasonFit.tooLate;
 1298: 
 1299:     return Container(
 1300:       width: double.infinity,
 1301:       constraints: const BoxConstraints(maxWidth: 760),
 1302:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
 1303:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 1304:         color: Colors.white,
 1305:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
 1306:         border: Border.all(color: fitColor.withValues(alpha: 0.32)),
 1307:         boxShadow: const [
 1308:           BoxShadow(
 1309:             color: Color(0x0F000000),
 1310:             blurRadius: 12,
 1311:             offset: Offset(0, 4),
 1312:           ),
 1313:         ],
 1314:       ),
 1315:       child: Column(
 1316:         crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
 1317:         children: [
 1318:           Row(
 1319:             children: [
 1320:               _CropIconBadge(crop: crop, color: fitColor),
 1321:               const SizedBox(width: 10),
 1322:               Expanded(
 1323:                 child: Text(
 1324:                   '${crop.cropName} in Blenheim',
 1325:                   maxLines: 1,
 1326:                   overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
 1327:                   style: const TextStyle(
 1328:                     color: Color(0xFF1B1A17),
 1329:                     fontSize: 16,
 1330:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1331:                   ),
 1332:                 ),
 1333:               ),
 1334:               IconButton(
 1335:                 tooltip: 'Close explanation',
 1336:                 onPressed: onClose,
 1337:                 icon: const Icon(Icons.close),
 1338:                 color: const Color(0xFF757068),
 1339:                 visualDensity: VisualDensity.compact,
 1340:               ),
 1341:             ],
 1342:           ),
 1343:           const SizedBox(height: 10),
 1344:           Wrap(
 1345:             spacing: 8,
 1346:             runSpacing: 8,
 1347:             children: [
 1348:               _EvidencePill(
 1349:                 label: fitLabel,
 1350:                 color: fitColor,
 1351:                 icon: fit == _SeasonFit.good
 1352:                     ? Icons.check_circle
 1353:                     : fit == _SeasonFit.tight
 1354:                     ? Icons.warning_amber_rounded
 1355:                     : fit == _SeasonFit.wait
 1356:                     ? Icons.schedule
 1357:                     : Icons.block,
 1358:               ),
 1359:               _EvidencePill(
 1360:                 label: method,
 1361:                 color: const Color(0xFF1B1A17),
 1362:                 icon: Icons.grass_outlined,
 1363:               ),
 1364:               _EvidencePill(
 1365:                 label: rule.label,
 1366:                 color: const Color(0xFF5F53C7),
 1367:                 icon: Icons.calendar_month_outlined,
 1368:               ),
 1369:               _EvidencePill(
 1370:                 label: harvestText,
 1371:                 color: const Color(0xFFA86412),
 1372:                 icon: Icons.event_available_outlined,
 1373:               ),
 1374:             ],
 1375:           ),
 1376:           const SizedBox(height: 13),
 1377:           _DetailLine(
 1378:             icon: Icons.thermostat_outlined,
 1379:             label: 'Soil check',
 1380:             value:
 1381:                 'Root-zone soil is ${SoilWaterDemandPanel.formatC(SoilWaterDemandPanel.rootZoneTemp)}. This panel separates germination warmth from regional timing.',
 1382:           ),
 1383:           _DetailLine(
 1384:             icon: Icons.map_outlined,
 1385:             label: 'Regional window',
 1386:             value: '${rule.label}. ${rule.note}',
 1387:           ),
 1388:           _DetailLine(
 1389:             icon: Icons.timelapse_outlined,
 1390:             label: 'Crop timing',
 1391:             value:
 1392:                 '$daysNeeded days estimated crop time; expected harvest window is $harvestText.',
 1393:           ),
 1394:           _DetailLine(
 1395:             icon: Icons.construction_outlined,
 1396:             label: 'Method',
 1397:             value: RecommendationModel.methodExplanation(method),
 1398:           ),
 1399:           _PlantingInstructionBlock(
 1400:             instructions: RecommendationModel.plantingInstructionsFor(crop),
 1401:           ),
 1402:           _EnvironmentalRiskBlock(crop: crop),
 1403:           _VarietyChoiceBlock(crop: crop, onAddVariety: onAddVariety),
 1404:           const SizedBox(height: 12),
 1405:           Row(
 1406:             children: [
 1407:               Expanded(
 1408:                 child: Text(
 1409:                   RecommendationModel.recommendationSentence(crop),
 1410:                   style: TextStyle(
 1411:                     color: fitColor,
 1412:                     fontSize: 12,
 1413:                     fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
 1414:                     height: 1.3,
 1415:                   ),
 1416:                 ),
 1417:               ),
 1418:               const SizedBox(width: 10),
 1419:               FilledButton.icon(
 1420:                 onPressed: enabled ? onAdd : null,
 1421:                 icon: const Icon(Icons.add),
 1422:                 label: Text(method),
 1423:                 style: FilledButton.styleFrom(
 1424:                   backgroundColor: fitColor,
 1425:                   foregroundColor: const Color(0xFFF5F0E8),
 1426:                   disabledBackgroundColor: const Color(0xFFD8D0C0),
 1427:                   disabledForegroundColor: const Color(0xFF757068),
 1428:                   shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
 1429:                     borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
 1430:                   ),
 1431:                 ),
 1432:               ),
 1433:             ],
 1434:           ),
 1435:         ],
 1436:       ),
 1437:     );
 1438:   }
 1439: }
 1440: 
 1441: class RecommendationModel {
 1442:   static _PlantingInstructions plantingInstructionsFor(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1443:     final key = crop.key.trim().toLowerCase();
 1444:     final name = crop.cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
 1445:     final category = crop.category.trim().toLowerCase();
 1446:     final text = '$key $name $category';
 1447: 
 1448:     if (text.contains('garlic')) {
 1449:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1450:         depth: '5 cm',
 1451:         spacing: '10-15 cm',
 1452:         rows: '20-30 cm',
 1453:         note:
 1454:             'Plant individual cloves point-up into firm, free-draining soil. Mulch lightly after planting and keep the bed weed-free through winter.',
 1455:       );
 1456:     }
 1457: 
 1458:     if (text.contains('potato') && !text.contains('sweet')) {
 1459:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1460:         depth: '10-15 cm',
 1461:         spacing: '30-40 cm',
 1462:         rows: '60-75 cm',
 1463:         note:
 1464:             'Plant seed tubers with shoots facing up. Hill soil around stems as plants grow to protect developing tubers.',
 1465:       );
 1466:     }
 1467: 
 1468:     if (text.contains('kumara') ||
 1469:         text.contains('sweet_potato') ||
 1470:         text.contains('sweet potato')) {
 1471:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1472:         depth: '5-10 cm',
 1473:         spacing: '30-40 cm',
 1474:         rows: '75-90 cm',
 1475:         note:
 1476:             'Plant rooted slips only after the warm-season window begins. Bury the lower stem and keep watered until established.',
 1477:       );
 1478:     }
 1479: 
 1480:     if (text.contains('yacon')) {
 1481:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1482:         depth: '5-8 cm',
 1483:         spacing: '75-100 cm',
 1484:         rows: '100 cm',
 1485:         note:
 1486:             'Plant crowns or divisions, not seed. Give each plant generous space because mature plants become large.',
 1487:       );
 1488:     }
 1489: 
 1490:     if (text.contains('carrot')) {
 1491:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1492:         depth: '5-10 mm',
 1493:         spacing: 'thin to 3-5 cm',
 1494:         rows: '20 cm',
 1495:         note:
 1496:             'Direct sow only. Keep the seedbed evenly moist until germination and avoid transplanting because roots fork easily.',
 1497:       );
 1498:     }
 1499: 
 1500:     if (text.contains('beetroot')) {
 1501:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1502:         depth: '10-15 mm',
 1503:         spacing: 'thin to 8-10 cm',
 1504:         rows: '25-30 cm',
 1505:         note:
 1506:             'Sow direct or transplant very young. Each seed cluster can produce several seedlings, so thin early.',
 1507:       );
 1508:     }
 1509: 
 1510:     if (text.contains('radish')) {
 1511:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1512:         depth: '10 mm',
 1513:         spacing: '3-5 cm',
 1514:         rows: '15-20 cm',
 1515:         note:
 1516:             'Direct sow in short succession rows. Keep evenly moist for crisp roots.',
 1517:       );
 1518:     }
 1519: 
 1520:     if (text.contains('turnip') ||
 1521:         text.contains('swede') ||
 1522:         text.contains('rutabaga')) {
 1523:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1524:         depth: '10-15 mm',
 1525:         spacing: '10-20 cm',
 1526:         rows: '30 cm',
 1527:         note:
 1528:             'Direct sow or transplant young seedlings. Thin early to prevent crowded roots.',
 1529:       );
 1530:     }
 1531:

 1541:       );
 1542:     }

 1545:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1546:         depth: '5 mm',
 1547:         spacing: '45-60 cm',
 1548:         rows: '60 cm',
 1549:         note:
 1550:             'Start in trays, then transplant sturdy seedlings before they become root-bound. Firm soil around transplants.',
 1551:       );
 1552:     }
 1553:

 1601:       return const _PlantingInstructions(
 1602:         depth: '3-5 mm',

 1699:       spacing: 'check variety',
 1700:       rows: 'check variety',

 1703:     );

 1705: 
 1706:   static String plantingActionFor(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1707:     final key = crop.key.trim().toLowerCase();
 1708:     final name = crop.cropName.trim().toLowerCase();
 1709:     final text = '$key $name';
 1710: 
 1711:     if (text.contains('garlic')) return 'Plant cloves';
 1712:     if (text.contains('potato') && !text.contains('sweet')) {
 1713:       return 'Plant tubers';
 1714:     }
 1715:     if (text.contains('kumara') ||
 1716:         text.contains('sweet_potato') ||
 1717:         text.contains('sweet potato')) {
 1718:       return 'Plant slips';
 1719:     }
 1720:     if (text.contains('yacon')) return 'Plant crowns';
 1721: 
 1722:     if (text.contains('carrot') ||
 1723:         text.contains('beet') ||
 1724:         text.contains('radish') ||
 1725:         text.contains('turnip') ||
 1726:         text.contains('parsnip') ||
 1727:         text.contains('swede') ||
 1728:         text.contains('rutabaga') ||
 1729:         text.contains('salsify') ||
 1730:         text.contains('scorzonera') ||
 1731:         text.contains('beans') ||
 1732:         text.contains('peas') ||
 1733:         text.contains('corn')) {
 1734:       return 'Direct sow';
 1735:     }
 1736: 
 1737:     if (text.contains('lettuce') ||
 1738:         text.contains('spinach') ||
 1739:         text.contains('silverbeet') ||
 1740:         text.contains('rocket') ||
 1741:         text.contains('mizuna') ||
 1742:         text.contains('tatsoi') ||
 1743:         text.contains('endive') ||
 1744:         text.contains('pak') ||
 1745:         text.contains('bok')) {
 1746:       return 'Direct or tray';
 1747:     }
 1748: 
 1749:     return 'Start tray';
 1750:   }
 1751: 
 1752:   static String methodExplanation(String method) {
 1753:     switch (method) {
 1754:       case 'Plant cloves':
 1755:         return 'Place individual cloves directly into the bed; this is not a seedling-tray crop.';
 1756:       case 'Plant tubers':
 1757:         return 'Plant seed tubers directly into prepared soil once the regional window is right.';
 1758:       case 'Plant slips':
 1759:         return 'Use rooted slips rather than seed; wait for the warm-season planting window.';
 1760:       case 'Plant crowns':
 1761:         return 'Plant crowns or divisions rather than seed; wait for the warm-season planting window.';
 1762:       case 'Direct sow':
 1763:         return 'Sow directly into the bed because transplanting can disturb roots or because the crop establishes well in place.';
 1764:       case 'Direct or tray':
 1765:         return 'Either sow direct or start in trays, depending on bed space, pest pressure, and weather protection.';
 1766:       default:
 1767:         return 'Start in a tray, then transplant once seedlings are sturdy and conditions are suitable.';
 1768:     }
 1769:   }
 1770: 
 1771:   static int daysNeeded(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1772:     if (crop.key == 'garlic') return 230;
 1773:     if (crop.key == 'yacon') return 210;
 1774: 
 1775:     final harvestDays = crop.harvestDaysFromTransplant;
 1776:     if (harvestDays <= 0) return 70;
 1777:     return harvestDays;
 1778:   }
 1779: 
 1780:   static _BlenheimSeasonRule ruleFor(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1781:     final key = crop.key.toLowerCase();
 1782:     final category = crop.category.toLowerCase();
 1783: 
 1784:     if (key == 'garlic') {
 1785:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1786:         label: 'plant Apr-Jun',
 1787:         sowStartMonth: 4,
 1788:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1789:         sowEndMonth: 6,
 1790:         sowEndDay: 30,
 1791:         harvestStartMonth: 12,
 1792:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1793:         harvestEndMonth: 1,
 1794:         harvestEndDay: 31,
 1795:         allowOverwinter: true,
 1796:         note:
 1797:             'Garlic is an overwintering allium in Blenheim; autumn to early winter planting is realistic.',
 1798:       );
 1799:     }
 1800: 
 1801:     if (key == 'potato') {
 1802:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1803:         label: 'plant Aug-Dec',
 1804:         sowStartMonth: 8,
 1805:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1806:         sowEndMonth: 12,
 1807:         sowEndDay: 15,
 1808:         harvestStartMonth: 11,
 1809:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1810:         harvestEndMonth: 4,
 1811:         harvestEndDay: 30,
 1812:         note:
 1813:             'Potatoes are usually better held until late winter or spring in this model.',
 1814:       );
 1815:     }
 1816: 
 1817:     if (key == 'kumara' || key == 'sweet_potato' || key == 'yacon') {
 1818:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1819:         label: 'plant Oct-Dec',
 1820:         sowStartMonth: 10,
 1821:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1822:         sowEndMonth: 12,
 1823:         sowEndDay: 31,
 1824:         harvestStartMonth: 3,
 1825:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1826:         harvestEndMonth: 5,
 1827:         harvestEndDay: 31,
 1828:         note:
 1829:             'Warm-season tuber crop; soil warmth alone is not enough in April.',
 1830:       );
 1831:     }
 1832: 
 1833:     if (category.contains('root')) {
 1834:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1835:         label: 'sow Feb-May',
 1836:         sowStartMonth: 2,
 1837:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1838:         sowEndMonth: 5,
 1839:         sowEndDay: 31,
 1840:         harvestStartMonth: 5,
 1841:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1842:         harvestEndMonth: 9,
 1843:         harvestEndDay: 30,
 1844:         note: 'Cool-season root crop window for autumn into winter harvest.',
 1845:       );
 1846:     }
 1847: 
 1848:     if (category.contains('allium')) {
 1849:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1850:         label: 'sow Mar-Jul',
 1851:         sowStartMonth: 3,
 1852:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1853:         sowEndMonth: 7,
 1854:         sowEndDay: 31,
 1855:         harvestStartMonth: 8,
 1856:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1857:         harvestEndMonth: 1,
 1858:         harvestEndDay: 31,
 1859:         allowOverwinter: true,
 1860:         note: 'Cool-season allium window.',
 1861:       );
 1862:     }
 1863: 
 1864:     if (category.contains('brassica') || category.contains('leaf')) {
 1865:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1866:         label: 'sow Feb-May',
 1867:         sowStartMonth: 2,
 1868:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1869:         sowEndMonth: 5,
 1870:         sowEndDay: 31,
 1871:         harvestStartMonth: 4,
 1872:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1873:         harvestEndMonth: 9,
 1874:         harvestEndDay: 30,
 1875:         note: 'Autumn brassica and leafy-green window.',
 1876:       );
 1877:     }
 1878: 
 1879:     if (category.contains('legume')) {
 1880:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1881:         label: 'sow Sep-Dec',
 1882:         sowStartMonth: 9,
 1883:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1884:         sowEndMonth: 12,
 1885:         sowEndDay: 31,
 1886:         harvestStartMonth: 11,
 1887:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1888:         harvestEndMonth: 4,
 1889:         harvestEndDay: 30,
 1890:         note: 'Warm-soil legume window.',
 1891:       );
 1892:     }
 1893: 
 1894:     if (category.contains('fruiting') || category.contains('cucurbit')) {
 1895:       return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1896:         label: 'sow Sep-Dec',
 1897:         sowStartMonth: 9,
 1898:         sowStartDay: 1,
 1899:         sowEndMonth: 12,
 1900:         sowEndDay: 31,
 1901:         harvestStartMonth: 12,
 1902:         harvestStartDay: 1,
 1903:         harvestEndMonth: 4,
 1904:         harvestEndDay: 30,
 1905:         note: 'Warm-season crop window.',
 1906:       );
 1907:     }
 1908: 
 1909:     return const _BlenheimSeasonRule(
 1910:       label: 'sow Mar-May',
 1911:       sowStartMonth: 3,
 1912:       sowStartDay: 1,
 1913:       sowEndMonth: 5,
 1914:       sowEndDay: 31,
 1915:       harvestStartMonth: 5,
 1916:       harvestStartDay: 1,
 1917:       harvestEndMonth: 9,
 1918:       harvestEndDay: 30,
 1919:       note: 'Default cool-season vegetable window.',
 1920:     );
 1921:   }
 1922: 
 1923:   static _SeasonFit seasonFit(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1924:     final todayRaw = DateTime.now();
 1925:     final today = DateTime(todayRaw.year, todayRaw.month, todayRaw.day);
 1926:     final rule = ruleFor(crop);
 1927:     final sowStart = rule.sowStartFor(today);
 1928:     final sowEnd = rule.sowEndFor(today);
 1929: 
 1930:     if (today.isBefore(sowStart)) return _SeasonFit.wait;
 1931:     if (today.isAfter(sowEnd)) return _SeasonFit.tooLate;
 1932: 
 1933:     final days = daysNeeded(crop);
 1934:     final harvestStart = rule.harvestStartAfter(today);
 1935:     final harvestEnd = rule.harvestEndAfter(today);
 1936:     final expectedHarvest = today.add(Duration(days: days));
 1937: 
 1938:     if (expectedHarvest.isAfter(harvestEnd)) return _SeasonFit.tooLate;
 1939: 
 1940:     if (expectedHarvest.isBefore(harvestStart)) {
 1941:       return rule.allowOverwinter ? _SeasonFit.good : _SeasonFit.tight;
 1942:     }
 1943: 
 1944:     final spareDays = harvestEnd.difference(expectedHarvest).inDays;
 1945:     if (spareDays >= 21) return _SeasonFit.good;
 1946:     return _SeasonFit.tight;
 1947:   }
 1948: 
 1949:   static String harvestText(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1950:     final todayRaw = DateTime.now();
 1951:     final today = DateTime(todayRaw.year, todayRaw.month, todayRaw.day);
 1952:     final rule = ruleFor(crop);
 1953:     final start = rule.harvestStartAfter(today);
 1954:     final end = rule.harvestEndAfter(today);
 1955: 
 1956:     return 'harvest ${_shortMonth(start)}-${_shortMonth(end)}';
 1957:   }
 1958: 
 1959:   static String recommendationSentence(SeedCatalogItem crop) {
 1960:     final fit = seasonFit(crop);
 1961:     final method = plantingActionFor(crop);
 1962: 
 1963:     switch (fit) {
 1964:       case _SeasonFit.good:
 1965:         return 'Recommendation: $method now.';
 1966:       case _SeasonFit.tight:
 1967:         return 'Recommendation: $method soon; timing is workable but not generous.';
 1968:       case _SeasonFit.wait:
 1969:         return 'Recommendation: wait for the regional planting window.';
 1970:       case _SeasonFit.tooLate:
 1971:         return 'Recommendation: do not plant now; the local timing window has passed.';
 1972:     }
 1973:   }
 1974: 
 1975:   static String seasonFitLabel(_SeasonFit fit) {
 1976:     switch (fit) {
 1977:       case _SeasonFit.good:
 1978:         return 'Good time';
 1979:       case _SeasonFit.tight:
 1980:         return 'Tight';
 1981:       case _SeasonFit.wait:
 1982:         return 'Wait';
 1983:       case _SeasonFit.tooLate:
 1984:         return 'Too late';
 1985:     }
 1986:   }
 1987: 
 1988:   static Color seasonFitColor(_SeasonFit fit) {
 1989:     switch (fit) {
 1990:       case _SeasonFit.good:
 1991:         return const Color(0xFF227A47);
 1992:       case _SeasonFit.tight:
 1993:         return const Color(0xFFA86412);
 1994:       case _SeasonFit.wait:
 1995:         return const Color(0xFF5F53C7);
 1996:       case _SeasonFit.tooLate:
 1997:         return const Color(0xFFA6261A);
 1998:     }
 1999:   }
 2000: 
 2001:   static Color seasonFitBackground(_SeasonFit fit) {
 2002:     switch (fit) {
 2003:       case _SeasonFit.good:
 2004:         return const Color(0xFFEAF6EE);
 2005:       case _SeasonFit.tight:
 2006:         return const Color(0xFFFFF5E3);
 2007:       case _SeasonFit.wait:
 2008:         return const Color(0xFFF2F0FF);
 2009:       case _SeasonFit.tooLate:
 2010:         return const Color(0xFFFDECEF);
 2011:     }
 2012:   }
 2013: 
 2014:   static String _shortMonth(DateTime date) {
 2015:     const months = <int, String>{
 2016:       1: 'Jan',
 2017:       2: 'Feb',
 2018:       3: 'Mar',
 2019:       4: 'Apr',
 2020:       5: 'May',
 2021:       6: 'Jun',
 2022:       7: 'Jul',
 2023:       8: 'Aug',
 2024:       9: 'Sep',
 2025:       10: 'Oct',
 2026:       11: 'Nov',
 2027:       12: 'Dec',
 2028:     };
 2029: 
 2030:     return months[date.month] ?? '${date.month}';
 2031:   }
 2032: }
 2033: 
 2034: class _EvidencePill extends StatelessWidget {
 2035:   const _EvidencePill({
 2036:     required this.label,
 2037:     required this.color,
 2038:     required this.icon,
 2039:   });
 2040: 
 2041:   final String label;
 2042:   final Color color;
 2043:   final IconData icon;
 2044: 
 2045:   @override
 2046:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
 2047:     return Container(
 2048:       height: 30,
 2049:       padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 10),
 2050:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
 2051:         color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.10),
 2052:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
 2053:         border: Border.all(color: color.withValues(alpha: 0.30)),
 2054:       ),

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: 
    3: import '../../../../core/theme/garden_theme.dart';
    4: import '../../services/spray_conditions_service.dart';
    5: 
    6: class SprayConditionsWidget extends StatefulWidget {
    7:   const SprayConditionsWidget({
    8:     super.key,
    9:     this.compactMode = false,
   10:     this.latitude = SprayConditionsService.defaultLatitude,
   11:     this.longitude = SprayConditionsService.defaultLongitude,
   12:   });
   13: 
   14:   final double latitude;
   15:   final double longitude;
   16:   final bool compactMode;
   17: 
   18:   @override
   19:   State<SprayConditionsWidget> createState() => _SprayConditionsWidgetState();
   20: }
   21: 
   22: class _SprayConditionsWidgetState extends State<SprayConditionsWidget> {
   23:   final SprayConditionsService service = const SprayConditionsService();
   24: 
   25:   late Future<SprayConditions> conditionsFuture;
   26: 
   27:   @override
   28:   void initState() {
   29:     super.initState();
   30:     conditionsFuture = _load();
   31:   }
   32: 
   33:   @override
   34:   void didUpdateWidget(covariant SprayConditionsWidget oldWidget) {
   35:     super.didUpdateWidget(oldWidget);
   36: 
   37:     if (oldWidget.latitude != widget.latitude ||
   38:         oldWidget.longitude != widget.longitude) {
   39:       conditionsFuture = _load();
   40:     }
   41:   }
   42: 
   43:   Future<SprayConditions> _load() {
   44:     return service.fetchCurrent(
   45:       latitude: widget.latitude,
   46:       longitude: widget.longitude,
   47:     );
   48:   }
   49: 
   50:   void _refresh() {
   51:     setState(() {
   52:       conditionsFuture = _load();
   53:     });
   54:   }
   55: 
   56:   @override
   57:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   58:     return FutureBuilder<SprayConditions>(
   59:       future: conditionsFuture,
   60:       builder: (context, snapshot) {
   61:         if (snapshot.connectionState == ConnectionState.waiting) {
   62:           return const _SprayLoading();
   63:         }
   64: 
   65:         if (snapshot.hasError) {
   66:           return _SprayError(
   67:             message: snapshot.error.toString(),
   68:             onRetry: _refresh,
   69:           );
   70:         }
   71: 
   72:         final conditions = snapshot.data;
   73: 
   74:         if (conditions == null) {
   75:           return _SprayError(
   76:             message: 'No spray condition data available.',
   77:             onRetry: _refresh,
   78:           );
   79:         }
   80: 
   81:         return _SprayContent(conditions: conditions, onRefresh: _refresh);
   82:       },
   83:     );
   84:   }
   85: }
   86: 
   87: class _SprayLoading extends StatelessWidget {
   88:   const _SprayLoading();
   89: 
   90:   @override
   91:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   92:     return _SprayShell(
   93:       child: const Row(
   94:         children: [
   95:           SizedBox(
   96:             width: 18,
   97:             height: 18,
   98:             child: CircularProgressIndicator(strokeWidth: 2),
   99:           ),
  100:           SizedBox(width: 10),
  101:           Text(
  102:             'Loading spray conditions...',
  103:             style: TextStyle(
  104:               color: GardenTheme.muted,
  105:               fontSize: 12,
  106:               fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  107:             ),
  108:           ),
  109:         ],
  110:       ),
  111:     );
  112:   }
  113: }
  114: 
  115: class _SprayError extends StatelessWidget {
  116:   const _SprayError({required this.message, required this.onRetry});
  117: 
  118:   final String message;
  119:   final VoidCallback onRetry;
  120: 
  121:   @override
  122:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  123:     return _SprayShell(
  124:       child: Row(
  125:         children: [
  126:           const Icon(Icons.warning_amber, color: GardenTheme.warn, size: 18),
  127:           const SizedBox(width: 10),
  128:           Expanded(
  129:             child: Text(
  130:               message,
  131:               maxLines: 2,
  132:               overflow: TextOverflow.ellipsis,
  133:               style: const TextStyle(
  134:                 color: GardenTheme.muted,
  135:                 fontSize: 12,
  136:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w700,
  137:               ),
  138:             ),
  139:           ),
  140:           TextButton(onPressed: onRetry, child: const Text('Retry')),
  141:         ],
  142:       ),
  143:     );
  144:   }
