  487: 
  488: class _SprayShell extends StatelessWidget {
  489:   const _SprayShell({required this.child});
  490: 
  491:   final Widget child;
  492: 
  493:   @override
  494:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  495:     return Container(
  496:       width: double.infinity,
  497:       constraints: const BoxConstraints(minHeight: 0),
  498:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(12),
  499:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  500:         color: GardenTheme.panel,
  501:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(18),
  502:         border: Border.all(color: GardenTheme.border),
  503:         boxShadow: const [
  504:           BoxShadow(
  505:             color: Color(0x0F000000),
  506:             blurRadius: 16,
  507:             offset: Offset(0, 5),
  508:           ),
  509:         ],
  510:       ),
  511:       child: child,
  512:     );
  513:   }
  514: }
  515: 
  516: Color _suitabilityColor(SpraySuitability suitability) {
  517:   switch (suitability) {
  518:     case SpraySuitability.good:
  519:       return GardenTheme.good;
  520:     case SpraySuitability.caution:
  521:       return GardenTheme.warn;
  522:     case SpraySuitability.noSpray:
  523:       return GardenTheme.bad;
  524:   }
  525: }
  526: 
  527: Color _suitabilityBackground(SpraySuitability suitability) {
  528:   switch (suitability) {
  529:     case SpraySuitability.good:
  530:       return const Color(0xFFEEF8F0);
  531:     case SpraySuitability.caution:
  532:       return const Color(0xFFFFF3E5);
  533:     case SpraySuitability.noSpray:
  534:       return const Color(0xFFFFF0EE);
  535:   }
  536: }
  537: 
  538: IconData _suitabilityIcon(SpraySuitability suitability) {
  539:   switch (suitability) {
  540:     case SpraySuitability.good:
  541:       return Icons.check_circle_outline;
  542:     case SpraySuitability.caution:
  543:       return Icons.warning_amber_rounded;
  544:     case SpraySuitability.noSpray:
  545:       return Icons.block_outlined;
  546:   }
  547: }
  548: 
  549: String _suitabilityTitle(SpraySuitability suitability) {
  550:   switch (suitability) {
  551:     case SpraySuitability.good:
  552:       return 'Good spray window';
  553:     case SpraySuitability.caution:
  554:       return 'Spray with caution';
  555:     case SpraySuitability.noSpray:
  556:       return 'Do not spray';
  557:   }
  558: }
  559: 
  560: String _suitabilityChipLabel(SpraySuitability suitability) {
  561:   switch (suitability) {
  562:     case SpraySuitability.good:
  563:       return 'GOOD';
  564:     case SpraySuitability.caution:
  565:       return 'CAUTION';
  566:     case SpraySuitability.noSpray:
  567:       return 'NO SPRAY';
  568:   }
  569: }
  570: 
  571: Color _windColor(SprayConditions conditions) {
  572:   if (conditions.windSpeedKmh >= 18 || conditions.windGustKmh >= 28) {
  573:     return GardenTheme.bad;
  574:   }
  575:   if (conditions.windSpeedKmh >= 12 || conditions.windGustKmh >= 20) {
  576:     return GardenTheme.warn;
  577:   }
  578:   return GardenTheme.good;
  579: }
  580: 
  581: Color _rainColor(SprayConditions conditions) {
  582:   return conditions.precipitationMm > 0.2 ? GardenTheme.bad : GardenTheme.good;
  583: }
  584: 
  585: Color _humidityColor(int humidity) {
  586:   if (humidity >= 90 || humidity <= 35) return GardenTheme.warn;
  587:   return GardenTheme.good;
  588: }
  589: 
  590: Color _temperatureColor(double temperatureC) {
  591:   if (temperatureC >= 29) return GardenTheme.bad;
  592:   if (temperatureC >= 25) return GardenTheme.warn;
  593:   return GardenTheme.good;
  594: }
  595: 
  596: Color _uvColor(double uvIndex) {
  597:   if (uvIndex >= 8) return GardenTheme.bad;
  598:   if (uvIndex >= 6) return GardenTheme.warn;
  599:   return GardenTheme.good;
  600: }
  601: 
  602: String _humidityCaption(int humidity) {
  603:   if (humidity >= 90) return 'Very humid';
  604:   if (humidity <= 35) return 'Very dry';
  605:   return 'Suitable';
  606: }
  607: 
  608: String _temperatureCaption(double temperatureC) {
  609:   if (temperatureC >= 29) return 'Too hot';
  610:   if (temperatureC >= 25) return 'Warm';
  611:   return 'Suitable';
  612: }
  613: 
  614: String _uvCaption(double uvIndex) {
  615:   if (uvIndex >= 8) return 'Very high';
  616:   if (uvIndex >= 6) return 'High';
  617:   return 'Suitable';
  618: }

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: 
    3: import '../../../../core/models/bed.dart';
    4: import '../../../../core/theme/garden_theme.dart';
    5: 
    6: class SummaryCards extends StatelessWidget {
    7:   const SummaryCards({
    8:     super.key,
    9:     required this.beds,
   10:     required this.overlapCount,
   11:   });
   12: 
   13:   final List<Bed> beds;
   14:   final int overlapCount;
   15: 
   16:   @override
   17:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   18:     final totalBeds = beds.length;
   19: 
   20:     final plantedCrops = beds
   21:         .expand((bed) => bed.crops)
   22:         .where((crop) => crop.trim().isNotEmpty)
   23:         .toSet()
   24:         .length;
   25: 
   26:     final needsAttention = beds
   27:         .where((bed) => bed.status != BedStatus.ok)
   28:         .length;
   29: 
   30:     final totalArea = beds.fold<double>(
   31:       0,
   32:       (sum, bed) => sum + bed.width * bed.height,
   33:     );
   34: 
   35:     return SizedBox(
   36:       height: 108,
   37:       child: ListView(
   38:         scrollDirection: Axis.horizontal,
   39:         children: [
   40:           SummaryCard(
   41:             label: 'Total Beds',
   42:             value: totalBeds.toString(),
   43:             sublabel: 'Active layout cards',
   44:             accentColor: GardenTheme.ink,
   45:           ),
   46:           const SizedBox(width: 12),
   47:           SummaryCard(
   48:             label: 'Planted Crops',
   49:             value: plantedCrops.toString(),
   50:             sublabel: 'Unique crop labels',
   51:             accentColor: GardenTheme.good,
   52:           ),
   53:           const SizedBox(width: 12),
   54:           SummaryCard(
   55:             label: 'Needs Attention',
   56:             value: needsAttention.toString(),
   57:             sublabel: 'Warning, issue, or hold',
   58:             accentColor: needsAttention == 0
   59:                 ? GardenTheme.good
   60:                 : GardenTheme.warn,
   61:           ),
   62:           const SizedBox(width: 12),
   63:           SummaryCard(
   64:             label: 'Layout Issues',
   65:             value: overlapCount.toString(),
   66:             sublabel: overlapCount == 0
   67:                 ? 'No overlapping beds'
   68:                 : 'Overlapping bed warnings',
   69:             accentColor: overlapCount == 0 ? GardenTheme.good : GardenTheme.bad,
   70:           ),
   71:           const SizedBox(width: 12),
   72:           SummaryCard(
   73:             label: 'Garden Area',
   74:             value: '${totalArea.toStringAsFixed(0)} mÂ²',
   75:             sublabel: 'Total planned bed area',
   76:             accentColor: GardenTheme.hold,
   77:           ),
   78:         ],
   79:       ),
   80:     );
   81:   }
   82: }
   83:

    1: import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
    2: 
    3: @immutable
    4: class ViewOptions {
    5:   const ViewOptions({
    6:     this.dashboardExpanded = true,
    7:     this.gridVisible = true,
    8:     this.labelsVisible = true,
    9:     this.cropRowsVisible = true,
   10:     this.mapInstructionsVisible = true,
   11:   });
   12: 
   13:   final bool dashboardExpanded;
   14:   final bool gridVisible;
   15:   final bool labelsVisible;
   16:   final bool cropRowsVisible;
   17:   final bool mapInstructionsVisible;
   18: 
   19:   ViewOptions copyWith({
   20:     bool? dashboardExpanded,
   21:     bool? gridVisible,
   22:     bool? labelsVisible,
   23:     bool? cropRowsVisible,
   24:     bool? mapInstructionsVisible,
   25:   }) {
   26:     return ViewOptions(
   27:       dashboardExpanded: dashboardExpanded ?? this.dashboardExpanded,
   28:       gridVisible: gridVisible ?? this.gridVisible,
   29:       labelsVisible: labelsVisible ?? this.labelsVisible,
   30:       cropRowsVisible: cropRowsVisible ?? this.cropRowsVisible,
   31:       mapInstructionsVisible:
   32:           mapInstructionsVisible ?? this.mapInstructionsVisible,
   33:     );
   34:   }
   35: }

DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\models\bed.dart

    1: import 'crop_placement.dart';
    2: 
    3: enum BedStatus { ok, warning, bad, hold }
    4: 
    5: class Bed {
    6:   const Bed({
    7:     required this.id,
    8:     required this.number,
    9:     required this.name,
   10:     required this.x,
   11:     required this.y,
   12:     required this.width,
   13:     required this.height,
   14:     required this.zone,
   15:     required this.status,
   16:     required this.healthPercent,
   17:     required this.crops,
   18:     this.cropPlacements = const [],
   19:   });
   20: 
   21:   final String id;
   22:   final int number;
   23:   final String name;
   24: 
   25:   /// Position on the garden canvas, measured in meters.
   26:   final double x;
   27:   final double y;
   28: 
   29:   /// Bed size, measured in meters.
   30:   final double width;
   31:   final double height;
   32: 
   33:   final String zone;
   34:   final BedStatus status;
   35:   final double healthPercent;
   36:   final List<String> crops;
   37: 
   38:   /// Manual crop icon placements inside this bed.
   39:   ///
   40:   /// Each placement uses bed-local coordinates:
   41:   /// x = meters from bed left edge
   42:   /// y = meters from bed top edge
   43:   final List<CropPlacement> cropPlacements;
   44: 
   45:   Bed copyWith({
   46:     String? id,
   47:     int? number,
   48:     String? name,
   49:     double? x,
   50:     double? y,
   51:     double? width,
   52:     double? height,
   53:     String? zone,
   54:     BedStatus? status,
   55:     double? healthPercent,
   56:     List<String>? crops,
   57:     List<CropPlacement>? cropPlacements,
   58:   }) {
   59:     return Bed(
   60:       id: id ?? this.id,
   61:       number: number ?? this.number,
   62:       name: name ?? this.name,
   63:       x: x ?? this.x,
   64:       y: y ?? this.y,
   65:       width: width ?? this.width,
   66:       height: height ?? this.height,
   67:       zone: zone ?? this.zone,
   68:       status: status ?? this.status,
   69:       healthPercent: healthPercent ?? this.healthPercent,
   70:       crops: crops ?? this.crops,
   71:       cropPlacements: cropPlacements ?? this.cropPlacements,
   72:     );
   73:   }
   74: 
   75:   Map<String, dynamic> toJson() {
   76:     return {
   77:       'id': id,
   78:       'x': x,
   79:       'y': y,
   80:       'width': width,
   81:       'height': height,
   82:       'number': number,
   83:       'name': name,
   84:       'zone': zone,
   85:       'status': status.name,
   86:       'healthPercent': healthPercent,
   87:       'crops': crops,
   88:       'cropPlacements': cropPlacements
   89:           .map((placement) => placement.toJson())
   90:           .toList(),
   91:     };
   92:   }
   93: 
   94:   factory Bed.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
   95:     return Bed(
   96:       id: json['id']?.toString() ?? '',
   97:       x: _readDouble(json['x']),
   98:       y: _readDouble(json['y']),
   99:       width: _readDouble(json['width']),
  100:       height: _readDouble(json['height']),
  101:       number: _readInt(json['number']),
  102:       name: json['name']?.toString() ?? 'Untitled Bed',
  103:       zone: json['zone']?.toString() ?? 'Main Garden',
  104:       status: _readStatus(json['status']),
  105:       healthPercent: _readDouble(json['healthPercent'], fallback: 1.0),
  106:       crops: _readStringList(json['crops']),
  107:       cropPlacements: _readCropPlacements(json['cropPlacements']),
  108:     );
  109:   }
  110: 
  111:   static BedStatus _readStatus(Object? value) {
  112:     final raw = value?.toString();
  113: 
  114:     for (final status in BedStatus.values) {
  115:       if (status.name == raw) {
  116:         return status;
  117:       }
  118:     }
  119: 
  120:     return BedStatus.ok;
  121:   }
  122: 
  123:   static List<String> _readStringList(Object? value) {
  124:     if (value is! List) return const [];
  125: 
  126:     return value
  127:         .map((item) => item.toString().trim())
  128:         .where((item) => item.isNotEmpty)
  129:         .toList();
  130:   }
  131: 
  132:   static List<CropPlacement> _readCropPlacements(Object? value) {
  133:     if (value is! List) return const [];
  134: 
  135:     return value
  136:         .whereType<Map>()
  137:         .map((item) => CropPlacement.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item)))
  138:         .where((placement) => placement.id.trim().isNotEmpty)
  139:         .toList();
  140:   }
  141: 
  142:   static double _readDouble(Object? value, {double fallback = 0}) {
  143:     if (value is num) return value.toDouble();
  144:     if (value is String) return double.tryParse(value) ?? fallback;
  145:     return fallback;
  146:   }
  147: 
  148:   static int _readInt(Object? value, {int fallback = 0}) {
  149:     if (value is int) return value;
  150:     if (value is num) return value.toInt();
  151:     if (value is String) return int.tryParse(value) ?? fallback;
  152:     return fallback;
  153:   }
  154: }

    3: class GardenProject {

    6:   final double widthMeters;
    7:   final double heightMeters;
    8:   final List<Bed> beds;
    9:   final DateTime updatedAt;
   10: 
   11:   const GardenProject({
   12:     required this.id,
   13:     required this.name,
   14:     required this.widthMeters,
   15:     required this.heightMeters,
   16:     required this.beds,
   17:     required this.updatedAt,
   18:   });
   19: 
   20:   factory GardenProject.demo() {
   21:     return GardenProject(
   22:       id: 'demo-project',
   23:       name: 'Blenheim Garden Plan',
   24:       widthMeters: 30,
   25:       heightMeters: 18,
   26:       updatedAt: DateTime.now(),
   27:       beds: const [
   28:         Bed(
   29:           id: '1',

   36:           zone: 'Berry Zone',
   37:           status: BedStatus.ok,
   38:           healthPercent: 0.9,
   39:           crops: ['Strawberries'],
   40:         ),
   41:         Bed(

   43:           number: 2,
   44:           name: 'Raspberry + Strawberry Bed',
   45:           x: 2,
   46:           y: 7,
   47:           width: 8,
   48:           height: 4,
   49:           zone: 'Berry Zone',
   50:           status: BedStatus.warning,
   51:           healthPercent: 0.7,
   52:           crops: ['Raspberries', 'Strawberries'],
   53:         ),
   54:         Bed(
   55:           id: '3',
   56:           number: 3,
   57:           name: 'Broccoli Bed',
   58:           x: 12,
   59:           y: 4,
   60:           width: 6,
   61:           height: 4,
   62:           zone: 'Main Garden',
   63:           status: BedStatus.ok,
   64:           healthPercent: 0.85,
   65:           crops: ['Broccoli'],
   66:         ),
   67:       ],
   68:     );
   69:   }
   70: 
   71:   GardenProject copyWith({
   72:     String? id,
   73:     String? name,
   74:     double? widthMeters,
   75:     double? heightMeters,
   76:     List<Bed>? beds,
   77:     DateTime? updatedAt,
   78:   }) {
   79:     return GardenProject(
   80:       id: id ?? this.id,
   81:       name: name ?? this.name,
   82:       widthMeters: widthMeters ?? this.widthMeters,
   83:       heightMeters: heightMeters ?? this.heightMeters,
   84:       beds: beds ?? this.beds,
   85:       updatedAt: updatedAt ?? this.updatedAt,
   86:     );
   87:   }
   88: 
   89:   Map<String, dynamic> toJson() {
   90:     return {
   91:       'id': id,
   92:       'name': name,
   93:       'widthMeters': widthMeters,
   94:       'heightMeters': heightMeters,
   95:       'beds': beds.map((bed) => bed.toJson()).toList(),
   96:       'updatedAt': updatedAt.toIso8601String(),
   97:     };
   98:   }
   99: 
  100:   factory GardenProject.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic> json) {
  101:     return GardenProject(
  102:       id: json['id'] as String? ?? 'project',
  103:       name: json['name'] as String? ?? 'Untitled Garden Plan',
  104:       widthMeters: _toDouble(json['widthMeters'], fallback: 30),
  105:       heightMeters: _toDouble(json['heightMeters'], fallback: 18),
  106:       beds: _bedsFromJson(json['beds']),
  107:       updatedAt: _dateTimeFromJson(json['updatedAt']),
  108:     );
  109:   }
  110: 
  111:   static List<Bed> _bedsFromJson(dynamic value) {
  112:     if (value is List) {
  113:       return value
  114:           .whereType<Map>()
  115:           .map((item) => Bed.fromJson(Map<String, dynamic>.from(item)))
  116:           .toList();
  117:     }
  118: 
  119:     return const [];
  120:   }
  121: 
  122:   static DateTime _dateTimeFromJson(dynamic value) {
  123:     if (value is String) {
  124:       return DateTime.tryParse(value) ?? DateTime.now();
  125:     }
  126: 
  127:     return DateTime.now();
  128:   }
  129: 
  130:   static double _toDouble(dynamic value, {double fallback = 0.0}) {
  131:     if (value is double) return value;
  132:     if (value is int) return value.toDouble();
  133:     if (value is String) return double.tryParse(value) ?? fallback;
  134: 
  135:     return fallback;
  136:   }
  137: }

============================================================
DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\screens\garden_map_screen.dart
============================================================

    1: import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
    2: import 'package:flutter/gestures.dart';
    3: 
    4: import '../models/garden_project.dart';
    5: import '../models/bed.dart';
    6: 
    7: class GardenMapScreen extends StatefulWidget {
    8:   final GardenProject project;
    9: 
   10:   const GardenMapScreen({super.key, required this.project});
   11: 
   12:   @override
   13:   State<GardenMapScreen> createState() => _GardenMapScreenState();
   14: }
   15: 
   16: class _GardenMapScreenState extends State<GardenMapScreen> {
   17:   List<Bed> beds = [];
   18:   final Set<String> selected = {};
   19: 
   20:   double scale = 1.0;
   21:   Offset offset = Offset.zero;
   22: 
   23:   Bed? dragging;
   24:   Bed? resizing;
   25:   String? resizeHandle;
   26: 
   27:   @override
   28:   void initState() {
   29:     super.initState();
   30: 
   31:     // GUARANTEED VISIBILITY (prevents empty canvas)
   32:     beds = widget.project.beds.isNotEmpty
   33:         ? List<Bed>.from(widget.project.beds)
   34:         : [
   35:             Bed(
   36:               id: "debug",
   37:               name: "Debug Bed",
   38:               x: 100,
   39:               y: 100,
   40:               width: 200,
   41:               height: 120,
   42:               cropCount: 0,
   43:             ),
   44:           ];
   45:   }
   46: 
   47:   // ---------------- SAFE WORLD TRANSFORM ----------------
   48:   Offset _world(Offset p) => (p - offset) / scale;
   49: 
   50:   double _snap(double v) => (v / 20).round() * 20;
   51: 
   52:   // ---------------- HIT TEST ----------------
   53:   Bed? _hit(Offset p) {
   54:     for (final b in beds) {
   55:       final r = Rect.fromLTWH(b.x, b.y, b.width, b.height);
   56:       if (r.contains(p)) return b;
   57:     }
   58:     return null;
   59:   }
   60: 
   61:   String? _handleAt(Bed b, Offset p) {
   62:     const s = 12.0;
   63: 
   64:     final map = {
   65:       "tl": Rect.fromLTWH(b.x - s, b.y - s, s * 2, s * 2),
   66:       "tr": Rect.fromLTWH(b.x + b.width - s, b.y - s, s * 2, s * 2),
   67:       "bl": Rect.fromLTWH(b.x - s, b.y + b.height - s, s * 2, s * 2),
   68:       "br": Rect.fromLTWH(b.x + b.width - s, b.y + b.height - s, s * 2, s * 2),
   69:     };
   70: 
   71:     for (final e in map.entries) {
   72:       if (e.value.contains(p)) return e.key;
   73:     }
   74:     return null;
   75:   }
   76: 
   77:   // ---------------- SAFE ZOOM ----------------
   78:   void _onPointerSignal(PointerSignalEvent event) {
   79:     if (event is PointerScrollEvent) {
   80:       final dy = event.scrollDelta.dy;
   81: 
   82:       setState(() {
   83:         scale -= dy * 0.001;
   84:         scale = scale.clamp(0.5, 3.0);
   85:       });
   86:     }
   87:   }
   88: 
   89:   // ---------------- TAP ----------------
   90:   void _onTapDown(TapDownDetails d) {
   91:     final p = _world(d.localPosition);
   92:     final hit = _hit(p);
   93: 
   94:     setState(() {
   95:       if (hit == null) {
   96:         beds.add(
   97:           Bed(
   98:             id: DateTime.now().microsecondsSinceEpoch.toString(),
   99:             name: "Bed",
  100:             x: _snap(p.dx),
  101:             y: _snap(p.dy),
  102:             width: 140,
  103:             height: 80,
  104:             cropCount: 0,
  105:           ),
  106:         );
  107:       } else {
  108:         selected.contains(hit.id)
  109:             ? selected.remove(hit.id)
  110:             : selected.add(hit.id);
  111:       }
  112:     });
  113:   }
  114: 
  115:   // ---------------- SAFE DRAG START ----------------
  116:   void _onPanStart(DragStartDetails d) {
  117:     final p = _world(d.localPosition);
  118: 
  119:     dragging = null;
  120:     resizing = null;
  121:     resizeHandle = null;
  122: 
  123:     final hit = _hit(p);
  124:     if (hit == null) return;
  125: 
  126:     final h = _handleAt(hit, p);
  127: 
  128:     if (h != null) {
  129:       resizing = hit;
  130:       resizeHandle = h;
  131:       return;
  132:     }
  133: 
  134:     dragging = hit;
  135:   }
  136: 
  137:   // ---------------- SAFE DRAG UPDATE ----------------
  138:   void _onPanUpdate(DragUpdateDetails d) {
  139:     final Offset raw = d.delta;
  140: 
  141:     final double dx = (raw.dx.isFinite) ? raw.dx : 0.0;
  142:     final double dy = (raw.dy.isFinite) ? raw.dy : 0.0;
  143: 
  144:     final Offset delta = Offset(dx, dy) / scale;
  145: 
  146:     setState(() {
  147:       // CAMERA PAN
  148:       if (dragging == null && resizing == null && selected.isEmpty) {
  149:         offset += Offset(dx, dy);
  150:         return;
  151:       }
  152: 
  153:       // RESIZE
  154:       if (resizing != null && resizeHandle != null) {
  155:         final b = resizing!;
  156: 
  157:         switch (resizeHandle) {
  158:           case "br":
  159:             b.width = _snap(b.width + delta.dx);
  160:             b.height = _snap(b.height + delta.dy);
  161:             break;
  162: 
  163:           case "bl":
  164:             b.x = _snap(b.x + delta.dx);
  165:             b.width = _snap(b.width - delta.dx);
  166:             b.height = _snap(b.height + delta.dy);
  167:             break;
  168: 
  169:           case "tr":
  170:             b.y = _snap(b.y + delta.dy);
  171:             b.width = _snap(b.width + delta.dx);
  172:             b.height = _snap(b.height - delta.dy);
  173:             break;
  174: 
  175:           case "tl":
  176:             b.x = _snap(b.x + delta.dx);
  177:             b.y = _snap(b.y + delta.dy);
  178:             b.width = _snap(b.width - delta.dx);
  179:             b.height = _snap(b.height - delta.dy);
  180:             break;
  181:         }
  182: 
  183:         if (b.width < 40) b.width = 40;
  184:         if (b.height < 40) b.height = 40;
  185:         return;
  186:       }
  187: 
  188:       // MOVE
  189:       if (selected.isNotEmpty) {
  190:         for (final b in beds) {
  191:           if (selected.contains(b.id)) {
  192:             b.x = _snap(b.x + delta.dx);
  193:             b.y = _snap(b.y + delta.dy);
  194:           }
  195:         }
  196:       } else if (dragging != null) {
  197:         dragging!.x = _snap(dragging!.x + delta.dx);
  198:         dragging!.y = _snap(dragging!.y + delta.dy);
  199:       }
  200:     });
  201:   }
  202: 
  203:   void _onPanEnd(_) {
  204:     dragging = null;
  205:     resizing = null;
  206:     resizeHandle = null;
  207:   }
  208: 
  209:   // ---------------- UI ----------------
  210:   @override
  211:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  212:     final frame = List<Bed>.from(beds);
  213: 
  214:     return Scaffold(
  215:       appBar: AppBar(title: Text(widget.project.name)),
  216: 
  217:       body: SizedBox.expand(
  218:         child: Listener(
  219:           onPointerSignal: _onPointerSignal,
  220: 
  221:           child: GestureDetector(
  222:             onTapDown: _onTapDown,
  223:             onPanStart: _onPanStart,
  224:             onPanUpdate: _onPanUpdate,
  225:             onPanEnd: _onPanEnd,
  226: 
  227:             child: CustomPaint(
  228:               painter: _Painter(
  229:                 beds: frame,
  230:                 selected: Set<String>.from(selected),
  231:                 scale: scale,
  232:                 offset: offset,
  233:               ),
  234:               child: const SizedBox.expand(),
  235:             ),
  236:           ),
  237:         ),
  238:       ),
  239:     );
  240:   }
  241: }
  242: 
  243: class _Painter extends CustomPainter {
  244:   final List<Bed> beds;
  245:   final Set<String> selected;
  246:   final double scale;
  247:   final Offset offset;
  248: 
  249:   _Painter({
  250:     required this.beds,
  251:     required this.selected,
  252:     required this.scale,
  253:     required this.offset,
  254:   });
  255: 
  256:   @override
  257:   void paint(Canvas c, Size s) {
  258:     c.save();
  259:     c.translate(offset.dx, offset.dy);
  260:     c.scale(scale);
  261: 
  262:     final bg = Paint()..color = const Color(0xFFE8F5E2);
  263:     c.drawRect(Rect.fromLTWH(-5000, -5000, 10000, 10000), bg);
  264: 
  265:     final grid = Paint()
  266:       ..color = Colors.black.withValues(alpha: 0.05)
  267:       ..strokeWidth = 1;
  268: 
  269:     for (double x = -5000; x < 5000; x += 20) {
  270:       c.drawLine(Offset(x, -5000), Offset(x, 5000), grid);
  271:     }
  272: 
  273:     for (double y = -5000; y < 5000; y += 20) {
  274:       c.drawLine(Offset(-5000, y), Offset(5000, y), grid);
  275:     }
  276: 
  277:     final fill = Paint()..color = const Color(0xFF4CAF50);
  278: 
  279:     final border = Paint()
  280:       ..color = Colors.black
  281:       ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke;
  282: 
  283:     final selectedBorder = Paint()
  284:       ..color = Colors.orange
  285:       ..style = PaintingStyle.stroke
  286:       ..strokeWidth = 3;
  287: 
  288:     for (final b in beds) {
  289:       final r = Rect.fromLTWH(b.x, b.y, b.width, b.height);
  290: 
  291:       c.drawRect(r, fill);
  292:       c.drawRect(r, border);
  293: 
  294:       if (selected.contains(b.id)) {
  295:         c.drawRect(r.inflate(2), selectedBorder);
  296:       }
  297:     }
  298: 
  299:     c.restore();
  300:   }
  301: 
  302:   @override
  303:   bool shouldRepaint(covariant CustomPainter oldDelegate) => true;
  304: }

   22:         ),

   25:   }

   31:     );
   32:   }

   35:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
   36:     return Scaffold(
   37:       appBar: AppBar(title: const Text("My Gardens")),
   38:       body: ListView(

  450:                           ),
  451:                         ],
  452:                       ),
  453:                     ),

  481:   Widget _waterDemandBar(double value) {
  482:     final normalized = (value / 6.0).clamp(0.0, 1.0);
  483: 
  484:     return Container(
  485:       height: 8,
  486:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  487:         color: const Color(0xFFE7E2D9),

  489:       ),

  491:         alignment: Alignment.centerLeft,
  492:         child: FractionallySizedBox(
  493:           widthFactor: normalized,
  494:           child: Container(
  495:             decoration: BoxDecoration(
  496:               gradient: const LinearGradient(
  497:                 colors: [
  498:                   Color(0xFF238B55),
  499:                   Color(0xFFE0B43C),
  500:                   Color(0xFFE04444),
  501:                 ],
  502:               ),
  503:               borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(999),
  504:             ),
  505:           ),
  506:         ),
  507:       ),
  508:     );
  509:   }

  623: 
  624:   Widget _careRow(_Seedling seedling) {
  625:     final needsWater = seedling.needsWater;
  626:     final needsFeed = seedling.needsFeed;
  627: 
  628:     return Container(
  629:       padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(14, 10, 14, 10),
  630:       decoration: const BoxDecoration(
  631:         border: Border(top: BorderSide(color: Color(0xFFE6DCCE))),
  632:       ),
  633:       child: Row(
  634:         children: [
  635:           Expanded(
  636:             child: Text(
  637:               '${_emojiForCrop(seedling.crop)} ${seedling.crop} Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â· ${seedling.bed}',
  638:               style: const TextStyle(
  639:                 color: Color(0xFF2A241E),
  640:                 fontSize: 13,
  641:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  642:               ),
  643:             ),
  644:           ),
  645:           if (needsWater)
  646:             OutlinedButton.icon(
  647:               onPressed: () => _waterNow(seedling),
  648:               icon: const Icon(Icons.water_drop, size: 15),
  649:               label: const Text('Water now'),
  650:             ),
  651:           if (needsWater && needsFeed) const SizedBox(width: 8),
  652:           if (needsFeed)
  653:             OutlinedButton.icon(
  654:               onPressed: () => _feedNow(seedling),
  655:               icon: const Icon(Icons.spa, size: 15),
  656:               label: const Text('Feed now'),
  657:             ),
  658:         ],
  659:       ),
  660:     );
  661:   }
  662: 
  663:   Widget _summaryCards() {
  664:     final active = seedlings.where((s) => !s.transplanted).length;
  665:     final germinating = seedlings
  666:         .where((s) => s.stage == _SeedlingStage.germinating)
  667:         .length;
  668:     final growing = seedlings
  669:         .where((s) => s.stage == _SeedlingStage.growing)
  670:         .length;
  671:     final ready = seedlings
  672:         .where((s) => s.stage == _SeedlingStage.ready)
  673:         .length;
  674: 
  675:     final cards = [
  676:       _SummaryCard(
  677:         label: 'ACTIVE SEEDLINGS',
  678:         value: active,
  679:         sub: 'currently being grown',
  680:       ),
  681:       _SummaryCard(
  682:         label: 'GERMINATING',
  683:         value: germinating,
  684:         sub: 'waiting to sprout',
  685:       ),
  686:       _SummaryCard(
  687:         label: 'GROWING ON',
  688:         value: growing,
  689:         sub: 'developing in trays',
  690:       ),
  691:       _SummaryCard(label: 'READY TO TRANSPLANT', value: ready, sub: 'none yet'),
  692:     ];
  693: 
  694:     return Padding(
  695:       padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 14, 16, 0),
  696:       child: LayoutBuilder(
  697:         builder: (context, constraints) {
  698:           if (constraints.maxWidth < 720) {
  699:             return GridView.count(
  700:               crossAxisCount: 2,
  701:               shrinkWrap: true,
  702:               physics: const NeverScrollableScrollPhysics(),
  703:               crossAxisSpacing: 10,
  704:               mainAxisSpacing: 10,
  705:               childAspectRatio: 1.9,
  706:               children: cards,
  707:             );
  708:           }
  709: 
  710:           return Row(
  711:             children: [
  712:               for (var i = 0; i < cards.length; i++) ...[
  713:                 Expanded(child: cards[i]),
  714:                 if (i != cards.length - 1) const SizedBox(width: 10),
  715:               ],
  716:             ],
  717:           );
  718:         },
  719:       ),
  720:     );
  721:   }
  722: 
  723:   Widget _filters() {
  724:     final types = ['All types', ...seedlings.map((s) => s.type).toSet()];
  725:     final stages = ['All stages', ..._SeedlingStage.values.map(_stageLabel)];
  726: 
  727:     return Padding(
  728:       padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 14, 16, 0),
  729:       child: Wrap(
  730:         spacing: 8,
  731:         runSpacing: 8,
  732:         crossAxisAlignment: WrapCrossAlignment.center,
  733:         children: [
  734:           SizedBox(
  735:             width: 190,
  736:             child: DropdownButtonFormField<String>(
  737:               initialValue: stageFilter,
  738:               decoration: _inputDecoration(),
  739:               items: stages
  740:                   .map(
  741:                     (stage) =>
  742:                         DropdownMenuItem(value: stage, child: Text(stage)),
  743:                   )
  744:                   .toList(),
  745:               onChanged: (value) =>
  746:                   setState(() => stageFilter = value ?? 'All stages'),
  747:             ),
  748:           ),
  749:           SizedBox(
  750:             width: 170,
  751:             child: DropdownButtonFormField<String>(
  752:               initialValue: typeFilter,
  753:               decoration: _inputDecoration(),
  754:               items: types
  755:                   .map(
  756:                     (type) => DropdownMenuItem(value: type, child: Text(type)),
  757:                   )
  758:                   .toList(),
  759:               onChanged: (value) =>
  760:                   setState(() => typeFilter = value ?? 'All types'),
  761:             ),
  762:           ),
  763:           FilterChip(
  764:             selected: showTransplanted,
  765:             onSelected: (value) => setState(() => showTransplanted = value),
  766:             label: const Text('Show transplanted'),
  767:           ),
  768:         ],
  769:       ),
  770:     );
  771:   }
  772: 
  773:   Widget _seedlingCard(_Seedling seedling) {
  774:     return Container(
  775:       padding: const EdgeInsets.all(14),
  776:       decoration: BoxDecoration(
  777:         color: const Color(0xFFFCFAF6),
  778:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(14),
  779:         border: Border.all(color: const Color(0xFFD8CDBE)),
  780:       ),
  781:       child: Row(
  782:         children: [
  783:           Text(
  784:             _emojiForCrop(seedling.crop),
  785:             style: const TextStyle(fontSize: 28),
  786:           ),
  787:           const SizedBox(width: 12),
  788:           Expanded(
  789:             child: Text(
  790:               '${seedling.crop} Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â· ${seedling.bed}\n${_stageLabel(seedling.stage)} Ãƒâ€šÃ‚Â· sown ${_shortDate(seedling.sownDate)}',
  791:               style: const TextStyle(
  792:                 color: Color(0xFF2A241E),
  793:                 fontSize: 13,
  794:                 fontWeight: FontWeight.w800,
  795:               ),
  796:             ),
  797:           ),
  798:           PopupMenuButton<String>(
  799:             onSelected: (action) {
  800:               if (action == 'water') _waterNow(seedling);
  801:               if (action == 'feed') _feedNow(seedling);
  802:               if (action == 'transplant') _markTransplanted(seedling);
  803:               if (action == 'delete') _deleteSeedling(seedling);
  804:             },
  805:             itemBuilder: (context) => const [
  806:               PopupMenuItem(value: 'water', child: Text('Water now')),
  807:               PopupMenuItem(value: 'feed', child: Text('Feed now')),
  808:               PopupMenuItem(
  809:                 value: 'transplant',
  810:                 child: Text('Mark transplanted'),
  811:               ),
  812:               PopupMenuItem(value: 'delete', child: Text('Delete')),
  813:             ],
  814:           ),
  815:         ],
  816:       ),
  817:     );
  818:   }
  819: 
  820:   InputDecoration _inputDecoration() {
  821:     return InputDecoration(
  822:       filled: true,
  823:       fillColor: const Color(0xFFFCFAF6),
  824:       contentPadding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 12, vertical: 10),
  825:       border: OutlineInputBorder(
  826:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
  827:         borderSide: const BorderSide(color: Color(0xFFD8CDBE)),
  828:       ),
  829:       enabledBorder: OutlineInputBorder(
  830:         borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
  831:         borderSide: const BorderSide(color: Color(0xFFD8CDBE)),
  832:       ),
  833:     );
  834:   }
  835: 
  836:   void _showSowSeedSheet() {
  837:     final cropController = TextEditingController();
  838:     final bedController = TextEditingController(text: 'Standard Bed 1');
  839:     String type = 'Vegetable';
  840:     _SeedlingStage stage = _SeedlingStage.germinating;
  841: 
  842:     showModalBottomSheet<void>(
  843:       context: context,
  844:       isScrollControlled: true,
  845:       showDragHandle: true,
  846:       builder: (sheetContext) {
  847:         return StatefulBuilder(
  848:           builder: (context, setSheetState) {
  849:             return Padding(
  850:               padding: EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(
  851:                 16,
  852:                 8,
  853:                 16,
  854:                 MediaQuery.of(context).viewInsets.bottom + 16,
  855:               ),
  856:               child: Column(
  857:                 mainAxisSize: MainAxisSize.min,
  858:                 children: [
  859:                   const Align(
  860:                     alignment: Alignment.centerLeft,
  861:                     child: Text(
  862:                       'Sow seed',
  863:                       style: TextStyle(
  864:                         fontSize: 20,
  865:                         fontWeight: FontWeight.w900,
  866:                       ),
  867:                     ),
  868:                   ),
  869:                   const SizedBox(height: 12),
  870:                   TextField(
  871:                     controller: cropController,
  872:                     decoration: const InputDecoration(
  873:                       labelText: 'Crop name',
  874:                       border: OutlineInputBorder(),
  875:                     ),
  876:                   ),
  877:                   const SizedBox(height: 10),
  878:                   TextField(
  879:                     controller: bedController,
  880:                     decoration: const InputDecoration(
  881:                       labelText: 'Bed / tray',
  882:                       border: OutlineInputBorder(),
  883:                     ),
  884:                   ),
  885:                   const SizedBox(height: 10),
  886:                   DropdownButtonFormField<String>(
  887:                     initialValue: type,
  888:                     decoration: const InputDecoration(
  889:                       labelText: 'Type',
  890:                       border: OutlineInputBorder(),
  891:                     ),
  892:                     items: const [
  893:                       DropdownMenuItem(
  894:                         value: 'Vegetable',
  895:                         child: Text('Vegetable'),
  896:                       ),
  897:                       DropdownMenuItem(value: 'Herb', child: Text('Herb')),
  898:                       DropdownMenuItem(value: 'Flower', child: Text('Flower')),
  899:                       DropdownMenuItem(value: 'Fruit', child: Text('Fruit')),
  900:                       DropdownMenuItem(
  901:                         value: 'Brassica',
  902:                         child: Text('Brassica'),
  903:                       ),
  904:                     ],
  905:                     onChanged: (value) {
  906:                       setSheetState(() => type = value ?? 'Vegetable');
  907:                     },
  908:                   ),
  909:                   const SizedBox(height: 10),
  910:                   DropdownButtonFormField<_SeedlingStage>(
  911:                     initialValue: stage,
  912:                     decoration: const InputDecoration(
  913:                       labelText: 'Stage',
  914:                       border: OutlineInputBorder(),
  915:                     ),
  916:                     items: _SeedlingStage.values
  917:                         .map(
  918:                           (item) => DropdownMenuItem(
  919:                             value: item,
  920:                             child: Text(_stageLabel(item)),
  921:                           ),
  922:                         )
  923:                         .toList(),
  924:                     onChanged: (value) {
  925:                       setSheetState(
  926:                         () => stage = value ?? _SeedlingStage.germinating,
  927:                       );
  928:                     },
  929:                   ),
  930:                   const SizedBox(height: 14),
  931:                   SizedBox(
  932:                     width: double.infinity,
  933:                     height: 48,
  934:                     child: FilledButton.icon(
  935:                       onPressed: () {
  936:                         final crop = cropController.text.trim();
  937:                         if (crop.isEmpty) return;
  938: 
  939:                         setState(() {
  940:                           seedlings.add(
  941:                             _Seedling(
  942:                               crop: crop,
  943:                               type: type,
  944:                               bed: bedController.text.trim().isEmpty
  945:                                   ? 'Unassigned'
  946:                                   : bedController.text.trim(),
  947:                               stage: stage,
  948:                               sownDate: DateTime.now(),
  949:                               lastWatered: DateTime.now(),
  950:                               lastFed: DateTime.now(),
  951:                             ),
  952:                           );
  953:                         });
  954: 
  955:                         Navigator.of(sheetContext).maybePop();
  956:                       },
  957:                       icon: const Icon(Icons.add),
  958:                       label: const Text('Add seedling'),
  959:                     ),
  960:                   ),
  961:                 ],
  962:               ),
  963:             );
  964:           },
  965:         );
  966:       },
  967:     );
  968:   }
  969: 
  970:   void _showRemindersSheet() {
  971:     final reminders = seedlings.where((s) => s.isOverdue).toList();
  972: 
  973:     showModalBottomSheet<void>(
  974:       context: context,
  975:       showDragHandle: true,
  976:       builder: (context) {
  977:         return ListView(
  978:           padding: const EdgeInsets.fromLTRB(16, 8, 16, 24),
  979:           children: [
  980:             const Text(
  981:               'Reminders',
  982:               style: TextStyle(fontSize: 20, fontWeight: FontWeight.w900),
  983:             ),
  984:             const SizedBox(height: 12),
  985:             if (reminders.isEmpty)
  986:               const Text('No reminders due.')
  987:             else
  988:               ...reminders.map(
  989:                 (seedling) => ListTile(
  990:                   leading: Text(_emojiForCrop(seedling.crop)),
  991:                   title: Text(seedling.crop),
  992:                   subtitle: Text(
  993:                     seedling.needsWater ? 'Water due' : 'Feed due',
  994:                   ),
  995:                   trailing: TextButton(
  996:                     onPressed: () {
  997:                       seedling.needsWater
  998:                           ? _waterNow(seedling)
  999:                           : _feedNow(seedling);
 1000:                       Navigator.of(context).maybePop();
 1001:                     },
 1002:                     child: Text(seedling.needsWater ? 'Water' : 'Feed'),
 1003:                   ),
 1004:                 ),
 1005:               ),
 1006:           ],
 1007:         );
 1008:       },
 1009:     );
 1010:   }
 1011: 
 1012:   List<_Seedling> _filteredSeedlings() {
 1013:     return seedlings.where((seedling) {
 1014:       final stageMatch =
 1015:           stageFilter == 'All stages' ||
 1016:           _stageLabel(seedling.stage) == stageFilter;
 1017:       final typeMatch =
 1018:           typeFilter == 'All types' || seedling.type == typeFilter;
 1019:       final transplantMatch = showTransplanted || !seedling.transplanted;
 1020:       return stageMatch && typeMatch && transplantMatch;
 1021:     }).toList();
 1022:   }
 1023: 
 1024:   void _waterNow(_Seedling seedling) {
 1025:     setState(() {
 1026:       seedling.lastWatered = DateTime.now();
 1027:     });
 1028:   }
 1029: 
 1030:   void _feedNow(_Seedling seedling) {
 1031:     setState(() {
 1032:       seedling.lastFed = DateTime.now();
 1033:     });
 1034:   }
 1035: 
 1036:   void _markTransplanted(_Seedling seedling) {
 1037:     setState(() {
 1038:       seedling.transplanted = true;
 1039:       seedling.stage = _SeedlingStage.transplanted;
 1040:     });
 1041:   }
 1042: 
 1043:   void _deleteSeedling(_Seedling seedling) {
 1044:     setState(() {
 1045:       seedlings.remove(seedling);
 1046:     });
 1047:   }
 1048: 
 1049:   static String _stageLabel(_SeedlingStage stage) {
 1050:     switch (stage) {
 1051:       case _SeedlingStage.germinating:
 1052:         return 'Germinating';
 1053:       case _SeedlingStage.growing:
 1054:         return 'Growing on';
 1055:       case _SeedlingStage.ready:
 1056:         return 'Ready to transplant';
 1057:       case _SeedlingStage.transplanted:
 1058:         return 'Transplanted';
 1059:     }
 1060:   }
 1061: 
 1062:   static String _shortDate(DateTime date) {
 1063:     return '${date.day}/${date.month}/${date.year}';
 1064:   }
 1065: 
 1066:   static String _emojiForCrop(String cropName) {
 1067:     final crop = cropName.toLowerCase();
 1068: 
 1069:     if (crop.contains('strawberry')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚ÂÃ¢â‚¬Å“';
 1070:     if (crop.contains('raspberry') || crop.contains('blackberry')) {
 1071:       return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚ÂÃ¢â‚¬Â¡';
 1072:     }
 1073:     if (crop.contains('blueberry')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â«Ã‚Â';
 1074:     if (crop.contains('broccoli')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã‚Â¦';
 1075:     if (crop.contains('basil') || crop.contains('herb')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã…â€™Ã‚Â¿';
 1076:     if (crop.contains('tomato')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚ÂÃ¢â‚¬Â¦';
 1077:     if (crop.contains('carrot')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã¢â‚¬Â¢';
 1078:     if (crop.contains('lettuce') || crop.contains('kale')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã‚Â¬';
 1079:     if (crop.contains('onion')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â§Ã¢â‚¬Â¦';
 1080:     if (crop.contains('garlic')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â§Ã¢â‚¬Å¾';
 1081:     if (crop.contains('potato')) return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã‚Â¥Ã¢â‚¬Â';
 1082:     return 'ÃƒÂ°Ã…Â¸Ã…â€™Ã‚Â±';
 1083:   }
 1084: }

 1086: class _Seedling {
 1087:   _Seedling({
 1088:     required this.crop,
 1089:     required this.type,
 1090:     required this.bed,
 1091:     required this.stage,
 1092:     required this.sownDate,
 1093:     required this.lastWatered,
 1094:     required this.lastFed,
 1095:   });
 1096: 
 1097:   final String crop;
 1098:   final String type;
 1099:   final String bed;
 1100:   _SeedlingStage stage;
 1101:   DateTime sownDate;
 1102:   DateTime lastWatered;
 1103:   DateTime lastFed;
 1104:   bool transplanted;
 1105: 
 1106:   bool get needsWater => DateTime.now().difference(lastWatered).inDays >= 2;
 1107:   bool get needsFeed => DateTime.now().difference(lastFed).inDays >= 7;
 1108:   bool get isOverdue => needsWater || needsFeed;
 1109: }
 1110: 
 1111: enum _SeedlingStage { germinating, growing, ready, transplanted }

DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\services\project_service.dart
============================================================

    1: import 'dart:convert';
    2: 
    3: import 'package:shared_preferences/shared_preferences.dart';
    4: 
    5: import '../../../core/models/garden_project.dart';
    6: 
    7: class ProjectStorageService {
    8:   static const String _currentProjectKey = 'garden_planner.current_project';
    9: 
   10:   Future<void> saveProject(GardenProject project) async {
   11:     final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
   12: 
   13:     await prefs.setString(_currentProjectKey, jsonEncode(project.toJson()));
   14:   }
   15: 
   16:   Future<GardenProject?> loadProject() async {
   17:     final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
   18:     final rawJson = prefs.getString(_currentProjectKey);
   19: 
   20:     if (rawJson == null || rawJson.trim().isEmpty) {
   21:       return null;
   22:     }
   23: 
   24:     final decoded = jsonDecode(rawJson);
   25: 
   26:     if (decoded is! Map<String, dynamic>) {
   27:       throw const FormatException('Saved project JSON must be an object.');
   28:     }
   29: 
   30:     return GardenProject.fromJson(decoded);
   31:   }
   32: 
   33:   Future<void> clearProject() async {
   34:     final prefs = await SharedPreferences.getInstance();
   35: 
   36:     await prefs.remove(_currentProjectKey);
   37:   }
   38: }

============================================================
DART FILE: C:\Users\Danie\garden_planner\lib\utils\command_history.dart
============================================================

    1: import '../models/bed.dart';
    2: 
    3: class CommandHistory {
    4:   static const int _maxDepth = 50;
    5: 
    6:   final List<List<Bed>> _past = [];
    7:   final List<List<Bed>> _future = [];
    8: 
    9:   bool get canUndo => _past.isNotEmpty;
   10:   bool get canRedo => _future.isNotEmpty;
   11: 
   12:   List<Bed> _clone(List<Bed> beds) => beds
   13:       .map(
   14:         (b) => Bed(
   15:           id: b.id,
   16:           name: b.name,
   17:           x: b.x,
   18:           y: b.y,
   19:           width: b.width,
   20:           height: b.height,
   21:           cropCount: b.cropCount,
   22:         ),
   23:       )
   24:       .toList();
   25: 
   26:   void push(List<Bed> current) {
   27:     _past.add(_clone(current));
   28:     if (_past.length > _maxDepth) _past.removeAt(0);
   29:     _future.clear();
   30:   }
   31: 
   32:   List<Bed>? undo(List<Bed> current) {
   33:     if (!canUndo) return null;
   34:     _future.add(_clone(current));
   35:     return _clone(_past.removeLast());
   36:   }
   37: 
   38:   List<Bed>? redo(List<Bed> current) {
   39:     if (!canRedo) return null;
   40:     _past.add(_clone(current));
   41:     return _clone(_future.removeLast());
   42:   }
   43: }

    7: 
    8:   const AppShell({super.key, required this.child, required this.currentRoute});
    9: 
   10:   void _go(BuildContext context, String route) {
   11:     if (route == currentRoute) return;
   12: 
   13:     Navigator.pushReplacementNamed(context, route);
   14:   }
   15: 
   16:   @override

  281: class _SectionTitle extends StatelessWidget {

  283: 
  284:   final String text;
  285: 
  286:   @override
  287:   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
  288:     return Text(
